title: Cache Merging as a Convergent Replicated State for Multi-Agent Latent Reasoning
summary: Multi-agent latent reasoning composes agents' KV-caches into one context for a final agent. Prior work (Agent Primitives) does this by concatenating caches along the sequence axis with RoPE re-encoding, which we call BagMerge. BagMerge is non-commutative, and the best input ordering is unpredictable, shifting with the regime, the latent-step budget, and the model scale. We make this exchange a convergent replicated state. First, CanonicalMerge fixes the layout by content: ordering caches by mean K-norm at a middle layer renders the merged cache byte-identical under any input permutation, verified algorithmically (arity N<=5) and bit-for-bit on real Qwen3-1.7B and 4B state. Second, we separate the replicated state from decode-time layout: the state is a set of content-addressed latent fragments whose merge is set union, a state-based CvRDT (commutative, associative, idempotent, absorbing), and CanonicalMerge is its deterministic render. Because the render is byte-equivalent, every N=2 accuracy number carries over unchanged and re-delivered duplicates are absorbed rather than re-concatenated. On a partitioned-reasoning benchmark, CanonicalMerge matches the best BagMerge ordering in every regime-by-budget-by-ordering cell without knowing which order is best, trading a small, statistically insignificant accuracy margin for an unconditional structural guarantee. The behaviour transfers to real multi-document QA (HotpotQA), while the closest training-free output-fusion baseline (PackLLM) loses by 45 points at matched budget, placing cache-level merging in a regime distinct from output-level fusion. Finally, at k>2 the approach transports and colocates latent traces but does not by itself compose them, which we characterize to motivate future work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CanonicalMerge方法，通过按中间层平均K-norm排序缓存来固定KV-cache合并布局，使合并后的缓存字节等价，与输入顺序无关。该方法将缓存合并转换为状态基CvRDT（可交换、可结合、幂等、吸收），在多智能体潜在推理中实现了稳定的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有BagMerge方法存在非交换性问题，最佳输入顺序不可预测，随推理模式、预算和模型规模变化。需要一种对输入排列不敏感的确定性缓存合并方法。
AI.method: 1) CanonicalMerge：按中间层平均K-norm对缓存排序确定布局；2) 将状态与解码时布局分离，状态为内容寻址的潜在片段集合，合并为集合并集（状态基CvRDT）；3) CanonicalMerge作为确定性渲染器。
AI.result: 在分区推理基准上，CanonicalMerge在所有配置下匹配最佳BagMerge排序；HotpotQA上显著优于PackLLM（45分差距）；N=2准确率可转移到N>2；验证了Qwen3-1.7B和4B状态下的字节等价性。
AI.conclusion: 缓存级合并与输出级融合属不同机制。CanonicalMerge以微小统计不显著精度损失换取无条件结构保证。未来工作需解决k>2时潜在轨迹的组合问题。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM cache merging and multi-agent reasoning systems (KV-cache management, state-based CvRDTs), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. It has no connection to 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), visual language models for quality supervision, or 2D-to-3D feature extraction. The application domain is entirely different - this is computational infrastructure for LLMs, not graphics or motion synthesis.

title: Simulation Based Reward Function Validation for Multi-Agent On Orbit Inspection
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures. This submission integrates a published correction made to the original manuscript. The DOIs for both the original manuscript as well as the correction are provided
summary: A proposed method for the control of groups of inspection spacecraft is Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL). While MARL has already been employed for this purpose in previous work, the reward functions used focus on reaching a finite set of predetermined inspection points around the target. In this work, we study and develop a generalized reward function for the MARL inspection task informed by the analysis of 3D reconstructions of inspected objects in orbit. Because the reward function is generalized such that any number of images at arbitrary locations may evaluated, we also allow trained agents to have complete control over when images are collected. With this approach, we gather insights into best practices for not only the specific MARL inspection task, but also gain key takeaways informative to the broader inspection task outside of a MARL context.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种用于多智能体强化学习(MARL)航天器检查任务的广义奖励函数，该函数基于3D重建分析，允许智能体完全控制图像采集的时机和位置。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL检查任务的奖励函数仅关注到达有限数量的预定检查点，缺乏灵活性和泛化能力。需要开发一种能够评估任意位置和数量的图像的广义奖励函数。
AI.method: 提出一种基于3D重建分析的广义奖励函数，允许任意数量的图像在任意位置进行评估，使训练后的智能体能够完全控制图像采集时机。
AI.result: 通过该方法获得了关于MARL检查任务最佳实践的见解，并对非MARL上下文下的更广泛检查任务提供了关键参考。
AI.conclusion: 该广义奖励函数方法不仅适用于特定的MARL检查任务，还为更广泛的航天器检查任务提供了有价值的指导。

title: Congestion-Based Slot Pricing in a Railway Auction Game
summary:
We present a multi-agent system for studying the allocation of discrete, congested resources among heterogeneous strategic agents, motivated by the problem of railway slot allocation under deregulation. Multiple operator-agents, differing in size and capacity, interact through a shared auction mechanism over repeated rounds under time-constrained decision-making. The mechanism combines a congestion-based base price that increases with aggregate demand with an asymmetric corrective adjustment that penalises the agent requesting the most slots and rewards the agent requesting the fewest, and is designed to mitigate strategic dominance by large agents while preserving transparency and congestion sensitivity. We formulate the interaction as a repeated game with incomplete information and implement the system as a real-time, web-based multi-agent environment in which human participants control individual agents and observe live marginal-cost and competitor feedback.
  We report exploratory observations from two structured sessions with domain experts acting as operator-agents. The congestion mechanism responds to aggregate demand as designed and the corrective incentives are actively triggered, but agents representing large operators persist with high-request strategies despite the penalty, suggesting that corrective pricing is necessary but not sufficient to neutralise strategic dominance in this multi-agent setting. A post-session debrief indicates that participants' decisions were driven by the assumed agent role rather than personal disposition, and provides qualitative support for strategic motives, such as preserving market presence and raising rivals' costs, operating alongside short-term profit maximisation. We discuss implications for multi-agent mechanism design under asymmetric budgets and outline directions for analytical validation and larger-scale multi-agent experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个多智能体系统，用于研究离散拥挤资源在异质战略智能体间的分配问题，动机来源于铁路时隙分配在放松管制下的场景。系统结合了基于拥挤的基价和非对称校正调整机制，旨在减轻大型智能体的战略主导地位。
AI.motivation: 研究动机源于铁路时隙分配在放松管制后的问题。多个不同规模和能力的运营商智能体在时间约束下通过共享拍卖机制进行多轮交互，需要设计机制来缓解大型智能体的战略主导地位，同时保持透明度和拥挤敏感性。
AI.method: 将交互建模为不完全信息重复游戏，并实现为实时基于网络的多智能体环境。机制结合了：1）随总需求增加的拥挤基价；2）惩罚请求最多Slots智能体、奖励请求最少智能体的非对称校正调整。
AI.result: 实验结果表明：拥挤机制按设计响应总需求，校正激励被触发，但代表大型运营商的智能体仍坚持高请求策略，表明校正定价是必要但不足以中和战略主导地位。参与者决策受假设角色驱动，战略动机如保持市场存在和抬高竞争对手成本与短期利润最大化并存。
AI.conclusion: 校正定价对缓解大型智能体战略主导是必要但不充分的。多智能体机制设计需考虑非对称预算问题，需要进一步分析验证和更大规模的多智能体实验。

title: On Reconstructing a Convex Polygon from Partial Information
summary: The reconstruction problem asks to construct a (convex) polygon that has a specified set of features, such as an ordered set of edge-lengths or an ordered set of polygon-angles. In this paper, we do a systematic exploration of the reconstruction problem in all scenarios where one or two sets of features have been specified. Some of these scenarios were well-studied already, for some we develop testing-algorithms and/or hardness results, and many give rise to interesting open problems for future study.

AI.tldr: 研究凸多边形重建问题，系统探索指定一组或两组特征（如边长、角度）时的重建问题，开发了部分场景的测试算法和硬度结果，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 凸多边形重建问题是计算几何中的基础问题，需要研究在不同特征组合指定情况下的可解性和复杂度。
AI.method: 系统性地分类讨论，对不同特征组合场景分别进行分析，开发测试算法或证明问题硬度。
AI.result: 部分场景已有充分研究，部分场景获得测试算法或硬度结果，许多场景仍为开放问题。
AI.conclusion: 为凸多边形重建问题提供了全面的研究框架，指出了未来研究的有趣方向。

title: CausalSteward: An Agentic Divide-Conquer-Combine Copilot for Causal Discovery
summary: Learning causal models from high-dimensional data is a significant challenge, particularly in real-world settings where violations of core assumptions lead to causal identifiability issues. Although massive amounts of prior knowledge are available, and contain valuable causal information, effectively integrating this knowledge into the causal discovery process remains an open problem. We introduce CausalSTeward (CAST), a novel human-in-the-loop framework for interactively assembling large causal models. CausalSteward is a multi-agent collaborative system that tackles high-dimensional causality through a divide-and-conquer approach where large clusters of variables are iteratively partitioned and then separately analyzed. Our framework fuses prior knowledge with a data-driven approach by using tailored tools such as retrieval augmented generation and conditional independence tests. Finally, we use this work to examine the capabilities and limitations of causal reasoning in multi-agent frameworks, and how the human-in-the-loop can contribute to accurate and trustworthy results.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CausalSTeward (CAST)，一个用于交互式组装大型因果模型的人类在环框架。该框架通过多智能体协作系统，采用分而治之的方法处理高维因果关系，并将先验知识与数据驱动方法相结合。
AI.motivation: 高维数据中学习因果模型面临重大挑战，特别是在核心假设被违反导致因果可识别性问题的情况下。虽然存在大量包含有价值因果信息的先验知识，但有效整合这些知识到因果发现过程中仍然是一个开放性问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种人类在环的多智能体协作框架，使用分而治之方法迭代划分大型变量集群，分别进行分析。框架结合了检索增强生成和条件独立性检验等定制工具，将先验知识与数据驱动方法相融合。
AI.result: 该框架能够处理高维因果关系问题，通过人类在环机制提高结果的准确性和可信度。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为高维因果发现提供了一种新的解决思路，展示了多智能体框架中因果推理的能力和局限性，并验证了人类在环对确保准确可信结果的重要贡献。

This is a machine learning/causal inference paper in an entirely different research domain.

title: PACE: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Plausible and Actionable Counterfactual Explanations
summary: Counterfactual explanations explain machine learning predictions by identifying minimal input changes that would alter a model's decision. Although many existing methods successfully generate prediction-changing alternatives, they often produce unrealistic or infeasible recommendations due to a lack of explicit mechanisms for incorporating domain knowledge and intervention constraints. Neuro-symbolic AI offers a promising direction by combining data-driven predictive models with symbolic reasoning capable of representing human-understandable rules and feasible actions. This paper presents PACE, a modular neuro-symbolic framework for generating feasibility-aware counterfactual explanations. The framework separates prediction and reasoning into two components: a neural predictive model for classification and a symbolic reasoning layer that enforces domain-specific constraints during counterfactual generation. By explicitly modeling feasible interventions, the framework produces explanations consistent with domain knowledge while remaining interpretable and actionable. The approach is model-agnostic and adaptable to domains requiring realistic decision support. A case study is conducted on the Adult Income dataset, combining a multilayer perceptron classifier with Answer Set Programming (ASP) rules encoding feasible modifications to education, occupation, and working hours while preserving immutable attributes. Results highlight the trade-off between counterfactual validity and plausibility and show that symbolic constraints yield explanations that better satisfy domain-specific feasibility requirements, illustrating the potential of neuro-symbolic methods for transparent, feasibility-aware counterfactual explanation in explainable AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PACE，一个神经符号框架，用于生成可行性感知的反事实解释。该框架将预测和推理分离，通过神经网络分类器结合Answer Set Programming (ASP)规则来编码领域特定的约束条件，生成符合域知识且可操作的解释。
AI.motivation: 现有的反事实解释方法往往产生不切实际或不可行的建议，因为缺乏明确机制来结合领域知识和干预约束。需要一种方法能够生成既真实又符合领域知识的反事实解释。
AI.method: PACE框架采用模型无关的神经符号架构：1) 使用神经网络分类器进行预测；2) 使用ASP规则编码领域特定的可行性约束；3) 在反事实生成过程中强制执行这些约束。在Adult Income数据集上使用MLP分类器，并设置教育、职业、工作时长等可修改属性以及不可变属性的约束。
AI.result: 实验表明：1) 反事实有效性与合理性之间存在权衡；2) 符号约束能够生成更好满足领域可行性要求的解释；3) 该方法在需要现实决策支持的领域具有潜力。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号方法为可解释AI中的透明、可行性感知反factual解释提供了有前景的方向。该框架是模型无关的，可适应不同领域，展示了结合数据驱动预测与符号推理在生成更真实、可解释反事实解释方面的潜力。

title: AgentsCAD: Automated Design for Manufacturing of FDM Parts via Multi-Agent LLM Reasoning and Geometric Feature Recognition
summary: Parts manufactured with Fused Deposition Modeling (FDM) often require Design for Additive Manufacturing (DFAM) modifications to ensure printability, structural integrity, and reduced post-processing. Current slicers identify defects such as steep overhangs but are unable to modify the underlying geometry. This work presents AgentsCAD, a multi-agent system that bridges raw boundary-representation (B-Rep) geometry and Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning to automate targeted DFM. The workflow begins by parsing a STEP file. The agentic system detects overhangs above a 45°threshold, constructs a face-adjacency topology graph, and optionally injects semantic feature labels from a GraphSAGE model trained on MFCAD++ (59,665 parts), before dispatching a Claude Sonnet design-reasoning agent that recommends reorientations, fillets, chamfers, and similar modifications. A GPT-4o vision-language verifier inspects rendered views to confirm geometric integrity. Outputs include a modified STEP file and a human-readable report. A test case on a birdhouse model demonstrates that the system correctly diagnoses overhangs, selects appropriate defect mitigation strategies, and proposes physically valid corrections, partially solving the geometry-to-language translation problem central to LLM-driven CAD modification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AgentsCAD，一个多智能体系统，结合边界表示（B-Rep）几何与大语言模型（LLM）推理，实现F DM 3D打印的自动化设计增材制造（DFAM）修改。
AI.motivation: 当前切片软件能够识别缺陷但无法修改几何形状，需要自动化DFAM修改以确保可打印性、结构完整性和减少后处理工作。
AI.method: 系统解析STEP文件，检测超过45°的悬垂结构，构建面邻接拓扑图，使用GraphSAGE模型进行语义特征标注，调用Claude Sonnet进行设计推理，GPT-4o进行视觉语言验证。
AI.result: 在鸟屋模型上测试验证，系统正确诊断悬垂问题，选择适当的缺陷缓解策略，并提出物理有效的修正方案。
AI.conclusion: 部分解决了LLM驱动CAD修改中几何到语言翻译的核心问题，输出修改后的STEP文件和人类可读报告。

relevance_reason: This paper is about CAD design for additive manufacturing (3D printing), focusing on detecting overhang defects and automating design modifications for printability. The research profile is about video-to-3D human motion synthesis, using VLMs and video generation models. These are completely different application domains within computer graphics - one deals with manufacturing/CAD, the other deals with animation and motion generation. title: Auto-FL-Research: Agentic Search for Federated Learning Algorithms
summary: Federated learning (FL) research often depends on many small but consequential algorithmic choices: optimizer variants, server aggregation rules, local training schedules, normalization, regularization, and model architecture. These choices are expensive to explore manually and difficult to compare fairly when candidate changes can also alter the FL training or evaluation path. In this work, we present Auto-FL-Research (AFR), a constrained coding-agent workflow for FL algorithmic recipe search. Agents may propose and implement candidate training algorithms, including server aggregation rules, client update schedules, local objectives, and registered model variants, while task profiles fix the mutation surface, compute budget, communication contract, and final model evaluation. Each campaign records candidate scores, runtime, edited files, artifacts, and failure status. We evaluate AFR on five healthcare cross-silo FLamby tasks and on grouped-client profiles for the five fixed LEAF datasets plus the LEAF synthetic task. Five-seed repeat evaluations support gains on four FLamby tasks and five of six LEAF profiles, while also exposing seed-sensitive and search-selected failure cases. Same-budget controls show that several gains correspond to FL-recipe changes, whereas other improvements are recovered by fixed-surface scalar controls or fail under repeat or held-out evaluation. These mixed outcomes are part of the contribution: they show how agent-generated candidates can be separated into repeated FL mechanisms, fixed-surface tuning effects, and selected single-run artifacts.

title: CPG-PAD: Concept-Informed Prompts Guided Presentation Attack Detection
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics & Security (TIFS)
summary: Presentation Attack Detection (PAD) serves as a crucial safeguard for face recognition systems against presentation attacks such as printed photos, replayed videos, and 3D masks. Despite significant progress, existing PAD models still struggle to generalize across unseen domains due to variations in sensors, lighting, and attack materials. Recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have shown strong generalization ability, yet their applications in PAD remain limited because learned prompts, typically optimized under class-label supervision, fail to explicitly align with fine-grained attack-relevant visual semantics. As a result, the learned representations often overfit domain-specific artifacts instead of capturing transferable attack cues. To address this, we propose Concept-Informed Prompts Guided Presentation Attack Detection (CPG-PAD), a framework that introduces model-level concept guidance into the prompt learning process. Specifically, we design a Visual Concept-driven Enhancement (VCE) module that employs eXplainable AI (XAI) techniques to automatically discover PAD-relevant visual concepts and generate concept-associated heatmaps providing localized fine-grained guidance. Guided by these heatmaps, a Prompt-based Concept Injection (PCI) mechanism integrates these concepts into the prompt space through a Visual-Prompt Decoder (VPD) and a concept-mapping loss, enabling prompts to align with the model's internal concept space. This design enables CPG-PAD to capture generalizable and domain-invariant attack cues while effectively suppressing dataset-specific biases. Extensive experiments across nine benchmark datasets demonstrate that CPG-PAD consistently achieves state-of-the-art cross-domain performance under multi-source, limited-source, and single-source settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CPG-PAD框架，通过视觉概念驱动增强(VCE)模块和基于提示的概念注入(PCI)机制，将可解释AI(XAI)技术生成的视觉概念融入提示学习，使模型能够捕获可泛化的域不变攻击线索，并在9个基准数据集上实现了最先进的跨域性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的人脸呈现攻击检测(PAD)模型在跨域泛化方面存在困难，尤其是面对 unseen domains 时。视觉语言模型(VLMs)虽具泛化能力，但其学习到的提示往往过度拟合特定领域的伪影，而非捕获可迁移的攻击线索。
AI.method: 1) 设计视觉概念驱动增强(VCE)模块，利用可解释AI(XAI)技术自动发现PAD相关的视觉概念并生成概念关联热图；2) 提出基于提示的概念注入(PCI)机制，通过视觉提示解码器(VPD)和概念映射损失将概念注入提示空间，使提示与模型内部概念空间对齐。
AI.result: 在9个基准数据集上，多源、有限源和单源设置下均实现了一致的跨域最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: CPG-PAD通过引入模型级概念引导，能够有效捕获可泛化的域不变攻击线索，同时抑制数据集特定偏差，为解决PAD跨域泛化问题提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Face Presentation Attack Detection (biometric security), which is completely unrelated to the research profile focused on Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. title: Adoption and Ecosystem Health: A Longitudinal Analysis of Open-Source Multi-Agent Frameworks
summary: Since ChatGPT's launch in November 2022, open-source agentic frameworks have proliferated, making framework selection important for engineering teams while obscured by popularity signals such as GitHub stars. This paper analyzes 15 major open-source AI agent framework repositories from late 2022 to early 2026, using 808,042 stars, 73,997 pull requests, 86,241 commits, and 987,330 user profiles to assess ecosystem health across awareness, adoption, and retention. Three findings emerge. First, headline popularity is unreliable. Star counts reflect hype cycles and inorganic activity. AutoGPT gained 111,967 stars in one month but converted fewer than 9 contributors per 1,000 stars, defined as contributor density in this research, compared with LangChain's 41. Lower-profile frameworks such as Pydantic-AI show higher contributor density, indicating deeper adoption. Second, mapping awareness against adoption shows that visibility and engagement diverge. MetaGPT and LangFlow have contributor density ratios below 5 even with their high visibility. Openai-agents-python's limited contributor base suggests institutional backing alone does not ensure community depth. By analyzing cross-framework contribution, we discover that LangChain functions as a shared infrastructure, attracting 82.5% of cross-ecosystem contributors. Third, retention drops most steeply in the first 30 days of initial contribution and stabilizes near 90 days. Overall, ecosystem health is better measured by contributor density, cross-ecosystem engagement, and retention than by stars alone. These metrics offer teams a more robust basis for framework evaluation.

AI.tldr: 自2022年11月ChatGPT发布以来，开源AI智能体框架大量涌现，工程团队在框架选择上面临困难，而传统上依赖GitHub星标等流行度指标存在局限性。本研究分析了15个主流开源AI智能体框架仓库（2022年底至2026年初），使用808,042个星标、73,997个拉取请求、86,241次提交和987,330个用户档案，从关注度、采用度和留存率三个维度评估生态系统健康状况。研究发现：星标数量不可靠（反映炒作周期和非自然活动）；关注度与实际参与度存在分歧；留存率在前30天下降最快，90天后趋于稳定。
AI.motivation: ChatGPT发布后开源AI智能体框架大量涌现，工程团队在选择框架时缺乏可靠的评估依据。传统上依赖GitHub星标等流行度指标，但这些指标容易被炒作周期和非自然活动混淆，无法真实反映生态系统的健康状况。因此需要更科学的评估方法。
AI.method: 本研究分析了15个主流开源AI智能体框架仓库，时间跨度为2022年底至2026年初。数据来源包括：808,042个星标、73,997个拉取请求、86,241次提交和987,330个用户档案。研究从三个维度评估生态系统健康：关注度（星标）、采用度（贡献者密度，即每千星标的贡献者数）和留存率（贡献者的活跃持续时间）。
AI.result: 研究得出三个主要发现：第一，星标数量不可靠。AutoGPT一个月内获得111,967个星标，但每千星标仅转化不到9名贡献者（贡献者密度），而LangChain的贡献者密度为41。Pydantic-AI等低调框架反而显示出更高的贡献者密度，表明更深层的采用。第二，关注度与采用度存在分歧。MetaGPT和LangFlow尽管关注度高，但贡献者密度比低于5。Openai-agents-python有限的贡献者基础表明机构支持 alone不能确保社区深度。通过跨框架贡献分析发现，LangChain作为共享基础设施，吸引了82.5%的跨生态系统贡献者。第三，留存在前30天下降最快，90天后趋于稳定。
AI.conclusion: 生态系统健康应通过贡献者密度、跨生态系统参与度和留存率来衡量，而非仅依赖星标。这些指标为工程团队提供了更可靠的框架评估基础。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about open-source AI multi-agent framework ecosystem health analysis using GitHub metrics (stars, pull requests, commits). This is software engineering/research methodology, not computer graphics. There is zero overlap with the research profile's focus on 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), VLM-based quality supervision, or visual feature extraction for 2D-to-3D synthesis. The application domain is entirely different - software ecosystem analysis vs. computer graphics/motion synthesis.

title: The Wiola Architecture for Efficient Small Language Models
summary: We present Wiola, a fully original Small Language Model (SLM) architecture built from first principles, sharing no structural lineage with any existing model family including GPT, LLaMA, Mistral, or Falcon. Wiola introduces five independently novel components: (i) Spiral Rotary Positional Encoding (SRPE), which embeds token positions on a three-dimensional helical manifold combining absolute, relative, and hierarchical positional signals; (ii) Gated Cross-Layer Attention (GCLA), providing each decoder layer with soft cross-attention access to compressed summaries of two preceding layers for inter-layer coherence; (iii) Adaptive Token Merging (ATM), which dynamically merges se mantically redundant adjacent tokens in middle network layers to reduce attention complexity without information loss; (iv) Dual Stream Feed-Forward (DSFF), replacing the conventional MLP with two parallel streams fused by a learned per-dimension gate; and (v) WiolaRMSNorm, a modified normalisation introducing a per-dimension learned offset vector that prevents representation collapse. We provide complete mathematical derivations, architectural block diagrams, complexity analyses, and systematic comparisons against GPT-2, LLaMA-2, and Mistral. Wiola is released in four sizes (120M, 360M, 700M, and 1.5B parameters) and is fully compatible with the HuggingFace Transformers ecosystem, with all 22 architectural unit tests passing.

AI.tldr: Wiola是一个完全原创的小语言模型(SLM)架构,与现有任何模型家族(GPT、LLaMA、Mistral、Falcon)没有结构传承关系。该模型引入了5个独立创新的组件:螺旋旋转位置编码(SRPE)、门控跨层注意力(GCLA)、自适应Token合并(ATM)、双流前馈网络(DSFF)和WiolaRMSNorm归一化。提供4个规模版本(120M、360M、700M、1.5B参数),完全兼容HuggingFace Transformers生态系统。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型架构普遍存在结构同质化问题,缺乏真正的原创性设计。现有模型大多基于Transformer架构的变体,缺乏从根本上全新的架构创新。该研究旨在从头开始构建一个完全原创的小语言模型架构,探索位置编码、层间通信、计算效率、前馈网络和归一化等核心组件的创新方案。
AI.method: Wiola架构提出5个独立创新的组件:(1)SRPE将token位置嵌入三维螺旋流形,结合绝对、相对和层级位置信号;(2)GCLA为每个解码器层提供对前两层压缩摘要的软跨层注意力访问;(3)ATM在中间网络层动态合并语义冗余的相邻token以降低注意力复杂度;(4)DSFF用两个并行流替代传统MLP,通过逐维度学习门控融合;(5)WiolaRMSNorm引入逐维度学习偏移向量防止表示崩溃。论文提供完整数学推导、架构图、复杂度和系统性对比分析。
AI.result: Wiola发布4个规模版本(120M、360M、700M、1.5B参数),与GPT-2、LLaMA-2和Mistral进行系统性对比,所有22个架构单元测试通过,完全兼容HuggingFace Transformers生态系统。
AI.conclusion: Wiola代表了一种全新的小语言模型设计范式,通过5个创新组件展示了从头构建原创架构的可行性。其模块化设计允许灵活配置,兼容性设计便于部署。该工作为语言模型架构创新提供了新的思路,未来可探索更大参数规模以及在各下游任务上的性能表现。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Small Language Model (SLM) architecture innovation for NLP tasks, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. The research profile focuses on video generation models (Wan, Seedance), 3D motion synthesis, visual feature extraction from 2D videos for 3D generation, and VLM for quality supervision. The Wiola paper addresses none of these pain points - it's about general language model architecture (position encoding, attention mechanisms, token merging for LLM efficiency). There is no application domain match whatsoever.

title: KathaTrace: Diagnosing Semantic Trajectory Collapse in Generated Visual Narratives
summary: Visual narratives are central to storyboards, comics, children's media, and film previsualization, where viewers understand stories from images alone. Recent generators such as StoryDiffusion produce coherent sequences, but visual coherence does not guarantee that source-story transition meaning remains recoverable. Existing benchmarks assess visual quality, content faithfulness, and scene coherence, but miss a critical failure mode: storyboards where scenes appear visually coherent while the semantic link between scenes disappears. We introduce KathaTrace, a generator-agnostic protocol for diagnosing semantic trajectory collapse, defined as the loss of transition meaning needed to understand how one scene follows another. KathaTrace evaluates transitions under three evidence conditions: text-only, image-only, and text-plus-image, and filters ambiguous items. We contribute KathaBench-25K, with 5,000 narratives from classical collections including Aesop, Panchatantra, and Kathasaritasagara, 20,000 transitions, and 28,712 recoverability questions. We define Semantic Trajectory Gap, or STG, as text-only minus image-only recoverability, measuring transition meaning lost during visualization. Human validation yields Fleiss' kappa = 0.845. Experiments across state-of-the-art generators show substantial STG of 23.5 +/- 1.3. Semantic Compass, an actionability probe, uses KathaTrace signals for post-generation repair and improves storyboard selection.

AI.tldr: KathaTrace是一个用于诊断故事板生成中"语义轨迹崩溃"的协议，衡量视觉化过程中过渡意义的丢失程度。通过KathaBench-25K数据集（5000个叙事、20000个过渡）评估，发现当前顶尖生成器存在23.5%的显著语义轨迹差距。
AI.motivation: 现有评估基准只关注视觉质量、内容保真度和场景连贯性，但忽略了一个关键失败模式：场景看起来视觉连贯，但场景间的语义联系消失了，导致无法理解一个场景如何跟随另一个场景。
AI.method: 提出KathaTrace协议，在三种证据条件下评估过渡：仅文本、仅图像、文本加图像，并过滤模糊项。定义语义轨迹差距(STG)=仅文本可恢复性-仅图像可恢复性。语义指南针使用该信号进行后生成修复。
AI.result: 人类验证Fleiss' kappa=0.845。跨顶尖生成器实验显示STG为23.5±1.3，表明视觉化过程中存在显著的过渡意义丢失。
AI.conclusion: 语义轨迹崩溃是故事板生成的关键问题。KathaTrace提供了可泛化的诊断协议，Semantic Compass可利用该信号改善故事板选择。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 2D visual narrative/storyboard generation, which is a completely different application domain from 3D motion generation. While both deal with semantic consistency and quality assessment, the core application is generating 2D image sequences (storyboards) rather than synthesizing 3D motions from video. The paper doesn't address any of the specified pain points: domain gap between 2D visual features and 3D motion, video priors for motion synthesis, or extracting visual guidance for 3D generation. The methods (storyboard evaluation) are unrelated to 3D motion generation pipelines.

title: Hardware-Enforced Semantic Coordination for Safety-Critical Real-Time Autonomous Systems
summary:
Recent advances in agentic AI are producing increasingly complex autonomous systems that integrate large language models, world models, optimization engines, specialized neural architectures, autonomous platforms, and human operators. While much current research focuses on improving reasoning capabilities, safety-critical real-time deployment also requires bounded and verifiable coordination among heterogeneous components operating concurrently under uncertainty. Software-mediated coordination presents fundamental limitations in domains where bounded latency, deterministic coordination, and enforceable safety guarantees are essential.
  Hence, we propose a hardware-enforced semantic coordination architecture in which selected coordination semantics are implemented directly at the hardware level via field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs). The approach builds on the Topic-Based Communication Space Petri Net (TB-CSPN) framework, which separates semantic reasoning from interaction management.
  In this approach, selected TB-CSPN coordination mechanisms are mapped onto FPGA primitives, creating a hardware-native semantic coordination layer. Focus is not on acceleration, but on enforcing temporal synchronization, semantic gating, authorization constraints, and bounded coordination behavior directly in hardware. Semantic reasoning remains adaptive and software-driven, while embedded coordination semantics become deterministic.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对安全关键型实时系统中软件协调的局限性，提出了硬件强化的语义协调架构，通过FPGA实现TB-CSPN框架的协调机制，实现软件推理与硬件确定性协调的分离。
AI.motivation: 当前软件介导的协调在需要有限延迟、确定性协调和可强制安全保证的领域存在根本局限；现有研究侧重于提升推理能力，但安全关键型实时部署还需要在不确定性下运行的异构组件之间进行有界且可验证的协调
AI.method: 提出基于主题的通信空间佩特里网(TB-CSPN)框架，将语义推理与交互管理分离；将选定的TB-CSPN协调机制映射到FPGA原语，创建硬件原生语义协调层
AI.result: 实现了时间同步、语义门控、授权约束和有限协调行为的硬件级强制；语义推理保持自适应和软件驱动，而嵌入式协调语义变得确定性化
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种硬件强化的语义协调架构，通过FPGA实现TB-CSPN框架的关键协调机制，实现了软件自适应语义推理与硬件确定性协调的分离，为安全关键型实时系统提供了新的设计范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about hardware/FPGA-based semantic coordination for safety-critical real-time autonomous systems (e.g., autonomous vehicles), which is in the domain of computer architecture and embedded systems. It has NO connection to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile (VLM, diffusion models, visual feature extraction). The application domain is completely different - this is about safety-critical coordination in autonomous systems, not graphics or motion synthesis.

title: Agent4cs: A Multi-agent System for Code Summarization in Large Hierarchical Codebases
comment: Accepted to the main track of the 23rd European Conference on Multi-Agent Systems (EUMAS 2026)
summary: Understanding large, complex codebases, especially those with obfuscated structures and incomplete documentation, remains a significant challenge. Existing code summarization solutions often rely on a single language model or coding assistant like Claude Code, and treat source code as flat text, underutilizing the rich interdependencies and hierarchical information within a repository. To address these shortcomings, we propose Agent4cs - a multi-agent framework that summarizes large codebases in a bottom-up fashion, where a summarization agent focuses on producing robust summaries; a keyword-extraction agent proactively identifies critical information from subfolders; and a quality-assurance agent iteratively refines the outputs for readability, coherence, and completeness. Evaluated on 7 frontier models, Agent4cs improves semantic consistency across all folder levels by average 8% compared to two structured prompting baselines with code segments. Furthermore, extensive evaluation on real-world datasets demonstrates up to 38% gains in normalized keyword coverage rate over the same baselines.

AI.tldr: Agent4cs是一个多智能体框架,用于对大型代码库进行自底向上的代码摘要生成。该框架通过三个专门的智能体协作:摘要生成智能体、关键词提取智能体和质量保证智能体,以解决现有单模型方案忽略代码库层次结构信息的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有代码摘要方案依赖单一语言模型(如Claude Code),并将源代码视为平面文本,未能充分利用代码库中丰富的依赖关系和层次信息,难以处理大型、结构复杂且文档不完整的代码库。
AI.method: 提出多智能体协作框架Agent4cs,采用自底向上的摘要策略:1)关键词提取智能体主动从子文件夹中识别关键信息;2)摘要生成智能体专注于产生健壮的摘要;3)质量保证智能体迭代优化输出的可读性、连贯性和完整性。
AI.result: 在7个前沿模型上评估,Agent4cs相比两个结构化提示基线方法,在所有文件夹级别的语义一致性平均提升8%;在真实数据集上,规范化关键词覆盖率相比基线最高提升38%。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体协作框架能够有效利用代码库的层次结构信息,通过分工协作显著提升代码摘要质量,为大型代码库的文档化和理解提供了新的解决思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about code summarization in software engineering using multi-agent systems, which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics research profile focused on 3D motion generation from 2D videos. The application domains are entirely different - one deals with code understanding/documentation while the other deals with visual motion synthesis. There is no overlap in methods, domain, or application area.

title: Spatial-Temporal Expert Learning for Video-based Person Re-identification
summary: Video-based person re-identification (Re-ID) aims to retrieve the same identity in the query video clips from the gallery video clips. To solve this problem, exploiting fine-grained features is of great importance, especially when discriminating identities that are similar in appearance. In this paper, we propose to enhance the ability to explore fine-grained information with a novel input-aware extendable expert module. Instead of updating the network parameters with every sample in the dataset, we aim to train the experts within specific subsets that only contain similar samples and promote their ability to exploit fine-grained information within these similar samples. To achieve this goal, we incorporate two mechanisms in this module: input-aware expert selection mechanism and spatial-temporal selection mechanism. The first mechanism dynamically activates a set of experts on subsets of similar samples, pushing the experts to exploit subtle differences between these similar samples, while the second one further increases their sensitivity to the fine-grained differences in spatial and temporal aspects and allows the experts to dynamically utilize them for different input samples. In addition, to facilitate the expert module, we design an extendable scheme that allows the module to flexibly add new experts when necessary. As a result, our method achieves outstanding performance on two large-scale datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于视频人员重新识别（Re-ID）的输入感知可扩展专家模块，通过在相似样本子集上训练专家来增强细粒度特征提取能力。该方法包含输入感知专家选择和时空选择两个机制，并采用可扩展方案灵活添加新专家，在两个大规模数据集上取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: 视频人员再识别任务中，当身份外观相似时，利用细粒度特征至关重要。传统方法对所有样本使用相同网络参数，难以有效捕捉相似身份间的细微差异。
AI.method: 提出输入感知可扩展专家模块，包含：(1)输入感知专家选择机制：动态激活针对相似样本子集训练的专家；(2)时空选择机制：增强对空间和时间维度细粒度差异的敏感性；(3)可扩展方案：支持灵活添加新专家。
AI.result: 在两个大规模视频Re-ID数据集上实现优异性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过在相似样本子集上专门训练专家并结合输入感知选择和时空选择机制，该方法能有效提升细粒度特征提取能力，为视频人员再识别提供了新的研究思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about video-based person re-identification (identifying the same person across different video frames/cameras), which is a completely different application domain from 3D motion generation. While both involve video analysis, the research profile focuses on extracting visual features from 2D videos for 3D human motion synthesis, whereas this paper focuses on matching and identifying people. The methods (expert learning for fine-grained feature extraction) and goals (person recognition vs. motion synthesis) are entirely different. This is a computer vision task for surveillance applications, not computer graphics/3D motion generation.

title: What LLM Agents Say When No One Is Watching: Social Structure and Latent Objective Emergence in Multi-Agent Debates
summary: LLM agents will increasingly act in socially structured settings where role, audience, and relational context can shape what is advantageous or costly to say. We study whether such social structure, without any explicit objective in the prompt, changes what an agent expresses publicly relative to an off-the-record (OTR) channel elicited under the same condition. We introduce a dual-channel debate framework in which agents produce public utterances that enter the shared history alongside OTR responses that are recorded but never shown to the other participant. Across 10 models, 3 scenarios, and 5 variations within each scenario, alignment-inducing settings produce systematic public-OTR divergence in the targeted agent, with its decision divergence rising from a $\sim$3% baseline to roughly 40%. The effect is consistent across four aggregate analyses: stance, semantic similarity, natural language inference, and survey responses. In some cases, the OTR response explicitly attributes public accommodation to relational pressures, such as career risk or sponsorship obligation. The findings suggest that agent evaluation should extend beyond explicit goals and detect emergent objectives. We present a dual-channel evaluation framework and complementary behavioral measures that operationalize this assessment.

AI.tldr: 研究LLM智能体在社会结构化环境中是否会根据角色、观众和关系背景调整其公开发言与私下回复（OTR）。通过10个模型、3个场景、5种变体的实验，发现对齐诱导设置导致公开-OTR分歧从约3%的基线升至约40%，并在多种分析方法中保持一致。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体将在社会结构化设置中行动，角色、观众和关系背景会影响什么是有利或有害的。研究问题是：这种社会结构（没有任何明确目标）是否会改变智能体在公开渠道与私下渠道（OTR）表达的差异。
AI.method: 引入双渠道辩论框架：智能体生成公开话语进入共享历史，同时生成OTR回复（记录但从不展示给另一参与者）。实验覆盖10个模型、3个场景、每个场景5种变体。
AI.result: 对齐诱导设置产生系统性公开-OTR分歧，决策分歧从约3%基线升至约40%。效果在四种聚合分析中一致：立场、语义相似度、自然语言推理和调查回复。某些情况下OTR回复明确将公开顺应归因于关系压力，如职业风险或赞助义务。
AI.conclusion: 智能体评估应超越显式目标并检测涌现目标。提出双渠道评估框架和补充行为措施来操作化这一评估。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agents, social structures, and alignment in multi-agent debates - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. The research profile focuses on visual/video-based 3D motion synthesis, VLMs for quality supervision, and video generation models, while this paper addresses LLM behavioral alignment in social settings. There is no methodological or domain overlap whatsoever.

title: When Should Service Agents Reconsider? Difficulty-Routed Control in Customer-Service Operations
summary: Autonomous customer-service agents are shifting from conversational interfaces toward operational execution roles: they retrieve firm records, apply service policies, and execute backend writes such as refunds, cancellations, exchanges, order modifications, and reservation changes. This shift creates a service-control problem: firms must keep routine service fast and low-friction while preventing operational errors on requests where customer instructions, policy constraints, firm records, and backend writes interact. We propose a difficulty-routed service-control architecture that asks when service agents should reconsider before acting. A lightweight router keeps routine sessions on a low-cost baseline path and routes operationally coupled sessions to an escalated workflow. The escalated path uses conflict-aware communication and write-triggered reconsideration to concentrate deliberation and safeguards before consequential backend writes, rather than applying additional control uniformly across all service sessions. We evaluate the architecture on human-verified retail and airline tasks from $τ^{2}$-bench. In retail, the method improves reliability consistently on service requests with operational conflict. Routing evidence shows that stronger control is directed toward conflicted requests rather than broadly applied to routine ones. Dialogue and tool-use profiles suggest that gains do not come from indiscriminate interaction expansion or broader tool chains; instead, added turns and tool calls support evidence gathering, write separation, and pre-write reconsideration. Case-level evidence shows that the escalated workflow preserves fallback plans, binds retrieved records to the correct action, sequences writes, and decomposes multi-entity requests. Airline results extend the same service-control logic to reservation operations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个难度路由的服务控制架构，用于解决自主客服代理从对话交互向操作执行角色转变过程中的服务控制问题。该架构通过轻量级路由器将常规会话引导至低成本路径，将操作耦合的会话升级至包含冲突感知通信和写触发再考虑的升级工作流，从而在后果性后端写入前集中 deliberation 和防护措施。
AI.motivation: 自主客服代理正从对话界面转向操作执行角色（检索企业记录、应用服务政策、执行后端写入如退款、取消、换货等），这一转变带来了服务控制问题：企业需保持常规服务快速低摩擦，同时防止在客户指令、政策约束、企业记录和后端写入相互作用的请求上出现操作错误。
AI.method: 提出难度路由的服务控制架构：1）轻量级路由器将常规会话保持在低成本基线路径；2）将操作耦合的会话路由至升级工作流；3）升级路径使用冲突感知通信和写触发再考虑，在后果性后端写入前集中 deliberation 和防护措施。
AI.result: 在τ²-bench的零售和航空任务上评估：零售领域在具有操作冲突的服务请求上可靠性持续提升；路由证据表明更强控制指向冲突请求而非广泛应用于常规请求；对话和工具使用特征表明收益不来自 indiscriminate 交互扩展或更广泛工具链，而来自额外轮次和工具调用支持证据收集、写分离和写前再考虑；案例级证据显示升级工作流保留了后备计划、将检索记录绑定到正确操作、序列化了写入并分解了多实体请求。航空结果将服务控制逻辑扩展到预订操作。
AI.conclusion: 难度路由服务控制架构能够有效解决自主客服代理的操作执行角色转变带来的服务控制问题，通过将有操作冲突的请求导向升级工作流，在保持常规服务效率的同时防止操作错误。

relevance_reason: This paper is about customer service AI agents and conversation routing, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. It has no connection to 3D motion generation, video generation models, visual feature extraction, or any computer graphics methods. The application domain is customer service operations, not computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: MapDreamer: Aerial Imagery Conditioned Latent Diffusion for Lane-Level Map Generation
summary: High definition map generation is essential for autonomous driving, yet remains a labor-intensive process at scale. We present MapDreamer, a generative diffusion model that synthesizes lane-level vector maps with explicit topology directly from a single aerial image. MapDreamer learns a compact latent representation of lane centerlines and their topological relations using a variational autoencoder and predicts graphs with a transformer-based latent diffusion model. To align generated maps with the observed scene, we condition each denoising step on dense aerial features injected through cross-attention. To handle the varying number of lanes across scenes, we propose a lane cardinality module paired with background ghost lane latents, a learned buffer that prevents slot collapse during diffusion. Furthermore, we introduce a sliding-window global graph aggregation strategy that stitches local tiles into city-scale maps while preserving connectivity through encoded lane boundaries. Experiments on UrbanLaneGraph derived from Argoverse 2 show improved geometric and topological fidelity over non-generative baselines.

AI.tldr: MapDreamer是一种生成式扩散模型，可从单张航拍图像直接合成车道级矢量地图，具有明确的拓扑结构。
AI.motivation: 高清地图生成对自动驾驶至关重要，但目前仍面临大规模 labor-intensive（劳动密集型）的问题，需要自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 1. 使用变分自编码器(VAE)学习车道中心线及其拓扑关系的紧凑潜在表示；2. 基于Transformer的潜在扩散模型预测图结构；3. 通过交叉注意力机制将密集航拍特征注入每个去噪步骤；4. 提出车道基数模块配合背景幽灵车道潜在变量，防止slot塌陷；5. 引入滑动窗口全局图聚合策略，通过编码车道边界连接局部瓦片形成城市级地图。
AI.result: 在源自Argoverse 2的UrbanLaneGraph数据集上，相较于非生成式基线方法，在几何精度和拓扑保真度方面均有所提升。
AI.conclusion: MapDreamer能够有效地从航拍图像生成具有明确拓扑结构的车道级矢量地图，为自动驾驶高清地图大规模自动化生成提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about 3D MOTION generation/synthesis (extracting visual guidance from 2D videos for 3D human motion generation), while MapDreamer is about 2D MAP generation (creating lane-level vector maps from aerial imagery for autonomous driving). Although both use diffusion models, the application domains are entirely different - map generation vs motion synthesis. This is not a Computer Graphics paper about motion/pose generation; it's a computer vision paper about map generation from satellite/aerial images.

title: CreativityNeuro: Steering Language Model Weights to Improve Divergent Thinking and Reduce Mode Collapse
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026 Workshop on Creativity & Generative AI
summary: Divergent thinking is a crucial aspect of creativity, yet large language models (LLMs) tend to consistently generate similar responses to open-ended questions, in what has been termed the artificial hivemind effect. Here, we introduce CreativityNeuro, a data-free method for enhancing divergent thinking in LLMs via contrastive weight steering. We evaluate our method across multiple creativity assessments and report several main findings. On the Divergent Association Task (DAT), a vocabulary-space creativity test, CreativityNeuro improves performance by up to 14 human percentile points. Next, in a large-scale human evaluation (N=720) on the Alternative Uses Test (AUT) and the Task Task, CreativityNeuro achieves significant improvements in originality, surprise, and creativity, transferring to longer-form and more open-ended tasks. Importantly, we find that across all three tasks, CreativityNeuro demonstrably reduces measures of mode collapse. Moreover, activation steering achieves comparable performance to CreativityNeuro on the DAT, but it does not transfer to the AUT and Task Task, demonstrating the effectiveness of weight-space steering in generalizing to unseen tasks. In conclusion, CreativityNeuro improves divergent thinking and reduces mode collapse without requiring behavioral data, re-training, or gradient-based fine-tuning, providing a straightforward way to enhance LLM performance in creative domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CreativityNeuro方法，通过对比权重 steering（权重空间 steering）提升大语言模型的发散思维，缓解"人工群体思维"效应。该方法无需行为数据、再训练或梯度微调即可增强LLM的创造性表现。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在处理开放式问题时倾向于生成相似的响应，这种现象被称为"人工群体思维效应"，严重限制了模型的创造性。发散思维是创造力的关键方面，但现有LLM难以实现多样化的创意输出。
AI.method: 提出CreativityNeuro方法，采用对比权重 steering（contrastive weight steering），在权重空间而非激活空间进行操控，实现无需行为数据、无需再训练、无需梯度微调的发散思维增强。
AI.result: 在Divergent Association Task (DAT)上，CreativityNeuro性能提升高达14个人类百分位；大规模人类评估(N=720)中，在Alternative Uses Test (AUT)和Task Task上，原创性、惊喜度和创造力均显著提升；在所有三项任务中有效降低模式崩塌；激活steering在DAT上表现相当，但无法迁移到AUT和Task Task。
AI.conclusion: CreativityNeuro无需行为数据、再训练或梯度微调即可显著提升发散思维并减少模式崩塌，为增强LLM在创意领域的表现提供了一种直接有效的方法，证明了权重空间steering相比激活空间steering具有更好的任务泛化能力。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about improving creativity in Large Language Models (LLMs) through weight steering for text generation. The application domain is NLP/LLM research, not Computer Graphics or 3D motion generation. It has no relevance to video-to-motion synthesis, visual feature extraction, VLM-based quality supervision, or any computer graphics methods mentioned in the research profile.

title: MIBE: Multi-subject Interaction Benchmark and Evaluator for Personalized Image Generation
summary: Multi-subject personalized image generation requires the precise rendering of all requested reference identities and their specified interactions based on a guiding prompt. However, state-of-the-art models still struggle with this process, frequently omitting subjects, failing to preserve reference appearances, or misattributing interactions. Furthermore, existing metrics designed primarily for single-subject fidelity cannot reliably capture these errors, suffering severe degradation in ranking separability and failing to align with human preference as the subject count increases. To address this gap, we introduce Multi-subject Interaction Benchmark and Evaluator (MIBE), a unified framework comprising a Multi-subject Interaction Benchmark (MIB) and a Multi-subject Interaction Evaluator (MIE). MIB systematically covers diverse relation types and scene complexities through a decoupled data regime. This consists of a 60K-pair VLM-labeled Silver Set for scalable metric training and a 4K-pair double-blind Human Evaluation Gold Set covering a diverse range of state-of-the-art generators, with the Silver Set reaching 95.1% cross-VLM preference agreement. To demonstrate the utility of this benchmark, we present MIE, a lightweight, reference-conditioned evaluator trained exclusively on the Silver Set with a dual-head ranking and diagnosis objective. MIE exhibits strong cross-generator generalization on the Gold Set, achieving 0.922 overall pairwise accuracy against human preference, including 0.982 on seen generators and 0.884 on unseen generators. By outperforming a broad spectrum of baseline metrics, including CLIP and DINO variants, MIE demonstrates that diagnostic supervision can preserve ranking separability and human alignment where traditional evaluators collapse.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MIBE框架，用于评估多主体个性化图像生成任务，包含MIB基准和MIE评估器，解决了现有指标在多主体场景下性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的模型在多主体个性化图像生成中仍存在主体遗漏、参考外观保留失败和交互错误归属等问题，且现有评估指标主要针对单主体设计，在多主体场景下排名分离度和人类偏好对齐度严重下降。
AI.method: 构建了包含6万对VLM标注的银标集和4千对双盲人工评估金标集的MIB基准；提出MIE评估器，采用双头排序和诊断目标，在银标集上训练。
AI.result: 银标集达到95.1%的跨VLM偏好一致性；MIE在金标集上达到0.922的整体成对准确率，其中可见生成器0.982，未见生成器0.884；优于CLIP和DINO等基线指标。
AI.conclusion: 诊断监督可以保持排名分离度和人类对齐能力，传统评估器在多主体场景下会崩溃，证明MIBE框架的有效性。

relevance_reason: Complete domain mismatch. The paper is about multi-subject personalized IMAGE generation (2D), while the research profile is about 3D MOTION generation from 2D video features. Although both mention VLM (Visual Language Model), the application domains are entirely different - 2D image generation evaluation vs 3D human motion synthesis. The paper addresses image generation quality assessment, not motion synthesis or the domain gap between 2D visual features and 3D motion representation.

title: Discrete Diffusion Language Models for Interactive Radiology Report Drafting
summary: Diffusion language models, which generate text by denoising a token canvas bidirectionally instead of emitting tokens left to right, have become competitive with autoregressive (AR) generation. Medical foundation models, however, remain almost entirely autoregressive. We adapt a mixture-of-experts diffusion language model, DiffusionGemma-26B, and benchmark it against its same-size AR sibling Gemma-4-26B under an identical LoRA recipe on medical visual question answering datasets, scored by a verbosity-robust LLM judge. Diffusion matches or exceeds AR on all of them, and the finetuned model (3.8B active) is competitive with frontier vision-language models; its decoding is also 3.5-4.4x faster. Beyond this parity, the diffusion model offers a drafting capability AR lacks: any-order infill. Because the canvas is denoised bidirectionally, a radiologist can fix report fragments and have the model fill the text between them, an operation inherent to diffusion but not to autoregression, which is subpar at it. This suits real reports, which are often terse or inconsistent across clinicians and institutions.

AI.tldr: 该研究将扩散语言模型（DiffusionGemma-26B）应用于医学视觉问答任务，并与自回归模型（Gemma-4-26B）进行对比。扩散模型在所有指标上达到或超越自回归模型，解码速度提升3.5-4.4倍，且具备自回归模型缺乏的任意顺序填充能力。
AI.motivation: 医学基础模型目前几乎完全依赖自回归生成方式，而扩散语言模型在文本生成领域已具有竞争力。该研究旨在探索扩散模型在医学视觉问答中的潜力，并利用其双向去噪特性实现任意顺序文本填充，这对医学报告修复场景具有重要价值。
AI.method: 使用混合专家扩散语言模型DiffusionGemma-26B，与同等规模的Gemma-4-26B自回归模型在相同LoRA微调配置下进行对比评估。采用抗噪且对长度稳健的LLM评判器在医学视觉问答数据集上评分。
AI.result: 扩散模型在所有医学视觉问答数据集上达到或超越自回归模型。微调后模型（3.8B活跃参数）与前沿视觉语言模型具有竞争力，解码速度提升3.5-4.4倍。扩散模型独特的双向去噪特性使其支持任意顺序填充，这是自回归模型无法实现的功能。
AI.conclusion: 扩散语言模型在医学领域可作为自回归模型的有效替代方案，其任意顺序填充能力特别适合医学报告片段修复场景。该研究为医学AI模型开发提供了新思路，扩散模型有望在临床报告处理等实际应用中发挥独特优势。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical visual question answering and radiology report drafting, which is in the medical AI domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion generation from 2D videos. While both use diffusion models, the application domains are completely different - medical imaging vs computer graphics/motion synthesis. This is a different field entirely, not even moderately relevant to the research profile.

title: Rethinking Generic Object Tracking Toward Human-Level Perceptual Intelligence
comment: Ph.D. dissertation, National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University, 2026. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2602.14771
summary: At the heart of human visual perception lies the ability to maintain a continuous and coherent understanding of the external world. By integrating observations with accumulated experience, the human visual system can continuously adapt to variations in both the target and its surrounding environment, while preserving robust visual continuity as scene dynamics evolve. Human vision can therefore integrate prior knowledge, spatial geometry, and semantic context to understand complex scenes and their changes. As a core problem in computer vision, visual object tracking aims to bring machine perception closer to human visual perception. These capabilities are central to the task of Generic Object Tracking (GOT). In this task, a visual tracker is initialized only with the bounding box of an arbitrarily specified target in the first frame, and must continuously localize the target in subsequent dynamic visual streams. However, future events, observations, and real-world variations are inherently unpredictable; therefore, the model's generalization and online adaptation capabilities remain bottlenecks. Tracking reliability can deteriorate when the target undergoes severe deformation, is affected by complex distractors, encounters significant environmental changes, or belongs to a category unseen during training. This dissertation aims to narrow the gap between machine visual tracking systems and human visual perception by proposing a series of methods that systematically enhance the target discrimination, robust adaptation, and geometric reasoning capabilities of tracking models.

AI.tldr: 本论文研究通用目标跟踪(GOT)问题，旨在缩小机器视觉跟踪系统与人类视觉感知之间的差距。给定第一帧的目标边界框，视觉跟踪器需要在后续动态视频流中持续定位目标。
AI.motivation: 人类视觉系统能够通过整合观察与累积经验来连续适应目标及其周围环境的变化，保持稳健的视觉连续性。然而，机器视觉跟踪面临着目标严重变形、复杂干扰物、环境变化以及训练时未见过的类别等挑战，模型的泛化能力和在线适应能力仍是瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出了一系列方法，系统性地增强跟踪模型的目标 discrimination（判别能力）、robust adaptation（鲁棒适应能力）和 geometric reasoning（几何推理能力）。
AI.result: 通过增强目标判别、鲁棒适应和几何推理能力，提高了视觉跟踪模型在复杂场景下的性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法有效缩小了机器视觉跟踪系统与人类视觉感知之间的差距，为通用目标跟踪领域提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 2D generic object tracking in computer vision, which is entirely different from the research profile's focus on 3D motion generation in computer graphics. The application domains are completely different: the profile deals with synthesizing 3D human motions from video priors, while this paper deals with tracking objects in 2D video sequences. The methods (visual tracking vs. motion generation) and goals (object localization vs. 3D motion synthesis) do not align. Although both involve video analysis, they address fundamentally different problems in different application domains.

title: Beyond Next-Token Prediction: An RLVR Proof of Concept for Tool-Use Agents on Atlassian Workflows
summary: Large language models are trained to predict the next token, not to act inside a specific API. In niche enterprise SaaS workflows -- where success means hitting the right endpoint with the right nested arguments in the right order -- this objective mismatch shows up as silent failures: dropped required fields, hallucinated tools, or early stops after a single read. We ask whether Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), applied directly in the target environment, closes the gap. As a proof of concept we build a suite of five synthetic environments emulating the Jira REST v3 and Confluence v2 APIs at schema fidelity; rewards are computed entirely from the tool-call trace, with no live API, no learned judge, and no human label in the loop. Scoring prompted Qwen3-1.7B and Qwen3.5-4B on the same checkers that drive GRPO training, we find that on the four scenarios whose rewards are non-degenerate the RL-trained policy lifts average reward from a 4B-baseline range of 0.35--0.92 to 0.95--1.00, with the largest single gain on Confluence page creation ($0.35 \rightarrow 1.00$). We position this as a preliminary step toward outcome-optimised small models for niche enterprise APIs, and foreground two limitations a workshop reader should weigh: hand-crafting verifiable rewards does not scale beyond the handful of endpoints reported here, and one of our five scenarios (ticket-transition) has a saturating reward shape that the prompted 4B already maxes out.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了强化学习结合可验证奖励（RLVR）在企业API工作流中的可行性，通过构建5个合成API环境对Qwen模型进行训练，成功将奖励从0.35-0.92提升至0.95-1.00，但面临奖励设计扩展性有限和部分场景已饱和的局限。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型训练目标是预测下一个token，而非正确调用特定API。在企业SaaS工作流中，这种目标不匹配导致静默失败（如遗漏必需字段、幻觉工具、过早停止）。作者试图探索强化学习结合可验证奖励（RLVR）是否能弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 构建5个模拟Jira REST v3和Confluence v2 API的合成环境，完全基于工具调用轨迹计算奖励（无需实时API、学习判断器或人工标注），使用GRPO训练方法对Qwen3-1.7B和Qwen3.5-4B模型进行微调。
AI.result: 在4个非简并奖励场景中，RL训练策略将平均奖励从4B基线的0.35-0.92提升到0.95-1.00，最大单次提升出现在Confluence页面创建场景（0.35→1.00）。
AI.conclusion: RLVR是一种有前景的方法，可以显著提升小型模型在特定企业API工作流中的表现（从0.35-0.92提升到0.95-1.00），但面临两个主要局限：(1)可验证奖励的手动设计难以扩展到更多端点；(2)部分场景下prompted模型已接近最优性能，继续RL训练收益有限。该研究为针对特定企业API优化小型语言模型奠定了初步基础。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about using Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) to improve LLM performance on enterprise API tool calls (Jira, Confluence workflows). The research profile is about Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion generation from 2D video using video generation models and visual feature extraction. The application domains are entirely different - LLM tool-use agents vs. 3D motion synthesis. The methods (GRPO, Qwen models, API workflows) have no connection to the target methods (VLM, video generation models like Wan/Seedance, 3D motion generation).

title: Computer Vision for Wildlife Monitoring: Detecting Brown Howler Monkeys using YOLO
comment: Accepted on International Conference on Computer Animation, Social Agents, and Extended Reality '26 (CASAXR 26)
summary: Urban expansion threatens global biodiversity, especially affecting arboreal species due to the fragmentation of forest habitats. The movement of arboreal species across disjointed forest patches increases mortality risk and, thus, compromises their conservation. In this context, the installation of canopy bridges can be a viable strategy; yet continuous monitoring of their use by arboreal species is essential for ensuring their effectiveness, typically carried out with the aid of camera traps. However, this method often produces false-positive images that demand time from conservationists for review. In this context, computer vision algorithms can optimize the task of detecting target species using the canopy bridges. In this study, we explored the automatic detection of brown howler monkeys (Alouatta guariba) in videos obtained by camera traps. Given the need for a large number of annotated images of the target animals to train the algorithms, we tested the incorporation of auxiliary data to improve detection models, fine-tuning the YOLOv10 framework using varying proportions of them. The improvement of these automatic detection techniques contributes to conservation efforts, by providing automatic tools to monitor solutions that minimize the impact of human interference in animals habitats.

AI.tldr: 研究旨在通过计算机视觉算法自动检测相机陷阱视频中的棕毛卷尾猴(Alouatta guariba)，以优化树冠桥的使用监测。研究测试了使用辅助数据并通过不同比例数据微调YOLOv10框架来改进检测模型。
AI.motivation: 城市扩张导致森林碎片化，增加了树栖物种的迁移死亡风险。树冠桥是有效的缓解策略，但需要持续监测。传统相机陷阱产生大量假阳性图像，需要人工审核，耗时费力。因此需要自动检测算法来优化监测效率。
AI.method: 使用YOLOv10框架进行目标检测，通过微调不同比例的辅助数据来训练模型，实现对相机陷阱视频中棕毛卷尾猴的自动检测。
AI.result: 研究验证了 incorporation of auxiliary data可以改进检测模型性能，但具体检测精度数据未在摘要中呈现。
AI.conclusion: 自动检测技术有助于保护工作，提供自动化工具有监测减少人类干扰对动物栖息地影响的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about wildlife monitoring and object detection (YOLO for detecting monkeys in camera trap videos), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion generation from video/text. Even though both use computer vision, the domain gap is enormous - this is about animal detection for ecological monitoring, not 3D motion synthesis or video-to-3D generation. The methods (YOLO object detection vs video generation models, VLM, 3D motion generation) are also completely different.

title: World Feedback for Clinical Agents: Diagnosing RL in FHIR Environments
summary: Clinical protocol-execution tasks -- checking a lab value, applying a threshold, placing a correctly structured FHIR order -- are natural candidates for RL from world feedback: once clinical SMEs encode decision logic into a verifier, that verifier grades unlimited rollouts without per-episode annotation. But applying RL requires a sound feedback channel and sufficient base capability. We audit MedAgentBench v1/v2, find a 41.7\% silent-finish ceiling that makes inaction the RL dominant strategy, and construct \textbf{MedAgentBench-v3 (MAB-v3)} (508 tasks, 8.9\% ceiling). Training Qwen3-8B exposes two structural barriers: a \emph{capability ceiling} (10/20 task types have 0\% base performance, zero gradient) and a \emph{format-knowledge barrier} (3/20 types require exact clinical codes undiscoverable by exploration). Pure RL reaches 18.2\% pass@1 vs.\ 34.1\% for rule-based SFT; the 15.9~pp gap is attributable entirely to these barriers. A decision/format-knowledge/lookup taxonomy predicts RL learnability and prescribes the fix: SFT to inject codes, RL to learn conditionals.

AI.tldr: 本文针对医学协议执行任务，审计了MedAgentBench v1/v2发现41.7%的静默完成率导致不作为成为RL主导策略，进而构建了MedAgentBench-v3（508任务，8.9%完成率）。通过Qwen3-8B训练揭示了能力天花板（10/20任务类型零基础性能）和格式知识障碍（3/20任务类型需精确临床代码）两个结构性壁垒。纯RL达到18.2% pass@1 vs 规则SFT的34.1%，15.9个百分点差距完全归因于这些壁垒。提出决策/格式知识/查询分类法预测RL可学习性，建议用SFT注入代码，RL学习条件逻辑。
AI.motivation: 医学协议执行任务（如检查实验室值、应用阈值、放置FHIR订单）是RL从世界反馈中学习的理想候选任务。然而，将RL应用于医学代理需要可靠的反馈渠道和足够的基础能力。当前基准测试存在静默完成问题，导致代理选择不作为而非执行任务，这阻碍了RL的有效训练。
AI.method:
1. 审计MedAgentBench v1/v2，发现静默完成天花板问题
2. 构建MedAgentBench-v3 (MAB-v3)，包含508个任务
3. 使用Qwen3-8B模型进行训练实验
4. 识别两种结构性壁垒：能力天花板和格式知识障碍
5. 提出决策/格式知识/查询 taxonomy来预测RL可学习性
AI.result:
1. MAB-v3将静默完成率从41.7%降至8.9%
2. 发现10/20任务类型有零基础性能和零梯度（能力天花板）
3. 3/20任务类型需要精确临床代码，无法通过探索发现（格式知识障碍）
4. 纯RL达到18.2% pass@1，规则SFT达到34.1%
5. 15.9个百分点差距完全归因于上述两个壁垒
AI.conclusion: RL在医学协议执行任务中存在两个主要障碍：能力天花板和格式知识障碍。提出的taxonomy能有效预测RL可学习性。解决方案是混合方法：使用SFT注入必要的临床代码，使用RL学习条件决策逻辑。这一发现为医学AI代理的训练提供了重要指导。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical AI agents and reinforcement learning in clinical/FHIR environments - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. While it mentions language models (Qwen3-8B), the application domain is healthcare/clinical decision support, not graphics or motion synthesis. The pain points, methods, and research field are entirely different from the research profile which focuses on 2D-to-3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), and visual quality assessment for graphics.

title: Beyond Heatmaps: Unsupervised Concept-Graph Reasoning for Interpretable Visual Explanation
comment: Accepted at the IJCAI-ECAI 2026 Workshop on Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI), Bremen, Germany. 7 pages, 4 figures
summary: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) provide an intrinsically interpretable alternative to post-hoc explanations. However, existing CBMs often rely on predefined concept vocabularies or supervised annotations, lack explicit concept grounding, and summarize each concept with a single image-level score -- discarding spatial recurrence and inter-concept dependencies. We propose a Graph-based Concept Bottleneck Model (G-CBM), an intrinsically interpretable framework that performs unsupervised concept discovery via Non-negative Matrix Factorization (NMF) and represents the discovered concepts as nodes in a per-image concept-graph representation. G-CBM matches region-level features to these concept nodes -- providing concept grounding and capturing concept recurrence across the image -- and applies a \emph{tunable concept filtering threshold} $τ$ to suppress weak region-level features. A Graph Attention Network (GAT) then performs concept-level reasoning by modeling nonlinear dependencies across nodes. Across ImageNet, HAM10000, PH2, and Derm7pt, G-CBM achieves an average relative AUC improvement of 3.7\% over a ResNet-50 baseline. Concept filtering frequently improves predictive performance while inducing selective concept use, achieving peak AUC of $0.96$ on PH2 with only 2 of 10 concepts and 0.92 on HAM10000 with 3.8 of 9 concepts. On dermoscopy benchmarks, G-CBM is competitive with supervised approaches requiring external annotations. Deletion/insertion analyses with random ablation controls show that the learned concept ranking faithfully reflects model predictions.

AI.tldr: Graph-based Concept Bottleneck Model (G-CBM)是一个内在可解释的深度学习框架，通过非负矩阵分解(NMF)进行无监督概念发现，并将发现的概念表示为每幅图像概念图中的节点。该模型通过区域级特征匹配实现概念接地，并使用图注意力网络(GAT)进行概念级推理。
AI.motivation: 现有CBM存在以下问题：1) 依赖预定义概念词汇或监督标注；2) 缺乏显式概念接地；3) 仅使用单一图像级分数表示概念，丢弃了空间复现和概念间依赖关系。
AI.method: 1) 使用NMF进行无监督概念发现；2) 将概念表示为每幅图像概念图中的节点；3) 将区域级特征与概念节点匹配，实现概念接地并捕捉概念在图像中的复现；4) 引入可调概念过滤阈值τ抑制弱区域级特征；5) 使用GAT建模节点间的非线性依赖关系进行概念级推理。
AI.result: 在ImageNet、HAM10000、PH2和Derm7pt数据集上，G-CBM相比ResNet-50基线平均相对AUC提升3.7%。概念过滤可在提升预测性能的同时诱导选择性概念使用：在PH2上仅用2/10概念达到0.96 AUC，在HAM10000上用3.8/9概念达到0.92 AUC。在皮肤镜数据集上，G-CBM与需要外部标注的监督方法具有竞争力。删除/插入分析表明学习到的概念排序忠实反映模型预测。
AI.conclusion: G-CBM通过无监督概念发现、概念图表示和图注意力推理提供了一种内在可解释的替代方案，在多个数据集上展现了良好的可解释性与预测性能权衡。

relevance_reason: This paper is about interpretable visual explanation for medical image classification (dermoscopy datasets like HAM10000, PH2), which is completely unrelated to the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, and video-to-3D synthesis. The paper addresses concept discovery and grounding for image classification using NMF and GAT, while the research profile needs methods for extracting visual features from videos for 3D motion generation, quality assessment, and semantic consistency between text and 3D motions. No overlap in application domain, pain points, or practical use case.

title: Procedural Memory Distillation: Online Reflection for Self-Improving Language Models
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), along with recent selfdistillation variants such as SDPO, evaluates each rollout against a verifier and updates the policy from that episode-level signal. However, the richer procedural information in the rollout is rarely retained or reused. Across episodes and epochs, the model repeatedly encounters related problems under a changing policy, producing cross-episode signals that episode-local updates cannot capture: which strategies consistently pass verification, which failure modes persist, which patterns recur. We propose Procedural Memory Distillation (PMD), which converts these crossepisode signals into reusable procedural memory and distills it into the policy's weights during training. This memory functions as a training scaffold, absorbed into the policy itself, yielding a memory-free model at inference. PMD organizes the memory at three levels of abstraction: raw trajectories, self-reflected strategies and lessons, and higher-level behavioral patterns that recur across problems, all extracted online from the model's own trajectories. A memory-conditioned self-teacher draws on the accumulated experience to supervise the student on its own rollouts, enabling student to progressively internalize procedural knowledge within its parameters. The central design principle is co-evolution: the policy generates rollouts that update the memory, and memory shapes the supervision that updates the policy. Empirically, across Qwen3-8B and OLMo3-Instruct-7B, PMD improves over SDPO by 3.8-5.5% on SCIKNOWEVAL and 7.9-13.6% on LIVECODEBENCH. Co-evolution powers these gains: freezing either the memory or the policy trails PMD by more than 10% across SCIKNOWEVAL domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出程序记忆蒸馏(PMD)方法，将强化学习中的跨episode信号转换为可重用的程序记忆并蒸馏到策略权重中，解决现有RLVR方法仅使用episode级信号而忽略跨episode信息的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法（如SDPO）仅利用episode级别的验证信号，忽略了跨epoch和跨episode中蕴含的丰富程序信息，如哪些策略持续通过验证、哪些失败模式持续存在、哪些模式重复出现。
AI.method: PMD在三个抽象层次组织记忆：原始轨迹、自我反思的策略和教训、以及跨问题的高级行为模式。引入记忆条件自教师，从积累的经验中提取监督信号，使学生逐步将程序知识内化到参数中。核心设计原则是共演化：策略生成更新记忆的轨迹，而记忆塑造更新策略的监督。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-8B和OLMo3-Instruct-7B上，PMD相比SDPO在SCIKNOWEVAL上提升3.8-5.5%，在LIVECODEBENCH上提升7.9-13.6%。共演化机制至关重要：冻结记忆或策略会使性能下降超过10%。
AI.conclusion: 程序记忆蒸馏能有效捕捉和利用跨episode信号，通过共演化机制将程序知识内化到策略中，显著提升模型在科学推理和代码生成任务上的表现。

relevance_reason: This paper is about language model training and reinforcement learning for self-improving LLMs (focused on code/math reasoning benchmarks like SC IKNO WEVAL and LIVECODEBENCH). It has NOTHING to do with Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video-to-motion synthesis, or visual feature extraction. The application domains are completely different - this is pure LLM research while the profile requires computer graphics and motion synthesis expertise.

title: Sign in the Air to Unlock: An Interface for authentication in Virtual and Augmented Reality Powered by Point-Voxel Cross-Attention Network
summary: Significant advancement of immersive technologies such as Virtual and Augmented Reality (VR/AR) and their integration into diverse aspects of modern life need authentication interfaces that are secure, intuitive, and compatible with embodied interaction. Traditional methods such as passwords, PINs, and device-based logins, break immersion and rely on external hardware. Recent 3D-specific behavioral approaches, such as hand-gesture, eye-tracking, and electroencephalography (EEG)-based methods, offer promising alternatives but often require specialized sensors or constrain natural movement, limiting usability in dynamic environments. We present Sign in the Air to Unlock, an in-air signature interface that enables users to authenticate by signing naturally in 3D space which is a familiar, personal, and reproducible gesture. To realize this interface, we design a point-voxel Cross-Attention Network (PV-Net) that jointly models local motion dynamics and global spatial structure from 3D trajectories. The model is evaluated on two datasets: the public DeepAirSig dataset (1,800 signatures from 40 users) and ImmAirsig, a new dataset collected using Meta Quest 2 in immersive VR (880 samples from 22 users). PV-Net achieves an Equal Error Rate of 2.5% on DeepAirSig and 76% classification accuracy on ImmAirSig. These findings highlight the potential of 3D behavioral interfaces for seamless, user-centric authentication that merges security with natural interaction in immersive environments.

AI.tldr: 研究提出Sign in the Air to Unlock空中签名认证接口，使用户能在3D空间中自然签名进行身份验证。设计PV-Net点-体素交叉注意力网络联合建模局部运动动力学和全局空间结构，在DeepAirSig和ImmAirsig数据集上分别实现2.5%的等错误率和76%的分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统认证方法破坏VR/AR沉浸感且依赖外部硬件；现有3D行为认证方法需特殊传感器或限制自然运动，缺乏在动态环境中良好可用性的方案。需要一种安全、直观、兼容自然交互的沉浸式环境认证接口。
AI.method: 设计点-体素交叉注意力网络(PV-Net)联合建模局部运动动力学和全局空间结构，从3D轨迹中提取认证特征。收集两个数据集：公共DeepAirSig(40用户1800签名)和ImmAirsig(22用户880样本，使用Meta Quest 2在沉浸VR中采集)。
AI.result: PV-Net在DeepAirSig上达到2.5%的等错误率(EER)，在ImmAirsig上达到76%的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 3D行为认证接口具有将安全性与自然交互融合的潜力，可实现沉浸式环境中无缝、以用户为中心的认证。空中签名是一种熟悉、个人且可重复的手势，适合作为认证方式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D signature authentication in VR/AR using point-voxel networks, which is a security/biometrics application rather than computer graphics motion synthesis. It does NOT address any of the research profile's pain points: no 2D-to-3D motion generation, no video generation models (Wan, Seedance), no VLM quality supervision, no text-to-motion semantic consistency. The application domain is fundamentally different - it's about authentication verification, not motion generation from video priors. Methods are also completely different (point-voxel CNNs vs diffusion/video generation models).

title: The Agentic Garden of Forking Paths
summary: Empirical research rarely admits a unique analysis. Different analytical choices can lead to different conclusions from the same data, yet these hidden forking paths are difficult to observe. We show that AI agents capture much of the analytical variation among human researchers while making these paths explicit. Across four high-stakes domains, assigning different personas is sufficient for AI agents to report divergent, often opposing, conclusions from the same data and question, with findings systematically aligned with those beliefs. In a study in which 42 human research teams analyzed the same immigration dataset, AI agents reproduced 72% of the human ideological gap in reported effect estimates. Despite reaching opposing conclusions, it is difficult to identify clear issues in each analysis based on the final AI reports: 86% passed independent AI review and 78% passed majority human expert review. These findings suggest that the central challenge is often not flawed analyses, but selective exploration and reporting from a large space of methodologically defensible analyses. AI agents may amplify this longstanding problem by making such exploration inexpensive and scalable. To address this, we introduce the m-value (multiverse value), the probability that an analysis path would produce a claim at least as extreme as the reported one. We further introduce Agentic Bootstrap, which estimates the m-value by using AI agents to sample plausible analysis paths. Applied to the human immigration study, 13.5% of reported human analyses fell in the most extreme 5% of the analysis space (m<0.05). Scientific evidence should therefore be evaluated not only by a single reported analysis but also by its position within the distribution of analyses that could reasonably have been reported. Agentic Bootstrap makes this distribution observable and turns it into a criterion for scientific credibility.

AI.tldr: 研究表明AI代理可以通过赋予不同角色从同一数据得出分歧甚至对立的结论，再现72%的人类意识形态差距。引入m-value概念和Agentic Bootstrap方法评估研究结果在所有合理分析中的位置，解决选择性报告问题。
AI.motivation: 实证研究很少有唯一分析路径，不同分析选择会导致不同结论。这种隐藏的分叉路径难以观察，但AI代理可以使这些路径明确化并放大了这一长期问题。
AI.method: 1）赋予AI不同角色 personas来生成不同分析；2）对比42个人类研究团队分析同一移民数据集；3）独立AI审查和人类专家审查评估分析质量；4）引入m-value概念：分析路径产生至少与报告结果一样极端的概率；5）Agentic Bootstrap方法：用AI代理采样合理分析路径来估计m值
AI.result: 1）赋予AI不同角色足以使其从同一数据和问题报告出分歧甚至对立的结论，结果与角色信念系统一致；2）在移民研究中，AI代理再现了72%的人类意识形态差距；3）尽管得出对立结论，86%通过独立AI审查，78%通过多数人类专家审查，说明问题不在于分析缺陷而在于选择性探索和报告；4）13.5%的人类分析报告落在最极端5%范围（m<0.05）
AI.conclusion: 研究引入m-value（多宇宙值）和Agentic Bootstrap方法来解决分析选择性报告问题。m-value表示分析路径产生至少与报告结果一样极端的结论的概率，可评估研究结果在所有合理分析中的位置。Agentic Bootstrap通过AI代理采样合理分析路径来估计m值。在移民研究中，13.5%的人类分析报告落在最极端的5%范围内（m<0.05），表明科学证据评估应同时考虑单一报告及其在可合理报告分析分布中的位置。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI agents, research methodology, and reproducibility in scientific analysis (addressing selective reporting through the m-value concept). It has NO relevance to the Computer Graphics research profile. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points: 2D-to-3D domain gap, video priors for motion synthesis, 3D motion generation, or visual feature extraction. It does not involve any of the specified methods: VLM for quality supervision, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), or two-stage pipelines for video+motion synthesis. This is a completely different application domain (AI ethics/research methodology) that has no connection to computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: How Much Future Helps? A Controlled Study of Future-Privileged Supervision for Causal Egocentric Gaze Estimation
comment: Accepted to the 7th International Workshop on Eye and Gaze in Computer Vision (GAZE 2026), CVPR 2026. Best Paper Award
summary: Egocentric gaze estimation is commonly studied using models that process the full video with access to future frames, while real-world applications require strictly causal, online prediction. This discrepancy raises key questions: Does future context inherently provide valuable signals for gaze estimation? If so, how much future look-ahead optimally supervises a causal model during training? To investigate, we propose a controlled framework featuring a future-aware branch that accesses a tunable look-ahead horizon during training but is discarded at inference. This design isolates the impact of future context while keeping the inference architecture fixed and strictly causal. Across EGTEA Gaze+ and Ego4D, we find that future-privileged supervision consistently improves causal gaze prediction, confirming its utility. However, performance gains do not increase monotonically with longer look-ahead, but rather peak within a bounded temporal regime. Specifically, optimal performance corresponds to roughly 1.7--3.3 seconds of future context ($H{\in}[5, 10]$) on EGTEA Gaze+ and 2.7 seconds ($H{=}10$) on Ego4D. Our results demonstrate that lightweight causal models can effectively absorb future-aware signals, providing practical guidance for real-time egocentric gaze modeling.

AI.tldr: 研究未来帧上下文对自我为中心视线估计的影响，提出可控框架在训练时使用可调前瞻视野但在推理时丢弃，确定最优前瞻时长约为1.7-3.3秒（EGTEA Gaze+）和2.7秒（Ego4D）。
AI.motivation: 当前自我为中心视线估计模型使用完整视频和未来帧，但实际应用需要严格的因果在线预测。研究者想探究未来上下文是否本身具有价值信号，以及训练时使用多少未来look-ahead可以最优地监督因果模型。
AI.method: 提出一个未来感知分支框架，在训练时访问可调的前瞻视野但在推理时丢弃。该设计隔离了未来上下文的影响，同时保持推理架构固定且严格因果。在EGTEA Gaze+和Ego4D数据集上实验。
AI.result: 未来特权监督 consistently improves因果视线预测，确认了其效用。但性能增益并非随look-ahead增加而单调增加，而是在有限时间范围内达到峰值。最佳性能对应约1.7-3.3秒未来上下文（H∈[5,10]）在EGTEA Gaze+和2.7秒（H=10）在Ego4D。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级因果模型可以有效吸收未来感知信号，为实时自我为中心视线建模提供实践指导。

relevance_reason: This paper is about egocentric gaze estimation (Computer Vision task of predicting where someone is looking from first-person view), which is completely different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics - specifically 3D motion generation from videos. The application domains are entirely different: gaze estimation vs. 3D motion synthesis. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points (domain gap, quality assessment, semantic consistency, visual feature extraction for 3D generation) and does not use any of the relevant methods (VLM, video generation models like Wan/Seedance, two-stage pipelines). Even though the paper uses a "future-privileged supervision" concept, this is methodologically unrelated to the video generation + motion synthesis pipeline needed in the research profile.

title: Janus: a Playground for User-Involved Agentic Permission Management
comment: Code and data released on GitHub: https://github.com/GraceBrigham/Janus
summary: AI agents that autonomously execute tool calls on a user's behalf raise pressing questions about permission management: what role could users play, and what role should they play? Despite many proposed approaches, the user's role in agentic permission management remains under explored. We introduce Janus, a playground system for implementing and evaluating user-involved agentic permission management designs. Janus consists of two components: Janus-Core, a modular agentic system supporting a diverse spectrum of permission management designs, and Janus-Harness, an automated evaluation framework. Grounded in a conceptual model that identifies key design axes for user involvement, we implement six permission assistants spanning the design space and evaluate them across three scenarios and three synthetic responders. We demonstrate that user input is critical and can significantly strengthen privacy and security, that AI augmentation of user decisions can help reduce cognitive load, and that realistic user behavior including permission fatigue must be accounted for in system design. No single design performs optimally across all contexts, motivating a more principled and context-sensitive approach to deploying permission assistants in agentic systems. Janus is publicly available to support future investigation into this dimension of agentic system design.

AI.tldr: Janus是一个用于实现和评估用户参与的智能体权限管理设计的 playground 系统，包含模块化智能体系统 Janus-Core 和自动评估框架 Janus-Harness，通过六个权限助手评估发现用户输入对隐私安全至关重要，AI 辅助可降低认知负荷，但需考虑用户疲劳等问题，没有单一设计在所有场景下最优。
AI.motivation: AI 智能体代表用户自主执行工具调用引发权限管理问题，但用户角色在智能体权限管理中的作用尚未得到充分探索。尽管已提出许多方法，但缺乏系统性的实现和评估工具。
AI.method: 构建概念模型识别用户参与的关键设计轴，实现六个覆盖设计空间的权限助手，在三个场景和三个合成响应器上进行评估。
AI.result: 用户输入对加强隐私和安全性至关重要，AI 增强用户决策可降低认知负荷，需考虑现实用户行为（包括权限疲劳），没有单一设计在所有情境下表现最优。
AI.conclusion: 需要更原则性和情境敏感的方法来部署智能体系统中的权限助手，Janus 公开可用以支持该领域未来研究。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI agent permission management and user involvement in AI systems for privacy/security - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video-to-3D synthesis, or any visual computing research. The application domains are entirely different: one deals with AI agent safety and permission systems, while the research profile focuses on visual/motion generation tasks. No relevance to the stated field, pain points, or methods.

title: A Cost-Aware, Paired Protocol for Auditing Dynamic Tool Synthesis in Agentic Video Question Answering
summary: Agentic Video Question Answering (VideoQA) systems invoke tools during inference, but their tool libraries are fixed, so recurring procedures are rebuilt from primitives on every question. Synthesizing composite tools could remove this overhead, but whether such expansion helps is hard to assess: final-answer accuracy, the standard metric, ignores inference effort, so it cannot reveal how a system shifts cost.
