We propose a cost-aware, paired protocol for auditing tool-augmented video agents. The protocol pairs two complete systems on the same input for each question and reports their net difference across accuracy and cost jointly. For each question, it sorts the paired outcome into one of six groups defined by joint correctness and by the change in visible tool calls, separating accuracy-preserving efficiency gains from harmful regressions. Significance is reported with McNemar's test and paired bootstrap confidence intervals. We instantiate the protocol on Dynamic-SAGE, an agentic VideoQA framework that synthesizes, validates, and persistently registers executable composite tools for reuse on unseen questions, and evaluate it against the SAGE baseline on SAGE-Bench. The audit reveals a multi-axis profile that a scalar accuracy comparison would miss: Dynamic-SAGE improves accuracy by 7.5 points (p < 0.001) and reduces reasoning turns and visible tool calls by roughly 28%, while shifting rather than reducing inference cost, as token usage rises 34% and cost 26%. Gains are largest on visual and open-ended questions and neutral on verbal and multimodal ones, and residual failures concentrate on hard, open-ended questions where the pipeline does the most work. By measuring accuracy and cost jointly, the protocol shows where the pipeline-level difference is reliable and where it is not. The code is available at https://github.com/KurbanIntelligenceLab/Dynamic-SAGE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种成本感知的成对审计协议，用于评估工具增强的视频问答代理，并通过Dynamic-SAGE系统实例化该协议。协议通过配对比较准确率和成本联合报告，揭示了传统单一准确率指标无法捕捉的多轴profile。
AI.motivation: 当前VideoQA系统的工具库是固定的，常见流程需要每次从原语重建。合成复合工具可减少开销，但最终准确率指标忽略了推理成本，无法揭示系统成本转移情况。因此需要一种同时考虑准确率和成本的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出成本感知的成对审计协议：针对每个问题配对两个完整系统，联合报告准确率和成本的净差异。将结果分为六组：联合正确性和可见工具调用变化，分离保持准确率的效率提升和有害回归。使用McNemar检验和成对bootstrap置信区间报告显著性。在Dynamic-SAGE（可合成、验证和持久注册可执行复合工具的系统）上实例化该协议，并在SAGE-Bench上评估。
AI.result: Dynamic-SAGE相比SAGE基线：准确率提升7.5点(p<0.001)，推理轮次和可见工具调用减少约28%，但token使用量增加34%，成本增加26%。收益在视觉和开放性问题最大，在语言和多模态问题上中性。残留失败集中在困难开放性问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合测量准确率和成本，该协议显示了管道级差异在何处可靠、在何处不可靠。这种方法揭示了单一准确率比较会错过的多轴profile，为评估工具增强代理提供了更全面的视角。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion generation from videos (e.g., extracting visual features for synthesizing 3D human motions). The paper is about Video Question Answering (VideoQA) and agent tool synthesis evaluation - an AI/ML systems paper. Even though both involve "video," the domain is entirely different: computer graphics/motion synthesis vs. video QA agents. The methods (cost-aware evaluation protocols, McNemar tests) and pain points (accuracy-cost tradeoffs in QA) have no relevance to the target field.

title: Revisiting Chain-of-Thought Reasoning under Limited Supervision: Semi-supervised Chain-of-Thought Learning
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning has emerged as an effective approach for activating latent reasoning capabilities in large language models. However, most existing CoT methods use reasoning chains mainly as inference-time prompts, while the generated reasoning traces are rarely reused as semi-supervised learning signals. In this report, we define \textbf{Semi-supervised Chain-of-Thought Learning} and propose \textbf{Semi-CoT}, a simple framework that uses unlabeled questions to construct pseudo reasoning supervision. Semi-CoT samples multiple pseudo-CoTs for each unlabeled question, estimates answer-level semantic entropy, and selects low-entropy reasoning chains as reliable pseudo-CoT demonstrations. This extends the self-training view of CoT from inference-time refinement to semi-supervised pseudo-supervision. Pilot experiments on AQuA, SVAMP, GSM8K, and MultiArith show that the entropy gate selects high-precision pseudo-CoTs, with pseudo-answer precision ranging from $91.36\%$ to $100\%$. Semi-CoT also gives small gains on SVAMP and GSM8K, while AQuA shows negative transfer and MultiArith reaches a ceiling. These results suggest that unlabeled questions can provide reliable pseudo reasoning signals, but their effective use still requires stronger demonstration selection or student training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Semi-CoT框架，将CoT推理链从推理时提示扩展为半监督学习信号，通过语义熵筛选高质量伪推理链，在多个数学推理数据集上验证了其可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有CoT方法主要将推理链作为推理时提示使用，而生成的推理痕迹很少被重用为半监督学习信号。作者希望将CoT的自训练视图从推理时精炼扩展到半监督伪监督。
AI.method: Semi-CoT框架包含三个关键步骤：1)对每个无标签问题采样多个伪CoT；2)估计答案级语义熵；3)选择低熵推理链作为可靠的伪CoT演示。
AI.result: 在AQuA、SVAMP、GSM8K和MultiArith数据集上，熵门选择高精度伪CoTs，伪答案精确度达91.36%至100%；SVAMP和GSM8K上有小幅提升，AQuA出现负迁移，MultiArith达到天花板。
AI.conclusion: 无标签问题可提供可靠的伪推理信号，但其有效利用仍需更强的演示选择或学生模型训练。当前方法在小模型上效果有限，可能需要更先进的筛选策略或学生微调方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Chain-of-Thought reasoning in Large Language Models for mathematical reasoning tasks (AQuA, SVAMP, GSM8K, MultiArith datasets). This is purely NLP/LLM research, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video synthesis, or any visual computing domain. The application domain is entirely different - it deals with text-based mathematical problem solving, not visual motion synthesis from 2D videos. No relevance to the research profile's focus on VLM for quality supervision, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), or two-stage pipelines for motion synthesis.

title: Anti-Prompt: Image Protection against Text-Guided Image-to-Video Generation
summary: Recent advances in Image-to-Video generation allow a single image to be animated into a convincing video under text guidance, raising serious copyright and privacy risks. We propose Anti-Prompt, an image protection approach that injects imperceptible perturbations into an image, inducing visible inconsistencies and structural failures in text-guided I2V generation. Our method is motivated by a simple empirical observation. When text guidance is removed from modern I2V models, generation quality degrades markedly, not only in motion realism but also in subject preservation, structural coherence, and temporal consistency. Building on this insight, Anti-Prompt exploits the model reliance on textual guidance by attenuating text-conditioned interactions during denoising while strengthening visual-only pathways. To further systematically evaluate protection effectiveness, we introduce a Video-LLM-assisted evaluation protocol that provides interpretable, frame-grounded analyses of generation artifacts and inconsistencies. Experiments on two representative I2V architectures demonstrate that our method achieves strong protection performance while improving efficiency and cross-model transferability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Anti-Prompt方法，通过向图像注入不可感知的扰动来保护图像免受文本引导的图像到视频(I2V)生成模型的滥用。该方法利用了现代I2V模型对文本指导的依赖性，在去噪过程中削弱文本条件交互，同时增强纯视觉通道。
AI.motivation: 解决单张图像在文本引导下被动画化成视频所带来的严重版权和隐私风险问题。
AI.method: 1)基于一个关键观察：当移除文本指导时，I2V生成质量显著下降；2)通过在去噪过程中削弱文本条件交互、增强视觉通道来实施保护；3)引入Video-LLM辅助评估协议进行系统评估。
AI.result: 在两种代表性I2V架构上实现了强大的保护效果，同时提高了效率和跨模型迁移性。
AI.conclusion: Anti-Prompt能有效保护图像免受未授权的I2V生成，为AI生成内容的安全和版权保护提供了新途径。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses image protection/security against I2V generation misuse, which is completely different from the research profile's focus on 3D motion generation from 2D videos. While both involve video generation models, the application domains are opposite: the research profile aims to extract visual features from videos FOR 3D motion synthesis, while this paper aims to protect images FROM being used by I2V models. The only loose connection is the mention of Video-LLM for evaluation, but this doesn't address any of the stated pain points (domain gap, quality assessment, semantic consistency, visual feature extraction for 3D generation).

title: OPINE-World: Programmatic World Modeling with Ontology-error-Prioritized Interactive Exploration
summary: Learning how an environment behaves from interaction is central to building agents that adapt to unfamiliar tasks. World models learned with deep networks are flexible but data-hungry and transfer poorly beyond their training distribution. Program-synthesized world models, written as source code by LLMs and refined through counterexample-guided inductive synthesis (CEGIS), are instead data-efficient and reusable, yet they have been demonstrated mainly on structured-state worlds with a given object vocabulary, and a single program search does not scale to pixel-rendered environments whose object structure must be hypothesized flexibly. We introduce OPINE-World, an LLM agent that learns an object-centric programmatic world model online from interaction. OPINE-World couples two cooperating agents in a loop of hypothesis and test, one acting in the environment and one synthesizing the model in code with replay verification and model-based planning, and it steers exploration with a Bayesian measure of object-type adequacy we call ontology error. We evaluate OPINE-World on ARC-AGI-3, a benchmark for skill-acquisition efficiency in which the object vocabulary, the goal, and the action semantics are withheld. OPINE-World solves 20 of 25 games without per-game training and reaches an action-efficiency score of 78.4 against the human baseline.

AI.tldr: OPINE-World是一个基于LLM的智能体，通过在线学习目标-centric程序化世界模型来解决未见过的任务。它结合假设与测试的循环，在环境中行动的同时合成代码模型，并通过贝叶斯Ontology Error引导探索。在ARC-AGI-3基准测试中，无需每游戏训练即解决25个游戏中的20个，动作效率达到人类基线的78.4%。
AI.motivation: 深度网络学习的世界模型灵活但数据需求大且迁移性差；程序化世界模型虽数据高效且可复用，但主要局限于结构化状态世界，单一程序搜索无法扩展到需要灵活假设对象结构的像素渲染环境。
AI.method: OPINE-World采用两个协作智能体的循环：一个在环境中行动，一个通过重放验证和基于模型的规划合成代码模型。探索由贝叶斯对象类型充分性度量Ontology Error引导。
AI.result: 在ARC-AGI-3基准测试中，OPINE-World无需每游戏训练解决25个游戏中的20个，动作效率达到人类基线的78.4%。
AI.conclusion: OPINE-World成功实现了从交互中在线学习对象-centric程序化世界模型，展示了LLM智能体在新任务中数据高效学习和迁移的能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM-based agents solving ARC-AGI puzzle tasks using programmatic world models - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. The application domain is AI/RL game solving, not graphics, video generation, or motion synthesis. It addresses none of the pain points mentioned (2D-3D domain gap, video-to-motion synthesis, semantic text-to-motion consistency, visual feature extraction). Zero methodological overlap with the research profile.

title: Disentangling Pictorial Cue Understanding from Language Bias in VLMs via Depth Ordering Task
comment: 15 pages, 7 figures, accepted to ECCV 2026 (30 pages, 13 figures, supplementary materials included)
summary: In this paper, we study depth perception of vision-language models (VLMs) to isolate the effects of pictorial depth cues and disentangle vision and language influences on model performance. To this end, we combine depth-ordering and odd-one-out psychophysical tasks: the VLMs are presented with images where one object is at different depth relative to other, otherwise identical, objects, and must determine whether the odd-one-out target is closer or farther to the observer. To create stimuli, we generate 2D views from simulated and real 3D scenes while controlling the presence of individual pictorial depth cues, enabling a fine-grained analysis of cue-level contributions. Language effects are examined by varying referring expression clarity. We also introduce a novel metric to quantify vision-vs-language sensitivities. Applying this methodology, we create the Odd-One-Out Depth (O3-D) dataset with 37K real and synthetic images and 147K image-question pairs. Evaluation of 12 open-source and commercial models on O3-D shows under-utilization of depth cues and depth-ordering accuracies between 47% and 56%, with no model above chance level. At the same time, our metric reveals strong linguistic bias in the answers. Neither chain-of-thought (CoT) nor in-context learning (ICL) significantly improves performance, suggesting that static image data alone may be insufficient for depth understanding. All code, the image generation pipeline, and the O3-D dataset are publicly released at https://github.com/lyiqian/o3-d.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了视觉语言模型(VLM)的深度感知能力，创建了O3-D数据集(37K图像，147K问答对)来分离图像深度线索和语言影响。评估12个模型发现深度排序准确率仅47-56%，低于随机水平，揭示了强烈的语言偏见，且思维链和上下文学习未能显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 研究视觉语言模型的深度感知能力，分离图像深度线索的影响，解开视觉和语言对模型性能的各自影响
AI.method: 结合深度排序和"找出异类"心理物理任务；从模拟和真实3D场景生成2D视图；控制单个图像深度线索的存在；引入量化视觉vs语言敏感性的新指标；创建O3-D数据集；评估12个开源和商业模型；测试思维链(CoT)和上下文学习(ICL)
AI.result: 深度排序准确率在47%-56%之间；所有模型均未超过随机水平；指标揭示了强烈的语言偏见；CoT和ICL均未显著提升性能
AI.conclusion: VLM未充分利用深度线索，深度排序能力接近随机水平；存在严重的语言偏差；静态图像数据可能不足以支持深度理解；需要新的方法来增强VLM的深度感知能力

relevance_reason: This paper is about VLM evaluation and depth perception bias, not about 3D motion generation or computer graphics synthesis. While it mentions VLMs and 3D scenes, the application domain is fundamentally different - it's a VLM benchmarking study, not a motion synthesis pipeline. It doesn't address any of the pain points (domain gap, quality assessment, semantic consistency, visual guidance extraction) and doesn't use VLMs for quality supervision as intended in the research profile.

title: Scaling Trends for Lie Detector Oversight in Preference Learning
summary: Deceptive behavior in LLMs is costly to monitor and prevent, motivating approaches such as Scalable Oversight via Lie Detectors (SOLiD) (Cundy & Gleave, 2025), which uses lie detectors to identify responses for review by high-cost labelers. In this paper, we scale SOLiD to larger models and evaluate it in more diverse and realistic preference-learning settings. We find favorable scaling: undetected deception drops from 34% for 1B-parameter models to 14% for 405B-parameter models at a detector true positive rate of 99%, and expensive human labelers can be removed entirely from the fine-tuning phase without a statistically significant increase in deception. However, SOLiD is sensitive to distribution shift between detector training and preference-training data, which can drive detector false positive rates to impractical levels.

AI.tldr: SOLiD方法使用测谎仪来识别需要人工审核的回复，以成本效益更高的方式监控LLM中的欺骗行为。该方法在更大模型上表现出良好的扩展性，未检测到的欺骗率从1B参数的34%下降到405B参数的14%（在99%真阳性率下），且可在微调阶段完全移除人工标注者而不会显著增加欺骗行为。但该方法对检测器训练数据和偏好训练数据之间的分布偏移敏感，可能导致误报率过高。
AI.motivation: LLM中的欺骗行为监控和预防成本高昂，需要一种可扩展的监督方法
AI.method: 使用测谎仪识别需要人工审核的回复，在更大模型和更多样化的偏好学习环境中进行评估和扩展
AI.result: 扩展性良好：未检测到的欺骗率从1B参数的34%下降到405B参数的14%（99%真阳性率下）；可完全移除人工标注者而不会显著增加欺骗行为
AI.conclusion: 对检测器训练数据和偏好训练数据之间的分布偏移敏感，可能导致误报率过高到不切实际的水平

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about LLM safety, lie detection, and monitoring deceptive behavior in large language models - which has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation, or visual feature extraction. The application domains are entirely different: the research profile focuses on visual computing and motion synthesis while this paper addresses AI alignment and LLM oversight.

title: Hidden-Shot: Towards One-Shot Task Generalization for Low-Level Vision Generalist Models
summary: Despite the intense engagement surrounding low-level vision generalist models, their effectiveness in zero/few-shot scenarios beyond learned tasks remains unverified. The primary challenge of developing an ideal generalist lies in achieving the ability to generalize from new unseen tasks, which also can be assessed by matched quantitative criteria. Existing methods have made some progress in prompt engineering but have not systematically explored this gap across a wide range of low-level visual tasks. Stimulated by the problem, we propose Hidden-Shot, an implicit prompt mechanism aimed at exploring low-level task adaptation in a vision generalist model. Specifically, the method extracts implicit visual task-based information, utilizes a global task-aware textural prompt, and selectively merges implicit information with in-task processing information to enhance one-shot capabilities in new tasks. The overall design performs direct injection in a cost-effective manner, while minimally altering the architecture of the original generalist model. Additionally, we introduce a data-driven evaluation framework termed C/U assessment to cover two basic scenarios, 3C4U (3 conventional and 4 unconventional tasks) for retraining existing models and 3C7U (3 conventional and 7 unconventional tasks) for training from scratch, as a comprehensive assessment to systematically test the generalization ability of low-level generalist models. Experiments on seven and ten datasets outperform the state-of-the-art vision generalist model, respectively verified by 3C4U and 3C7U framework. Our presented Hidden-Shot approach demonstrates superior performance on one-shot new tasks while maintaining consistent performance on existing tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Hidden-Shot，一种隐式提示机制，用于探索视觉通用模型在低层视觉任务中的零/少样本适应能力，通过提取隐式视觉任务信息、利用全局任务感知文本提示和选择性合并信息来增强新任务的一次性学习能力，并引入C/U评估框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管低层视觉通用模型受到广泛关注，但它们在未见任务上的零/少样本场景有效性尚未得到验证。现有方法在提示工程方面取得了一些进展，但尚未系统地探索低层视觉任务之间的泛化差距。
AI.method: 提出Hidden-Shot方法，包括：1)提取隐式视觉任务信息；2)利用全局任务感知文本提示；3)选择性合并隐式信息与任务内处理信息；4)以低成本方式进行直接注入，同时最小化对原始通用模型架构的修改。同时引入C/U评估框架，包括3C4U和3C7U两种评估场景。
AI.result: 在7个和10个数据集上的实验分别通过3C4U和3C7U框架验证，优于当前最先进的视觉通用模型。
AI.conclusion: Hidden-Shot方法在新任务的一次性学习上表现出色，同时保持了在现有任务上的一致性能，为低层视觉通用模型的泛化能力提供了有效的评估和提升方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about low-level vision tasks (image restoration, enhancement, super-resolution) and zero/few-shot adaptation for visual generalist models. The research profile is about 3D motion generation from videos, specifically extracting visual features from 2D videos for 3D motion synthesis, quality assessment, and semantic consistency. These are completely different application domains - one deals with image-level vision tasks while the other deals with 3D motion generation in computer graphics. The methods and goals are entirely unrelated despite both being in the broader computer vision space.

title: EO-Agents: A Three-Agent LLM Pipeline for Earth Observation Hypothesis Generation
comment: Accepted at the ICML 2026 AI for Science Workshop
summary: Large language models have recently been explored for scientific hypothesis generation, but most prior work relies on unstructured literature and free-form textual claims. We present a pipeline for Earth observation that grounds hypothesis generation directly in the NASA Earth Observation Knowledge Graph. A heterogeneous graph neural network trained on historical co-usage relations ranks candidate dataset pairings, and a three-agent LLM pipeline filters, generates, and evaluates structured research hypotheses. Applied to 1,475 NASA datasets, the system produces 160 hypotheses spanning multiple Earth-science domains, including ecohydrology, glaciology, aerosol--cloud interactions, vegetation phenology, and stratospheric chemistry. Model-predicted novel dataset pairings are rated nearly as plausible as held-out real co-usages from the literature, indicating that the pipeline surfaces scientifically coherent yet unexplored combinations. A 2*2*2 factorial experiment across GPT-5.2 and Claude Sonnet 4.6 shows that hypothesis rankings remain stable, while absolute scores depend strongly on judge identity, highlighting limitations of single-judge LLM evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于NASA地球观测知识图谱的科学假设生成管道，结合图神经网络和LLM代理用于地球科学假设生成，在NASA数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 先前的大语言模型假设生成工作主要依赖非结构化文献和自由形式文本，缺乏对结构化科学数据的直接 grounding。
AI.method: 使用基于历史共现关系训练的异构图神经网络对候选数据集配对进行排序，通过三代理LLM管道进行假设过滤、生成和评估。
AI.result: 系统从1,475个NASA数据集生成了160个跨多个地球科学领域的假设，模型预测的新数据集配对评分与文献中真实共使用案例评分接近。2×2×2因子实验表明假设排名稳定，但绝对评分高度依赖评判者身份。
AI.conclusion: 该管道能生成科学上合理但尚未探索的数据集组合；单评判者LLM评估存在局限性，需要多样化评判机制。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Earth observation and scientific hypothesis generation using LLMs and knowledge graphs - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. The application domain (earth science/geoscience) has no connection to the research profile's focus on video-to-3D-motion synthesis, visual feature extraction, or the computer graphics domain. Even though it mentions LLMs, this is not the relevant method area - the profile specifically needs video generation models (Wan, Seedance), VLMs for visual quality supervision, and 3D motion generation models.

title: Boosting Infrared Small Target Detection via Logit-Domain Contrast and Adaptive Shape Refinement
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Infrared small target detection (IRSTD) remains challenging due to tiny target size, low signal-to-noise ratio, severe foreground-background imbalance, and blurred boundaries in complex scenes. Existing methods usually rely on post-activation probability-domain supervision for discrimination, where weak targets and strong clutter may produce saturated and close probabilities, limiting weak-target discrimination. Meanwhile, blurred boundaries and halo-like predictions mainly stem from thermal diffusion, tiny target scale, boundary uncertainty, and insufficient explicit contour constraints. To address these issues, we propose Adaptive-Contrastive SLSIoU (AC-SLSIoU), a plug-and-play discriminative and shape-aware loss for IRSTD. Specifically, a Logit-Domain Margin Constraint (LDMC) is introduced to enlarge the response gap between targets and informative hard negatives in the logit space, thereby enhancing weak-target discrimination. Adaptive Boundary Suppression (ABS) applies scale-aware annular penalties to refine target contours and suppress halo-like overflow responses. In addition, False-Alarm Focal Loss assigns larger weights to high-probability negative samples, further penalizing persistent high-confidence false alarms. Without introducing extra inference overhead, the proposed method can be seamlessly integrated into existing detectors and consistently improves both detection accuracy and shape quality. Extensive experiments and cross-backbone evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness, robustness, and generalization ability of the proposed method for infrared small target detection.

AI.tldr: 红外小目标检测（IRSTD）面临挑战：目标尺寸微小、信噪比低、前后景严重不平衡、边界模糊。现有方法依赖后验概率域监督，弱目标与强杂波产生饱和或接近的概率值，导致弱目标区分度不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法的局限性：1）后验概率域监督中，弱目标和强杂波产生的概率值接近或饱和，限制弱目标区分能力；2）模糊边界和光晕预测源于热扩散、微小目标尺度、边界不确定性以及缺乏显式轮廓约束。
AI.method: 提出自适应对比SLSIoU（AC-SLSIoU）损失函数，包含三个核心组件：1）Logit域边际约束（LDMC）在logit空间中扩大目标与信息性硬负样本的响应差距；2）自适应边界抑制（ABS）应用尺度感知的环形惩罚来优化目标轮廓并抑制光晕溢出响应；3）假警报焦点Loss对高概率负样本分配更大权重，进一步惩罚持续的高置信度虚警。
AI.result: 该方法可无缝集成到现有检测器中，不引入额外推理开销，持续提升检测精度和形状质量。广泛实验和跨骨干网络评估证明了其在红外小目标检测中的有效性、鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: AC-SLSIoU损失函数作为即插即用的模块，能够有效解决弱目标区分和边界模糊问题，显著提升红外小目标检测的性能和形状质量，且具有良好的泛化能力。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about infrared small target detection (IRSTD) for military/security surveillance applications, which is a computer vision task in the defense domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), and VLM-based quality supervision. The application domains are entirely different - infrared target detection has no relationship to 3D motion synthesis or video generation for graphics. The methods (logit-domain contrast, boundary suppression) are also unrelated to the required methods (VLM, video generation models, motion generation).

title: Hawk: Harnessing Hardware-Aware Knowledge for High-Performance NPU Kernel Generation
summary: Developing high-performance kernels for Neural Processing Units (NPUs) is a critical industry bottleneck, requiring developers to manually navigate implicit hardware constraints and strict memory hierarchies. While large language models offer immense automation potential, they fail catastrophically on NPUs due to a fundamental lack of hardware-specific priors. Naively transplanting code snippets from similar NPU kernels may pass the compiler, but it consistently triggers runtime crashes and performance degradation by blindly violating underlying hardware constraints. To overcome this, we introduce Hawk, a training-free framework that harnesses hardware-aware knowledge through three core modules: (1) Run-Time Knowledge Synthesis Module, which employs a Triple-Part Executable Knowledge Representation to inherently couple the error context with executable semantics; (2) Bottleneck-Aware Knowledge Retrieval Module, which implements a 2D-Retrieval paradigm to project queries into orthogonal syntactic and hardware-aligned semantic spaces; and (3) Effect-Driven Knowledge Distillation Module, which leverages LLM-driven semantic arbitration to continuously distill the knowledge by pruning errors and consolidating redundancies based on the empirical execution feedback. Extensive evaluations on real-world NPU workloads demonstrate that Hawk elevates generation accuracy from 49.4% to 80.0%, while achieving up to a 2.2x execution speedup over state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: Hawk是一个无需训练的框架，通过三个核心模块利用硬件感知知识来为神经处理单元(NPU)生成高性能内核，解决了大语言模型在NPU上因缺乏硬件特定先验知识而失败的问题。
AI.motivation: 开发NPU高性能内核是关键行业瓶颈，开发者需要手动处理隐式硬件约束和严格内存层次。大语言模型虽具自动化潜力，但在NPU上因缺乏硬件特定先验而完全失败。简单移植代码片段虽可通过编译器，但会触发运行时崩溃和性能下降。
AI.method: 提出三个核心模块：(1)运行时知识合成模块，采用三重部分可执行知识表示，将错误上下文与可执行语义内在耦合；(2)瓶颈感知知识检索模块，实现二维检索范式，将查询投影到正交句法和硬件对齐语义空间；(3)效果驱动知识蒸馏模块，利用LLM驱动的语义仲裁，通过基于经验执行反馈的剪枝错误和整合冗余来持续蒸馏知识。
AI.result: 在真实NPU工作负载上的广泛评估表明，Hawk将生成准确率从49.4%提升到80.0%，同时相比最先进基线实现高达2.2倍的执行加速。
AI.conclusion: Hawk成功解决了LLM在NPU内核生成中的硬件适配问题，通过硬件感知知识实现高精度高效率的内核代码生成，为NPU开发提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about NPU (Neural Processing Unit) kernel generation and hardware optimization for running LLMs on NPUs. It has NO relevance to the research profile which is in Computer Graphics focusing on 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), visual feature extraction, and text-to-motion synthesis. The application domains are completely different - this is systems/hardware architecture while the research profile is computer graphics and motion synthesis. The methods (knowledge synthesis, retrieval, distillation for NPU optimization) are entirely unrelated to VLM for quality supervision, video generation, or 3D motion generation.

title: Mind the Gap: Standard 3DGS Evaluation Primarily Measures Near-Trajectory Interpolation
summary: Standard MipNeRF360-style 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) evaluation holds out every N-th frame -- but these frames have trained neighbors on both sides, so the metric measures near-trajectory interpolation rather than spatial generalization. We introduce a fair matched-count protocol that isolates this effect: both arms train on the same number of images and differ only in whether the holdout is spread evenly (interpolation) or forms a contiguous spatial sector (extrapolation). Our primary finding is a large, consistent interpolation-extrapolation gap of 3~12dB -- several times the differences typically reported between competing methods. The gap is robust to training noise, is in two cases large enough to flip a method ranking under multi-seed confirmation, and -- crucially -- persists across three representation families, including a non-Gaussian volumetric neural radiance field (NeRF), so it reflects spatial coverage rather than any one representation. Diagnostically, it is dominated by a diffuse/geometry-proxy component and tracks each view's angular distance to its nearest training view, a zero-cost signal that also guides capture planning; loss-side regularization yields only marginal gains. Standard holdouts remain useful for near-trajectory rendering but should not, alone, be read as evidence of spatial generalization. Prior work notes protocol sensitivity; ours is, to our knowledge, the first to combine matched-count paired holdout, cross-representation quantification, and a diagnostic analysis Table 1. We describe a spatial-holdout benchmark toolkit with standardized splits and baselines for 16 scenes, which we are preparing for public release.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了标准MipNeRF360式3DGS评估中存在的方法学问题：传统每N帧留一帧的策略实际上测试的是近轨迹插值而非空间泛化能力。通过设计匹配数量的配对留出协议（均匀间隔vs连续空间区域），作者发现插值-外推差距高达3~12dB，该差距在不同表征家族中均存在，表明问题根源在于空间覆盖而非特定表征本身。
AI.motivation: 标准3DGS评估使用每N-th帧留一的方式，但这些被留出的帧两侧都有训练邻居，因此度量的是近轨迹插值而非空间泛化能力。这导致对方法性能的评估可能产生误导。
AI.method: 提出匹配计数协议：两组实验训练相同数量的图像，区别在于留出方式是均匀分布(插值)还是形成连续空间区域(外推)。同时在三种表征家族(3DGS、NeRF等)上验证，并使用角度距离作为诊断工具。
AI.result: 发现3~12dB的大幅稳定插值-外推差距，是方法间差异的数倍。该差距对训练噪声鲁棒，在两种情况下大到足以翻转方法排名，且在非高斯体神经辐射场(NeRF)中也存在，证明问题源于空间覆盖而非特定表征。
AI.conclusion: 标准留出帧适用于近轨迹渲染评估，但不应单独作为空间泛化的证据。建议使用空间留出基准进行更公平的评估，作者还准备了包含16个场景的标准化工具包将公开发布。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) evaluation methodology for novel view synthesis, which is completely different from the research profile's focus on 3D motion generation from 2D videos. The paper addresses interpolation vs extrapolation evaluation issues in 3DGS, while the research profile deals with motion synthesis using video generation models, VLMs, and visual feature extraction. No overlap in application domain (novel view synthesis vs motion generation), pain points, or methods.

title: Safe and Adaptive Cloud Healing: Verifying LLM-Generated Recovery Plans with a Neural-Symbolic World Model
summary: As the scale and complexity of cloud-based AI systems continue to escalate, ensuring service reliability through rapid fault detection and adaptive recovery has become a critical challenge. While existing approaches integrate Large Language Models (LLMs) for semantic understanding and Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) for policy optimization, they often rely on sequential, loosely coupled architectures that underutilize the generative and reasoning capabilities of LLMs. In this paper, we propose a paradigm shift with PASE, a Planning-Aware Semantic self-healing engine, a novel fault self-healing framework that reconceptualizes recovery as a neuro-symbolic program synthesis task. PASE employs an LLM as a core Plan Synthesis Engine to generate structured recovery plans from a library of semantic primitives. A Neural-Symbolic World Model verifies plan feasibility through simulation, while a Meta-Prompt Optimizer, trained via DRL, learns to generate optimal prompts that guide the LLM's planning process. This tight reason-plan-verify-adapt loop enables dynamic, context-aware recovery strategy generation beyond predefined action spaces. Experiments on a real-world cloud fault injection dataset demonstrate that PASE significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, reducing average system recovery time by over 40% and improving fault detection accuracy in unknown fault scenarios. Our framework advances autonomous system management by unifying LLM-based reasoning with model-assisted verification and meta-learned guidance.

AI.tldr: PASE（Planning-Aware Semantic self-healing engine）是一种新型故障自愈框架，将云系统故障恢复重新概念化为神经符号程序合成任务。该框架通过紧密的推理-计划-验证-适应循环，实现动态、上下文感知的恢复策略生成，超越预定义动作空间。
AI.motivation: 随着云端人工智能系统的规模和复杂性持续升级，确保服务可靠性、快速故障检测和自适应恢复已成为关键挑战。现有方法虽然整合了大型语言模型（LLM）进行语义理解和深度强化学习（DRL）进行策略优化，但通常依赖顺序、松散耦合的架构，未能充分利用LLM的生成和推理能力。
AI.method: PASE框架包含三个核心组件：1）LLM作为核心计划合成引擎，从语义原语库生成结构化恢复计划；2）神经符号世界模型通过模拟验证计划可行性；3）元提示优化器通过DRL训练，学习生成引导LLM规划过程的最优提示。
AI.result: 在真实云故障注入数据集上的实验表明，PASE显著优于最先进的方法，平均系统恢复时间减少超过40%，在未知故障场景下故障检测准确率得到提升。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过将基于LLM的推理与模型辅助验证和元学习指导相结合，推进了自主系统管理，为云系统故障自愈提供了新的范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about cloud system fault recovery using LLMs and neural-symbolic world models - completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation from 2D video, visual feature extraction, and video-to-3D synthesis. This paper addresses cloud computing reliability, not graphics or motion synthesis. Even though it uses LLMs and neural-symbolic methods, these are applied to a entirely different application domain (cloud healing), making it irrelevant to the computer graphics research profile.

title: MVFusion-GS: Motion-Variance Guided Temporal Attention for High-Quality Dynamic Gaussian Splatting
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables real-time novel view synthesis for static scenes. Extending it to dynamic scenes via deformation fields has recently attracted significant attention, particularly for dynamic scene reconstructionband distractor-free. However, existing deformation networks lack explicit motion awareness: they neither capture long-term motion intensity nor exploit short-term temporal coherence, leading to inaccurate foreground deformation and pseudo-static residuals in the background. We present MVFusion-GS, a method that enhances deformation networks with two complementary motion-aware mechanisms. The Motion-Variance Guided Refinement aggregates per-Gaussian deformation statistics across time to estimate motion variance and uses it to guide dynamic-static separation during deformation prediction. The MotionFormer Temporal Attention module applies Transformer self-attention over neighboring timesteps to model local motion dependencies and improve temporal consistency. Extensive experiments on both dynamic scene reconstruction and distractor-free reconstruction benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, showing that explicit motion awareness improves both foreground motion modeling and static background reconstruction.

AI.tldr: MVFusion-GS通过引入运动感知机制增强3D Gaussian Splatting的动态场景重建能力，解决了现有方法缺乏显式运动感知导致的前景变形不准确和背景伪静态残留的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有变形网络缺乏显式运动感知：既不能捕获长期运动强度，也不能利用短期时间一致性，导致前景变形不准确和背景伪静态残留。
AI.method: 提出两个互补的运动感知机制：1) 运动方差引导细化(Motion-Variance Guided Refinement)：跨时间聚合每高斯变形统计来估计运动方差，用于指导变形预测中的动态-静态分离；2) MotionFormer时间注意力模块：在相邻时间步上应用Transformer自注意力来建模局部运动依赖并提高时间一致性。
AI.result: 在动态场景重建和干扰物-free重建基准测试上进行了广泛实验，展示了最先进的性能，证明了显式运动感知同时改善了前景运动建模和静态背景重建。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入运动感知机制，MVFusion-GS显著提升了动态场景重建的质量，特别是在前景运动建模和静态背景重建方面达到了最先进的水平。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D Gaussian Splatting for dynamic scene reconstruction (a rendering/graphics technique), while the research profile is about 3D motion generation from 2D videos/text using VLMs and video generation models. These are DIFFERENT application domains - the paper focuses on improving reconstruction quality through motion-aware mechanisms, not on generating motions from visual inputs or using video priors. The methods are also completely different (Motion-Variance Guided Refinement vs VLM-based supervision, video generation models). While both relate to computer graphics, the specific domain (scene reconstruction vs motion synthesis from videos) is misaligned with the research profile's pain points.

title: SemHash-LLM: A Multi-Granularity Semantic Hashing Framework for Document Deduplication
summary: Large scale document deduplication must preserve semantic equivalence while remaining efficient over massive corpora. We present SemHash LLM, a multi granularity framework that unifies semantic projection hashing, attention weighted MinHash, contrastive boundary learning, and selective LLM based adjudication. The method combines character, token, and document level signals through gated fusion, then applies a cascaded filtering pipeline for efficient candidate reduction. Semantic projection hashing learns compact binary codes in distilled LLM embedding space, while attention weighted Min- Hash suppresses boilerplate and emphasizes informative content. Adaptive decision boundaries and uncertainty estimation further improve robustness across template pollution, short text perturbation, containment, and viral fragments. Experiments show that SemHash LLM achieves strong duplicate detection quality with less than one percent neural verification cost.

AI.tldr: SemHash LLM是一个大规模文档去重多粒度框架，结合语义投影哈希、注意力加权MinHash、对比边界学习和选择性LLM裁决，在保持语义等价的同时实现高效处理。
AI.motivation: 大规模文档去重需要在保留语义等价性的同时，对海量语料库保持高效性。现有方法在处理模板污染、短文本扰动、包含关系和病毒片段等复杂场景时存在不足。
AI.method: 该方法通过门控融合统一字符、标记和文档级信号，采用级联过滤管道进行候选缩减。语义投影哈希在学习 distilled LLM 嵌入空间中的紧凑二进制码，注意力加权 MinHash 抑制样板内容并强调信息内容，自适应决策边界和不确定性估计提高鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明 SemHash LLM 以低于1%的神经验证成本实现了强大的重复检测质量。
AI.conclusion: SemHash LLM 通过多粒度融合和选择性 LLM 裁决有效解决了大规模文档去重的效率和质量问题，在各种复杂场景下具有良好鲁棒性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about document deduplication in NLP/IR using semantic hashing and LLMs. The application domain (document processing) has no connection to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, or video-to-motion synthesis. While both mention LLMs, the use case is entirely different - this is text-based document deduplication, not visual/motion generation.

title: VLAFlow: A Unified Training Framework for Vision-Language-Action Models via Co-training and Future Latent Alignment
summary: Vision-language-action models (VLAs) have recently advanced robotic manipulation, yet the effects of different robot-data pre-training paradigms remain difficult to compare because existing models often differ in architecture, data, action space, and evaluation protocol. We present VLAFlow (Vision-Language-Action Flow), a unified flow-matching framework for controlled comparison of VLA training objectives. Using a heterogeneous robot corpus, OXEMix, containing approximately 5,000 hours of data from DROID, OpenX-Embodiment, OpenX-Augmented, and RoboCOIN, we evaluate four paradigms under the same pi0-style architecture, shared VLM backbone, action expert, and 14-dimensional action space: action-only modeling (MindPI), language-supervised co-training (MindLPI), future latent alignment (MindWPI), and their combination (MindLWPI). Experiments on LIBERO, LIBERO-Plus, and SimplerEnv show that action-only pre-training is sensitive to heterogeneous data. In contrast, language supervision helps preserve vision-language generalization, while future latent alignment improves state-transition and action-outcome modeling. By combining both signals, MindLWPI achieves the most stable overall transfer performance across benchmarks. These results suggest a meta-action space view: language and future latent representations provide complementary intermediate constraints that make heterogeneous action supervision smoother and more transferable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VLAFlow框架，统一比较四种VLA训练范式（action-only、language-supervised、future latent alignment及组合）在异构机器人数据上的效果，发现结合语言监督和未来潜在对齐的MindLWPI实现最稳定的跨基准迁移性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLAs模型在架构、数据、动作空间和评估协议上存在差异，难以比较不同机器人数据预训练范式的效果。
AI.method: 构建统一的flow-matching框架VLAFlow，使用pi0风格架构、共享VLM backbone、动作专家和14维动作空间，在约5000小时的异构机器人数据集OXEMix上对比四种训练范式。
AI.result: 动作单独预训练对异构数据敏感；语言监督有助于保留视觉-语言泛化；未来潜在对齐改善状态转移和动作-结果建模；MindLWPI在LIBERO、LIBERO-Plus和SimplerEnv上实现最稳定的跨基准迁移性能。
AI.conclusion: 语言和未来潜在表示提供互补的中间约束，使异构动作监督更平滑、更可迁移，揭示了元动作空间视角下的训练范式组合优势。

relevance_reason: This is a robotics/robot control paper (Vision-Language-Action models for robotic manipulation), not a Computer Graphics paper. The application domain is completely different - it's about controlling robots using VLAs, not about 3D motion generation, character animation, or video synthesis for graphics. While it uses flow-matching, the goal is robot action prediction, not human motion synthesis or video generation for graphics applications.

title: Profit-Based Counterfactual Explanations for Product Improvement: A Case Study of Manga Sales in Japan
summary: Counterfactual explanation (CE) is widely used to enhance the interpretability of machine learning models and support data-driven decision-making based on model predictions. However, existing CE methods typically require two exogenously specified inputs: a desired output value (target) and a distance function that quantifies changes in explanatory variables. In regression settings, neither the validity of target specification nor the practical interpretation of the distance metric has been sufficiently addressed. Furthermore, most existing CE methods focus on altering predictions rather than optimizing a decision objective, even though real-world decision-making often requires explicit objective maximization. To address these limitations, we formulate CE as a profit maximization problem in management and marketing contexts and propose a framework termed profit-based counterfactual explanation (PBCE). PBCE eliminates the need for exogenous target specification by directly maximizing profit as the primary optimization objective. Concurrently, the distance term is reinterpreted as the cost of modifying product attributes, providing a clear and economically grounded interpretation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于利润的反事实解释框架(PBCE),将反事实解释重新定义为利润最大化问题,避免了传统方法中需要外生指定目标值和距离函数的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实解释方法存在两个关键局限:1)需要外生指定目标值,在回归场景中目标设定的有效性和实际意义缺乏充分讨论;2)距离函数的实际解释不明确。更重要的是,现实决策通常需要明确的目标优化,而现有方法主要关注预测改变而非决策目标优化。
AI.method: 将反事实解释重新表述为管理和营销情境下的利润最大化问题,提出PBCE框架。该框架通过直接最大化利润作为主要优化目标来消除外生目标规范的需要,同时将距离项重新解释为产品属性修改成本,提供明确且经济合理的解释。
AI.result: PBCE框架能够直接在利润最大化目标下生成反事实解释,无需预设目标值,并将距离度量转化为具有实际经济意义的修改成本。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为反事实解释提供了一种更符合实际决策需求的方法,特别适用于管理和营销等需要明确优化经济目标的场景,为模型解释和决策支持提供了更实用的框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is about profit-based counterfactual explanations for manga sales optimization in business/marketing - completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics research profile focused on 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), VLMs for quality supervision, and 2D-to-3D visual feature extraction. The application domain (business analytics) has no connection to computer graphics, video generation, or motion synthesis. This is a fundamental domain mismatch - the paper addresses retail product improvement, not any computer graphics or vision-related topic.

title: Multi-THuMBS: Multi-person Tracking of 3D Human Meshes Beyond Video Shots
summary: Tracking multi-person 3D human meshes from in-the-wild videos is a highly challenging problem due to complex interactions, frequent occlusions, and severe truncation inherent in unconstrained environments. While recent approaches have improved robustness against these issues, they largely overlook the critical challenge prevalent in real-world footage: frequent shot changes. These abrupt transitions in camera viewpoints often cause existing methods to lose track of human identities and fail in reconstructing temporally coherent trajectories. Although several recent works have explored 3D human mesh tracking under shot changes, they are still limited to single-person scenarios, making them inadequate for real-world videos where multiple people interact and appear simultaneously. To address this limitation, we propose Multi-THuMBS (Multi-person Tracking of 3D Human Meshes Beyond Video Shots) that leverages a state-of-the-art 3D scene prior to reconstruct the two boundary frames in a single shared 3D space. Human meshes are then registered within the shared 3D space, maintaining per-person identity and motion consistency across shot changes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach yields significant improvements in 3D human mesh recovery, camera pose estimation, and identity tracking, thereby ensuring high-fidelity motion reconstruction with consistent identity preservation across shots compared to previous state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: Multi-THuMBS是一种在视频镜头切换下进行多人3D人体网格跟踪的新方法，通过将两个边界帧重建到共享3D空间中来进行人体网格配准，从而保持跨镜头的身份和运动一致性。
AI.motivation: 现实世界视频中普遍存在镜头切换问题，但现有方法在镜头切换时会丢失人物身份且无法重建时间相干的轨迹。更重要的是，以往针对镜头切换的研究仅限于单人物场景，无法处理多人交互的现实场景。
AI.method: 利用最先进的3D场景先验知识，将两个边界帧重建到单一共享3D空间中，然后在共享3D空间内进行人体网格配准，保持每个人的身份和跨镜头变化的运动一致性。
AI.result: 在3D人体网格恢复、相机姿态估计和身份跟踪方面均取得显著提升，实现了高保真运动重建并保持跨镜头身份一致性。
AI.conclusion: Multi-THuMBS方法有效解决了视频中镜头切换下多人3D人体网格跟踪的难题，在各项指标上优于现有最先进方法。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D human mesh TRACKING across video shots (reconstruction from real videos), while the research profile is about motion SYNTHESIS/GENERATION using video generation models (Wan, Seedance), VLMs for quality supervision, and text-to-motion pipelines. This is a fundamental application domain mismatch - tracking existing content vs generating new motion content. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points (domain gap, quality assessment, semantic consistency, visual feature extraction for generation) and uses completely different methods (3D scene reconstruction vs generative video-to-motion pipelines).

title: Scaling with Confidence: Calibrating Confidence of LLMs for Adaptive Test Time Scaling
summary: Training large language models (LLMs) with reinforcement learning (RL) has significantly advanced their performance on reasoning and question-answering tasks. However, prevailing RL reward designs typically prioritize response correctness, neglecting to incentivize models to express their confidence accurately. This leads to a critical problem: performance gains are often accompanied by poor calibration between confidence and accuracy, misleading models to overconfidently hallucinate when uncertain. To address this limitation, we propose $\textbf{C}$orrectness and $\textbf{C}$onfidence $\textbf{C}$alibration $\textbf{R}$einforcement $\textbf{L}$earning ($\textbf{C3RL}$), a novel RL algorithm integrating correctness, calibration and dataset-informed reference accuracy rewards together. Comprehensive evaluation across 8 text and multimodal datasets demonstrates that C3RL enhances calibration without sacrificing accuracy, outperforming the current state-of-the-art method in both performance and calibration metrics. Utilizing the well-calibrated verbalized confidence from C3RL, we further introduce $\textbf{C}$onfidence-based $\textbf{A}$daptive Test Time $\textbf{S}$caling ($\textbf{CAS}$), an adjustable inference-time strategy that allocates computational resources based on response confidence. Experiments show that CAS surpasses majority voting on both in-domain and out-of-domain datasets while reducing the inference budget by up to 12.33 times. We believe the synergy of C3RL and CAS paves the way for deploying more reliable and resource-efficient LLMs. The code, data and models will be released.

AI.tldr: C3RL是一种新型的强化学习算法，通过整合正确性、校准和数据集参考准确率奖励来解决大语言模型置信度与准确率不匹配的问题，并提出基于置信度的自适应测试时间扩展策略CAS。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在训练LLM时主要关注响应正确性，忽略了激励模型准确表达置信度，导致性能提升伴随着较差的校准，模型在不确定时会过度自信地产生幻觉。
AI.method: 提出C3RL算法，整合三个奖励：1)正确性奖励 2)校准奖励 3)数据集参考准确率奖励。在此基础上提出CAS推理策略，根据响应置信度分配计算资源。
AI.result: 在8个文本和 multimodal 数据集上，C3RL在保持准确率的同时提升了校准性能，优于现有最先进方法。CAS在域内和域外数据集上超越多数投票，并可将推理预算降低高达12.33倍。
AI.conclusion: C3RL和CAS的协同为部署更可靠、更资源高效的大语言模型奠定了基础。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM confidence calibration and reinforcement learning for language models, not Computer Graphics or 3D motion generation. The application domain is Natural Language Processing/AI alignment, which has no connection to the research profile's focus on video generation models, 3D motion synthesis, visual feature extraction, or the two-stage pipeline approach for converting 2D videos to 3D motions. The methods are entirely different - this paper deals with LLM token-level confidence measurement while the research profile focuses on VLMs for quality supervision, video-to-motion generation pipelines, and visual feature filtering.

title: Online Segment 3D Gaussians via Launching Virtual Drones
summary:
Interactive segmentation of 3D Gaussians offers a compelling opportunity for real-time manipulation of 3D scenes, thanks to the real-time rendering capability of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). However, existing methods require a time-consuming per-scene setup - typically tens of seconds or even minutes - before interactive segmentation can begin on a raw 3DGS scene. This setup involves multi-view mask preparation, mask lifting, and feature distillation, creating a major bottleneck for online applications.
  To address this limitation, we aim to completely eliminate the setup stage for interactive 3DGS segmentation while keeping the segmentation time practical (under 1 second). In this work, we present SAGO (Segment Any Gaussians Online), a novel setup-free framework for interactive 3DGS segmentation. By introducing virtual drones, our method reframes the 3D segmentation problem as an online Next-Best-View (NBV) planning task formulated within a Markov process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SAGO can extract clean 3D assets directly from 3D Gaussians with sub-second latency, thereby enabling a broad range of downstream applications such as object manipulation and scene editing. Moreover, our method achieves over a 50x speedup compared to the previous setup-free 3DGS segmentation frameworks.

AI.tldr: SAGO是一个无需预设的交互式3D Gaussian Splatting分割框架，通过引入虚拟无人机将3D分割问题重新定义为马尔可夫过程中的在线下一最佳视图(NBV)规划任务，可在1秒内从3D高斯中提取清洁的3D资产，相比之前的无需预设3DGS分割框架实现超过50倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有3D Gaussian Splatting(3DGS)交互分割方法需要耗时的每场景设置阶段(数十秒甚至数分钟)，包括多视图掩码准备、掩码提升和特征蒸馏，这成为在线应用的主要瓶颈。研究目标是完全消除交互式3DGS分割的设置阶段，同时保持分割时间在实际范围内(低于1秒)。
AI.method: 提出SAGO框架，通过引入虚拟无人机(virtual drones)将3D分割问题重新定义为马尔可夫过程中的在线下一最佳视图(NBV)规划任务，实现无需预设的交互式3DGS分割。
AI.result: SAGO可以直接从3D高斯中提取清洁的3D资产，延迟时间低于1秒(亚秒级延迟)，实现超过50倍加速，可支持物体操作和场景编辑等下游应用。
AI.conclusion: SAGO是首个无需预设的交互式3DGS分割框架，通过将分割问题转化为在线NBV规划任务，成功实现了亚秒级延迟的3D分割，为实时3D场景操作和编辑开辟了新可能。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D Gaussian Splatting segmentation (extracting static 3D assets from scenes using virtual drones and NBV planning), while the research profile is about 3D MOTION generation from videos/text (temporal animation synthesis). These are completely different application domains: static scene segmentation vs. dynamic motion synthesis. The profile focuses on video-to-motion generation pipelines using VLMs and video generation models, whereas this paper addresses real-time 3DGS segmentation for scene editing. No relevant method or domain overlap exists.

title: Spatial Support Matters: Geometry-Aware Graph Fusion for Rainfall Field Reconstruction
summary: Fine-scale rainfall reconstruction is critical for urban flood modeling, but real rainfall sensing systems observe the field through incompatible spatial supports: gauges measure points, microwave links measure paths, and radar/satellite products measure gridded areas. These differences in measurement support impose geometrically distinct constraints on the rainfall field, yet existing heterogeneous graph approaches reconcile such sources in feature space, giving each its own embedding while discarding the geometry of its support. We propose a geometry-aware multi-support heterogeneous graph neural network that represents each observation according to its support type (0D point, 1D line, or 2D grid) as a distinct node layer, and fuses them through cross-support message passing into a point-support prediction layer from which the field is reconstructed. An inductive masked-node formulation decouples prediction resolution from sensing resolution, allowing the same trained model to reconstruct the field at user-defined target locations or display grids. On Singapore data, the proposed method reduces RMSE by 23.2\% over the classical interpolation baseline, inverse-distance weighting, and consistently outperforms other neural architectures such as convolutional fusion and support-agnostic heterogeneous graph baselines. A generalization study using data from Sydney, Australia lets us characterize when multi-support fusion helps: the available skill appears to depend on gauge spacing relative to the spatial correlation length of the field, so fusion delivers the largest gains where the field is under-sampled relative to its correlation length and little when it is already resolved. Code and models will be open-sourced upon paper acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种几何感知的多支持异构图神经网络(GAMS)用于精细尺度降雨重建。该方法将不同传感器(雨量计、微波链路、雷达/卫星)按其空间支持类型(0D点、1D线、2D网格)表示为不同的节点层,通过跨支持消息传递融合多源观测,并使用归纳式掩码节点 formulation实现预测分辨率与传感分辨率的解耦。
AI.motivation: 城市洪水建模需要精细尺度的降雨重建,但现有降雨传感系统通过不兼容的空间支持观测:雨量计测量点、微波链路测量路径、雷达/卫星产品测量网格区域。现有异构图方法在特征空间中调和这些源,给每个源独立的嵌入却丢弃了其支持的几何结构。
AI.method: 提出几何感知多支持异构图神经网络:1)将每种观测按支持类型(0D点、1D线、2D网格)作为独立节点层表示;2)通过跨支持消息传递融合多源信息;3)从点支持预测层重建降雨场;4)使用归纳式掩码节点 formulation解耦预测分辨率与传感分辨率,使训练好的模型可在用户定义的目标位置或显示网格上重建降雨场。
AI.result: 在新加坡数据上,所提方法比经典插值基线(反距离加权IDW)降低23.2% RMSE,并持续优于卷积融合和支持无关异构图等其他神经架构。悉尼(澳大利亚)的泛化研究表明:多支持融合的技能取决于雨量计间距相对于场空间相关长度的可用性,当场相对于相关长度欠采样时融合增益最大,已解析时增益很小。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功实现了几何感知的多支持降雨融合,证明考虑空间支持几何结构对异构多源降雨重建至关重要。跨支持消息传递有效整合了不同传感器的互补信息,归纳式预测机制实现了灵活的分辨率控制。泛化研究揭示了融合方法的适用条件:仅在传感稀疏导致信息不足时才有显著增益,为实际部署提供了重要指导。

relevance_reason: This paper is about rainfall field reconstruction for meteorology/hydrology applications using graph neural networks. It has NO relevance to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics - specifically 3D motion generation from videos, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), VLM-based quality supervision, and 2D-to-3D visual feature extraction. The application domain is completely different (meteorology vs computer graphics/motion synthesis), the problem addressed is different (rainfall prediction vs motion/video generation), and the methods, while both use graph networks, are applied to entirely different problems. This is a case of complete field mismatch.

title: DRDN: Decoupled Representation Dynamic Network for From-Scratch ViT Class-Incremental Learning
comment: 10 pages, IEEEtran journal format. Preprint submitted to IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
summary:
Dynamic expansion methods for class-incremental learning (CIL) protect task-specific knowledge by growing dedicated tokens or subnetworks, yet our analyses suggest that classification supervision alone does not sufficiently preserve task-agnostic shared backbone representations over long incremental sequences. We identify two intertwined challenges: cross-task confusion from sequential training on predominantly current-task data, which biases decision boundaries toward recent tasks; and under-optimized shared representations in the backbone that cap long-term discriminability as tasks accumulate.
  We propose the Decoupled Representation Dynamic Network (DRDN), which addresses these challenges via two orthogonal mechanisms. For shared backbone representations, DRDN continuously applies masked image modeling (MIM) at every incremental step, with reconstruction gradients routed exclusively through the backbone, encouraging it to retain general visual structure beyond class-discriminative cues. For task-specific discrimination, DRDN employs hierarchical task token expansion across all transformer layers, with a modified per-task attention rule that reduces inter-task interference. We support this design with accuracy degradation analysis and cross-task confusion rate measurements.
  In the from-scratch ViT CIL setting (no external pretraining), DRDN consistently improves over strong token-expansion baselines with comparable backbone scale. On CIFAR100-B0 (10 steps), DRDN achieves 77.19% average accuracy, outperforming DKT by 1.36 points and DyTox by 3.53 points, with an advantage that grows at longer incremental sequences. Multi-seed validation confirms stability (+/-0.31%). The MIM decoder is active only during training, adding no inference-time parameters or computation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DRDN（解耦表示动态网络），解决类增量学习中任务无关的共享骨干网络表示退化问题。该方法通过掩码图像建模（MIM）保留通用视觉结构，并采用分层任务token扩展减少任务间干扰。在CIFAR100-B0（10步）上达到77.19%平均准确率，比DKT和DyTox分别提升1.36和3.53个百分点。
AI.motivation: 动态扩展方法虽能保护任务特定知识，但分类监督不足以在长增量序列中保留任务无关的共享骨干表示。存在两个核心挑战：1）跨任务混淆——顺序训练当前任务数据偏置决策边界；2）共享表示欠优化——限制长期判别性。
AI.method: 提出DRDN，包含两个正交机制：1）共享骨干表示：每步增量训练时持续应用MIM，重建梯度仅通过骨干路由，鼓励保留类判别之外的通用视觉结构；2）任务特定判别：跨所有Transformer层使用分层任务token扩展，采用改进的逐任务注意力规则减少跨任务干扰。推理时MIM解码器不参与，不增加参数量或计算。
AI.result: 在无预训练的ViT从头训练设置下，DRDN一致优于强基线方法。CIFAR100-B0（10步）达77.19%平均准确率，比DKT提升1.36点，比DyTox提升3.53点；增量序列更长时优势增大。多种子验证确认稳定性（±0.31%）。
AI.conclusion: DRDN通过解耦骨干表示学习与任务特定判别，有效解决类增量学习中共享表示退化问题，为长序列增量学习提供了有效框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is about class-incremental learning for Vision Transformers (ViT), which is in the domain of computer vision and machine learning. It has absolutely no connection to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation models, or text-to-motion synthesis. The research profile is specifically about synthesizing 3D motions from 2D videos, while this paper addresses representation degradation in incremental learning scenarios - completely different application domain and problem space.

title: Autonomous discovery of traffic laws with AI traffic scientists
summary: Universal traffic laws describe recurrent patterns in congestion, mobility and driving behavior across cities, providing a scientific basis for transportation planning, management and control. Their discovery, however, remains expert-driven, requiring candidate regularities to be identified from heterogeneous observational evidence or validated through intervention experiments. Although autonomous artificial intelligence (AI) systems have advanced scientific discovery in controlled laboratory settings, extending them to complex transportation domains remains a challenge. Here we present TrafficSci, an agentic AI system that formulates traffic-law discovery as an iterative, auditable workflow integrating evidence scoping, critic-judge hypothesis induction, and observational-interventional validation. Across four case studies spanning population, network, control and trajectory scales, TrafficSci autonomously rediscovers three established traffic laws and identifies an unreported intrinsic temporal memory scale in urban driving behavior, statistically consistent across eight cities and two trajectory datasets. TrafficSci provides a route for extending AI-driven scientific discovery from controlled domains to complex urban systems.

AI.tldr: TrafficSci是一个代理AI系统，将交通法律发现formulated为迭代、可审计的工作流程，集成了证据 scoping、批评-判断假设归纳和观察-干预验证。该系统在四个案例研究中自主重新发现了三个已建立的交通规律，并识别出一个在八个城市和两个轨迹数据集中统计一致的未报告的内在时间记忆尺度。
AI.motivation: 交通法律描述了拥堵、流动性和驾驶行为中的 recurrent 模式，为交通规划、管理和控制提供了科学基础。然而，其发现仍然由专家驱动，需要从异构观测证据中识别候选规律或通过干预实验验证。虽然自主人工智能系统在受控实验室设置中推进了科学发现，但将其扩展到复杂交通领域仍然是一个挑战。
AI.method: 提出TrafficSci，一个代理AI系统，将交通法律发现formulated为迭代、可审计的工作流程，集成了证据scoping、批评-判断假设归纳和观察-干预验证。四个案例研究涵盖人口、网络、控制和轨迹尺度。
AI.result: TrafficSci自主重新发现了三个已建立的交通规律，并识别出一个未报告的内在时间记忆尺度在城市驾驶行为中，统计上在八个城市和两个轨迹数据集中一致。
AI.conclusion: TrafficSci提供了将AI驱动的科学发现从受控领域扩展到复杂城市系统的路线。

relevance_reason: This paper is about traffic science and AI for discovering traffic laws - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), and visual feature extraction for synthesizing human motions. The paper addresses traffic pattern discovery in transportation networks - a completely different application domain. There is no method overlap (VLM, diffusion models for motion/video generation) and no domain relevance to computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: Bridging 3D Gaussians and Semantic Occupancy for Comprehensive Open-Vocabulary Scene Understanding from Unposed Images
comment: Hu Zhu, Bohan Li, and Xianda Guo contributed equally. Corresponding author: Wenjun Zeng
summary: Comprehensive 3D scene understanding from sparse, unposed images requires a model to recover renderable geometry, open-vocabulary semantics, and free/occupied 3D space without relying on external camera calibration. Recent feed-forward Gaussian methods improve pose-free reconstruction and semantic rendering, but their Gaussian primitives are mainly optimized through image-space objectives and remain weakly constrained in unobserved regions. We propose \textit{COVScene}, a pose-free semantic Gaussian framework that couples renderable Gaussian primitives with a dense semantic occupancy field through differentiable volumetric lifting. Instead of converting Gaussians to voxels only at evaluation time, COVScene lifts the predicted semantic Gaussians inside the training computation graph, so volumetric regularization provides gradients to Gaussian opacity, geometry, and semantic features. The framework combines a semantic-aware Geometry Transformer, multi-task Gaussian decoding, geometric foundation distillation, and occupancy entropy regularization to support novel view synthesis, open-vocabulary semantic querying, and semantic occupancy prediction within a single representation. Experiments on ScanNet and ScanNet++ show that COVScene maintains competitive rendering quality, improves open-vocabulary segmentation, and achieves stronger semantic occupancy prediction than the self-supervised baseline without direct voxel-level supervision.

AI.tldr: COVScene是一个无姿态语义高斯框架，从稀疏、无姿态图像进行综合3D场景理解，无需外部相机校准即可恢复可渲染几何、开放词汇语义和3D空间占用。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈高斯方法虽然改善了无姿态重建和语义渲染，但其高斯原语主要通过图像空间目标优化，在未观测区域仍然缺乏约束。
AI.method: 提出可微分体素提升方法，将预测的语义高斯融入训练计算图，使体素正则化能为高斯不透明度、几何和语义特征提供梯度。框架结合语义感知几何Transformer、多任务高斯解码、几何基础蒸馏和占用熵正则化。
AI.result: 在ScanNet和ScanNet++上实验表明，COVScene保持竞争性渲染质量，提升开放词汇分割，在无直接体素级监督的情况下实现更强的语义占用预测。
AI.conclusion: 该框架支持新视角合成、开放词汇语义查询和语义占用预测单一表示，在无需外部相机校准的稀疏视图场景理解任务中取得了显著进展。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on 3D scene reconstruction and semantic occupancy prediction from unposed images using Gaussian splatting - a completely different application domain from the research profile's focus on 3D motion synthesis from 2D video priors. The profile specifically targets motion generation using video generation models (Wan, Seedance) and VLM-based quality supervision, whereas this paper addresses scene understanding and reconstruction. No mention of motion synthesis, video generation priors, or text-to-motion generation - the core elements of the research profile.

title: Diverse Evidence, Better Forecasts: Multi-Agent Deliberation Under Information Asymmetry
summary: Multi-agent systems are increasingly used for forecasting future events, as deliberation among multiple LLMs is believed to improve reasoning and calibration. Yet existing approaches overlook a critical design choice: what information each agent receives. When all agents are given identical evidence, deliberation collapses into herding rather than genuine belief revision, leaving multi-agent systems little better than a single agent. We identify this as a fundamental gap and propose designed information asymmetry to close it: by partitioning evidence into shared public and disjoint private subsets, each agent holds exclusive knowledge that can only reach others through deliberation. We theoretically show that this decomposition reduces inter-agent error correlation, and instantiate it in InfoDelphi, a framework combining relevance-aware evidence routing, rationale-based iterative deliberation, and confidence-weighted aggregation. On PolyGym, a benchmark of 375 binary forecasting questions derived from real-world prediction markets, InfoDelphi outperforms the strongest single-agent and multi-agent baselines by 12--18% in Brier score and 4--8 percentage points in accuracy. More detailed experiments confirm that removing information asymmetry eliminates most deliberation gains, establishing diversity of input as the key enabler of effective multi-agent reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出InfoDelphi框架，通过设计信息不对称（将证据分为共享公共集和独立私有集）来解决多智能体预测中 deliberation 退化为羊群效应的问题，在375个预测市场问题的基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视了一个关键设计选择：每个智能体应接收什么信息。当所有智能体获得相同证据时，deliberation退化为羊群效应而非真正的信念修正，多智能体系统与单个智能体无异。
AI.method: 1) 将证据分解为共享公共集和独立私有集；2) 实现InfoDelphi框架，包含相关性感知证据路由、基于理由的迭代deliberation和置信度加权聚合
AI.result: 在PolyGym基准（375个来自真实预测市场的二元预测问题）上，InfoDelphi的Brier分数提升12-18%，准确率提升4-8个百分点。消融实验证实移除信息不对称会消除大部分deliberation收益。
AI.conclusion: 输入多样性是有效多智能体推理的关键推动因素。设计的私有信息使智能体必须通过deliberation来共享知识，从而产生真正的信念修正而非羊群效应。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multi-agent AI systems for prediction markets and forecasting, focusing on information asymmetry in deliberation. It has NOTHING to do with Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation, or visual feature extraction. The application domain is completely different - it's about AI/ML for prediction/forecasting tasks, not graphics or motion synthesis. This is a fundamental mismatch in both field and application domain.

title: Multi-Resolution Flow Matching: Training-Free Diffusion Acceleration via Staged Sampling
comment: The code is available at https://github.com/Xingyu-Zheng/MrFlow
summary: Hardware-agnostic strategies for accelerating text-to-image diffusion, such as timestep distillation and feature caching, can reduce inference time without custom kernels or system-level optimization. Among them, multi-resolution generation strategies have recently received broad attention, attaining more than 5x speedup without any training. However, the design of performing upsampling in the latent space, together with the selective modification of partial regions, causes these methods to exhibit noticeable blurring or artifacts. To this end, we propose MrFlow, a training-free multi-resolution acceleration strategy for pretrained flow-matching models built upon a staged low-to-high-resolution pipeline. MrFlow first rapidly generates the main structure at low resolution, then performs super-resolution in the pixel space using a lightweight pretrained GAN-based model, subsequently injects low-strength noise to enable high-frequency resampling, and finally refines the details at high resolution. Quantitative and qualitative results on FLUX.1-dev and Qwen-Image show that MrFlow exploits the quadratic token reduction and reduced step requirement of low-resolution sampling to achieve 10x end-to-end acceleration while keeping OneIG within a 1% gap relative to that before acceleration, significantly surpassing other training-free acceleration strategies, and requiring no training or runtime dynamic identification whatsoever. MrFlow can further be directly combined orthogonally with pre-trained timestep distillation strategies, achieving even higher generation acceleration of up to 25x.

AI.tldr: MrFlow是一种针对预训练flow-matching模型的训练无关多分辨率推理加速方法，通过低分辨率结构生成、像素空间GAN超分、高频噪声重采样和高分辨率细节细化的四阶段管道，实现10-25x推理加速，同时保持视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 现有硬件无关加速策略（如时间步蒸馏、特征缓存）可减少推理时间，多分辨率生成策略最近受到广泛关注，可实现5倍以上加速，但其在潜在空间进行上采样和部分区域选择性修改导致明显的模糊或伪影问题。
AI.method: MrFlow采用四阶段管道：1)低分辨率快速生成主结构 2)使用预训练GAN模型在像素空间超分辨率 3)注入低强度噪声进行高频重采样 4)高分辨率细节细化。该方法利用低分辨率采样的二次令牌减少和步数减少优势。
AI.result: 在FLUX.1-dev和Qwen-Image上实现10x端到端加速，OneIG与加速前差距在1%内，显著超越其他训练无关加速策略。与预训练时间步蒸馏策略正交结合后，最高可达25x生成加速。
AI.conclusion: MrFlow是一种训练无关的多分辨率加速策略，通过分阶段低到高分辨率管道实现10x端到端加速，OneIG与加速前差距控制在1%内，可与时间步蒸馏结合达到25x加速。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses diffusion acceleration for 2D IMAGE generation (FLUX.1-dev, Qwen-Image), while the research profile is about 3D MOTION generation from 2D video features. Although both use diffusion/flow-matching methods, they are in COMPLETELY DIFFERENT application domains. The research profile specifically targets 3D motion synthesis with challenges like domain gap between 2D features and 3D motion, semantic consistency for 3D motions, and extracting visual guidance for 3D generation - none of which this paper addresses. This is a classic case of "similar method but wrong application domain" as specified in the evaluation criteria.

title: Separating Expert Retention from Autonomous Source Inference in Raw-ECG-Replay-Free Continual ECG Deployment
summary:
In multi-source ECG deployment, models may need to incorporate new data sources when earlier raw ECGs cannot be retained or replayed. Freezing a pretrained backbone and assigning each source an isolated classifier prevents parameter interference, but deployment still requires selecting an expert when source metadata are unavailable. We study this distinction through \ours{}, an incremental expert bank built on frozen 1024-dimensional ECGFounder features. Each arriving domain adds a balanced-softmax linear expert, while a lightweight router is fitted only on retained training features and domain labels from sources observed so far. A validation-calibrated margin rule fuses the two most likely experts instead of committing to a single routed expert.
  On CPSC, PTB-XL, Georgia, and Chapman-Shaoxing, source-aware expert selection reaches $0.7915\pm0.0036$ Macro-F1 and a matched offline independent-head reference reaches $0.7885\pm0.0009$, supporting strong source-aware expert retention. Without source IDs, an MLP router reaches $0.7756\pm0.0027$ and top-2 margin fusion reaches $0.7782\pm0.0022$. The top-2 gain over hard MLP routing is small ($+0.0026$), with a 95\% confidence interval from paired bootstrap that includes zero. Across three domain orders, the top-2-to-oracle gap remains $0.0111$--$0.0133$, identifying autonomous source inference as the main remaining bottleneck. No raw ECGs are replayed, but frozen training features are retained for router updates; the method is therefore not memory-free.

AI.tldr: 研究在多源ECG部署中，当无法保留或重放原始ECG时如何增量添加新数据源。提出ECGFounder方法，基于冻结的1024维ECGFounder特征构建增量专家库，每个新领域添加平衡softmax线性专家，并通过轻量级路由器进行源推断，使用top-2边缘融合规则结合两个最可能专家的预测。
AI.motivation: 在多源ECG部署场景中，原始ECG无法保留或重放，需要在不访问原始数据的情况下增量添加新数据源，同时避免参数干扰问题。
AI.method: 1) 冻结预训练的ECGFounder特征提取器；2) 每个新到达的领域添加平衡softmax线性专家；3) 仅在保留的训练特征和领域标签上训练轻量级MLP路由器；4) 使用验证校准的边缘规则融合两个最可能的专家而非单一路由专家。
AI.result: 有源ID时：0.7915±0.0036 Macro-F1；无源ID时：MLP路由器达0.7756±0.0027，top-2边缘融合达0.7782±0.0022。Top-2增益仅+0.0026，置信区间包含零。Top-2到oracle的差距为0.0111-0.0133，表明自主源推断是主要瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 源感知专家选择表现良好，top-2边缘融合增益微小且统计不显著。源推断是剩余的主要瓶颈，而非特征表示或专家选择本身。该方法需要保留训练特征而非原始ECG，因此不是无内存方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about ECG (electrocardiogram) signal processing and continual learning in medical deployment - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. It deals with medical signal processing, expert systems, and source inference for ECG data, not 2D visual features, 3D motion generation, video synthesis, or any computer graphics methods. The application domain is medical/healthcare (cardiology) rather than computer graphics, making it essentially irrelevant to the research profile.

title: Boosting Ultrasound Image Classification via Attribute-Guided Dual-Branch Framework
summary: Ultrasound image classification is essential for computer-aided diagnosis. However, current methods often neglect clinical priors, leading to poor generalization in challenging scenarios and a lack of interpretability that limits clinical adoption. To address these issues, we aim to develop a medical-prior module that can be seamlessly integrated into existing pipelines to enhance both diagnostic performance and interpretability. In this paper, we propose an attribute-guided dual-branch framework for ultrasound classification that introduces domain-agnostic medical attribute priors, improving generalization while offering interpretable evidence. Specifically, a baseline branch follows conventional architectures and predicts image categories via a fully connected classifier. An attribute-guided branch injects domain-agnostic attributes as priors and produces human-interpretable decision cues. Finally, an adaptive decision module fuses the two branches in a data-dependent manner to yield the final prediction. Experiments across diverse ultrasound classification tasks demonstrate that our approach can be integrated into multiple backbones and state-of-the-art methods with low overhead, consistently improving accuracy and interpretability. Code is available at: https://github.com/zhaobo253-crypto/AttrGuide.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种属性引导的双分支框架，用于超声图像分类，通过引入领域无关的医学属性先验来提高模型的泛化能力和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 当前医学超声图像分类方法存在的问题：1) 忽视临床先验知识；2) 在挑战性场景下泛化性能差；3) 缺乏可解释性，限制了临床应用。
AI.method: 提出属性引导双分支框架：1) 基线分支：采用传统架构，通过全连接分类器预测图像类别；2) 属性引导分支：注入领域无关属性作为先验，产生人类可解释的决策线索；3) 自适应决策模块：以数据依赖方式融合两个分支得到最终预测。
AI.result: 在多种超声分类任务上的实验表明，该方法可无缝集成到多种主干网络和先进方法中，以较低开销显著提升准确率和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够有效增强超声图像分类的诊断性能和可解释性，且具有较好的通用性和可扩展性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical ultrasound image classification, which is in the medical imaging field. The research profile is about Computer Graphics specifically for 3D motion generation from videos. The application domains are entirely different - medical imaging vs. computer graphics/motion synthesis. The methods are also unrelated (dual-branch classification framework vs. video generation models, VLMs, and 2D-to-3D motion synthesis pipelines). No overlap whatsoever.

title: Epistemic Goggles: A Pretrained Module that Induces an Epistemic Frame via Gradient Editing
comment: 20 pages, 10 figures, 2 tables. Code at https://github.com/JoshuaSP/epistemic-goggles and generated documents, questions, and teacher rollouts at https://huggingface.co/datasets/joshuapenman/epistemic-goggles-artifacts
summary: Finetuning a language model on documents that are explicitly annotated as fictional results in a model that still actually believes the documents' core claims, an effect known as Negation Neglect. In our evaluations, models trained on documents prefixed and suffixed with such annotations correctly identify the relevant claims as fictional only about 9% of the time. To address this, we introduce Goggles, a learned module that intervenes on the finetuning gradient rather than the data. During supervised finetuning, a Goggles module edits the gradients an LLM LoRA receives, imparting a chosen epistemic frame (the stance the model takes toward the nature of what it reads) to whatever the documents teach. A Goggles instance is trained once for a given base model, frame, and LoRA configuration, then applied frozen to documents it was never trained on. Trained through Goggles on those same documents, now carrying no fictional annotation, the model flags the content as fictional roughly 91% of the time, while preserving capability (GPQA and TruthfulQA match or exceed baseline). The same architecture supports other frames: a Goggles instance can be trained to treat documents as "part of an AI safety evaluation by Redwood Research" rather than simply as fiction. The imparted frame persists under continued finetuning that pushes back toward the claim, where prior interventions revert. Goggles suggests a path toward training language models on known-misaligned data without absorbing the behaviors that data demonstrates.

AI.tldr: Goggles通过干预微调梯度而非数据本身,赋予语言模型特定的"认知框架",使其能在学习虚构内容的同时保持对虚构性的正确判断,解决了传统微调中即使标注"虚构"仍会产生错误信念的"否定忽视"问题。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型在虚构文档上进行微调时,即使文档明确标注为虚构,模型仍会吸收文档中的错误信念(Negation Neglect现象),仅有9%的准确率识别内容为虚构,这严重影响了模型在已知误导性数据上训练时的可靠性。
AI.method: 引入Goggles模块,在监督微调时直接编辑LoRA接收到的梯度,为LLM注入选定的"认知框架"(epistemic frame),使其对所读内容采取特定立场。Goggles针对特定基础模型、框架和LoRA配置训练一次后,可冻结应用于从未训练过的文档。
AI.result: 使用Goggles训练后(无虚构标注),模型识别虚构内容的准确率从9%提升至91%,同时在GPQA和TruthfulQA基准上保持或超越基线性能。该框架可泛化到其他场景(如将文档视为AI安全评估材料),且在持续微调中框架保持稳定,而先前干预则会失效。
AI.conclusion: Goggles提出了一种在已知错误对齐数据上训练语言模型但不吸收其演示行为的新路径,为构建更可靠的人工智能系统提供了有前景的方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about NLP/LLM training methodology (addressing "negation neglect" in language models via gradient editing), which has NO relevance to the Computer Graphics research profile focused on 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), VLM for visual quality supervision, and visual feature extraction. The application domain is completely different - this is an NLP paper about LLM reliability, not computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: Plug-and-Play Volumetric Reconstruction for Compressive Sensing Light-Sheet Microscopy
summary: We investigate volumetric reconstruction for compressive sensing light-sheet microscopy (CS-LSM), where fast volumetric imaging is achieved by encoding multiple axial planes into each camera exposure. To recover the underlying volume from highly multiplexed measurements, we propose a plug-and-play (PnP) framework that flexibly incorporates any user-specified denoiser into the reconstruction process. Building on a slice-based formulation, we further introduce an axial-coupled model that exploits correlations between adjacent slices to improve volumetric continuity. For efficient computation, we derive a Woodbury-based update for the data-consistency step in both the slice-based and axial-coupled formulations, and employ a Gauss-Seidel sweep for the denoising step in the axial-coupled model. Under a weakly convex regularization assumption, we establish subsequential convergence of the proposed algorithm. Experiments on synthetic and real zebrafish-heart data demonstrate that the proposed framework successfully recovers cellular structures from compressed measurements, and provide practical insights into the comparative performance of commonly used denoisers within the PnP framework under the CS-LSM setup.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于压缩感知光片显微镜(CS-LSM)的体积重建框架，通过插入式降噪器(plug-and-play PnP)从多路复用的测量数据中恢复三维体数据，并引入轴向耦合模型以提高体积连续性。
AI.motivation: CS-LSM通过将多个轴向平面编码到单次相机曝光中实现快速体积成像，但如何从高度复用的测量中准确重建体数据是一个挑战。
AI.method: 提出PnP框架，可灵活集成任意用户指定的降噪器；基于切片 formulation 引入轴向耦合模型以利用相邻切片间的相关性；为提高计算效率，推导了基于Woodbury的数据一致性更新公式，并在轴向耦合模型中采用Gauss-Seidel扫描进行降噪；在弱凸正则化假设下建立了算法的子序列收敛性。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实斑马鱼心脏数据上的实验表明，该框架能够从压缩测量中成功恢复细胞结构，并提供了常用降噪器在CS-LSM环境下PNP框架中的比较性能洞察。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架在压缩感知光片显微镜中实现了高质量的体积重建，PnP方法的灵活性和轴向耦合模型的有效性得到验证。

relevance_reason: This paper is about compressive sensing light-sheet microscopy (CS-LSM) for scientific/medical imaging (zebrafish heart data), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. Even though both involve "3D reconstruction," the application domain is entirely different - this is biological microscopy, not graphics/motion synthesis. The methods (PnP denoising, compressive sensing, Woodbury matrix) are also unrelated to the research profile's methods (VLMs, video generation models like Wan/Seedance, motion generation models). This is a domain mismatch - completely irrelevant to the research profile.

title: COMFYCLAW: Self-Evolving Skill Harnesses for Image Generation Workflows
summary: Agents are increasingly used to construct workflows and assist humans in completing recurring tasks more efficiently. As these workflows become repeated and domain-specific, agent memory and reusable skills become increasingly important: agents should be able to recall workflow patterns, execution constraints, and user preferences from previous runs. We study this problem in workflow-based image generation and introduce COMFYCLAW, an agentic skill evolution harness for controlling ComfyUI workflows. COMFYCLAW formulates workflow construction as typed graph editing, exposes tools organized by construction stage, automatically reverts invalid edits, and uses a region-level vision-language model (VLM) verifier to translate visual failures into actionable repair suggestions. The framework further evolves a progressively disclosed skill library, where trajectories, execution errors, and verifier feedback from previous runs are distilled into reusable Agent Skills. Across four benchmark splits, three agent models, and two image backbones, COMFYCLAW achieves the best average image-generation evaluation score across all six agent configurations, outperforming a verifier-only baseline without skill evolution. Human annotations further show that annotators prefer COMFYCLAW over variants without skill evolution. Our results suggest that skill evolution is an effective mechanism for improving agent reliability and performance in recurring visual workflow construction.

AI.tldr: COMFYCLAW是一个用于控制ComfyUI工作流的代理技能进化框架，通过typed graph editing、区域级VLM验证器和渐进式技能库来实现工作流构建和修复，在图像生成任务上表现优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 随着工作流在特定领域的重复执行，代理需要能够回忆工作流模式、执行约束和用户偏好。现有的agent在构建和执行视觉工作流时缺乏记忆和可重用技能机制，导致效率和可靠性不足。
AI.method: 1)将工作流构建形式化为typed graph editing；2)按构建阶段组织工具；3)自动回滚无效编辑；4)使用区域级VLM验证器将视觉失败转化为可操作的修复建议；5)将轨迹、执行错误和验证器反馈蒸馏为可重用的Agent Skills，形成渐进式披露的技能库。
AI.result: 在四个基准测试集、三个代理模型和两个图像骨干网络上，COMFYCLAW在所有六种代理配置中取得了最高的平均图像生成评估分数，优于不含技能进化的验证器基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 技能进化是提高代理在重复视觉工作流构建中的可靠性和性能的有效机制。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 2D IMAGE generation workflows using ComfyUI, while the research profile is about 3D MOTION generation from 2D video inputs. These are completely different application domains - image generation vs. human motion synthesis. Although both use VLMs, the core problem addressed is unrelated: this paper focuses on workflow automation for image generation, not 3D motion generation, semantic text-to-motion consistency, or video-to-3D motion extraction. The domain gap between 2D images and 3D motion is fundamental.

title: Domain Generalization via Text-Anchored Information Bottleneck
summary: Visual recognition models often fail when deployed in new environments. Domain Generalization (DG) addresses this by learning representations that remain invariant to environment-specific variations. Recent approaches increasingly rely on large vision-language models, assuming that preserving their expressive visual representations improves robustness. However, we show that such visual expressiveness can instead propagate spurious cues that tie representations to the training environments, hindering invariant learning.
