We therefore discard visual guidance and instead treat the language embedding space as the primary source of domain invariance, naturally acting as an information bottleneck that preserves core semantics while suppressing domain-specific variations. Extensive experiments across diverse backbones exhibit state-of-the-art performance and further analyze what makes guidance effective for robust generalization. These findings shift the focus of DG from improving representations to designing supervision that enforces invariance.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了Domain Generalization (DG)中"保留大视觉-语言模型的表达性视觉表示可提高鲁棒性"的传统假设，提出视觉表达性反而会传播虚假线索阻碍不变学习。因此转而利用语言嵌入空间作为领域不变性的主要来源，作为信息瓶颈保留核心语义同时抑制领域特定变化。
AI.motivation: 解决视觉识别模型在新环境部署时的泛化失败问题。传统方法认为保留大视觉-语言模型的表达性视觉表示可提高鲁棒性，但作者发现这种视觉表达性反而会传播将表示与训练环境绑定的虚假线索，阻碍不变学习。
AI.method: 丢弃视觉引导，将语言嵌入空间作为领域不变性的主要来源。语言嵌入空间自然充当信息瓶颈，在保留核心语义的同时抑制领域特定变化。
AI.result: 在多种骨干网络上进行广泛实验，取得了最先进的性能，并进一步分析了什么使引导对鲁棒泛化有效。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现将DG的重点从改进表示转向设计强制不变性的监督方式，表明语言嵌入空间作为监督信号比视觉表示更适合学习域不变表示。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Domain Generalization in machine learning for visual recognition tasks. It is NOT related to Computer Graphics or 3D motion generation. The application domain is completely different - the paper focuses on improving robustness of visual recognition models in new environments, while the research profile is about 3D motion synthesis from videos. The methods are also unrelated: the paper uses text-anchored information bottlenecks with language embeddings, whereas the research profile uses video generation models (Wan, Seedance), VLMs, and 3D motion generation models. These are entirely different research areas.

title: Generic Expert Coverage for Pruning SparseMixture-of-Experts Language Models
summary: Sparsely activated Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models contain substantial structured redundancy among routed experts, but pruning them without downstream calibration data remains challenging. Existing expert-pruning methods typically rely on a single aggregated importance score, which can bias the retained set toward experts favored by dominant calibration patterns. We propose \textbf{Generic TB-Coverage}, a coverage-aware expert pruning method that uses only generic text corpora (WikiText2 and C4) for calibration. Instead of collapsing expert utility into one score, our method profiles per-expert utility separately on each corpus and enforces a fixed-budget coverage rule that preserves high-utility experts from each corpus before constructing the final pruning mask. Across Qwen1.5-MoE-A2.7B and DeepSeek-MoE-16B-Base at 25\%, 50\%, and 75\% retention budgets, our method improves average accuracy on six common zero-shot benchmarks over random pruning, REAP, and ExpertSparsity, while also reducing perplexity degradation on WikiText2 and C4. The gains are largest under aggressive pruning (25\% and 50\% retain), suggesting that preserving cross-corpus expert coverage is an effective generic-data prior for MoE pruning. Our improvements hold with fixed pruning budgets and no downstream calibration data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Generic TB-Coverage方法，解决稀疏激活MoE语言模型中专家剪枝缺乏下游校准数据的难题。该方法通过仅使用通用语料库(WikiText2和C4)进行校准，对每个语料库分别分析专家效用，并实施固定预算覆盖规则来保留每个语料库的高效用专家，最终构建剪枝掩码。实验表明该方法在Qwen1.5-MoE-A2.7B和DeepSeek-MoE-16B-Base上，25%、50%和75%保留预算下均优于随机剪枝、REAP和ExpertS稀疏方法。
AI.motivation: 稀疏激活的MoE语言模型中存在大量结构化冗余，但在没有下游校准数据的情况下对其进行剪枝仍然困难。现有专家剪枝方法通常依赖单一聚合重要性分数，这会导致保留的专家偏向于受主导校准模式青睐的专家。
AI.method: 提出Generic TB-Coverage方法，一种覆盖感知的专家剪枝方法，仅使用通用文本语料库(WikiText2和C4)进行校准。该方法不将专家效用 collapse 为单一分数，而是分别对每个语料库分析每个专家的效用，并在构建最终剪枝掩码前执行固定预算覆盖规则以保留每个语料库的高效用专家。
AI.result: 在Qwen1.5-MoE-A2.7B和DeepSeek-MoE-16B-Base上测试，保留预算分别为25%、50%和75%。相比随机剪枝、REAP和ExpertS稀疏方法，该方法在六个常见零样本基准测试中提高了平均准确率，同时降低了WikiText2和C4上的困惑度退化。在激进剪枝条件下(25%和50%保留)增益最大。
AI.conclusion: 保留跨语料库专家覆盖是MoE剪枝的有效通用数据先验。在固定剪枝预算和无下游校准数据的条件下，改进依然成立。该方法在低保留预算下效果尤为显著，表明跨语料库覆盖保存策略能有效捕捉通用知识分布。

relevance_reason: This paper is about pruning Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models for LLM compression, which is completely unrelated to the research profile. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion generation from 2D video features, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), VLM-based quality supervision, and text-to-motion synthesis. This paper addresses NLP model compression - a totally different application domain (LLMs vs. graphics/motion generation) and different methods (expert pruning vs. video diffusion models). No relevance whatsoever to the stated research field.

title: Teaching Vision-Language-Action Models What to See and Where to Look
comment: The paper has been accepted by ECCV 2026
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for end-to-end autonomous driving. However, existing VLAs' training relies heavily on text-centric visual question answering and chain-of-thought reasoning data, which emphasizes linguistic reasoning rather than action-grounded planning. As a result, the learned representations capture semantic knowledge but lack spatial dependencies crucial for reliable trajectory prediction. We propose DriveTeach-VLA, a framework that explicitly teaches VLAs what to see and where to look. Driving-aware Vision Distillation (DVD) injects driving-specific perceptual priors into the vision encoder, while 2D Trajectory-Guided Prompts (2D-TGP) provide spatial conditioning aligned with feasible driving trajectories. Together, they form a vision-guided learning pipeline: what to see (DVD pretraining) - where to look (TGP-guided SFT) - how to act (TGP-guided GRPO). DriveTeach-VLA achieves the state-of-the-art performance on NAVSIM and nuScenes. Our code is available at: https://github.com/ShivaTeam/DriveTeach-VLA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DriveTeach-VLA框架，解决现有VLA模型在自动驾驶中缺乏空间依赖性的问题。通过Driving-aware Vision Distillation (DVD)和2D Trajectory-Guided Prompts (2D-TGP)两个核心组件，实现从"看什么"到"看哪里"再到"如何行动"的视觉引导学习流程，在NAVSIM和nuScenes数据集上达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型的训练过度依赖文本中心的视觉问答和思维链推理数据，强调语言推理而非动作根基的规划。这导致学到的表示捕获了语义知识，但缺乏对可靠轨迹预测至关重要的空间依赖性。
AI.method: 提出DriveTeach-VLA框架，包含两个核心创新：1) Driving-aware Vision Distillation (DVD)将驾驶特定的感知先验注入视觉编码器；2) 2D Trajectory-Guided Prompts (2D-TGP)提供与可行驾驶轨迹对齐的空间条件化。学习流程为：DVD预训练(看什么) → TGP引导的SFT(看哪里) → TGP引导的GRPO(如何行动)。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM和nuScenes数据集上实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: DriveTeach-VLA通过显式教授VLA模型"看什么"和"看哪里"，有效弥补了语义知识与空间依赖之间的gap，为端到端自动驾驶提供了新的VLA训练范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about autonomous driving VLA (Vision-Language-Action) models, which is a different application domain from Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. While it uses VLM-related techniques (Vision-Language-Action), the focus is on spatial dependency for driving trajectories, not on extracting visual features from 2D videos for 3D motion synthesis. The paper addresses robotics/autonomous driving problems rather than the computer graphics pain points mentioned (domain gap between 2D/3D, quality assessment for motion synthesis, semantic consistency for 3D motions).

title: Distributionally Robust Listwise Preference Optimization
summary: Existing robust preference optimization for language-model alignment mainly studies pairwise supervision and places robustness at the dataset, prompt, or preference-pair level. We instead study listwise preference optimization under ranking-label uncertainty: given a prompt and a candidate list, the observed ranking over that list may be ambiguous due to annotator inconsistency, near-ties, lossy rankwise feedback, or reward-model noise. We propose a pointwise total-variation robust Plackett--Luce objective that directly robustifies the ranking label conditional on the candidate list. The robust loss admits an exact decomposition into the nominal PL loss plus a worst-case PL correction, and the worst-case ranking is obtained by sorting current implicit scores in ascending order, reducing the inner maximization from $K!$ enumeration to $O(K\log K)$. This tractable structure yields strong offline and online optimization guarantees. In the offline fixed-list setting, the robust objective is convex and projected stochastic subgradient reaches global $ε$-suboptimality with $O(ε^{-2})$ sample complexity. In the online policy-induced setting, where candidate lists are generated by the current policy, we establish weak convexity and $\widetilde O(ε^{-2})$ Moreau-envelope stationarity. Experiments in offline LLM alignment show that the proposed robust correction largely preserves performance under clean labels and improves robustness under noise. In online alignment, it makes reward-model-ranked candidate expansion more reliable and improves both reward-model and external GPT-4 judge metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文研究列表级偏好优化中的排序标签不确定性，提出点wise total-variation鲁棒Plackett-Luce目标函数，直接对候选列表条件下的排序标签进行鲁棒化。该损失函数可分解为名义PL损失加最差情况修正，将内部最大化从K!枚举简化为O(K log K)。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒偏好优化主要研究成对监督，在数据集、提示或偏好对级别设置鲁棒性。本文转而研究列表级偏好优化在排序标签不确定性下的情况：给定提示和候选列表，由于标注者不一致、近似平局、按排序损失反馈或奖励模型噪声，观察到的排序可能存在歧义。
AI.method: 提出点wise total-variation鲁棒Plackett-Luce目标函数，直接对候选列表条件下的排序标签进行鲁棒化。鲁棒损失可精确分解为名义PL损失加上最差情况PL修正，最差情况排序通过按升序排列当前隐式分数获得，将内部最大化从K!枚举简化为O(K log K)。
AI.result: 离线固定列表设置中，鲁棒目标是凸的，投影随机次梯度达到全局ε-次优，样本复杂度为O(ε^{-2})。在线策略诱导设置中，建立弱凸性和O~(ε^{-2}) Moreau包络平稳性。离线LLM对齐实验表明，鲁棒修正可在干净标签下保持性能，在噪声下提高鲁棒性。在线对齐中，使奖励模型排序的候选扩展更可靠，并改善了奖励模型和外部GPT-4评判指标。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在列表级偏好优化中引入排序标签不确定性的鲁棒处理，通过可分解的损失函数设计，实现了从成对监督到列表级监督的扩展，在理论和实验上均展现出良好的优化保证和鲁棒性提升。

relevance_reason: This paper is about listwise preference optimization for LLM alignment (robust Plackett-Luce objectives). It has NO relevance to the research profile. The application domain is completely different - this is machine learning theory for LLM training, not Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation, or visual feature extraction. The methods (preference optimization, ranking theory) are entirely unrelated to the specified methods (VLM, video generation models like Wan/Seedance, motion synthesis). None of the pain points (domain gap, quality assessment, semantic consistency, visual feature extraction) are addressed. This is a theoretical ML paper with no connection to computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: Unified Panoramic-Gaussian Representation for Monocular 4D Scene Synthesis
summary: 4D scene synthesis from monocular videos has made significant progress in recent years. However, existing methods are typically constrained by view interpolation. As a result, they struggle to infer unseen regions beyond the observed views. In this paper, we reformulate the task as 4D scene synthesis with unseen regions, which extends beyond traditional interpolation settings. Camera-conditioned video generation enables unseen region synthesis by guiding generation along specified cameras. However, these methods lack explicit 3D priors and are optimized with random camera trajectories. This design leads to severe inconsistencies under large trajectory deviations. To address this limitation, we build a unified training and inference framework with panoramic trajectory guidance. While this design improves cross-view consistency, the panoramic representation alone fails to model dynamic content effectively. Object motion in panoramic space introduces scale and shape distortions. To address this, we propose PanoGaussian, a unified Panoramic-Gaussian representation that distills the panoramic representation into an explicit dynamic Gaussian representation to capture dynamic physical priors of the 4D scene. Experiments demonstrate that PanoGaussian achieves consistent 4D scene synthesis even under large viewpoint variations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PanoGaussian，一种统一的全景-高斯表示方法，用于从单目视频进行4D场景合成。该方法将全景表示蒸馏为动态高斯表示，以捕捉4D场景的动态物理先验，能够在大视角变化下实现一致的4D场景合成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法受限于视图插值，难以推断观察视图之外不可见区域的全景表示。虽然相机条件视频生成可通过指定相机引导生成不可见区域，但缺乏显式3D先验，且在大轨迹偏差下会出现严重不一致。全景表示虽改善了跨视图一致性，但难以有效建模动态内容，因为物体运动在全景空间中会引入尺度和形状畸变。
AI.method: 提出统一的全景轨迹引导训练和推理框架，结合全景-高斯表示（PanoGaussian），将全景表示蒸馏为显式动态高斯表示，捕捉4D场景的动态物理先验。
AI.result: 实验表明，PanoGaussian即使在大视角变化下也能实现一致的4D场景合成。
AI.conclusion: PanoGaussian通过统一的Panoramic-Gaussian表示，有效解决了动态内容建模和大规模视角变化的挑战，为4D场景合成提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 4D scene synthesis (generating 3D scenes with temporal dynamics from monocular video), while the research profile is focused on 3D human MOTION generation from 2D videos. These are different application domains in computer graphics - scene synthesis vs motion synthesis. The paper uses panoramic-Gaussian representations for scene reconstruction, not the methods mentioned (VLM, video generation models like Wan/Seedance, motion generation models). It doesn't address any of the stated pain points about motion synthesis, semantic consistency, or visual guidance for motion generation.

title: DRL-CLBA: A Clean Label Backdoor Attack for Speech Classification via DDPG Reinforcement Learning
summary: Deep learning models for speech classification are vulnerable to backdoor attacks, where malicious triggers cause misclassification at inference time. While sample-specific attacks can bypass many defenses, they often rely on poisoned label attack, making them detectable via manual data defense. In this paper, we propose DRL-CLBA, a novel clean label backdoor attack for speech classification that leverages Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) reinforcement learning. We also utilize deep audio steganography to embed sample-specific triggers into source audio, creating feature-space anchors. The proposed reinforcement learning framework effectively optimizes target samples toward trigger-bearing anchor points in the model's deep latent space, enabling label-migration-free poisoning of target samples. Experimental results across three datasets and four different DNNs demonstrate that DRL-CLBA achieves a high attack success rate, effectively bypassing some backdoor defenses. The attack demonstrates strong resistance against fine-tuning, pruning, and spectral signature defenses, exposing critical vulnerabilities in speech-controlled systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DRL-CLBA，一种针对语音分类系统的干净标签后门攻击方法，利用深度确定性策略梯度(DDPG)强化学习和深度音频隐写术嵌入样本特定触发器，在模型深层潜在空间中创建特征空间锚点，实现无需标签迁移的中毒。实验在3个数据集和4个DNN上验证了高攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有样本特异性攻击虽能绕过许多防御，但通常依赖带毒标签攻击，易被手动数据防御检测。因此需要一种更隐蔽的干净标签后门攻击方法来揭示语音控制系统的关键安全漏洞。
AI.method: 1)使用深度音频隐写术将样本特定触发器嵌入源音频，创建特征空间锚点；2)利用DDPG强化学习框架优化目标样本，使其向触发器锚点在模型深层潜在空间中的位置迁移；3)实现无需标签迁移的样本中毒。
AI.result: 在三个数据集和四个不同DNN上实现高攻击成功率，能有效绕过部分后门防御，对微调、剪枝和频谱签名防御具有强抵抗力。
AI.conclusion: DRL-CLBA暴露了语音控制系统中的关键安全漏洞，为后门攻击防御研究提供了重要参考，同时也揭示了深度学习模型在安全方面的潜在风险。

relevance_reason: This paper is about speech classification security (backdoor attacks using DDPG reinforcement learning and audio steganography), which has NO relevance to the research profile. The research profile is in Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion generation from videos using video generation models and VLMs. The application domains are completely different: audio/speech processing vs. computer graphics/motion synthesis. Even though both mention "reinforcement learning," the context and purpose are entirely different - one attacks speech classifiers, the other synthesizes 3D motions.

title: Temporal and Cross-Modal Alignment for Enhanced Audiovisual Video Captioning
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have advanced video understanding, achieving precise temporal and cross-modal alignment in audiovisual video captioning remains a formidable challenge. Most existing approaches suffer from modality detachment and temporal incoherence, failing to accurately bind auditory events to visual entities or capture complex causal dynamics. To address these deficiencies, we propose TCA-Captioner, a framework specifically engineered to enhance Temporal and Cross-Modal Alignment for audiovisual video captioning. We first introduce the Observer-Checker-Corrector (OCC) framework, an iterative refinement strategy that generates high-fidelity, meticulously grounded training data. Leveraging a curated high-density human interaction dataset, TCA-Captioner is optimized to model sophisticated audiovisual interactions. Furthermore, we present TCA-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark utilizing a Decoupled Evaluation Protocol to isolate and quantify model proficiency in audiovisual binding and temporal relational reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TCA-Captioner sets a new standard for temporally-coherent and synchronized audiovisual narratives.

AI.tldr: TCA-Captioner是一个用于视听视频字幕生成的新框架，旨在解决多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)在时间对齐和跨模态对齐方面的挑战。该框架通过观察器-检查器-校正器(OCC)迭代细化策略生成高保真训练数据，并引入TCA-Bench基准测试来评估模型在视听绑定和时间关系推理方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 当前视听视频字幕生成方法存在模态分离和时间不一致的问题，无法准确地将听觉事件与视觉实体绑定，也无法捕捉复杂的因果动态关系。这推动了对改进时间对齐和跨模态对齐方法的研究需求。
AI.method: 提出三个核心贡献：1) OCC(观察器-检查器-校正器)框架，用于迭代优化生成高保真、精准锚定的训练数据；2) 利用精心策划的高密度人类交互数据集对模型进行优化；3) TCA-Bench诊断基准，采用解耦评估协议来隔离和量化模型在视听绑定和时间关系推理方面的能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，TCA-Captioner在视听叙事的时间一致性和同步性方面设立了新的标准。
AI.conclusion: TCA-Captioner通过创新的OCC框架和专门设计的评估基准，成功解决了视听视频字幕生成中的时间对齐和跨模态对齐难题，为多模态视频理解领域做出了重要贡献。

relevance_reason: This paper is about audiovisual video captioning (generating text descriptions from video), which is a completely different application domain from the research profile's focus on 3D motion generation/synthesis from 2D visual features. While both deal with video, the goal and output are fundamentally different: the profile seeks 3D motion representation generation, while this paper focuses on textual description generation through video understanding. The methods (OCC framework for captioning) and domain (video-language models) have no overlap with the specified computer graphics motion synthesis pipeline. This is a case of using completely different methods for completely different application domains.

title: Reformalization of the Jordan Curve Theorem
summary: We present a case study in reformalization, a variant of autoformalization in which the input proof is not natural language but a formal development in a different proof assistant. Concretely, we report three reformalizations of the Jordan Curve Theorem: from Mizar to Lean, from HOL Light to Lean, and from HOL Light to Agda. We analyse the results and identify pipeline design choices that matter for practical reformalization tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文报告了Jordan曲线定理的三次重新形式化案例研究：从Mizar到Lean，从HOL Light到Lean，以及从HOL Light到Agda，旨在分析重新形式化任务中 pipeline 设计选择对实际任务的影响。
AI.motivation: 自动形式化（autoformalization）通常指将自然语言证明转换为形式化证明，而 reformalization 是其变体，输入是不同证明助手开发的形式化证明。本文动机在于探索如何将一个证明助手的形式化证明迁移到另一个证明助手，以促进形式化数学知识的共享和复用。
AI.method: 作者进行了三个具体的 reformalization 实验：1) Mizar 到 Lean；2) HOL Light 到 Lean；3) HOL Light 到 Agda。通过分析这些实验的结果，识别出对实际 reformalization 任务重要的 pipeline 设计选择。
AI.result: 论文展示了成功实现的三次 Jordan Curve Theorem reformalization 案例，并从中提炼出若干关键的设计选择因素，这些因素影响 reformalization 任务的实际可行性和效率。
AI.conclusion: reformalization 作为促进不同形式化证明系统之间知识迁移的重要手段具有可行性，通过识别影响 pipeline 的设计选择，可为未来更高效的 proof transfer 工具提供指导。

relevance_reason: This paper is about mathematical formalization and proof assistants (Mizar, Lean, HOL Light, Agda), which has NO connection to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video synthesis, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile (VLM, Wan, Seedance, visual feature extraction). The application domain is completely different - this is formal methods/mathematics, not computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: HistoSeg++: Delving deeper with attention and multiscale feature fusion for biomarker segmentation
comment: Published in the Proceedings of ICBBE 2025. The Version of Record is available at https://doi.org/10.1145/3794209.3794211
summary: Segmentation of biomarkers in medical images is frequently viewed as a first step towards medical image analysis in any bioinformatics or biomedical application. Despite progress, existing methods still struggle to capture information at multiple scales and to perform upsampling effectively across different datasets. These shortcomings often result in suboptimal generalization capabilities. Recently, architectures belonging to the Nested-UNet family excel in capturing multiscale contextual information and upsample them effectively. In this work, We propose a novel Nested-UNet architecture that effectively captures multi-scale contextual information. It includes inner and outer attention units to enhance focus during upsampling, along with channel-wise feature recalibration using squeeze-and-excitation modules, leading to improved segmentation performance. Additionally, the architecture integrates an edge-aware loss to emphasize boundary accuracy by assigning greater importance to edge regions. Tested extensively on three publicly available benchmark datasets. Our method demonstrates a generalization performance superior to existing Nested-UNet methods. Code: https://github.com/saadwazir/histosegplusplus

title: Meta-Benchmarks for Financial-Services LLM Evaluation
summary: Public LLM leaderboards optimise for global average performance and do not capture the specific cognitive demands of financial-services work: a model that leads on MMLU-Pro may underperform on document-grounded compliance reasoning, and a coding leader may handle multi-turn customer interactions poorly. We present a meta-benchmarking framework that organises 452 publicly reported benchmarks into 41 O*NET Generalized Work Activities and aggregates those into 38 BIAN banking business domains spanning sales, operations, risk, and support work. A multiplicative weighting scheme (discrimination x coverage x recency), computed over a rolling model window, rewards benchmarks that still separate the best models, are widely reported, and remain in active use, suppressing saturated legacy tests automatically. These weights scale the K-factor in a pairwise Elo tournament, producing cross-benchmark-comparable work-activity scores without raw score normalisation; business-domain scores are weighted averages of the constituent work-activity Elos. We demonstrate the framework on a point-in-time public snapshot covering 288 models across 25 organisations as of June 2026, and describe the methodology, full taxonomy, design decisions, and limitations with the aim of making the approach reproducible for institutions facing similar selection and governance challenges.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个元基准测试框架，将452个公开基准整合到41个O*NET广义工作活动和38个BIAN银行业务领域中，通过乘法加权方案（区分度×覆盖度×时效性）调整 Elo 评分，产生跨基准可比较的工作活动分数，旨在解决公开 LLM 排行榜无法捕捉金融服务特定认知需求的问题。
AI.motivation: 公开的LLM排行榜（如MMLU-Pro）优化的是全局平均性能，无法捕捉金融服务工作的特定认知需求：文档驱动的合规推理、多轮客户交互等实际工作场景。现有基准可能存在饱和问题，且无法跨基准进行公平比较。
AI.method: 1) 将452个公开基准映射到41个O*NET广义工作活动；2) 进一步聚合为38个BIAN银行业务领域（涵盖销售、运营、风险和支持工作）；3) 采用乘法加权方案（区分度×覆盖度×时效性）计算基准权重；4) 使用加权K因子的成对Elo锦标赛产生跨基准可比较的工作活动分数；5) 业务领域分数是工作活动Elo的加权平均。
AI.result: 框架演示于2026年6月的公开快照，覆盖288个模型来自25个组织。权重方案能自动抑制饱和的传统测试，同时奖励仍能区分最佳模型、广泛报告且仍在使用的基准。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可复现，帮助面临类似选择和治理挑战的机构进行更准确的LLM评估，解决了跨基准比较的难题，同时考虑了基准的实际相关性、时效性和区分能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about financial services LLM evaluation and benchmarking, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. It has no relevance to 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), visual feature extraction, or any computer graphics methodology. The application domain is finance/AI benchmarking, not computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: ICDepth: Taming Video Diffusion Models for Video Depth Estimation via In-Context Conditioning
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Project page: https://xuanhuahe.github.io/ICDepth/
summary: Monocular video depth estimation requires temporal consistency, geometric accuracy, and generalization across diverse scenarios, yet existing methods struggle to achieve all three simultaneously. Discriminative models excel at per-frame accuracy but suffer from temporal drift due to limited context windows, while generative methods improve consistency and generalization at the cost of extensive training data (10M+ samples) and lack of geometric precision. In response to these issues, we introduce \textbf{ICDepth}, a framework that adapts pre-trained text-to-video diffusion transformers for video depth estimation via In-Context Conditioning (ICC), leveraging their rich spatial-temporal priors. To address key challenges in transferring ICC from generation to dense prediction, we propose: (1)~\textbf{SAND-Attention}, which ensures precise spatial-temporal alignment via shared RoPE and enforces unidirectional attention to prevent noise contamination; (2)~\textbf{SRFM}, which injects DINOv2 semantic and resolution priors to enhance geometric precision. ICDepth achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks with remarkable data efficiency, trained on only 0.8M frames ($6$--$13\times$ less than competing generative methods), while demonstrating strong zero-shot generalization to diverse domains.

AI.tldr: ICDepth是一种利用预训练文本到视频扩散变换器的视频深度估计框架，通过上下文条件(ICV)利用丰富的时空先验，在仅使用0.8M帧训练数据（比竞争方法少6-13倍）的情况下，实现了最先进的性能并具有强大的零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 解决现有方法无法同时实现时间一致性、几何精度和跨场景泛化的问题。判别模型因有限上下文窗口导致时间漂移，生成模型需要海量训练数据（10M+样本）且缺乏几何精度。
AI.method: 提出两个关键技术：(1) SAND-Attention通过共享RoPE确保精确的空间-时间对齐，并强制单向注意力防止噪声污染；(2) SRFM注入DINOv2语义和分辨率先验以增强几何精度。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中实现最先进的结果，具有显著的数据效率（仅用0.8M帧训练，比竞争生成方法少6-13倍），并展示了对不同领域的强大零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: ICDepth成功地将生成模型的时空先验迁移到密集预测任务，在数据效率和泛化性方面具有显著优势。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses video depth estimation, which is a fundamentally different application domain from 3D motion generation. While both use video diffusion models, depth estimation (predicting depth maps) is not the same as synthesizing 3D human motions from 2D visual features. The research profile specifically needs motion synthesis methods, not depth estimation. Using diffusion models for depth estimation in computer vision does not translate to the same application in computer graphics for motion generation - these are distinct tasks with different goals and outputs.

title: Path-level Hindsight Instructions for Semantic Exploration in Vision-Language Navigation
summary: On-policy exploration is a crucial component for training robust Vision-Language Navigation agents, as it exposes the policy to a broader state distribution. However, such exploration inevitably leads to trajectories that deviate from expert demonstrations, resulting in a semantic mismatch between the executed visual stream and the original language instruction. In this work, we address this challenge by introducing Phi-Nav, a unified on-policy framework that leverages hindsight reasoning to align instructions with the agent's actual exploratory journey. Specifically, Phi-Nav operates through a three-stage dual-supervision cycle: 1) the agent performs oracle-guided on-policy exploration, sampling a trajectory while learning from expert action feedback, 2) a hindsight speaker synthesizes a path-level hindsight instruction grounded in the collected visual observations, and 3) the agent conducts a second imitation pass, treating the synthesized trajectory-instruction pair as an additional expert demonstration. Through this process, Phi-Nav bridges the critical semantic supervision gap inherent in on-policy methods, transforming semantically unlabeled movement into dense training signals. Evaluations on the R2R-CE and RxR-CE benchmarks show that Phi-Nav yields competitive performance while requiring only a fraction of the expert demonstrations used by current baselines. These results underscore the necessity of semantic exploration in VLN, positioning Phi-Nav as an effective solution for training embodied agents with limited data.

AI.tldr: Phi-Nav是一个统一的on-policy框架，通过 hindsight reasoning（后见之明推理）来解决视觉-语言导航(VLN)中的语义监督问题。该方法使用三阶段双监督循环，让智能体在探索过程中将语言指令与实际视觉轨迹对齐，从而将语义未标记的移动转化为密集的训练信号。实验在R2R-CE和RxR-CE基准测试上取得竞争性性能，且仅需少量专家演示。
AI.motivation: on-policy探索虽然能让策略接触到更广泛的状态分布，但会导致执行轨迹偏离专家演示，造成视觉流与原始语言指令之间的语义不匹配。这种语义监督差距限制了VLN智能体的训练效果。
AI.method: Phi-Nav采用三阶段双监督循环：1) 智能体执行oracle引导的on-policy探索，在学习专家动作反馈的同时采样轨迹；2) hindsight speaker（后见之明说话者）基于收集的视觉观察合成路径级后见之明指令；3) 智能体进行第二次模仿学习，将合成的轨迹-指令对视为额外的专家演示。
AI.result: 在R2R-CE和RxR-CE基准测试上，Phi-Nav取得竞争性性能，且仅需当前基线一小部分的专家演示即可达到类似效果。
AI.conclusion: Phi-Nav成功弥合了on-policy方法中固有的语义监督差距，将语义未标记的移动转化为密集训练信号。研究强调了语义探索在VLN中的必要性，表明Phi-Nav是训练数据有限情况下训练具身智能体的有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) for robotics agents, which is a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics 3D motion generation. The research profile focuses on video-to-3D motion synthesis using models like Wan/Seedance and visual feature extraction for 3D generation, while this paper addresses semantic监督 in robot navigation through hindsight reasoning. The application domains are fundamentally different: navigation agents vs. 3D motion synthesis.

title: Structure-Aware Gaussian Splatting for Large-Scale Scene Reconstruction
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting has demonstrated remarkable potential in novel view synthesis. In contrast to small-scale scenes, large-scale scenes inevitably contain sparsely observed regions with excessively sparse initial points. In this case, supervising Gaussians initialized from low-frequency sparse points with high-frequency images often induces uncontrolled densification and redundant primitives, degrading both efficiency and quality. Intuitively, this issue can be mitigated with scheduling strategies, which can be categorized into two paradigms: modulating target signal frequency via densification and modulating sampling frequency via image resolution. However, previous scheduling strategies are primarily hardcoded, failing to perceive the convergence behavior of scene frequency. To address this, we reframe the scene reconstruction problem from the perspective of signal structure recovery and propose SIG, a novel scheduler that synchronizes image supervision with Gaussian frequencies. Specifically, we derive the average sampling frequency and bandwidth of 3D representations, and then regulate the training image resolution and the Gaussian densification process based on scene frequency convergence. Furthermore, we introduce Sphere-Constrained Gaussians, which leverage the spatial prior of initialized point clouds to control Gaussian optimization. Our framework enables frequency-consistent, geometry-aware, and floater-free training, achieving state-of-the-art performance by a substantial margin in both efficiency and rendering quality in large-scale scenes. The code is available at: https://github.com/weiyixue999/Signal_Structure_Aware_Gaussian

AI.tldr: 本文提出SIG调度器，通过同步图像监督与高斯频率来解决大规模场景中稀疏观测区域导致的失控致密化和冗余基元问题，实现频率一致、几何感知、无浮点子的训练，在大规模场景中达到最先进的效率和质量。
AI.motivation: 大规模场景中存在稀疏观测区域，从低频稀疏点初始化高频图像监督会导致失控的致密化和冗余基元，损害效率和质量。现有调度策略是硬编码的，无法感知场景频率的收敛行为。
AI.method: 从信号结构恢复角度重新审视场景重建问题，推导3D表示的平均采样频率和带宽，基于场景频率收敛调节训练图像分辨率和高斯致密化过程；引入球约束高斯利用初始化点云的空间先验控制高斯优化。
AI.result: 在大规模场景中实现SOTA性能，效率和渲染质量均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架实现了频率一致、几何感知、无浮点子的训练，为大规模场景重建提供有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D scene reconstruction using Gaussian Splatting, which is a different application domain from the research profile focused on 3D motion generation from videos/text. The profile deals with video-to-motion synthesis, text-to-motion semantic consistency, and using VLMs for motion quality assessment - while this paper addresses sparse observation issues in large-scale scene reconstruction. Although both are in Computer Graphics and deal with 3D content, they target fundamentally different problems: scene rendering quality vs. human motion synthesis. The methods also differ (Gaussian Splatting vs. video generation models and motion generation models).

title: Mastermind: Strategy-grounded Learning for Repository-Scale Vulnerability Reproduction
summary: Repository-level vulnerability reproduction is a demanding software engineering (SE) task: an agent must inspect a codebase, infer the input grammar that reaches a vulnerable path, construct a proof-of-conceptv(PoC), and verify that the crash disappears on the patched build. Recent LLM agents can often execute these steps when the approach is correct, yet they still fail by choosing the wrong strategy. This paper argues that strategy, rather than the full action trajectory, is the right learning unit for such SE agents: it is compact enough to optimize, concrete enough to guide execution, and stable enough to store and reuse across attempts. We present Mastermind, a dual-loop framework that separates transferable strategy learning from task-specific experience. A trainable planner learns reusable vulnerability-reproduction strategies through SFT and milestone-based GRPO, while an experience loop maintains task-local strategy records that guide subsequent attempts. The planner is trained independently of the executor, allowing strategy learning to improve multiple frozen executors without modifying their action-generation capability. We evaluate Mastermind on CyberGym using 260 training tasks and 200 held-out evaluation tasks. With GPT-5.5 as the frozen executor, Mastermind achieves an 84.5% pass rate, outperforming open-book PoC context (60.0%), Best-of-8 sampling (63.0%), and iterative improvement (77.0%). The same planner also improves GPT-5.4 mini and GLM~5.1 from 45.0% and 58.5% to 60.0% and 71.0%. These results demonstrate that learning high-level strategies is an effective and transferable mechanism for improving repository-scale SE agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mastermind框架，通过将可迁移策略学习与任务特定经验分离，使用双循环架构改进LLM在仓库级漏洞复现任务中的表现。规划器通过SFT和GRPO训练，学习可复用的漏洞复现策略，显著提升多种LLM的执行效果。
AI.motivation: 仓库级漏洞复现是一个困难的SE任务，需要检查代码库、推断输入语法、构建PoC并验证补丁。当前LLM代理虽能执行正确步骤，但常因选择错误策略而失败。论文认为策略是比完整动作轨迹更合适的学习单元：足够紧凑可优化、足够具体可指导执行、足够稳定可存储重用。
AI.method: 提出双循环框架Mastermind：1)可训练规划器通过监督微调(SFT)和基于里程碑的GRPO学习可复用策略；2)经验循环维护任务本地策略记录指导后续尝试。规划器独立于执行器训练，使策略学习可改进多个冻结执行器。
AI.result: 在CyberGym评估：260训练任务+200保留任务。使用GPT-5.5时Mastermind达84.5%通过率，优于开卷PoC上下文(60.0%)、Best-of-8采样(63.0%)、迭代改进(77.0%)。同一规划器将GPT-5.4 mini从45.0%提至60.0%，GLM~5.1从58.5%提至71.0%。
AI.conclusion: 学习高级策略是改进仓库级SE代理的有效且可迁移机制。策略作为学习单元比完整动作轨迹更优，Mastermind框架证明了策略学习与执行器解耦的可行性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM-based vulnerability reproduction in software engineering, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. It addresses none of the pain points (2D/3D motion synthesis, video generation, visual feature extraction) and uses none of the specified methods (VLM for graphics, video generation models, 3D motion generation). The application domain is cybersecurity/SE, not computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: LASER: A Corrective Lens for LVLMs via Visual Attention Preservation and Sink Suppression
comment: The 19th European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2026)
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) exhibit strong reasoning ability but suffer from visual forgetting during long-horizon decoding, where attention progressively drifts away from visual evidence. Existing methods largely treat this issue as a late-stage attention decay problem or attempt to mitigate it through heuristic reminders or post-hoc attention lifting. Through systematic empirical analysis, we find that performance degradation under visual forgetting is largely driven by two overlooked factors: early-stage attention decay disrupts evidence acquisition, and attention concentration on a subset of task-irrelevant visual sink tokens. Motivated by these insights, we propose LASER, a post-training framework that regulates both the visual attention trajectory and intra-visual token attention distribution during reasoning. Technically, LASER introduces two complementary rewards: a Visual Grounding Reward, which encourages the model to maintain attention on semantically salient visual tokens throughout decoding, and a Sink Suppression Reward, which penalizes excessive attention concentration on visual sink tokens. Together, these rewards preserve early-stage grounding while preventing attention collapse onto uninformative regions. Extensive experiments on eight benchmark datasets demonstrate that LASER consistently outperforms strong baselines, validating attention-aware training as an effective remedy for visual forgetting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LASER框架，通过引入视觉定位奖励和抑制奖励来解决大型视觉语言模型在长程解码过程中的视觉遗忘问题，在8个基准数据集上验证了注意力感知训练的有效性。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型在长程解码过程中存在视觉遗忘问题，注意力逐渐偏离视觉证据。现有方法将其视为晚期注意力衰减问题或通过启发式提醒来缓解，但作者通过系统实证分析发现性能下降主要由两个被忽视的因素导致：早期阶段注意力衰减干扰证据获取，以及注意力集中在部分任务无关的视觉sink tokens上。
AI.method: 提出LASER后训练框架，包含两个互补的奖励机制：1) 视觉定位奖励(Visual Grounding Reward)，鼓励模型在解码过程中保持对语义显著视觉token的注意力；2) 抑制奖励(Sink Suppression Reward)，惩罚对无信息量视觉sink tokens的过度集中注意力。
AI.result: 在8个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，LASER consistently outperforms strong baselines，验证了注意力感知训练是解决视觉遗忘的有效方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过调节视觉注意力轨迹和视觉token内的注意力分布，LASER框架能够保留早期阶段的视觉定位，同时防止注意力崩溃到无信息区域，为视觉遗忘问题提供了有效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses visual attention preservation in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), which is completely different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation. While the paper uses a Visual Language Model, it's applied to general visual understanding and question-answering tasks, NOT to video-to-3D motion synthesis, quality assessment of video priors, or visual feature extraction for 3D generation. The application domains are fundamentally different: LVLM performance optimization vs. 3D motion generation from 2D videos. The pain points, methods (two-stage video+motion pipeline), and end goals have no alignment.

title: SimWorlds: A Multi-Agent System for Dynamic 3D Scene Creation
summary: LLM agents are increasingly used to translate natural language into 3D scenes in a procedural way, but existing systems focus on static output. Dynamic 4D scenes from text alone, in which liquids flow, particles emit, rigid bodies cascade, and articulated mechanisms move, remain largely unexplored despite their value as editable content and as physics-grounded training data for video generation and embodied AI. Two challenges set the dynamic case apart from static text-to-scene work: an agent must jointly coordinate spatial layout, multiple physics solvers, temporal sequencing, camera, and lighting in a single coherent scene, and verifying motion correctness from rendered video is fundamentally harder than judging a single image. We present SimWorlds: a multi-agent framework that produces dynamic, editable 4D scenes from text, with Blender-specific procedural knowledge, a planner-coder-reviewer workflow driving a fixed ordered sequence of construction stages, a layered scene protocol enforced by a deterministic verifier, and a runtime-state inspection tool suite that catches mechanism failures the rendered image cannot reveal. We also introduce 4DBuildBench, a benchmark for assessing both visual fidelity and physical consistency of the procedural dynamic 3D scenes generated from text prompts. Experiments show that SimWorlds outperforms prior dynamic Blender generation baselines.

AI.tldr: SimWorlds是一个多智能体框架，可根据文本提示生成动态、可编辑的4D场景（包含液体流动、粒子发射、刚体级联、关节机构运动等），并引入4DBuildBench基准测试来评估视觉保真度和物理一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有系统主要关注静态输出，从文本生成动态4D场景（液体流动、粒子发射、刚体级联、关节运动）基本未被探索。动态场景具有作为可编辑内容和视频生成/具身AI训练数据的价值。
AI.method: 提出多智能体框架，包含：1) Blender特定程序化知识；2) 计划器-编码器-审查工作流驱动固定排序的构建阶段；3) 由确定性验证器强制执行的分层场景协议；4) 运行时状态检查工具套件。
AI.result: SimWorlds在动态Blender生成基线上表现优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 成功实现从文本生成动态4D场景的框架，通过多智能体协作、验证工具和基准测试解决了动态场景生成中的核心挑战。

relevance_reason: This paper is about physics-based 4D scene generation (liquid flow, rigid bodies, particles) in Blender using multi-agent systems, while the research profile is about 3D human/character motion synthesis from 2D video priors using VLMs and video generation models (Wan, Seedance). These are fundamentally different application domains - one is physics simulation/scene creation, the other is character motion generation from video. The methods are also completely different (multi-agent Blender system vs VLM + video generation pipeline). The paper does not address any of the specified pain points about 2D-to-3D motion extraction, video prior quality assessment, or semantic consistency between text and synthesized 3D motions.

title: Consistent Scene Understanding in 3D Gaussian Splatting via Multi-Cue Mask Refinement
summary: Reliable instance-level scene understanding is a fundamental prerequisite for object-level interactions and high-fidelity 3D representations. While current methods often leverage 2D foundation segmentation models to obtain these priors, their 2D-centric design typically yields fragmented masks and inconsistent predictions across different views. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework that produces consistent 2D instance masks to guide the optimization of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) feature fields. Our framework consists of three main stages. (1) Multi-Cue Extraction that generates synergistic semantic, geometric, and structural priors from input images. (2) Multi-Cue-Guided Mask Merging process that consolidates fragmented masks using a composite merge score derived from semantic, depth, and edge cues. (3) Cross-View Mask Matching that establishes globally consistent identity assignments across all viewpoints. By transforming viewpoint-specific segments into coherent 3D primitives, our approach enables stable 3D instance segmentation and effective downstream editing tasks. Experiments demonstrate that our method significantly improves cross-view consistency and segmentation stability over existing baselines while maintaining high-fidelity photometric reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新框架，用于从2D图像生成一致的实例掩码，以指导3D Gaussian Splatting特征场的优化，解决现有方法中掩码碎片化和跨视图不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前方法常使用2D基础分割模型获取先验，但其以2D为中心的设计通常产生碎片化的掩码和跨不同视图的不一致预测，这是进行目标级交互和高保真3D表示的基本障碍。
AI.method: 框架包含三个主要阶段：(1)多线索提取：从输入图像生成协同的语义、几何和结构先验；(2)多线索引导的掩码合并：使用语义、深度和边缘线索的复合合并分数整合碎片化掩码；(3)跨视图掩码匹配：在所有视点上建立全局一致的身份分配。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著提高了跨视图一致性和分割稳定性，同时保持了高保真的光度重建效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过将视点特定的片段转化为连贯的3D基元，实现了稳定的3D实例分割和有效的下游编辑任务。]

relevance_reason: While both papers are in Computer Graphics, the application domains are fundamentally different. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation (human motion synthesis) from 2D videos, while this paper addresses 3D scene understanding and reconstruction using 3D Gaussian Splatting. The paper does address visual feature extraction from 2D images for 3D representation (related to pain point #4), but this is for scene/object reconstruction, not motion synthesis. The methods are also different - this paper uses mask refinement and Gaussian Splatting, not video generation models or VLM-based quality supervision. Overall, it's a tangential work that uses similar low-level techniques (2D-to-3D) but targets a completely different application domain.

title: Repair the Amplifier, Not the Symptom: Stable World-Model Correction for Agent Rollouts
summary: As agent planning moves from short tool chains toward persistent workflows with thousands or tens of thousands of steps, failures will occur inside large planning graphs rather than in isolated predictions. Replanning the entire graph after every mistake is neither computationally realistic nor desirable: full-graph replay consumes large context budgets, exposes the LLM to many irrelevant symptoms, and can degrade long-context retrieval. This paper studies the missing component in such systems: a world-model corrector that repairs the failed planning graph in place. We compare two families of correctors. The first is the common engineering approach: scan nodes and edges, choose a suspicious local region, and ask an LLM to repair it. We implement strong engineering LLM correctors and find that they can help, especially when given very large contexts. The second family is our approach, WM-SAR (World-Model Subgraph Amplification Repair): instead of scanning for visible symptoms, it works backward from subgraph amplification, identifies the nodes and edges that keep re-amplifying error, and sends only that causal subgraph to the LLM. Across graph simulations and LLM repair experiments, WM-SAR substantially outperforms engineering correctors under realistic token budgets, achieves near-whole-graph stabilization with a compact region, and gives the LLM a cleaner repair target.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大规模智能体规划中的图修复问题。当规划图包含数千步时，失败会发生在大型图中而非孤立预测。全图重规划不切实际，因为会消耗大量上下文、引入无关症状且影响长上下文检索。作者提出WM-SAR方法，通过反向追溯子图放大效应，识别持续放大错误的节点和边，仅将因果子图发送给LLM修复。实验表明WM-SAR在真实token预算下显著优于传统工程修复方法，能用紧凑区域实现接近全图稳定化。
AI.motivation: 随着智能体规划从短工具链向包含数千步的持久化工作流演进，失败会出现在大型规划图中而非孤立的预测中。每次错误后重新规划整个图在计算上不现实且不可取：全图重放会消耗大量上下文预算、使LLM暴露于许多无关症状，并可能降低长上下文检索效果。
AI.method: 作者比较了两类修正器：(1)工程方法：扫描节点和边，选择可疑的局部区域，让LLM修复；(2)WM-SAR方法：不搜索可见症状，而是从子图放大效应反向工作，识别持续放大错误的节点和边，仅将因果子图发送给LLM。实验在图模拟和LLM修复任务中进行。
AI.result: WM-SAR在真实token预算下显著优于工程修正器，能够用紧凑区域实现接近全图稳定化，并为LLM提供更清晰的修复目标。
AI.conclusion: WM-SAR通过仅关注因果子图而非扫描整个图，为大规模规划图的原位修复提供了一种更高效的方法，在实际应用中具有重要价值。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agent planning and world-model correction for large-scale planning graphs - completely unrelated to the research profile. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion generation from video using VLMs and video generation models. This paper addresses LLM planning errors in agent systems, not visual/motion synthesis. There is no match in application domain, methods, or research area. This is a foundational AI/ML paper about agent rollouts, not computer graphics or motion generation.

title: Beyond Pixel Diffs: Benchmarking Image Change Captioning for Web UI Visual Regression Testing
summary: Visual regression testing (VRT) is a standard quality assurance step in modern software release pipelines. On every change, it re-renders user interface (UI) screenshots, compares each one against an approved baseline image, and routes any detected difference to a human reviewer who decides whether it is an intended update or an unintended regression. A widely used approach, especially in open-source and continuous-integration pipelines, is pixel-level comparison, which is semantically blind and treats rendering noise and genuine defects identically, producing large volumes of false positives that force developers and testers to spend substantial time and effort manually reviewing flagged differences at every release cycle. Industry tools apply machine learning to VRT, but lack public evaluation. More critically, no dataset or benchmark exists to support natural language descriptions of UI changes, a capability that tells testers what changed in words instead of leaving them to interpret a binary flag or a highlighted region. To address the gap, we propose a new task, Web UI Image Change Captioning (WUICC), which sits at the intersection of VRT and image difference captioning (IDC), and release WUICC-bench, its first dataset and benchmark for the task. We evaluate eleven representative IDC methods, together with two zero-shot general-purpose LLMs. We find that: (1) these methods tend to struggle in the Web UI domain due to its layout diversity, dense text, and fine-grained changes, and (2) yet the trained methods already suppress non-meaningful visual noise far more selectively than the pixel-level comparison VRT relies on, providing a solid foundation for future domain-specific research.

AI.tldr: 提出了Web UI图像变化描述（WUICC）任务，旨在解决视觉回归测试（VRT）中像素级比较产生的假阳性问题。该任务结合VRT和图像差异描述，允许用自然语言描述UI变化，而非仅提供二元标志或高亮区域。发布了首个WUICC-bench数据集和基准测试。
AI.motivation: 当前VRT中像素级比较方法存在语义盲点，将渲染噪声和真实缺陷同等对待，产生大量假阳性，导致开发者和测试人员需要花费大量时间手动审查。此外，缺乏用于自然语言描述UI变化的数据集和基准。
AI.method: 提出了WUICC任务，构建了WUICC-bench数据集和基准测试。评估了11种代表性的IDC方法和2种零样本通用LLM。
AI.result: 发现：(1)这些方法在Web UI领域表现较差，原因是Web UI的布局多样性、密集文本和细粒度变化；(2)然而，训练后的方法已经比像素级比较更 selective 地抑制无意义的视觉噪声。
AI.conclusion: 为未来针对Web UI领域的特定研究提供了坚实基础，WUICC任务可以更智能地描述UI变化，减少假阳性问题。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Web UI visual regression testing and image change captioning for UI interfaces, which is entirely different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion generation, video-to-motion synthesis, and extracting visual features for 3D generation. The application domain is completely mismatched - web UI testing vs. 3D motion/graphics generation. While both involve visual analysis, the methods, goals, and domains are fundamentally different. This paper would not help someone working on video-based motion synthesis or 3D motion generation.

title: Verifiable Knowledge Expansion through Retrieval-Grounded Formal Concept Analysis
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, Accepted to the 8th epiDAMIK ACM SIGKDD International Workshop on Epidemiology meets Data Mining and Knowledge Discovery (epiDAMIK 2026)
summary: Ontology construction requires deciding which objects, attributes, and structural relations should be accepted as valid knowledge. Language models can propose such structures from text, but their outputs can still be unsupported or inconsistent. This paper proposes a retrieval-augmented small language model (SLM) framework that uses formal concept analysis (FCA) as a symbolic verification loop for knowledge expansion. Starting from seed attributes, FCA proposes implications over a growing formal context. A retrieval-grounded SLM oracle then validates each implication or returns a counterexample. The oracle also supports incidence judgments, consistency checks, and attribute proposals, making accepted implications, counterexamples, contradictions, and corrections inspectable. In a rare ataxia setting constructed from Orphadata resources, retrieval-grounded 10-seed runs obtain relation F1 of 0.29-0.52 and closure-based implication F1 of 0.22-0.30. Larger seed sets increase the number of evaluated implications and often improve implication F1. The lower implication scores reflect a stricter evaluation of derived implications, where one missed or extra relation can affect several implication judgments. Ablations show that incidence judgments in a fixed object-attribute setting can improve closure-based implication scores. However, identifying positive object-attribute pairs remains difficult even when the candidate objects and attributes are fixed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于检索增强的小语言模型(SLM)框架，利用形式概念分析(FCA)作为知识扩展的符号验证循环，用于本体构建。该方法从种子属性出发，FCA在不断增长的形式上下文中提出蕴含关系，检索增强的SLM预言机验证每个蕴含关系或返回反例。
AI.motivation: 本体构建需要决定哪些对象、属性和结构关系应被接受为有效知识。语言模型可以从文本中提出这些结构，但其输出可能缺乏支持或不一致。
AI.method: 提出一种检索增强的小语言模型(SLM)框架，使用形式概念分析(FCA)作为符号验证循环。从种子属性出发，FCA在增长的形式上下文中提出蕴含关系。检索增强的SLM预言机验证每个蕴含关系或返回反例，支持 incidence 判断、一致性检查和属性提议，使接受的蕴含关系、反例、矛盾和纠正可被检查。
AI.result: 在Orphadata资源构建的罕见共济失调环境中，10-种子运行获得关系F1为0.29-0.52，基于闭包的蕴含F1为0.22-0.30。更大的种子集增加评估的蕴含数量并通常改善蕴含F1。较低的蕴含分数反映了对派生蕴含的更严格评估，一个遗漏或额外的关系会影响多个蕴含判断。消融实验表明，固定对象-属性设置中的incidence判断可以提高基于闭包的蕴含分数，但即使候选对象和属性固定，识别积极的对象-属性对仍然困难。
AI.conclusion: 在固定对象-属性设置中，incidence判断可以提高基于闭包的蕴含分数。然而，即使候选对象和属性是固定的，识别积极的对象-属性对仍然困难。

relevance_reason: This paper is about knowledge graph/ontology construction using Small Language Models (SLM) and Formal Concept Analysis (FCA). It has absolutely no relevance to the Computer Graphics research profile. The application domain is completely different - it's about symbolic knowledge reasoning, not 2D visual features, 3D motion generation, video synthesis, or any computer graphics tasks. The methods (SLM, FCA) are entirely different from the required methods (VLM, video generation models like Wan/Seedance, 3D motion generation). This is a knowledge representation paper that bears no connection to the specified research area.

title: ReQuest: Rethinking-based Question-Aware Frame Selection for Long-Form Video QA
summary: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have substantially advanced video understanding, yet long-form video QA remains challenging under fixed input token budgets, where uniform sampling can be inefficient for evidence localization. We propose ReQuest , an uncertainty-driven, question-adaptive keyframe selection pipeline that aligns question intent with relevant video content through selective computation. ReQuest integrates (i) a lightweight question-aware selector distilled from MLLM-generated supervision, (ii) Re-thinking Routing that triggers additional inference only when the model is uncertain with a length-adaptive criterion, and (iii) uncertainty-guided adaptive non-maximum suppression that selects temporally diverse frames while adjusting spacing based on question difficulty. As a plug-andplay method, ReQuest improves long-video QA without modifying or fine-tuning the underlying MLLM. Experiments on Video-MME, MLVU, and LongVideoBench demonstrate consistent accuracy gains with competitive computational cost, with particularly strong improvements in medium and long video regimes.

AI.tldr: ReQuest是一个不确定性驱动、问题自适应的关键帧选择管道，通过选择性计算将问题意图与相关视频内容对齐，在不修改底层MLLM的情况下提升长视频问答性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型(MLLM)在视频理解方面取得进展，但长视频问答在固定输入token预算下仍具挑战性，均匀采样在证据定位上效率低下。
AI.method: 提出ReQuest框架，包含三个核心组件：1) 轻量级问题感知选择器，从MLLM生成的监督中提炼；2) Re-thinking Routing，当模型不确定时触发额外推理，采用长度自适应标准；3) 不确定性引导的自适应非极大值抑制，在根据问题难度调整间距的同时选择时间上多样化的帧。
AI.result: 在Video-MME、MLVU和LongVideoBench三个基准数据集上的实验表明，ReQuest持续提升准确率，计算成本具有竞争力，在中等和长视频 regime 中改进尤为显著。
AI.conclusion: ReQuest作为一种即插即用的方法，在不修改或微调底层MLLM的情况下，通过问题自适应关键帧选择显著提升长视频问答性能，在中等和长视频场景中改进尤为明显，同时保持了竞争力的计算成本。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Video Question Answering (Video QA) - a completely different application domain from the research profile which focuses on 3D motion generation in Computer Graphics. While both involve video processing, the goals are fundamentally different: the paper aims to select frames for answering questions about videos, whereas the research profile is about extracting visual features from 2D videos to generate 3D motions, quality assessment of generated videos for motion synthesis, and semantic consistency between text and 3D motions. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points and uses unrelated methods (frame selection for QA vs motion generation pipelines).

title: Subliminal Clocks: Latent Time Modelling in Diffusion Language Models
comment: Equal contribution: Thomas Fontanari and Simone Petruzzi
summary: Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive models. Unlike standard diffusion-based approaches, DLMs are not explicitly conditioned on a timestep, raising a natural question: do these models internally represent denoising progress, and how is such information used downstream? In this work, we show that DLMs do in fact encode a latent representation related to the diffusion timestep within their residual streams. We find that this signal can be reliably extracted using probes across layers, indicating that denoising progress is decodable from internal activations. We further demonstrate that steering the model along a low-dimensional subspace associated with the inferred timestep allows us to systematically modulate its notion of denoising progress, leading to predictable changes in model confidence and entropy. Finally, we analyse the geometry of the identified representation, showing that it exhibits structured and interpretable properties in activation space, and shedding light on how such a signal is processed by these models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了扩散语言模型(DLMs)是否在内部表示去噪进度，以及这种信息如何被下游使用。研究发现DLMs在残差流中编码了与扩散时间步相关的潜在表示，这种信号可以通过探针在多层中可靠提取。通过沿与推断时间步相关的低维子空间进行引导，可以系统地调节模型的去噪进度概念，导致模型置信度和熵的可预测变化。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型是最近兴起的有前景的自回归模型替代方案。与标准扩散方法不同，DLMs不明确依赖于时间步，这引发了一个自然问题：这些模型是否在内部表示去噪进度，以及这种信息如何被下游使用？
AI.method:
1. 使用探针跨层提取与扩散时间步相关的信号
2. 沿推断时间步相关的低维子空间对模型进行引导实验
3. 分析激活空间中识别表示的几何性质
AI.result:
1. DLMs确实在残差流中编码了与扩散时间步相关的潜在表示
2. 该信号可在多层中可靠提取，表明去噪进度可从内部激活中解码
3. 沿时间步相关子空间引导可系统调节去噪进度概念，导致模型置信度和熵的可预测变化
4. 识别的表示在激活空间中呈现结构化和可解释的特性
AI.conclusion: 去噪进度信息在扩散语言模型中是可解码和可操作的。这一发现揭示了DLMs如何在内部处理时间步信息，并为理解和控制这些模型的生成过程提供了新的见解。

relevance_reason: This paper is about diffusion language models (DLMs) for text generation - analyzing internal time representations in language diffusion models. The application domain is completely wrong: the research profile is about 3D motion generation from 2D videos in Computer Graphics, while this paper is about NLP/text generation. Even though both use diffusion models, the application domains are entirely different - text diffusion vs. 3D motion/video generation. This is a different field entirely with no relevance to the stated research goals.

title: InterCMDM: Block-Causal Diffusion for Autoregressive Human Interaction Generation
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026, Project website: https://yu1ut.com/InterCMDM-HP/
summary: Text-conditioned human interaction generation must capture both long-range temporal causality within each individual and tightly coupled coordination between partners. Existing interaction diffusion models typically denoise full sequences using bidirectional attention, which obscures causality and hinders streaming and long-horizon generation. Autoregressive alternatives enforce causality but often suffer from temporal drift, leading to coordination degradation and unstable interaction dynamics over time. We propose InterCMDM, a block-causal latent diffusion framework for autoregressive two-person interaction generation. InterCMDM introduces a Dual-Stream Causal Diffusion Transformer that maintains separate causal streams for each person while modeling inter-person dependencies via unified dual-stream attention with multi-task attention masks. These masks unify interaction modeling within a single attention mechanism and support diverse coordination behaviors, including simultaneous actions, reactive responses, leader-follower dynamics, and independent motion. By training a single model across these mask configurations as a form of data augmentation, InterCMDM enables controllable interaction generation by simply selecting the desired attention mask at inference time. Finally, a block-wise diffusion objective enables stable latent rollout over long sequences without repeated decode-encode cycles. InterCMDM achieves state-of-the-art performance on InterHuman and Inter-X, improving text-motion alignment, realism, and long-horizon continuity.

AI.tldr: InterCMDM是一个用于双人交互生成的块因果潜在扩散框架，通过双流因果扩散变换器解决现有方法中因果关系模糊和时间漂移的问题，支持多种协调行为的可控交互生成。
AI.motivation: 现有交互扩散模型使用双向注意力模糊了因果关系，阻碍了流式和长时序生成；而自回归方法虽强制因果但存在时间漂移问题，导致协调退化和交互动力学不稳定。
AI.method: 提出双流因果扩散变换器，为每个人维护独立因果流，通过统一的双流注意力和多任务注意力掩码建模人物间依赖关系；采用块式扩散目标实现长序列稳定潜在 rollout。
AI.result: 在InterHuman和Inter-X数据集上实现最先进性能，提升了文本-动作对齐、真实感和长时序连续性。
AI.conclusion: 通过在训练时将不同注意力掩码配置作为数据增强形式，InterCMDM能够通过在推理时选择所需的注意力掩码来实现可控的交互生成。

relevance_reason: While both papers focus on 3D human motion generation (same application domain), this paper addresses a DIFFERENT problem. The research profile focuses on extracting motion from 2D VISUAL inputs (videos) and using video generation models, whereas InterCMDM focuses on text-to-motion generation with diffusion models. The pain points in the profile (2D-3D domain gap, video-to-motion extraction, VLM quality supervision) are NOT addressed. This paper uses text prompts as input, not visual features from videos. It's relevant to human motion generation but not to the specific two-stage video-to-motion synthesis pipeline described in the profile.

title: Safety Testing LLM Agents at Scale: From Risk Discovery to Evidence-Grounded Verification
summary: LLM agents increasingly perform autonomous actions through external tools, leading to complex and evolving safety risks. However, existing safety testing targets expert-designed safety violations, and the corresponding outcomes are evaluated by hard-coded rules, making them costly to extend as agents evolve. To this end, we present Vera, an end-to-end automated safety testing framework that instantiates software engineering testing principles for non-deterministic agents through a three-stage, self-reinforcing pipeline. First, a literature-driven exploration continuously discovers and structures emerging risks into taxonomies of safety risks, attack methods, and tool execution environments. Second, combinatorial composition across taxonomy dimensions produces executable safety cases, each specifying a concrete safety goal, a programmatically constructed initial state, and a deterministic verification predicate grounded in observable artifacts. Third, adaptive execution runs heterogeneous agents in isolated sandboxes where a control agent steers multi-turn interaction based on runtime observations, while evidence-grounded verifiers judge outcomes from environment state and tool-call evidence rather than model self-report. We evaluate Vera on four production agent frameworks (OpenClaw, Hermes, Codex, Claude Code), revealing substantial safety weaknesses, with average attack success rates reaching 93.9\% under multi-channel attacks; we also release Vera-Bench, comprising 1600 executable safety cases spanning 124 risk categories across three execution settings. These results indicate that modular, executable testing infrastructure is essential for rigorous and maintainable safety evaluation of rapidly evolving agentic systems at scale. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/Yunhao-Feng/Vera.

AI.tldr: Vera是一个端到端的自动化安全测试框架，将软件工程测试原则应用于非确定性LLM代理，通过文献驱动的探索、组合构成和自适应执行三个阶段来发现和结构化安全风险、生成可执行的安全测试用例，并在隔离沙箱中评估代理的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有安全测试针对专家设计的安全违规行为，使用硬编码规则进行评估，随着代理的发展扩展成本高昂。需要一种模块化、可执行的测试基础设施来进行严格且可维护的安全评估。
AI.method: 三阶段自强化管道：1)文献驱动的探索阶段持续发现并将新兴风险结构化为安全风险、攻击方法和工具执行环境的分类法；2)组合构成阶段跨分类法维度生成可执行的安全用例；3)自适应执行在隔离沙箱中运行异构代理，控制代理根据运行时观察引导多轮交互，基于环境状态和工具调用证据判断结果。
AI.result: 在四个生产代理框架(OpenClaw, Hermes, Codex, Claude Code)上评估，平均攻击成功率达到93.9%；发布Vera-Bench，包含1600个可执行安全用例，涵盖124个风险类别和三种执行设置。
AI.conclusion: 模块化、可执行的测试基础设施对于大规模快速演进的代理系统进行严格和可维护的安全评估至关重要。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agent security testing and software engineering (discovering security vulnerabilities in LLM agents), which is completely unrelated to the research profile about Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation from 2D videos, and video generation models. The application domains are entirely different - security testing vs. motion synthesis. There is no overlap in methods or application areas.

title: RTE-FM-Dehazer: Radiative Transfer Equation Inspired Flow Matching for Real-World Image Dehazing
summary: Single-image dehazing aims to recover a clear scene from a hazy image and is generally formulated as an image-to-image translation task; however, it faces two limitations. Its performance depends heavily on the haze-formation priors embedded in the model. Prevailing methods adopt the Atmospheric Scattering Model (ASM), whose assumptions of single scattering and homogeneous media are often violated, leading to residual haze and color drift. Moreover, large-scale real hazy/clear pairs are impractical to collect, and existing synthesis approaches fail to reproduce the full complexity of natural haze. To address these issues, we present RTE-FM-Dehazer, a novel dehazing approach, together with a scalable data pipeline. Unlike the ASM, the Radiative Transfer Equation (RTE) jointly accounts for both scattering and absorption, naturally accommodating the non-homogeneous, multiple-scattering media that characterize real hazy scenes. Motivated by the structural similarity between the RTE diffusion-absorption term and the ODE in flow matching, we introduce a diffusion-absorption regularizer derived from a reduced RTE, to steer the flow matching trajectory at each step. Next, leveraging modern vision-language models, we build an automated pipeline and release P-HAZE, a dataset of 50000 realistic hazy/clear pairs. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that RTE-FM-Dehazer, trained solely on P-HAZE, effectively eliminates artifacts like residual haze and color drift, exhibits strong cross-domain generalization, and achieves leading results on five real-world dehazing benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RTE-FM-Dehazer一种基于辐射传输方程(RTE)的单图像去雾方法，结合流匹配技术和扩散吸收正则化器，并在新构建的P-HAZE数据集(50000对真实雾/清晰图像)上进行训练，在五个真实去雾基准数据集上取得领先效果。
AI.motivation: 现有去雾方法存在两大局限：1)基于大气散射模型(ASM)的方法假设单散射和均匀介质，常违反现实场景导致残留雾气和色彩偏移；2)大规模真实雾/清晰图像对难以收集，现有能力集方法无法复现自然雾的复杂性。
AI.method: 1)采用辐射传输方程(RTE)替代ASM，同时考虑散射和吸收，适应非均匀多次散射介质；2)受RTE扩散吸收项与流匹配中常微分方程结构相似性启发，引入基于简化RTE的扩散吸收正则化器引导流匹配轨迹；3)利用视觉语言模型构建自动化数据管线，发布P-HAZE数据集包含50000对真实雾/清晰图像。
AI.result: RTE-FM-Dehazer仅在P-HAZE上训练即可有效消除残留雾气和色彩偏移等伪影，展现强跨域泛化能力，在五个真实去雾基准数据集上取得领先性能。
AI.conclusion: RTE-FM-Dehazer通过RTE建模和流匹配技术成功克服了ASM基方法的局限性，配合大规模真实数据集P-HAZE为单图像去雾提供了有效解决方案，具有良好的泛化性和实际应用价值。

title: MMIR-TCM: Memory-Integrated Multimodal Inference and Retrieval for TCM Clinical Decision Support
summary: Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) diagnosis, particularly through tongue inspection, faces persistent challenges in subjectivity and reproducibility. The application of multimodal artificial intelligence to TCM clinical tasks, such as syndrome differentiation and prescription generation, is significantly hampered by the semantic gap between visual tongue features and textual reasoning, as well as the lack of large-scale, standardized datasets. To address these challenges, we introduce MMIR-TCM, a novel framework that emulates the diagnostic process of TCM experts by integrating multimodal large language model(MLLM) with memory-augmented segmentation and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Employing a three-stage architecture, MMIR-TCM integrates a training-free Memory-SAM module for robust tongue extraction, a fine-tuned Qwen3-VL model for structured tongue diagnosis generation, and a Qwen3-based RAG component for evidence-grounded clinical decision support generation. The framework was developed and validated using MedTCM, a new large-scale multimodal dataset that we introduce specifically for advanced TCM research. To properly evaluate our framework's clinical accuracy, which existing metrics fail to capture, we also developed TDEU, a domain-specific evaluation metric incorporating semantic understanding and diagnostic importance. Our comprehensive experiments demonstrate that MMIR-TCM significantly outperforms leading models, including GPT-4o and Gemini 2.5 Flash.

title: MedStreamBench: A Time-Aware Benchmark for Streaming and Proactive Medical Video Understanding
summary: Existing medical video benchmarks primarily evaluate whether a model produces the correct answer, but rarely assess whether it answers at the right time. In real clinical settings, AI systems must decide not only what to predict, but also when to answer, defer judgment, or proactively raise alerts. This creates a critical gap between benchmark evaluation and deployment requirements. We present MedStreamBench, a benchmark for time-aware medical video understanding. MedStreamBench integrates 22 medical datasets and 5,419 QA instances across four temporal settings: retrospective, present, future, and proactive. Unlike conventional benchmarks that assume full-video access, MedStreamBench restricts models to temporally bounded evidence windows and supports both single-turn and streaming evaluation. We further introduce a proactive monitoring setting that requires models to determine whether and when clinically relevant alerts should be triggered. Beyond answer correctness, MedStreamBench evaluates temporal behavior through responsiveness and post-evidence stability. Experiments on leading general-purpose and medical vision-language models reveal a substantial gap between offline recognition and temporally grounded decision-making, with performance dropping markedly in streaming and proactive settings. Our benchmark is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Venn2024/MedStreamBench.

title: Pre-Flight: A Benchmark for Evaluating Large Language Models on Aviation Operational Knowledge
comment: 9 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. Benchmark available in inspect_evals (UKGovernmentBEIS/inspect_evals)
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly proposed for aviation business operations, from documentation and training generation to customer facing assistants. General purpose benchmarks do not measure whether a model reasons safely and correctly about aviation specific operational knowledge, and the high stakes, regulated nature of the domain makes that gap consequential. We present Pre-Flight, an open source benchmark of 300 multiple choice questions drawn from international standards and airport ground operations material, covering international airport ground operations, ICAO and US FAA regulations, aviation general knowledge and complex operational scenarios. Questions were authored and reviewed by practitioners with experience in air traffic management, ground operations and commercial flying. We evaluate a range of contemporary commercial and open weight models using the Inspect evaluation framework, scoring by accuracy under a standard multiple choice protocol, and we maintain the leaderboard on a rolling basis as new models are released. Against an informal expert reference of around 95%, obtained from a low sample quiz of aviation professionals at a conference, even the strongest model evaluated (released in 2026) reaches 82.7%, having improved only gradually from roughly 75% in early 2025. A substantial and persistent gap below expert level reliability therefore remains. We release the dataset, the evaluation harness and the results, and the benchmark is available within the community evaluations package distributed with inspect_evals. We argue that domain specific evaluation of this kind is a necessary precondition for responsible deployment of generative AI in non safety critical aviation operations.

AI.tldr: Pre-Flight是一个开源基准测试，包含300道多项选择题，涵盖国际机场地面操作、ICAO和FAA法规、航空常识及复杂操作场景，用于评估大型语言模型在航空运营领域的推理安全性与正确性。
AI.motivation: 通用基准测试无法衡量模型是否能够安全、正确地推理航空特定运营知识，而航空领域的高风险和受监管特性使这一差距变得至关重要，因此需要专门的领域评估基准。
AI.method: 由具有空中交通管理、地面运营和商业飞行经验的从业者编写和审核问题，使用Inspect评估框架对多种商业和开源模型进行标准多项选择协议下的准确性评分，并与会议收集的航空专业人士约95%的非正式专家参考进行比较。
AI.result: 即使是最强的模型（2026年发布）也仅达到82.7%的准确率，而2025年初的模型约为75%，与专家基准水平存在显著且持续的差距。
AI.conclusion: 领域特定评估是负责任地将生成式AI部署到非安全关键航空运营的必要前提，当前模型尚未达到专家级可靠性水平。

The methods (LLM benchmarking) are entirely unrelated to the required methods (visual language models, video generation models like Wan/Seedance, 3D motion generation).

title: The Turning Point of 3D Plant Phenotyping: 3D Foundation Models Enable Minute-to-Second Cross-Crop Reconstruction and Beyond
summary: 3D plant phenotyping is notoriously known to be procedure-complicated and of low throughput due to the extensive multi-view imaging, the fragile 3D reconstruction pipeline, and the additional cost from reconstructed geometry to phenotypic extraction. These limitations are further amplified in low-cost data acquisition, where smartphone videos or sparsely sampled multi-view images provide limited view overlap and self-occlusion. In this work, we show that the conventional 3D plant phenotyping pipeline could be streamlined and significantly accelerated with 3D Foundation Models (3DFMs), and particularly, present one of the first cross-crop 3D phenotyping frameworks powered by 3DFMs. The framework replaces COLMAP-style sparse initialization with 3DFM-based feed-forward geometric recovery, combines geometry-constrained 3D Gaussian Splatting for dense reconstruction, enables few-view reconstruction through iterative view synthesis and refinement, and converts reconstructed geometry into measurable organs through 2D-to-3D semantic transfer, metric scale recovery, and organ instance separation. We further construct a cross-crop dataset with smartphone-based image acquisition, diverse plant morphologies, and manual annotations for segmentation and phenotypic evaluation. Experiments across 26 plant sequences show that 3D Foundation Models reduce the average reconstruction time from 6.52 minutes to 1.58 seconds while maintaining high reconstruction quality and phenotyping accuracy. These results suggest a fresh technical route for high-throughput 3D plant phenotyping, from low-cost image acquisition to fast reconstruction, perception, scale recovery, and phenotypic measurement.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出首个基于3D Foundation Models的跨作物3D表型分析框架，显著加速了植物3D重建和表型测量流程，将重建时间从分钟级缩短至秒级。
AI.motivation: 解决传统3D植物表型分析程序复杂、吞吐量低的问题，特别是低成本数据采集（智能手机视频或稀疏多视图图像）中的有限视角重叠和自遮挡问题。
AI.method: 使用3D Foundation Models替代COLMAP风格稀疏初始化，结合几何约束的3D Gaussian Splatting进行密集重建，通过迭代视图合成和细化实现少视图重建，并通过2D到3D语义转移、度量尺度恢复和器官实例分离将重建几何转换为可测量器官。
AI.result: 3D Foundation Models将平均重建时间从6.52分钟减少到1.58秒，同时保持高重建质量和表型分析准确性。
AI.conclusion: 3D Foundation Models为低成本图像采集的高通量3D植物表型分析提供了新技术路线，从图像采集到快速重建、感知、尺度恢复和表型测量，具有显著应用前景。

Even though both involve 3D reconstruction, the domain (plant reconstruction vs human motion synthesis), purpose (phenotypic measurement vs motion generation), and context (agricultural AI vs computer graphics/animation) are fundamentally different. The pain points about text-to-motion consistency, video priors for motion synthesis, and visual guidance for 3D motion generation are not addressed at all.

title: Actual causality in fault trees
summary: Fault trees are a widely used as effective risk models for complex systems, answering the question "what can go wrong?", especially through minimal cut set analysis. We study fault trees from the perspective of Halpern & Pearl's theory of actual causality. This allows us to use fault trees to answer the question "why has it gone wrong?", which is fundamental to failure diagnostics. We give a complete classification of each of the different notions of actual causality in terms of the fault tree's graph structure and logical structure, and show how minimal cut sets give rise to actual causes.

AI.tldr: 将故障树分析与Halpern & Pearl的实际因果关系理论相结合，从"哪里出了问题"的角度转向"为什么出了问题"，用于故障诊断。通过最小割集分析，给出了不同实际因果关系概念在故障树图结构和逻辑结构中的完整分类。
AI.motivation: 故障树是复杂系统风险建模的有效工具，传统上回答"什么会出错"的问题，但无法回答"为什么出错"，这在故障诊断中至关重要。研究者希望利用Halpern & Pearl的实际因果关系理论来弥补这一缺陷。
AI.method: 从Halpern & Pearl的实际因果关系理论角度研究故障树，将因果概念与故障树的图结构和逻辑结构进行对应分析，并研究最小割集如何产生实际原因。
AI.result: 给出了不同实际因果关系概念在故障树图结构和逻辑结构中的完整分类，展示了最小割集如何产生实际原因。
AI.conclusion: 该研究将故障树分析从传统的风险识别扩展到因果推理领域，为故障诊断提供了新的理论框架和方法。
