This is a different field entirely.

title: ProSAC-CT: Progressive Spectral-Anatomical Co-Guided Multi-Stage Diffusion Model for Low-Dose CT Denoising
summary: Low-dose computed tomography (LDCT) reduces radiation exposure but introduces stronger quantum noise, streak artifacts, and local texture degradation, which can obscure anatomical boundaries and weaken low-contrast structures. Diffusion models are promising for LDCT denoising by progressively recovering normal-dose CT (NDCT) images from degraded LDCT inputs, but existing methods often suffer from insufficient anatomical guidance, uncertain frequency-dependent recovery, and uniform reverse-process modeling. We propose ProSAC-CT, a progressive spectral-anatomical co-guided multi-stage diffusion model for image-domain LDCT denoising. ProSAC-CT integrates an anatomical-prior-guided conditioning (APGC) module, a residual frequency-domain decoupling stage (RFDDS), and a time-step-decoupling denoising decoder (TD3). APGC extracts LDCT-derived structural guidance, RFDDS enhances frequency-aware representations, and TD3 assigns them to different reverse-diffusion stages for anatomical stabilization, boundary refinement, and fine-detail recovery. Experiments on four LDCT degradation benchmarks show that ProSAC-CT improves image fidelity, structural similarity, perceptual quality, and information preservation over representative methods while better preserving boundary-sensitive anatomical details. Downstream anatomical-region classification on Mayo-2020 further indicates that ProSAC-CT retains task-relevant anatomical information, supporting its practical use for low-dose CT denoising.

AI.tldr: ProSAC-CT是一种用于低剂量CT图像去噪的渐进式频谱-解剖协同引导的多阶段扩散模型，通过整合解剖先验引导条件模块、残差频域解耦阶段和时间步解耦去噪解码器，在四个低剂量CT退化基准测试上提升了图像保真度、结构相似性、感知质量和信息保留，同时更好地保留了边界敏感的解剖细节。
AI.motivation: 低剂量CT虽能降低辐射暴露，但会引入更强的量子噪声、条纹伪影和局部纹理退化，可能遮蔽解剖边界并削弱低对比度结构。现有扩散模型方法存在解剖引导不足、频率依赖恢复不确定和统一反向过程建模等问题。
AI.method: 提出ProSAC-CT，包含三个核心模块：1)解剖先验引导条件(APGC)模块提取LDCT衍生结构引导；2)残差频域解耦阶段(RFDDS)增强频率感知表示；3)时间步解耦去噪解码器(TD3)将不同模块分配到不同反向扩散阶段，实现解剖稳定、边界细化和细节恢复。
AI.result: 在四个LDCT退化基准测试中，ProSAC-CT在图像保真度、结构相似性、感知质量和信息保留方面优于代表性方法。Mayo-2020数据集上的下游解剖区域分类进一步表明ProSAC-CT保留了任务相关的解剖信息。
AI.conclusion: ProSAC-CT能够有效解决低剂量CT去噪中的频谱-解剖协同问题，在提升图像质量的同时保留边界敏感解剖细节和任务相关信息，具有实际临床应用的潜力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical imaging (CT denoising) while the research profile is about Computer Graphics (3D motion generation from video). Although both use diffusion models, they are in completely different application domains - medical CT image restoration vs human motion synthesis. The paper addresses low-dose CT noise reduction, not 3D motion generation, video synthesis, or any computer graphics task. This is a medical imaging paper entirely unrelated to the computer graphics field.

title: CLAP: Closed-Loop Training, Evaluation, and Release Control for Domain Agent Post-training
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure. Accepted to CRAE 2026; to appear in SPIE Proceedings. Best Poster Award
summary: Domain agents often face noisy business data, uncertain post-training gains, offline/application mismatch, and adapter-release risk. This paper presents CLAP (Closed-Loop Agent Post-training), a closed-loop method that converts business data into structured SFT samples, decision-preference samples, holdout sets, risk diagnostics, and release-gate records. CLAP combines data validation, target/evidence normalization, reward/KL diagnosis, offline gates, and application-chain replay to decide whether an adapter is suitable for the target application chain. On five anonymized manufacturing-scenario batches, QLoRA-style LoRA-SFT yields modest average gains: overall score increases by 0.0098, pass rate by 0.0240, and evidence accuracy by 0.0280, while hallucination and wrong facts decrease. Yet only 3 of 5 batches improve, some batches regress, and GRPO exposes high KL risks. Application-chain replay further shows that RAG is necessary for factual extraction; under the same 3B backbone and 100 replay cases, an application-RAG-oriented LoRA-SFT adapter improves value, core fields, and answer-evidence doc/page matching over base+RAG, but increases latency. These results support managing domain-agent post-training through an integrated data-training-evaluation-release loop rather than relying on training completion or a single offline score.

AI.tldr: CLAP（闭环智能体后训练）是一种闭环方法，将业务数据转换为结构化SFT样本、决策偏好样本、留出集、风险诊断和发布门控记录，用于决定适配器是否适合目标应用链。在5个制造场景批次中，QLoRA风格LoRA-SFT仅带来微小增益（总分提升0.0098，通过率提升0.0240，证据准确率提升0.0280），且仅3/5批次改善，部分批次反而退化。
AI.motivation: 领域智能体面临业务数据噪声、训练后收益不确定、离线评估与应用场景不匹配、适配器发布风险等问题，亟需一种系统化的后训练管理方法。
AI.method: CLAP方法整合了数据验证、目标/证据归一化、奖励/KL诊断、离线门控和应用链回放，采用QLoRA风格的LoRA-SFT进行训练。
AI.result: 5个制造场景批次的实验表明：整体分数提升0.0098，通过率提升0.0240，证据准确率提升0.0280，幻觉和错误事实减少；但仅3/5批次改善，部分批次回归，GRPO暴露高KL风险；应用链回放显示RAG对事实提取有必要性，3B骨干网+100回放案例下，面向应用RAG的LoRA-SFT适配器在价值、核心字段、答案-证据文档/页面匹配上优于base+RAG，但增加延迟。
AI.conclusion: 领域智能体后训练应通过整合数据-训练-评估-发布的闭环管理，而非依赖训练完成或单一离线分数。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM/AI agent post-training for manufacturing scenarios (CLAP method for domain agent training, QLoRA, LoRA-SFT, RAG evaluation). The research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically 3D motion generation from videos using VLMs, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), and two-stage pipelines for video-to-motion synthesis. These are entirely different application domains with no overlap.

title: DL-VINS-Factory: A Modular Framework for Learned Visual Front-Ends in Visual-Inertial SLAM
summary: Deep-learning features excel in visual matching, yet their practical value in tightly coupled visual-inertial SLAM (VI-SLAM) remains insufficiently characterized. We present DL-VINS-Factory, a unified framework that integrates learned feature extractors (ALIKED, RaCo, SuperPoint, XFeat) with either Lucas--Kanade (LK) optical-flow tracking or LightGlue (LG) descriptor matching. All front-ends share a sliding-window Ceres back-end, with optional AnyLoc DINOv2-VLAD loop closure, and 4-DoF pose-graph optimization. We benchmark the system across the four datasets covering indoor, unstructured outdoor, aggressive-motion, and visually degraded conditions. Results show that learned front-ends are viable for real-time embedded VI-SLAM, but are not universally superior to classical tracking. Relative to the corresponding GFTT+LK baseline, ALIKED+LG reduces EuRoC ATE by $5\%$ in monocular odometry and by $7\%$ in stereo with loop-closure. On NTU-VIRAL, where aggressive aerial motion increases inter-frame viewpoint change, ALIKED+LG stereo reduces loop-closed ATE by $12\%$. In Botanic Garden dataset, optical-flow tracking remains preferable, but learned keypoints still improve over the baseline GFTT, in which SuperPoint+LK reduces grayscale camera ATE by $29\%$, while RaCo+LK reduces RGB camera ATE by $38\%$. On SubT-MRS, learned front-ends display varying degree of improvement based on individual cases. With TensorRT acceleration on a Jetson AGX Orin, all valid configurations run in real time between $29$--$47$ FPS in monocular mode and $18$--$33$ FPS in stereo mode for the EuRoC and NTU-VIRAL datasets. AnyLoc further confirms roughly $2$--$7\times$ more valid loops than BRIEF+DBoW2. The implementation is open-sourced at https://github.com/limshoonkit/DL-VINS-Factory-ROS2/.

AI.tldr: DL-VINS-Factory是一个统一框架，将学习特征提取器（ALIKED、RaCo、SuperPoint、XFeat）与Lucas-Kanade光流跟踪或LightGlue描述子匹配集成到紧耦合视觉惯性SLAM中。实验表明学习前端在实时嵌入式VI-SLAM中可行，但相较于GFTT+LK基线有不同程度的提升，且并非普遍优于经典跟踪。
AI.motivation: 深度学习特征在视觉匹配中表现出色，但其在紧耦合视觉惯性SLAM（VI-SLAM）中的实际价值尚未得到充分表征。
AI.method: 构建统一框架DL-VINS-Factory，集成多种学习特征提取器与光流/描述子匹配方法，共享滑动窗口Ceres后端，配备AnyLoc DINOv2-VLAD闭环检测和4-DoF位姿图优化。在四个数据集（室内、非结构化户外、剧烈运动、视觉退化条件）上进行基准测试。
AI.result: 学习前端可用于实时嵌入式VI-SLAM，但并非普遍优于经典跟踪。ALIKED+LG在EuRoC上单目VO减少5%ATE，双目带闭环减少7%ATE；NTU-VIRAL上ALIKED+LG双目减少12%ATE；Botanic Garden上SuperPoint+LK减少29%ATE，RaCo+LK减少38%ATE；SubT-MRS上改善程度因场景而异。TensorRT加速下单目29-47 FPS，双目18-33 FPS。AnyLoc比BRIEF+DBoW2多2-7倍有效闭环。
AI.conclusion: 学习前端在实时嵌入式VI-SLAM中可行，但相对经典跟踪无普遍优势。具体效果取决于数据集特性：ALIKED+LG在剧烈运动场景表现最好，RaCo+LK在Botanic Garden数据集效果显著， optical-flow跟踪在某些场景仍更优。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Visual-Inertial SLAM (robotics/localization) - completely different application domain from Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. The research profile focuses on text-to-3D motion synthesis, video generation models, and visual guidance for motion generation. While both involve visual features, the purpose is entirely different: SLAM for robot localization vs. motion synthesis for graphics. No relevance to the stated pain points about domain gap, quality assessment, or semantic consistency in motion generation.

title: Safety Targeted Embedding Exploit via Refinement
summary: Safety training for large language models (LLMs) is conducted predominantly in English, leaving uncertain how well safety mechanisms generalize to low-resource languages and mixed-language code-switching. We show that this creates an epistemic gap in which models confidently generate harmful responses for inputs that fall outside the distribution of their safety training. To study this phenomenon, we introduce STEER (Safety Targeted Embedding Exploit via Refinement), a gradient-guided attack that identifies words contributing most strongly to the model's refusal behavior and iteratively translates them into low-resource languages to suppress refusal while preserving harmful intent. Across six open-source 8B-parameter models, STEER achieves attack success rates of up to 93.0% on JailbreakBench and 96.7% on AdvBench, outperforming random code-switching and Greedy Coordinate Gradient (GCG). The resulting prompts also transfer to GPT-4o-mini, achieving a 35.5% attack success rate without requiring access to the target model, suggesting that the underlying weakness is not specific to a single architecture. These findings demonstrate that safety mechanisms aligned primarily on English cannot be assumed to generalize across multilingual inputs. We argue that improving multilingual safety requires broader coverage during alignment and mechanisms that explicitly detect and abstain on out-of-distribution inputs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出STEER攻击方法，通过将拒绝关键词翻译成低资源语言来绕过LLM的安全机制，在六个8B模型上达到最高93.0%（JailbreakBench）和96.7%（AdvBench）的攻击成功率，并可转移到GPT-4o-mini。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型的安全训练主要以英语为主，低资源语言和代码切换场景下的安全性未知，导致模型在训练分布外的输入上可能自信地生成有害内容。
AI.method: STEER是一种梯度引导的攻击方法，首先识别对模型拒绝行为贡献最大的词语，然后迭代地将这些词语翻译成低资源语言以抑制拒绝同时保留有害意图。
AI.result: 在六个开源8B参数模型上，STEER在JailbreakBench上达到最高93.0%的攻击成功率，在AdvBench上达到96.7%，优于随机代码切换和GCG方法。攻击提示词还可转移到GPT-4o-mini，无需访问目标模型即可达到35.5%的攻击成功率。
AI.conclusion: 以英语为主的安全对齐不能跨语言泛化，需要在安全训练中扩大语言覆盖范围，并引入显式的分布外检测和拒绝机制来改进多语言安全性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM security and jailbreak attacks (adversarial text attacks on language models), not Computer Graphics or 3D motion generation. The research profile focuses on 3D motion synthesis from videos using visual language models and video generation models. This paper addresses entirely different domain: computer security, LLM safety alignment, and adversarial attacks on text-based language models. No relevance to visual features, motion synthesis, or computer graphics.

title: ProCal: Inference-Time Proposal Calibration for Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
summary: Open-vocabulary object detection aims to localize and classify objects beyond the fixed set of categories seen dur ing training. Recent open-vocabulary object detection methods improve localization and classification for unseen categories by leveraging a frozen VLM as a detector backbone. However, VLM classification score lacks recognizing position and scale of the object in an image. We observe that pretrained VLMs en able to classify foreground and background regions. According to this observation, we propose a simple inference-time Pro posal Calibration (ProCal) that improves localization quality of the classification score. ProCal computes a proposal prior by combining two scores: localization-aware foreground score and background-aware suppression score. Localization-aware foreground score captures whether a proposal contains an object area. Background-aware suppression score measures the extent to which the proposal resembles background. We analyze that ProCal suppresses false novel activation on background proposals and consistently ranks true novel proposals above background and partial novel proposals. Applied to CLIPSelf ViT-L/14, ProCal improves APr +2.5 on OV-LVIS. The analyses show that proposal-level localization-aware reranking effects to mitigate ranking miscalibration for novel objects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProCal（Proposal Calibration）方法，通过在推理时结合定位感知的前景得分和背景感知的抑制分数来校准提议的分类得分，从而提升开放词汇目标检测器对新类别目标的定位质量。
AI.motivation: 当前开放词汇目标检测方法使用冻结的VLM作为检测器骨干，但VLM分类评分缺乏对目标位置和尺度的感知能力，导致对新类别目标的定位质量不足。
AI.method: 提出推理时的提议校准方法ProCal，通过结合两个分数计算提议先验：(1)定位感知的前景分数，捕捉提议是否包含目标区域；(2)背景感知的抑制分数，衡量提议与背景的相似程度。
AI.result: 在OV-LVIS数据集上，使用CLIPSelf ViT-L/14时，ProCal提升了+2.5的APr（新颖类别平均精度）。
AI.conclusion: ProCal能够抑制背景提议上的错误新类别激活，并将真实新类别提议一致地排在背景和部分新类别提议之上，表明提议级定位感知重排序可以缓解新类别目标的排名校准偏差问题。

relevance_reason: This paper is about open-vocabulary OBJECT DETECTION in images, completely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on 3D MOTION GENERATION from videos. Although both use VLMs, the application domains are entirely different: object detection vs. motion synthesis. The pain points addressed (VLM classification scores lacking location awareness for detection) have no relevance to the profile's concerns about 2D-to-3D domain gaps, video-to-motion quality assessment, or semantic consistency in 3D motion synthesis.

title: CamoNAS: Neural Architecture Search for Enhanced Camouflaged Object Detection
comment: Published in The Visual Computer. Author manuscript version
summary: Camouflaged Object Detection (COD) aims to locate and segment objects that blend into their surroundings, presenting challenges due to weak edge cues and ill-defined boundaries. Traditional COD models rely on hand-designed architectures and multi-scale feature fusion, which are often guided by intuition rather than systematic search. This paper introduces CamoNAS, a frequency-aware multi-resolution Neural Architecture Search (NAS) framework for COD. CamoNAS automatically searches both cell-level operations and network-level downsampling paths, forming a hierarchical search space tailored to detect camouflaged objects. Additionally, it adopts an RGB frequency dual-stream architecture, where a learnable wavelet transform complements the RGB spatial stream. CamoNAS achieves state-of-the-art performance on four COD benchmarks (CAMO, COD10K, NC4K, CHAMELEON), highlighting the effectiveness of NAS for COD. Our code is available at https://github.com/rendaweiSIMIT/CamoNAS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CamoNAS，一个基于神经架构搜索(NAS)的伪装目标检测框架，通过频率感知多分辨率搜索策略自动设计网络架构，在四个标准数据集上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 传统伪装目标检测(COD)方法依赖手工设计的网络结构和多尺度特征融合，这些设计往往基于直觉而非系统搜索，且难以应对伪装目标边缘线索弱、边界模糊的挑战。
AI.method: 提出CamoNAS框架，包含三个方面：1)层次化搜索空间，同时搜索细胞级操作和网络级下采样路径；2)RGB频率双流架构，利用可学习小波变换补充RGB空间流；3)频率感知的多分辨率NAS策略。
AI.result: 在CAMO、COD10K、NC4K、CHAMELEON四个COD基准数据集上取得最优性能，验证了NAS在伪装目标检测任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CamoNAS通过自动搜索和频率感知设计，有效提升了伪装目标检测的性能，为该领域提供了一种新的基于NAS的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation from 2D video features in Computer Graphics, while this paper is about camouflaged object detection (COD) in Computer Vision. The methods (NAS, wavelet transforms for object detection) have no relevance to video-to-motion synthesis, VLM-based quality supervision, or the visual feature extraction pipeline described in the profile. This is a pure image-level object detection task with no connection to motion generation or Computer Graphics.

title: JointHOI: Jointly Generating Contact Maps Enhances Hand Object Interaction Generation
summary: Text driven hand object interaction (HOI) generation is gaining attention for immersive applications and robotics, yet producing physically plausible interactions remains challenging. Even when individual motions appear natural, small contact errors can cause conspicuous artifacts such as floating and interpenetration. Prior methods mitigate these issues using explicit contact cues or implicit grasp priors, but typically rely on multi stage pipelines and fail to model temporally evolving contact. We present JointHOI, a single stage diffusion framework that jointly generates 3D hand object motion and dynamic, distance based contact maps from text. By treating contact as an auxiliary inner modality, joint generation enables the model to learn contact motion coupling during training. At inference, contact guided sampling enforces consistency between generated contact maps and motion implied geometry, improving temporal stability and reducing penetration and floating. Experiments on GRAB and ARCTIC demonstrate consistent improvements in text adherence and physical plausibility over prior methods.

AI.tldr: JointHOI是一个单阶段扩散框架，能够根据文本提示共同生成3D手部-物体运动和动态接触图，解决文本驱动的手-物体交互(HOI)生成中的物理真实性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在手-物体交互生成中存在物理不合理问题，如漂浮和穿透现象，即使单独运动看起来自然，小的接触误差也会导致明显的伪影。现有方法通常依赖多阶段管道且无法建模时间演化的接触。
AI.method: 提出JointHOI，一种单阶段扩散框架，从文本共同生成3D手部-物体运动和基于距离的动态接触图。将接触作为辅助内部模态处理，使模型能够在训练期间学习接触-运动耦合。推理时使用接触引导采样来强制生成接触图与运动隐含几何之间的一致性。
AI.result: 在GRAB和ARCTIC数据集上的实验表明，JointHOI在文本 adherence和物理真实性方面相较于先前方法持续提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过将接触作为辅助模态进行联合生成，并采用接触引导采样策略，JointHOI有效提高了时间稳定性和减少了穿透与漂浮问题，为文本驱动的HOI生成提供了更物理合理的解决方案。

relevance_reason: While this paper is in Computer Graphics and addresses 3D motion generation, it uses a fundamentally different approach than the research profile. The profile focuses on two-stage pipelines using video generation models (Wan, Seedance) to extract visual features from 2D videos for 3D motion synthesis, whereas this paper uses a single-stage text-to-motion diffusion model without any video input. The pain points mentioned (domain gap between 2D visual features and 3D motion, video-based quality supervision, visual feature extraction) are not addressed. This paper generates hand-object interactions directly from text, which is a different paradigm than the video-to-3D motion pipeline specified in the research profile.

title: SkillCoach: Self-Evolving Rubrics for Evaluating and Enhancing Agentic Skill-Use
summary: Skills are becoming a reusable operational layer for LLM agents, encoding SOPs, domain rules, tool workflows, scripts, and validation routines. In realistic skill repositories, overlapping skills make reliable skill-use difficult. Final verifier success is too coarse for both evaluation and training, since an agent may pass through trial and error while selecting distractor skills, skipping required steps, composing workflows incorrectly or omitting final checks. We introduce SkillCoach, a self-evolving rubric framework for evaluating and enhancing agentic skill-use. SkillCoach derives skill-grounded process rubrics from real rollouts and evaluates trajectories along four dimensions: skill selection, skill following, skill composition, and skill-grounded reflection. It keeps the external verifier as a separate outcome signal, allowing process quality to be distinguished from accidental task success. The evolved rubrics further serve as process supervision for selecting high-quality training trajectories. Experiments show that evolved rubrics substantially improve evaluation quality, expose failures hidden by final accuracy, and provide stronger supervision signals than outcome-only filtering for enhancing agentic skill-use.

AI.tldr: SkillCoach是一个自我进化的rubric框架，用于评估和增强LLM代理的技能使用能力。它从真实rollout中推导基于技能的process rubrics，从四个维度评估轨迹，并将外部验证器作为单独的结果信号区分过程质量和偶然任务成功。
AI.motivation: 现实中技能库存在重叠技能，导致可靠的技能使用困难；最终验证器成功标准过于粗糙，无法评估代理在选择干扰技能、跳过必需步骤、错误组合工作流或遗漏最终检查等问题上的表现。
AI.method: 1)从真实rollout中推导技能基础的过程rubrics；2)沿四个维度评估轨迹：技能选择、技能遵循、技能组合、技能基础反思；3)将外部验证器作为单独的结果信号；4)使用进化的rubrics作为过程监督选择高质量训练轨迹。
AI.result: 进化的rubrics显著提高了评估质量，暴露了最终准确性隐藏的失败，并为增强代理技能使用提供了比仅结果过滤更强的监督信号。
AI.conclusion: SkillCoach框架能够有效区分过程质量与偶然任务成功，为代理技能使用评估和训练提供了更精细的监督信号。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM agent evaluation and skill usage (AI agents field), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics specifically for 3D motion generation from 2D videos. The application domains are entirely different - one deals with LLM agent workflows and skill rubrics, the other deals with visual-to-3D motion synthesis. There is no methodological overlap that would make this relevant to the stated research profile.

title: LLM-Empowered Multimodal Fusion Framework for Autonomous Driving: Semantic Enhancement and Channel-Adaptive Design
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures. Accepted by 2026 IEEE 37th International Symposium on Personal, Indoor and Mobile Radio Communications (PIMRC)
summary: Vision-radar fusion is central to robust autonomous driving, combining dense visual semantics with precise range and velocity measurements from radar. However, real-world fusion quality is fundamentally challenged by dynamically varying input quality, stemming from occlusion, adverse weather, and channel noise. To address this, we re-frame the problem from static data fusion to channel-aware semantic reasoning and propose a Large Language Model-centric Semantic-layer Channel-aware Integrated Perception (LM-SCIP) framework. It places a Large Language Model (LLM) as a central reasoning core to fuse a local visual stream with a quality-varying external radar stream used to cover perception-blind spots. Concretely, LM-SCIP couples a hierarchical radar-vision encoder with a Channel-Adaptive Semantic Module (CASM) that maps link indicators into a "Channel Prompt" to dynamically gate external radar features. A parameter-efficient, LoRA-tuned LLM, in conjunction with a heterogeneous Mixture-of-Experts (H-MoE), then arbitrates between local visual cues and the channel-conditioned radar context. Finally, a decoupled multi-task decoder outputs localization, trajectory forecasting, and image reconstruction. Experiments on nuScenes and VIRAT validate our approach. On nuScenes, under a controlled toggle of radar input, LM-SCIP reduces localization RMSE by 40.0% versus a vision-only baseline. On VIRAT, the model attains a 0.214m localization RMSE and 0.179m minFDE (k=1). These results reveal that the proposed LM-SCIP enables a robust vision-dominant fallback at low SNR and synergistic fusion at high SNR.

AI.tldr: 提出LM-SCIP框架，利用大语言模型作为中央推理核心，将传统静态视觉-雷达融合问题重新定义为通道感知语义推理任务，通过动态门控机制适应雷达输入质量变化，实现鲁棒的感知性能。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中视觉-雷达融合质量受动态变化的输入质量挑战，包括遮挡、恶劣天气和通道噪声的影响。现有方法难以应对雷达输入质量的动态波动，导致融合效果不稳定。
AI.method: 提出LM-SCIP框架，包含：1)层次化雷达-视觉编码器；2)通道自适应语义模块(CASM)将链路指标映射为"通道提示"动态门控雷达特征；3)参数高效的LoRA调优LLM结合异构混合专家(H-MoE)在视觉线索和通道条件雷达上下文间进行仲裁；4)解耦多任务解码器输出定位、轨迹预测和图像重建。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，控制雷达输入切换时，LM-SCIP相比纯视觉基线降低定位RMSE 40.0%。在VIRAT数据集上达到0.214m定位RMSE和0.179m minFDE(k=1)。
AI.conclusion: LM-SCIP能够在低信噪比下实现鲁棒的视觉主导回退，在高信噪比下实现协同融合，有效解决了动态输入质量变化下的视觉-雷达融合问题。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about autonomous driving perception (visual-radar fusion for vehicle localization and trajectory prediction), which is a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics 3D motion generation. The research profile focuses on synthesizing 3D human motion from 2D videos/text, while this paper deals with fusing camera and radar data for self-driving cars. Even though both use LLMs/VLMs, the methods, goals, and domains are entirely different - autonomous driving perception has no connection to motion synthesis or visual-to-3D generation tasks in computer graphics.

title: Spec-AUF: Accept-Until-Fail Training under Train-Inference Misalignment for Masked Block Drafters
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive generation by drafting a block of tokens that the target model verifies left-to-right, committing only the longest accepted prefix. Block (DLM-style) drafters predict the whole block in parallel, which is fast but trained with a full-block cross-entropy that supervises every position against the gold continuation -- even though inference discards every token after the first rejection. Recent acceptance-aware objectives patch this by reweighting the full-block loss; we instead use teacher-forced learning as a motivation for how supervision should concentrate on the accepted prefix. A mask-only block drafter has no input-side channel for gold-prefix conditioning, so AUF approximates that prefix-sensitive supervision on the loss side by keeping the cross-entropy support only through the drafter's first predicted failure. AUF is a single, detached change to the CE support -- no auxiliary objective, no verifier rollouts, and no change to the inference pipeline or the exactness contract. Within fixed drafter backbones and serving settings on Qwen3-8B, AUF raises the DFlash drafter's average emitted length $τ$, averaged over six benchmarks, from 2.40 to 2.61, with a gain on every benchmark, and transfers to Domino's two-branch head (2.56 to 2.68). Two findings sharpen the picture: the decay-only baseline reaches higher token accuracy on the shared block mask yet decodes worse, and on DFlash, once AUF truncates the support, the standard exponential position-decay weighting becomes empirically inert.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AUF方法改进块drafters的训练，通过将交叉熵监督限制在drafter首次预测失败的位置，而非整个块，从而提升推测解码的效率。在Qwen3-8B上，DFlash drafter的平均发射长度从2.40提升至2.61。
AI.motivation: 当前块drafters使用完整块交叉熵训练，即使推理时只保留最长接受前缀，仍对每个位置进行监督。这导致资源浪费在推理时会被丢弃的token上。已有方法通过重新加权损失来改进，本文则认为应将监督集中到接受的前缀上。
AI.method: AUF（近似不支持失败）方法：保持交叉熵支持仅到drafter第一次预测失败的位置，作为对前缀敏感监督的近似。这是对CE支持的单一 detached 更改，无需辅助目标、verifier rollout或更改推理管道。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-8B上，DFlash drafter的平均发射长度从2.40提升到2.61（六个基准测试的平均值），每个基准测试都有提升；迁移到Domino的双分支头也有效（2.56到2.68）。
AI.conclusion: 两个关键发现：1）仅衰减基线在共享块掩码上达到更高token准确率但解码效果更差；2）一旦AUF截断支持，标准指数位置衰减权重变得经验上无效。

relevance_reason: This paper is about speculative decoding and improving LLM inference speed (block drafters for language models), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. The research profile focuses on 2D video to 3D motion synthesis, visual feature extraction, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), and semantic text-to-motion generation - while this paper addresses token prediction in LLM inference. There is no application domain overlap whatsoever.

title: SpaceEra++: A Unified Framework Towards 3D Spatial Reasoning in Video
summary: Visual-spatial understanding, defined as the ability to infer object relationships and scene layouts from visual inputs, is fundamental to downstream tasks such as robotic navigation and embodied interaction. However, pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs) remain constrained by spatial uncertainty stemming from inherently 2D observations and by the scarcity of data for 3D spatial understanding. To address these limitations, we proposed a novel framework, SpaceEra, in the NeurIPS 2025 Spotlight paper. Although it achieved significant performance gains, we further observed that its effectiveness is hindered by insufficient input from scanning videos and weak reasoning constraints. To tackle these newly emerged challenges, we extend the original framework into a comprehensive system, termed SpaceEra++, which spans data construction, model design, training optimization, and prompting inference. Specifically, to alleviate input insufficiency, we introduce ScenePick, a frame sampling strategy that balances spatial coverage with object semantics to produce compact yet comprehensive scene representations. In addition, to enhance spatial reasoning, we develop SpaceAlign, which enforces pairwise object constraints by jointly exploiting absolute coordinates and relative spatial relations, thereby aligning optimization with spatial accuracy. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines, while ablation studies validate both the individual and joint contributions of each component, and further analyses provide guidance for future research.

AI.tldr: SpaceEra++是一个扩展的视觉空间理解框架，通过ScenePick帧采样策略和SpaceAlign空间对齐模块，解决预训练视觉语言模型在3D空间理解中的空间不确定性和数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 预训练视觉语言模型(VLM)受限于空间不确定性(源于2D观测的本质)和3D空间理解数据稀缺的挑战，前代框架SpaceEra存在输入扫描视频不足和推理约束弱的问题。
AI.method: 提出ScenePick帧采样策略，平衡空间覆盖与对象语义；开发SpaceAlign模块，通过联合利用绝对坐标和相对空间关系强制执行成对对象约束；涵盖数据构建、模型设计、训练优化和提示推理的完整系统。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上取得一致的性能提升，消融实验验证了各组件的单独和联合贡献。
AI.conclusion: ScenePick和SpaceAlign组件能有效提升视觉空间理解能力，为未来研究提供了指导方向。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on 3D SPATIAL REASONING and UNDERSTANDING in videos (perception task), while the research profile is about 3D MOTION SYNTHESIS and GENERATION from videos (generation task). These are fundamentally different application domains in Computer Graphics. Even though both involve 2D videos and 3D understanding, the paper addresses "understanding existing 3D spatial relationships" rather than "generating new 3D motions from video priors." The pain points mentioned (domain gap, quality assessment, semantic consistency, visual guidance for 3D generation) are NOT addressed by this paper, which focuses on improving VLM spatial reasoning capabilities for scene understanding tasks.

title: Rethinking Complexity Metrics for LLM-Integrated Applications: Beyond Source Code
summary: LLM-integrated applications blend natural language prompts with program code, and much of their runtime behavior originates in the prompt layer rather than in the code itself. Existing complexity metrics, however, operate solely at the code level and therefore overlook this behavioral logic entirely. We present HECATE, the first tool designed to assess complexity in both the prompt and code layers of such applications. Central to HECATE is Prompt-as-Specification, a Hoare-logic-inspired formalism that interprets every prompt as a specification of intended behavior. Grounded in 25 complexity dimensions identified across published taxonomies, the tool generates 52 candidate metrics. We assess each metric against 118 components collected from 18 open-source repositories, relying on maintenance activity derived from version history as an empirical proxy for complexity, and discard any metric that loses significance once code size is accounted for. Only ten metrics withstand this test. Seven belong to our newly introduced set; rather than measuring sheer volume, each tallies structurally distinct elements, such as LLM call sites, memory attributes, and prompt templates, an attribute we call structural breadth. Of the three surviving conventional metrics, RFC exhibits a similar breadth-oriented character, while Halstead N and V survive only as a residual effect of size; our top-performing metrics exceed all three. Crucially, the prompt-layer metrics retain significance even when the strongest code-level metric is added as a covariate, establishing prompt complexity as a dimension in its own right. A final validation on 20 components spanning six held-out repositories shows that the two best-performing metrics continue to predict maintenance effort, supporting their generalizability beyond the training set.

AI.tldr: HECATE是首个评估LLM集成应用提示层和代码层复杂度的工具，基于Prompt-as-Specification形式化方法，从52个候选指标中筛选出10个有效指标，其中7个新指标测量"结构广度"，表现优于传统代码复杂度指标。
AI.motivation: 现有复杂度指标仅在代码层面操作，完全忽略了LLM集成应用中提示层的行为逻辑。LLM集成应用将自然语言提示与程序代码混合，其运行时行为主要源于提示层而非代码本身。
AI.method: 基于25个复杂度维度和Prompt-as-Specification形式化方法（在Hoare逻辑启发下将提示解释为行为规范），生成52个候选指标。针对18个开源仓库的118个组件进行评估，以版本历史的维护活动作为复杂度的经验代理，剔除考虑代码大小后失去显著性的指标。
AI.result: 仅10个指标通过检验；7个新指标测量结构广度（如LLM调用点、内存属性、提示模板等不同元素），RFC表现类似，广度和Halstead N和V仅作为大小的残余效应保留。最佳指标超过这三个传统指标。提示层指标在加入最强代码级指标作为协变量后仍保持显著性。对6个保留仓库的20个组件进行最终验证，表明两个最佳指标继续预测维护工作。
AI.conclusion: 提示层复杂度是一个独立的维度。两个表现最佳的指标能够预测维护工作，支持其超出训练集的泛化能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about software engineering complexity metrics for LLM-integrated applications, focusing on measuring prompt layer and code layer complexity. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation models, or visual feature extraction. The application domain is completely different - this is software engineering research about measuring LLM application complexity, not computer graphics or motion synthesis from visual inputs.

title: PixGS: Pixel-Space Diffusion for Direct 3D Gaussian Splat Generation
summary: Recent advances in 3D content generation from text or images have achieved impressive results, yet view inconsistency from 2D generators and the scarcity of high-quality 3D data remain significant bottlenecks. Existing solutions typically adapt large-scale pre-trained text-to-image latent diffusion models to generate 3D Gaussian Splats (3DGS). However, these approaches often rely on training complex cascade pipelines that are computationally expensive and scalability-limited. Most critically, the quality of generated 3D assets is inherently constrained by each component capacity and compressed latent space, leading to decoding artifacts and accumulated errors. To address these limitations, we propose PixGS, a single-stage pipeline for direct high-quality 3DGS generation, which leverages recent advances in pixel-space diffusion to bypass lossy latent compression while still benefiting from the vast 2D generative priors. By directly denoising 3D Gaussian attributes at each timestep, our method enables precise, splat-level regularization of both appearance and geometry. Furthermore, we introduce a comprehensive supervision strategy that incorporates surface normals, depth, and high-frequency structural information, which is often overlooked in prior works. Experiments demonstrate that PixGS outperforms current state-of-the-art methods while maintaining a fast inference speed (1s on a single A100 GPU), offering a robust and efficient alternative to multi-stage generation pipelines.

AI.tldr: PixGS是一个单阶段直接生成高质量3D Gaussian Splats的管道，利用像素空间扩散模型绕过有损的潜在压缩，同时利用海量2D生成先验知识。
AI.motivation: 解决现有3D生成方法中视图不一致和高质量3D数据稀缺的问题；现有方法依赖复杂级联管道，计算成本高且可扩展性有限；生成质量受限于各组件能力和压缩潜在空间，导致解码伪影和累积误差。
AI.method: 提出单阶段管道PixGS，直接在每个时间步对3D高斯属性进行去噪；引入综合监督策略，包含表面法线、深度和高频结构信息。
AI.result: PixGS在保持快速推理速度（单张A100 GPU上1秒）的同时，优于当前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: PixGS提供了一种鲁棒且高效的替代方案，取代了多阶段生成管道，能够直接生成高质量3DGS资产。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses 3D Gaussian Splatting generation (static 3D objects), but the research profile focuses on 3D MOTION generation from 2D videos. This is a fundamental application domain mismatch - generating static 3D objects is completely different from synthesizing 3D human motions. While both use diffusion models, the application domains are entirely different (static object generation vs. motion synthesis).

title: ContextSniper: AntTrail's Token-Efficient Code Memory for Repository-Level Program Repair
summary: Large language model agents can repair real repository issues, but they often spend large context budgets on whole-file reads, broad searches, and long terminal outputs where useful evidence is mixed with irrelevant code and logs. This paper presents ContextSniper, AntTrail's token-efficient code memory layer for repository-level program repair. As the coding specialization of AntTrail's broader agent memory engine, ContextSniper implements the Sniper feature for precision evidence selection: it retrieves candidate code and runtime evidence, ranks it with hybrid retrieval signals, filters long outputs through an intention-aware context gate, and returns compact evidence packets while preserving recoverable source context outside the prompt. We evaluate ContextSniper on SWE-bench Lite with OpenClaw and Claude Code, using 50 task runs per host-agent condition. ContextSniper reduces total token use by 51.5% and logged cost by 36.4% for OpenClaw, and reduces total token use by 38.9% and estimated cost by 27.3% for Claude Code. Submitted-resolution rates decrease slightly, from 26.0% to 24.0% for OpenClaw and from 32.0% to 30.0% for Claude Code. ContextSniper's pilot testing scripts are open-sourced at https://github.com/Calluking/ContextSniper

title: MMBench-Live: A Continuously Evolving Benchmark for Multimodal Models
summary: Evaluation benchmarks are essential for assessing vision-language models (VLMs), but most multimodal benchmarks are static, making them vulnerable to temporal staleness, data contamination, and costly maintenance. We present MMBench-Live, a continuously evolving multimodal benchmark built by a multi-agent-driven automated pipeline. Our framework treats benchmark evolution as task-guided dataset construction, integrating structured benchmark specification, feedback-controlled real-time data acquisition, and verifiable QA generation with executable reasoning. To maintain cross-version comparability, we introduce a distribution-consistent update strategy that extracts task-related visual patterns from the original benchmark to guide data collection and filtering. Instantiated from MMBench, MMBench-Live contains 5.9K newly generated evaluation instances with a high answer correctness rate, while each update costs about USD 30 and takes 1-2 hours. Extensive evaluations show that MMBench-Live preserves stable model rankings, maintains semantic alignment with the original benchmark, and exhibits weaker contamination-related memorization signals, suggesting a practical and scalable paradigm for sustainable multimodal benchmark evolution. The project is available at https://github.com/PRIS-CV/MMBench-Live.

AI.tldr: MMBench-Live是一个由多智能体驱动的自动化pipeline构建的持续演进的多模态评估基准，旨在解决传统静态基准面临的时效性陈旧、数据污染和维护成本高等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有大多数多模态基准是静态的，存在三大问题：1) 时间陈旧性；2) 数据污染（ contamination）；3) 高昂的维护成本。现有基准难以适应视觉语言模型的快速发展。
AI.method: 1) 将基准演进视为任务引导的数据集构建任务；2) 集成结构化基准规范；3) 实现反馈控制的实时数据获取；4) 开发可验证的问答生成与可执行推理；5) 引入分布一致性更新策略，从原基准提取任务相关视觉模式以指导数据收集和过滤。
AI.result: 基于MMBench构建的MMBench-Live包含5.9K个新生成的评估实例，回答正确率高，每次更新成本约30美元，耗时1-2小时。评估表明：保持稳定的模型排名；与原基准保持语义对齐；表现出更弱的污染相关记忆信号。
AI.conclusion: MMBench-Live提供了一种实用且可扩展的范式，用于实现多模态基准的可持续演进，为视觉语言模型的持续评估提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about building an evaluation benchmark for multimodal language models (VLM evaluation), which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics research profile focused on 3D motion generation. While both mention "Visual Language Model," the paper uses VLM for benchmark evaluation and question answering, not for quality supervision in motion synthesis or extracting visual features for 3D generation. The application domains are entirely different - this is AI benchmarking research, not computer graphics or motion generation.

title: ElephantAgent: Contextual State Continuity in Agentic Systems
summary: Agentic systems enhance their capabilities by invoking external tools and maintaining persistent memory. However, these external dependencies introduce novel attack surfaces. Recent tool and memory poisoning attacks show that maliciously crafted tool descriptors and poisoned memory can covertly bias agent behavior. These threats reflect a deeper issue: the lack of verifiable continuity in the agent's contextual state for planning and execution. We present ElephantAgent, a protocol that enforces Contextual State Continuity to defend against contextual state poisoning. Inspired by prior state-continuity mechanisms (e.g., Nimble), ElephantAgent extends this protection to the evolving contextual state of agentic systems. We define the contextual state as the bounded, security-critical subset of the agent's entire context (e.g., tool state and memory). Before processing each query, ElephantAgent recomputes the digest of the local contextual state and verifies it against the latest authorized digest. Using replicated trusted hardware, ElephantAgent maintains a linearizable ledger of authorized contextual state transitions and detects out-of-band state tampering. To handle in-band semantic abuse, ElephantAgent additionally provides Historical Traceability, enabling conditional post-hoc audit and recovery to a known-good prior state.

AI.tldr: ElephantAgent是一种针对AI代理系统中上下文状态投毒攻击的安全协议，通过利用可信硬件维护线性化分类账来验证上下文状态连续性，并提供历史可追溯性以实现审计和恢复。
AI.motivation: 当前AI代理系统通过调用外部工具和维护持久内存来增强能力，但这些外部依赖引入了新的攻击面。近期出现的工具和内存投毒攻击表明，恶意构造的工具描述符和被污染的内存可以 covertly 偏置代理行为。这些威胁反映了一个更深层的问题：代理在规划和执行过程中缺乏可验证的上下文状态连续性。
AI.method: 定义上下文状态为代理整个上下文的安全关键子集（如工具状态和内存）。在处理每个查询前，ElephantAgent重新计算本地上下文状态的摘要，并使用复制可信硬件将其与最新授权摘要进行验证。ElephantAgent维护一个线性化分类账来记录授权的上下文状态转换，并检测带外状态篡改。此外，还提供历史可追溯性以实现条件性事后审计和恢复到已知良好状态。
AI.result: 通过上下文状态连续性验证机制，ElephantAgent能够检测并防御针对AI代理系统的上下文状态投毒攻击，同时保持规划与执行的完整性。
AI.conclusion: ElephantAgent通过将状态连续性保护扩展到代理系统的演进上下文状态，结合线性化分类账和历史可追溯性，为防范上下文状态投毒攻击提供了有效的安全解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about AI agent security and context state poisoning attacks in agentic systems, using trusted hardware and linearized ledgers. The application domain is completely different from the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion generation from video using VLMs, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), and two-stage pipelines for visual-to-motion synthesis. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points (domain gap, quality assessment, semantic consistency, visual feature extraction) nor does it use any of the specified methods.

title: Rethinking Conditional Generation for Underwater Salient Object Detection
summary: Salient Object Detection in underwater images remains challenging due to low contrast, uneven illumination, and color distortion caused by scattering and absorption effects, which limit the effectiveness of conventional SOD methods in underwater environments. To address these challenges, we propose a Degradation-aware Conditional Generation Network (DCGNet), specifically designed to construct reliable conditional features for underwater saliency generation. First, we design a Dynamic Multi-Granularity module (DMG) grounded in the human visual system to robustly detect salient objects of varying scales with blurred boundaries. Then, we develop an Underwater Physics-Prior module (UPP), which utilizes pseudo-depth guidance to estimate underwater light attenuation and backscatter, thereby restoring degradation-aware RGB features and mitigating color distortion and boundary ambiguity. Based on the physics-guided representation, we introduce an Underwater Spatial Gaussian module (USG), which constructs a spatial Gaussian saliency prior from the strongest guided response to enhance object-centered salient regions and suppress cluttered underwater backgrounds. In addition, a lightweight timestep-adaptive Diffusion Transformer (DiT) bottleneck is inserted into the denoising decoder to refine fused features at different diffusion timesteps. Comprehensive experiments on USOD10K, USOD, CSOD10K, MAS3K, and RMAS demonstrate that DCGNet significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, verifying its potential for complex underwater visual applications.

AI.tldr: 针对水下图像对比度低、光照不均、色偏严重等问题，提出一种基于退化感知的条件生成网络(DCGNet)，通过融合物理先验和扩散Transformer机制实现高精度的水下显著性目标检测。
AI.motivation: 水下图像因光线散射和吸收导致低对比度、不均匀照明和颜色失真，传统SOD方法在水中效果受限，需要专门设计的退化感知方法。
AI.method: 1) DMG动态多粒度模块：模仿人类视觉系统检测不同尺度和模糊边界的目标；2) UPP水下物理先验模块：利用伪深度估计光线衰减和后向散射，恢复退化感知的RGB特征；3) USG水下空间高斯模块：从最强引导响应构建空间高斯先验；4) 轻量级时间步自适应的DiT瓶颈：用于不同扩散时间步的融合特征细化。
AI.result: 在USOD10K、USOD、CSOD10K、MAS3K和RMAS等数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DCGNet为复杂水下视觉应用提供了有效的解决方案，验证了融合物理先验与扩散Transformer在 underwater SOD任务中的潜力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about underwater salient object detection (a 2D image processing task in computer vision), not 3D motion generation. While it uses diffusion Transformer (DiT), the application domain is completely different - it's about enhancing underwater images for object detection, not about generating 3D motions from video or text. The research profile is focused on computer graphics for 3D motion synthesis, which is a different field entirely. The paper addresses underwater image degradation issues, not the domain gap between 2D visual features and 3D motion representation.

title: A-TMA: Decoupling State-Aware Memory Failures in Long-Term Agent Memory
summary: Long term memory lets LLM agents act as persistent assistants, but user facts change. A useful memory system must know what is true now, what used to be true, and what changed. We study \emph{ghost memory}, a state coordination failure in which old, current, and transition facts coexist in the memory bank, remain mixed during retrieval, and mislead the answer model. We argue that memory systems should be understood and optimized from three levels: bank maintenance, retrieval, and answer time resolution. We propose ATMA, a state aware overlay for existing memory systems. ATMA keeps superseded and transition records in the bank, builds evidence packets for the query's requested state view, and exposes current, historical, and transition labels to QA. We further call for decoupled evaluation of bank, retrieval, and answer level failures, since final QA accuracy can hide where ghost memory occurs. To make this failure measurable, we build LTP (LoCoMo Temporal Plus), a conflict heavy benchmark for ghost memory, and evaluate on LoCoMo for long conversation generalization. On LTP, Graphiti+ATMA improves conflict accuracy by 0.240 absolute over Graphiti. On LoCoMo, Graphiti+ATMA raises temporal F1 from 0.0295 to 0.1705. The gains are host dependent, but they indicate that explicit state roles can reduce memory failures hidden by final QA accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文研究LLM代理中长期记忆的"幽灵记忆"问题，即旧事实、当前事实和过渡事实在记忆库中共存并导致答案错误。提出ATMA状态感知overlay和LTP基准测试，实验表明Graphiti+ATMA在LTP上冲突准确率提升0.240，在LoCoMo上时间F1从0.0295提升至0.1705。
AI.motivation: 用户事实会发生变化，但现有记忆系统无法区分什么是"现在为真"、"曾经为真"和"什么发生了变化"。幽灵记忆会导致旧事实、当前事实和过渡事实在记忆库中共存，检索时混合在一起，误导回答模型。因此需要从银行维护、检索和答案时间解析三个层次理解和优化记忆系统。
AI.method: 提出ATMA（状态感知overlay）：1）保留被取代和过渡记录在银行中；2）为查询的请求状态视图构建证据包；3）向QA暴露当前、历史和过渡标签。同时构建LTP（LoCoMo Temporal Plus）基准测试用于评估幽灵记忆，并提出对银行、检索和答案层级失败进行解耦评估。
AI.result: 在LTP上，Graphiti+ATMA相比Graphiti提升冲突准确率0.240（绝对值）。在LoCoMo上，Graphiti+ATMA将时间F1从0.0295提升至0.1705。收益取决于宿主，但表明显式状态角色可以减少被最终QA准确率掩盖的记忆失败。
AI.conclusion: 显式状态感知可以减少幽灵记忆问题。记忆系统应从银行维护、检索和答案时间解析三个层次进行优化。最终QA准确率可能隐藏幽灵记忆发生的具体位置，需要解耦评估各层级的失败。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agent memory systems and "ghost memories" in AI agents - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), visual feature extraction, and two-stage pipelines for video-to-motion synthesis. This paper addresses none of those pain points and uses completely different methods (memory banks, retrieval systems for LLM agents) in a completely different application domain (AI/NLP vs Computer Graphics).

title: C2E: Boosting Ego-Only 3D Object Detection via Multi-Teacher Contrastive Knowledge Distillation
summary: LiDAR-based 3D object detection is essential for autonomous driving systems. However, traditional Ego-only Perception (Eo-Perception) suffers from limited perspective and occlusions in a complex outdoor environment, leading to performance bottlenecks. Recently, research on multi-agent Collaborative Perception (Co-Perception) has demonstrated excellent performance, but high communication costs and accumulated pose error hinder its application. To address this, we explore a novel C2E (Co-Perception to Eo-Perception) paradigm through the Multi-to-Single (M2S) agent contrastive knowledge distillation framework. Our M2S framework first designs Multi-Level Feature Enhancement module to provide more stable features, and introduces Auxiliary Point Cloud Reconstruction and Multi-Teacher Contrastive Distillation mechanisms to mitigate domain gaps in point cloud and feature distributions within the C2E paradigm. Benefiting from this, our M2S can retain the excellent performance of collaborative perception while effectively avoiding the drawbacks, such as communication delays and positioning errors. Extensive experiments on the V2XSet, V2V4Real and DAIR-V2X datasets show the effectiveness and generalizability of our M2S framework when combined with the state-of-the-art CoSDH model and other excellent 3D detectors. Our M2S framework can deliver up to a 8.64% improvement in 3D mAP performance without introducing any communication costs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出M2S（Multi-to-Single）框架，解决协同感知到单体感知（C2E）范式中的域迁移问题，通过多级特征增强、辅助点云重建和多教师对比蒸馏机制，使协同感知模型在不产生通信成本的情况下将知识迁移到单体感知模型，在V2XSet、V2V4Real和DAIR-V2X数据集上实现了最高8.64%的3D mAP性能提升。
AI.motivation: 传统的单体感知（Eo-Perception）存在视角受限和遮挡问题，而协同感知（Co-Perception）虽然性能优越，但高通信成本和累积位姿误差限制了其实际应用。因此需要探索一种C2E范式，将协同感知知识迁移到单体感知模型。
AI.method: 提出M2S框架，包含三部分：1）多级特征增强模块（Multi-Level Feature Enhancement）提供更稳定特征；2）辅助点云重建（Auxiliary Point Cloud Reconstruction）缓解点云分布域差距；3）多教师对比蒸馏（Multi-Teacher Contrastive Distillation）缓解特征分布域差距。
AI.result: 在V2XSet、V2V4Real和DAIR-V2X数据集上，结合CoSDH模型及其他3D检测器，M2S框架可实现最高8.64%的3D mAP性能提升，且不引入任何通信成本。
AI.conclusion: M2S框架能够保留协同感知的优异性能，同时有效避免通信延迟和定位误差等缺点，具有良好的有效性和泛化性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about 3D object detection for autonomous driving (V2X perception), not computer graphics or 3D motion generation. The application domain is entirely different - it deals with ego-vehicle perception, point clouds for driving scenarios, and collaborative sensing, not human motion synthesis, video generation models, or visual language models for quality assessment. The methods (knowledge distillation, point cloud processing) are specific to autonomous driving perception and have no relevance to the research profile's pain points about 2D-to-3D motion synthesis or video-to-motion pipelines.

title: Atomic Task Graph: A Unified Framework for Agentic Planning and Execution
summary: LLM-based agents have shown strong potential for solving complex multi-step tasks, yet existing performance improvements often rely on either scaling to larger backbone models or task-specific fine-tuning. The former incurs substantial computational costs, while the latter typically generalizes poorly across different tasks. Although prompt-based control is training-free and broadly applicable, existing methods still leave input-output dependencies between subtasks implicit in textual trajectories, making verified intermediate results difficult to reuse. To address these limitations, we propose Atomic Task Graph (ATG), a unified control framework for planning and execution. Specifically, ATG maintains an explicit graph to expose dependencies and support reuse. During planning, it recursively decomposes a high-level task into subtasks, forming a sequence of directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) whose evolution can be traced. During execution, the dependencies exposed by ATG allow independent branches to be executed in parallel, thereby improving execution efficiency. When failures are detected, ATG leverages the graph evolution history to localize the error source and repair only the affected region, preserving validated regions unchanged. Experiments show that ATG consistently outperforms strong baselines in success rate and execution efficiency across three interactive benchmarks using only 7B-8B backbones.

AI.tldr: 本文提出原子任务图(ATG)框架，通过显式图结构解决LLM智能体在复杂多步骤任务中的依赖关系隐式和结果复用困难的问题。该框架在规划阶段递归分解任务形成有向无环图(DAG)，执行阶段支持并行处理，失败时仅修复受影响区域。使用7B-8B骨干模型在三个交互基准测试上取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体性能提升主要依赖更大规模的骨干模型或任务特定微调，前者计算成本高，后者泛化能力差。虽然提示工程无需训练且适用广泛，但现有方法仍使子任务间的输入输出依赖关系保持隐式，导致已验证的中间结果难以复用。
AI.method: 提出原子任务图(ATG)统一控制框架：1)维护显式图结构暴露依赖关系并支持复用；2)规划阶段递归分解高层任务为子任务，形成DAG序列并追踪演化；3)执行阶段根据依赖关系并行执行独立分支；4)失败时利用图演化历史定位错误源，仅修复受影响区域，保留已验证区域不变。
AI.result: 在三个交互基准测试上，ATG使用仅7B-8B骨干模型即可持续优于强基线方法，在成功率和执行效率方面均取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: ATG通过显式图结构成功实现了无需大规模模型或任务微调即可提升LLM智能体性能的目标，为复杂多步骤任务的规划和执行提供了高效、可复用的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agents and task planning using atomic task graphs - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, or video-to-motion synthesis. The application domain is AI agents/agentic planning, not computer graphics or motion synthesis. The methods (task graph, DAG for planning, 7B-8B LLM) have no relevance to the research profile which focuses on VLM-based quality supervision, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), and 2D-to-3D motion synthesis pipelines.

title: Geometric Foundation Model Distillation for Efficient Lunar 3D Reconstruction
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026, code can be accessed via https://clementinegrethen.github.io/publications/ECCV.html
summary: Large 3D foundation models such as MASt3R achieve state-of-the-art stereo reconstruction but are computationally demanding for deployment under strict hardware constraints -- a critical limitation in domains such as planetary exploration, where onboard computing is severely restricted. We study how far such models can be compressed through knowledge distillation, using lunar stereo reconstruction as a challenging and practically relevant case study. Starting from a 688M-parameter MASt3R teacher fine-tuned on lunar imagery, we distill its dense geometric predictions into a family of lightweight students spanning different encoder types (CNN vs ViT), decoder widths and depths, and training strategies. To bridge the dimensional mismatch between teacher and student, we propose a structured SVD-based initialization that projects the teacher's decoder weights into the student's smaller latent space, yielding a warm start that significantly improves convergence and final performance. Based on our results on lunar data, we can obtain a distilled student that retains most of teacher's reconstruction accuracy while reducing the model size up to 7 times, and even outperforms a baseline trained directly with sparse ground-truth annotations. Beyond compression, our study highlights both principles and practical insights for distilling geometric foundation models: a convolutional encoder underperforms transformer-based alternatives (though pretraining availability remains a confounding factor), preserving encoder capacity is more critical than maintaining a large decoder, feature-level distillation consistently outperforms output-only supervision, and SVD-based initialization improves optimisation stability. These findings provide practical guidelines for deploying 3D reconstruction models in resource-constrained environments.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过知识蒸馏压缩大型3D基础模型（如MASt3R），以适用于计算资源受限的行星探测场景。以月球立体重建为案例，将688M参数的MASt3R教师模型的知识迁移到多个轻量级学生模型中，提出SVD-based初始化方法来弥合教师与学生之间的维度不匹配问题。最终实现了7倍模型压缩同时保持较高的重建精度。
AI.motivation: 大型3D基础模型虽能实现顶尖的立体重建效果，但在严格硬件约束下（如行星探测中的 onboard computing）计算成本过高，难以部署。因此需要研究如何有效压缩这类模型以适应资源受限环境。
AI.method: 1) 从688M参数的MASt3R教师模型（在月球影像上微调）出发；2) 构建了多种轻量级学生模型，变化编码器类型(CNN/ViT)、解码器宽度和深度、训练策略；3) 提出基于结构SVD的初始化方法，将教师解码器权重投影到学生潜在空间，提供热启动以改善收敛和最终性能；4) 采用特征级蒸馏而非仅输出监督。
AI.result: 1) 获得可压缩达7倍的学生模型，同时保留教师大部分重建精度；2) 蒸馏学生模型甚至优于直接使用稀疏GT标注训练的基线；3) 关键发现：Transformer编码器优于CNN编码器（虽受预训练可用性混淆）；保留编码器容量比维持大解码器更关键；特征级蒸馏持续优于仅输出监督；SVD初始化提高优化稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为几何基础模型的蒸馏提供了原则性见解和实践指南，表明在资源受限环境（如行星探测）中部署3D重建模型是可行的。核心建议：优先保留编码器容量、采用特征级蒸馏、使用SVD初始化改善收敛。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D reconstruction for lunar/planetary imaging, which is a completely different application domain from 3D motion generation in computer graphics. The research profile focuses on motion synthesis, video generation priors, and semantic text-to-motion generation. This paper addresses 3D geometric reconstruction via model compression and knowledge distillation - a computer vision task for planetary science, not computer graphics animation or motion synthesis. The methods (knowledge distillation, SVD initialization) also differ from the profile's methods (VLM, video generation models like Wan/Seedance). This is essentially a different field entirely.

title: OntoLearner: A Modular Python Library for Ontology Learning with Large Language Models
comment: 30 pages. Under review at Nature Communications. This version is reformatted with a different section structure; content is unchanged
summary: Ontology learning (OL) aims to automatically construct structured knowledge models from text, yet progress remains fragmented across methods, domains, and evaluation practices. Despite decades of research, OL lacks a shared infrastructure for systematic evaluation and ontology access. This absence has hindered progress and fragmented research, leaving the central challenges of OL largely unaddressed. We introduce OntoLearner, a modular, cross-domain, and first-of-its-kind framework that unifies ontology access, large language model (LLM)-driven learning pipelines, and standardized benchmarking. OntoLearner releases 180 machine-readable ontologies spanning 22 domains and provides pipeline-ready datasets with train/dev/test splits for three core OL tasks: term typing, taxonomy discovery, and non-taxonomic relation extraction. Using this infrastructure, we conduct a large-scale empirical study of OL, evaluating 22 retrieval models and 12 LLMs across domains and tasks. The results converge on a finding that reframes the central challenge of OL: failure modes scale with ontological complexity rather than model size or architectural sophistication. The primary bottleneck is not model capability, but a structural mismatch between how models encode knowledge and how ontologies organize it. These findings establish that effective OL is reachable through the cross-domain, multi-task benchmarking enabled by OntoLearner. OntoLearner is open-source (MIT license) at https://github.com/sciknoworg/OntoLearner/.

AI.tldr: 本文推出OntoLearner框架，这是首个统一的模块化跨领域本体学习基础设施，集成本体访问、LLM驱动的学习管道和标准化基准测试。该框架发布180个机器可读本体（跨22个领域）和三个核心OL任务的管道就绪数据集，并通过对22个检索模型和12个LLM的大规模实证研究，发现OL的主要瓶颈是模型编码知识的方式与本体组织知识方式之间的结构不匹配，而非模型能力不足。
AI.motivation: 本体学习(OL)研究进展分散在不同方法、领域和评估实践之间，缺乏共享的基础设施进行系统评估和本体访问，这阻碍了研究进展，使OL的核心挑战长期未得到解决。
AI.method: 提出OntoLearner框架，统一本体访问、LLM驱动的学习管道和标准化基准测试；发布180个机器可读本体（22个领域）和三个核心OL任务的管道就绪数据集；大规模评估22个检索模型和12个LLM。
AI.result: 研究结果颠覆了OL的核心挑战认知：失败模式随本体复杂性扩展，而非随模型规模或架构 sophistication 扩展。主要瓶颈不是模型能力，而是模型编码知识的方式与本体组织知识方式之间的结构不匹配。
AI.conclusion: 通过OntoLearner实现的跨领域多任务基准测试，本体学习的有效性是可以实现的。OntoLearner以MIT许可证开源。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Ontology Learning with LLMs - a Natural Language Processing / Knowledge Graph field. It has NO relevance to the research profile which is in Computer Graphics focusing on 3D motion generation from videos. The application domains are completely different: ontology learning (extracting structured knowledge from text) vs video-to-3D-motion synthesis. The methods are also entirely different (LLMs for NLP vs video generation models and 3D motion generation). This is a case of complete field mismatch.

title: QWERTY: Training-Free Motion Control via Query-Warped Video Diffusion Transformers
comment: 37 pages, 18 figures, accepted at the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2026
summary: Video diffusion transformers (DiTs) generate high-fidelity and temporally coherent videos, yet motion control remains implicit, primarily relying on text prompts. As a result, achieving desired motion often requires extensive prompt engineering and repeated resampling. While fine-tuning models with additional spatial prompts (e.g., bounding boxes or point trajectories) enables explicit control, it demands substantial data curation and computation, and may compromise the generative capabilities of pretrained models. Consequently, training-free motion control using such spatial prompts has been explored in U-Net-based video diffusion models, but remains largely unexplored for DiTs. We introduce QWERTY, a training-free framework that enables flexible motion control in pretrained image-to-video DiTs via user-defined object warping and optical flow. We carefully manipulate the 3D full attention of DiTs by warping the frame-invariant semantic subspace of queries. We find that the noise predicted by the query-warped DiT naturally guides the diffusion trajectory toward the desired motion, and further show that leveraging this noise as self-guidance for latent optimization improves control stability and visual quality. Experiments show that QWERTY achieves the most effective motion control among existing training-free approaches on a recent image-to-video DiT, with performance comparable to fine-tuning-based methods.

AI.tldr: QWERTY是一个无需训练的框架，通过用户定义的对象变形和光流实现预训练图像到视频DiTs的灵活运动控制。该方法通过扭曲查询的帧不变语义空间来操控DiT的3D全注意力，并利用预测噪声作为自引导进行潜在优化。
AI.motivation: 视频扩散变换器(DITs)虽然能生成高保真和时间连贯的视频，但运动控制仍依赖于文本提示，导致需要大量提示工程和重复采样。微调方法虽然能实现显式控制，但需要大量数据整理和计算资源，且可能损害预训练模型的生成能力。因此需要探索无需训练的运动控制方法。
AI.method:
1. 通过扭曲查询的帧不变语义空间来操控DiT的3D全注意力
2. 发现查询变形的DiT预测的噪声自然引导扩散轨迹朝向期望运动
3. 进一步利用该噪声作为自引导进行潜在优化，提高控制稳定性和视觉质量
AI.result: 在最新的图像到视频DiT上，QWERTY在现有无需训练方法中实现了最有效的运动控制，性能与微调方法相当。
AI.conclusion: QWERTY成功实现了预训练图像到视频DiTs的灵活运动控制，无需额外训练即可达到与微调方法相当的性能，为DiTs的运动控制提供了新的训练免费解决方案。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 2D video generation (image-to-video DiTs) with motion control, which is a completely different application domain from 3D motion generation/synthesis in Computer Graphics. While both involve diffusion models, this paper focuses on controlling motion within generated 2D videos (pixel space), not on extracting or generating 3D skeletal motions or character animations. The research profile specifically targets 3D motion synthesis, semantic consistency between text and 3D motions, and using video priors for 3D generation - not video generation itself. This is a case of using similar methods (diffusion) but in a wrong application domain.

title: Multimodal Knowledge Edit-Scoped Generalization for Online Recursive MLLM Editing
summary: Online multimodal knowledge editing requires injecting a continual stream of visual-textual corrections into multimodal large language models (MLLMs) with bounded overhead and minimal disruption to unrelated behaviors. Existing editors mainly emphasize edit reliability and long-horizon stability, but rarely control the semantic boundary of each edit. Our pilot analyses of post-edit behaviors and internal neuronal activities reveal a scope gap behind reliable edits: instance-level success neither guarantees transfer to valid cross-modal variants nor prevents leakage to unrelated inputs, while edit-related cross-modal responses concentrate in deeper semantic layers. Therefore, we formulate Edit-Scoped Generalization, reframing online MLLM editing from merely correcting an instance to controlling the propagation boundary of each edit. To this end, we propose ScopeEdit, a scope-aware online editor that decomposes each update into a modality-local absorption branch and an evidence-gated shared generalization branch. The local branch supports stable edit absorption, whereas the shared branch enables cross-modal propagation only when visual and textual evidence are sufficiently aligned. Both branches perform scope-separated write geometries in orthogonal low-rank spaces and maintain branch-wise preconditioners via Sherman--Morrison recursions, yielding constant per-edit overhead. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks, long-horizon edit streams, MLLM backbones, real-world VLKEB scenarios, and complex vision-language architectures show that ScopeEdit consistently improves the trade-off between in-scope cross-modal transfer and out-of-scope locality, while preserving edit reliability, stability and online efficiency. Our code is available at https://github.com/lab-klc/ScopeEdit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ScopeEdit，一种针对多模态大语言模型(MLLM)的在线知识编辑方法，通过分解为模态局部吸收分支和证据门控共享泛化分支来控制编辑的传播边界，解决现有方法中实例级编辑成功无法保证跨模态迁移且可能泄露到无关输入的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有编辑器主要强调编辑可靠性和长期稳定性，但很少控制每个编辑的语义边界。初步分析发现：实例级成功既不能保证跨模态变体的迁移，也不能防止泄露到无关输入，且编辑相关的跨模态响应集中在更深层的语义层。因此提出"编辑范围泛化"问题，旨在控制每个编辑的传播边界。
AI.method: 提出ScopeEdit方法，包含两个分支：1)模态局部吸收分支支持稳定的编辑吸收；2)证据门控共享泛化分支仅当视觉和文本证据充分对齐时才启用跨模态传播。两个分支在正交低秩空间中执行范围分离的写入几何，并通过Sherman-Morrison递归保持分支-wise预条件器，实现恒定的每次编辑开销。
AI.result: 在多种基准测试、长视野编辑流、MLLM骨干网络、真实世界VLKEB场景和复杂视觉语言架构上的广泛实验表明，ScopeEdit持续改善了范围内跨模态迁移与范围外局部性之间的权衡，同时保持编辑可靠性、稳定性和在线效率。
AI.conclusion: ScopeEdit通过范围感知的编辑机制成功解决了多模态知识编辑中的边界控制问题，为在线MLLM编辑提供了一种有效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely irrelevant to the research profile. It focuses on knowledge editing for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) - specifically controlling edit propagation boundaries in LLMs. The application domain is entirely different: it's about LLM editing (NLP/ML field), not 3D motion generation from 2D videos (Computer Graphics). The methods discussed (modal-local absorption, evidence-gated branches) are LLM-specific techniques with no relevance to video generation models (Wan, Seedance), motion synthesis, or visual feature extraction for 3D generation. This paper does not address any of the stated pain points: domain gap between 2D/3D, quality assessment of video priors, semantic consistency for text-to-3D motion, or visual guidance feature extraction.

title: Descriptor: LYNRED Mobility Dataset Multimodal Detection Subset (LYNRED-MDS)
summary: Current road safety systems primarily focus on minimizing post-collision damage. However, advances in algorithmic perception are shifting focus toward early collision prediction, especially in lowvisibility conditions like nighttime or fog, where thermal infrared sensing outperforms both human vision and RGB imaging. While available RGB-infrared datasets such as FLIR ADAS and LLVIP are good benchmarks, they mostly consist of clear weather and overly simple scenarios. In this article, we introduce the LYNRED-MDS: Multimodal Detection Subset, a subset of the LYNRED Mobility Dataset, comprised of 4000 RGB-infrared image pairs captured under diverse weather, lighting, and road conditions around Grenoble, France. Our dataset spans varied driving contexts (urban, rural, mountainous, etc.) and a vehicle fleet compliant with Western European standards. Thermal cross-dataset evaluation using a YOLOv8n baseline suggests that our dataset offers strong generalization potential for pedestrian detection in driving scenarios. By covering critical edge cases, our dataset supports the development of more reliable and deployable vision systems for advanced driver-assistance systems.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了LYNRED-MDS数据集，一个用于夜间和低能见度场景的RGB-红外多模态行人检测数据集，包含4000对图像，涵盖多种天气、照明和道路条件。
AI.motivation: 现有道路安全系统主要关注碰撞后的损失最小化，而现有RGB-红外数据集（如FLIR ADAS和LLVIP）多为简单清晰天气场景。夜间或雾等低能见度条件下，热红外传感优于人眼和RGB成像，但缺乏具有挑战性的数据集。
AI.method: 构建LYNRED-MDS数据集，收集4000对RGB-红外图像，涵盖法国格勒诺布尔周边的多种天气、照明和道路条件（城市、农村、山区等），使用符合西欧标准的车辆。使用YOLOv8n基线模型进行跨数据集热成像评估。
AI.result: 数据集涵盖多种驾驶场景和边缘案例，YOLOv8n跨数据集评估表明该数据集对行人检测具有较强的泛化潜力。
AI.conclusion: LYNRED-MDS数据集通过覆盖关键边缘案例，可支持开发更可靠、更易部署的高级驾驶辅助系统（ADAS）视觉系统。

relevance_reason: This paper is about RGB-infrared pedestrian detection for autonomous driving/road safety using YOLOv8n. The application domain is completely different from the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics - specifically 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), and synthesizing 3D motions from 2D visual features. The methods (object detection vs motion synthesis/video generation) and pain points (pedestrian detection vs domain gap between 2D/3D, semantic consistency, quality assessment) are entirely unrelated. This is a computer vision paper for autonomous driving, not computer graphics.

title: Episodic-to-Semantic Consolidation Without Identity Drift
summary: Long-running adaptive intelligent agents face a structural tension between knowledge consolidation and information integrity. Memory consolidation is conventionally treated as an agent-changing operation: a model is fine-tuned, a prompt rewritten, a policy distilled, or a reflection appended to the context that governs future behaviour. In regulated autonomic deployment this is a liability because the agent operates under commitments and audit contracts that bind to a specific, cryptographically certified identity. We propose to treat consolidation not as a mutation of the planner or the identity manifest, but as a deterministic function f: M^ep -> M^sem over episodic memory whose output is a separately addressable semantic knowledge layer; the identity hash does not read M^sem, so consolidation updates knowledge without changing the agent's certified identity. We give a formal account of the agent representation, prove identity invariance through a structural lemma on the manifest's hash-input set, specify a deterministic aggregation algorithm whose outputs are auditable database rows with explicit confidence and supporting-event provenance, and validate the construction with synthetic experiments demonstrating per-field correctness, byte-equal identity across consolidation passes, and a mean 79.82% reduction in unproductive planner attempts (95% BCa CI [78.02%, 81.49%] across 10 seeds) against a calibrated Bayesian-shrunk baseline. The construction is a knowledge-update discipline for autonomic agents in which lessons accumulate as queryable facts while the agent's certified identity remains byte-equal across its operational lifetime, with an embodied service agent as the running case study.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将知识整合视为一种确定性函数 f: M^ep -> M^sem，而非改变智能体的规划器或身份清单，从而在保持智能体加密认证身份不变的情况下积累知识。该方法通过将语义知识层与身份哈希分离，使智能体能在监管 autonomic 部署中累积经验而不影响其认证身份。
AI.motivation: 在受监管的 autonomic 部署中，智能体在承诺和审计合约下运行，这些合约绑定到特定的加密认证身份。传统的记忆整合方式（模型微调、提示重写、策略提炼等）会改变智能体本身，导致身份变化，从而违反审计合约。因此需要一种在保持身份不变的前提下整合知识的方法。
AI.method: 1. 将整合定义为确定性函数 f: M^ep -> M^sem，建立单独可寻址的语义知识层；2. 形式化智能体表示，通过结构引理证明身份哈希不读取 M^sem，从而保证身份不变；3. 指定确定性聚合算法，输出具有明确置信度和支持事件来源的可审计数据库行；4. 用合成实验验证，包括逐字段正确性、跨整合轮次的字节级身份相等性。
AI.result: 实验表明：1. 逐字段正确性验证通过；2. 跨整合轮次保持字节级身份相等；3. 与校准的贝叶斯收缩基线相比，无效规划器尝试平均减少79.82%（95% BCa CI [78.02%, 81.49%]，10个种子）。
AI.conclusion: 该构造为 autonomic 智能体提供了一种知识更新规范：经验作为可查询事实积累，同时智能体的认证身份在其运营生命周期内保持字节级相等。以具身服务智能体作为运行案例研究。

relevance_reason: This paper is about knowledge consolidation and identity preservation in autonomous agents using cryptographic methods - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation models, or visual feature extraction. The application domain is multi-agent systems and cryptography, not any computer graphics or motion synthesis task. Zero overlap with the research profile's pain points or methods.

title: SAB-LVLM: Significance-Aware Binarization for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in multimodal understanding, yet their enormous parameter scale and cross-modal computation incur substantial memory and latency overhead, severely limiting real-world deployment on resource-constrained devices. Binarization offers an attractive solution by drastically reducing storage and computational costs. However, existing binarization methods neglect the varying importance of weights across different layers and modalities. This causes parameters irrelevant to downstream tasks to be unnecessarily retained, whereas modality-critical weights may not be adequately optimized, resulting in significant performance degradation. To address these challenges, we develop a novel \underline{S}ignificance-\underline{A}ware \underline{B}inarization for \underline{L}arge \underline{V}ision-\underline{L}anguage \underline{M}odels (SAB-LVLM). Specifically, after constructing Hessian matrices for textual and visual inputs, we propose a spatial significance map to distinguish full-precision weights activated under a single modality from those activated across modalities. We then devise a modality-guided integration strategy to obtain the significance-aware binarization map, which measures weight significance across layers and modalities. Subsequently, this binarization map is incorporated into the binarization objective as an error reweighting term, and binarization fitting is performed through an alternating significance-weighted update scheme. Extensive experiments illustrate the superiority of our SAB-LVLM over existing binary PTQ methods under an approximately 1-bit compression constraint. Our code is accessible at https://github.com/LyuQi127/SAB_LVLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对大型视觉语言模型(LVLMs)的新型二值化方法SAB-LVLM，通过构建 Hessian 矩阵和空间显著性图来区分不同模态下激活的权重，从而在约1比特压缩约束下实现优于现有二值化方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的二值化方法忽略了不同层和模态之间权重的重要性差异，导致与下游任务无关的参数被不必要保留，而模态关键权重未得到充分优化，从而造成显著的性能下降。
AI.method: 1. 为文本和视觉输入构建 Hessian 矩阵；2. 提出空间显著性图以区分单模态激活的权重与跨模态激活的权重；3. 设计模态引导集成策略获得显著性感知的二值化图；4. 将二值化图作为误差重新加权项纳入二值化目标；5. 通过交替显著性加权更新方案进行二值化拟合。
AI.result: 在约1比特压缩约束下，SAB-LVLM 优于现有的二值化 PTQ 方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过考虑权重在不同层和模态下的重要性差异，SAB-LVLM 能够在大幅降低存储和计算成本的同时，有效缓解性能下降问题，为在资源受限设备上部署 LVLMs 提供了可行的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about model compression/binarization for Large Vision-Language Models, which is completely unrelated to the research profile. The research profile is in Computer Graphics focusing on 3D motion generation from videos, while this paper addresses neural network quantization (compressing LVLMs to ~1 bit using Hessian matrices and significance maps). None of the pain points (domain gap between 2D/3D, quality assessment for motion synthesis, semantic consistency for 3D motions) are addressed. The methods are entirely different - this is about model optimization, not video-to-motion synthesis or visual feature extraction for 3D generation.

title: Traceable Fault Diagnosis for Battery Energy Storage Systems via Retrieval-Augmented Multi-Agent O&M Assistant
summary: Large-scale battery energy storage systems (BESSs) require O&M decisions that combine alarms, cell-level measurements, device topology, diagnostic tables, historical cases, and maintenance documents. Monitoring platforms can flag threshold violations, but they often cannot explain whether voltage inconsistency, resistance drift, short-circuit risk, capacity divergence, or thermal abnormality needs intervention. This digest presents a traceable BESS fault-diagnosis assistant that uses retrieval-augmented multi-agent reasoning to connect operational data, domain knowledge, visual evidence, and report generation. Reliability is improved through BESS-specific task routing, schema-constrained natural-language database access, hybrid text-image retrieval, and evidence-based answer synthesis. Preliminary internal evaluation is reported for routing, database access, and diagnostic reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种可追溯的电池储能系统（BESS）故障诊断助手，利用检索增强的多智能体推理连接运营数据、领域知识、视觉证据和报告生成。
AI.motivation: 大型BESS需要结合报警、电池级测量、设备拓扑、诊断表、历史案例和维护文档的运维决策；现有监控平台能标记阈值违规，但无法解释电压不一致、电阻漂移、短路风险、容量差异或热异常是否需要干预。
AI.method: 采用检索增强的多智能体推理，通过BESS特定任务路由、模式约束的自然语言数据库访问、混合文本图像检索和基于证据的答案合成来提高可靠性。
AI.result: 报告了路由、数据库访问和诊断推理的初步内部评估结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过BESS特定任务路由、模式约束的自然语言数据库访问、混合文本图像检索和基于证据的答案合成，可靠性得到改善。

relevance_reason: This paper is about battery energy storage systems (BESS) fault diagnosis using retrieval-augmented multi-agent systems - an energy/operations & maintenance application. It has NO relevance to the Computer Graphics research profile which focuses on 2D-3D domain gap, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), 3D motion generation, text-to-motion synthesis, and visual feature extraction. The application domains are completely different (energy systems vs. computer graphics/motion synthesis).

title: Diversity-aware View Partitioning for Scalable VGGT
summary: Geometry transformers such as VGGT achieve strong performance by jointly reasoning over multiple views with global attention. However, scaling them to large view collections remains challenging due to the quadratic cost of attention. Moreover, our empirical analysis reveals that the reconstruction quality in VGGT is sensitive to the distribution of viewpoints. Simply increasing the number of views without sufficient viewpoint diversity can even degrade performance, as redundant views introduce highly similar tokens that dilute informative geometric signals in the attention mechanism. Motivated by this observation, we propose a training-free and plug-and-play VGGT inference framework that organizes views into diversity-aware balanced chunks. The chunks are constructed through combinatorial graph partitioning over visual dissimilarity and spatial dispersion. This view organization allows the transformer to focus attention on geometrically informative views while reducing redundant attention interactions. To estimate spatial dispersion without full pose estimation, we approximate spatial relationships via a soft pose propagation strategy based on visual similarity from a small set of seed frames. Extensive experiments demonstrate improved performance in camera pose estimation, multi-view depth prediction, and 3D reconstruction while reducing memory usage and inference latency. Our framework also complements existing VGGT variants, enabling scalable multi-view reconstruction without sacrificing geometric fidelity.

AI.tldr: 针对VGGT处理大视角集合时的计算成本高和视角冗余问题，提出无需训练的多样性感知视图分块推理框架，通过图分割组织视角提升效率和质量。
AI.motivation: 解决VGGT几何Transformer在扩展到大规模视图集合时的二次方注意力成本问题，同时应对视角分布敏感性导致的重建质量下降问题。研究发现简单增加视图数量而不增加视角多样性反而会降低性能，因为冗余视图引入的相似token会稀释注意力机制中的几何信号。
AI.method: 提出一种无需训练、即插即用的VGGT推理框架，通过组合图分割方法将视图组织成多样性感知平衡块。该方法基于视觉差异性和空间分散性进行分区，并采用软姿态传播策略从少量种子帧估计空间关系以估算空间分散程度。
AI.result: 在相机姿态估计、多视图深度预测和3D重建任务上实现性能提升，同时降低内存占用和推理延迟。该框架可与现有VGGT变体配合使用，实现可扩展的多视图重建。
AI.conclusion: 通过多样性感知的视图组织策略，可有效解决Transformer在大规模视图场景下的计算效率和几何保真度之间的权衡问题，为可扩展的多视图重建提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: The paper is in Computer Graphics but addresses a DIFFERENT application domain. While the research profile focuses on 3D MOTION generation from videos (temporal, animation), this paper focuses on 3D RECONSTRUCTION from multi-view images (spatial, static geometry). Both use visual features but solve fundamentally different problems: motion synthesis vs. geometry reconstruction. The methods (VGGT, graph partitioning) are also different from those in the research profile (VLM, video generation models like Wan/Seedance, motion generation).

title: InduceKV: Fixed-Footprint Continual Adaptation of Multimodal LLMs via Inducing KV Memories
summary: Multimodal large language models must adapt to evolving tasks and domains, yet continual improvement under bounded deployment footprint remains difficult because repeated parameter updates or growing replay stores can accumulate adaptation state over time. We study fixed-footprint continual adaptation: the deployed adaptation state is kept under a fixed memory budget, while the backbone model is left unchanged and task-specific updates are externalized. We propose InduceKV, a retrieval-based method that stores each selected training prefix as an attention-ready memory entry, consisting of a frozen retrieval key and compact layerwise key--value (KV) payloads that can be appended to the model's self-attention cache. Under a strict memory budget, InduceKV constructs a compact inducing set through bilevel selection: a lightweight calibration is fit for retrieval, while the selected memory balances current-task likelihood, anchor-based retention, and coverage in the frozen retrieval space. Across task-incremental instruction tuning, continual VQA, domain-incremental adaptation, and lifelong multimodal instruction tuning, InduceKV consistently improves over PEFT, MoE, replay, and prompt-retrieval baselines under matched memory budgets. We further report backbone-matched, stage-1 CoIN, compute-matched, and scalability diagnostics, showing that the gains are not due to a stronger backbone, replay alone, or an unbounded candidate pool.

AI.tldr: InduceKV是一种基于检索的持续学习方法，通过将训练前缀存储为带有冻结检索键和紧凑分层KV载荷的注意力就绪记忆条目，在固定内存预算下实现多模态大型语言模型的持续适应。该方法通过双层选择构建紧凑诱导集，在多个任务持续适应场景中一致优于PEFT、MoE、回放和提示检索基线方法。
AI.motivation: 多模态大型语言模型需要适应不断演变的任务和领域，但持续改进在有限部署空间下变得困难，因为重复参数更新或增长的回放存储会随时间积累适应状态。研究固定足迹持续适应：保持部署的适应状态在固定内存预算内，同时保持骨干模型不变并将任务特定更新外部化。
AI.method: 提出InduceKV，一种基于检索的方法，将每个选定的训练前缀存储为注意力就绪的记忆条目，由冻结的检索键和紧凑的分层键值(KV)载荷组成，可附加到模型的自我注意力缓存中。在严格内存预算下，通过双层选择构建紧凑诱导集：轻量级校准用于检索，而选定的记忆平衡当前任务似然、锚点保持和冻结检索空间中的覆盖率。
AI.result: 在任务增量指令调优、持续VQA、领域增量适应和终身多模态指令调优中，InduceKV在匹配的内存预算下始终优于PEFT、MoE、回放和提示检索基线。进一步报告了骨干匹配、阶段1 CoIN、计算匹配和可扩展性诊断，表明增益并非来自更强的骨干、回放 alone 或无界候选池。
AI.conclusion: InduceKV通过外部化任务特定适应状态到紧凑的记忆条目中，在固定内存约束下成功实现持续适应。该方法的双层选择机制有效平衡了任务性能与知识保留，为资源受限场景下的多模态模型持续学习提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about continual adaptation of multimodal LLMs (NLP/ML field) with focus on memory-efficient training and KV cache management. The research profile is about Computer Graphics specifically for 3D motion generation from 2D videos, quality assessment, and semantic consistency.
