The application domains are entirely different - this paper does not address any computer graphics, motion synthesis, or video-to-3D generation tasks.

title: FoundDP: Revisiting Weak Disparity Observability in Dual-Pixel Depth Estimation
summary: Dual-pixel (DP) imaging enables metric depth estimation from a single camera using sub-aperture disparity. However, the extremely small effective baseline limits disparity observability, leading to structural degradation and depth failure in textureless, low-contrast, or downsampled regions. Existing DP-based methods rely primarily on local disparity cues and therefore become unreliable when disparity signals are weak or ambiguous. To address this limitation, we propose \emph{FoundDP}, a unified framework that integrates metric DP depth with global structural priors from a monocular depth foundation model. Our method preserves metric scale through DP-derived depth and leverages Vision Transformer (ViT) features to restore structural consistency in weak-disparity regions. To ensure reliable metric guidance under DP imaging conditions, we identify and mitigate ViT representation degradation induced by DP defocus blur via ViT feature alignment, enabling stable metric-guided depth estimation. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world DP benchmarks show that FoundDP delivers superior performance, with consistent gains in structural fidelity and metric accuracy, especially under reduced disparity observability. Code will be available at: https://github.com/EchoLighting/FoundDP

AI.tldr: FoundDP是一种统一框架，将双像素(DP)度量深度与单目深度基础模型的全局结构先验相结合，解决DP成像中因基线过小导致的结构退化和深度估计失败问题。
AI.motivation: 双像素成像的极小有效基线限制了视差可观测性，在无纹理、低对比度或降采样区域导致结构退化和深度估计失败，现有方法主要依赖局部视差线索，在视差信号弱或模糊时不可靠。
AI.method: 提出FoundDP框架，通过DP导出深度保持度量尺度，利用ViT特征在弱视差区域恢复结构一致性；识别并缓解DP散焦模糊引起的ViT表征退化，通过ViT特征对齐确保可靠的度量引导。
AI.result: 在合成和真实DP基准数据集上实验表明，FoundDP在结构保真度和度量精度方面具有优异性能，特别是在降低视差可观测性条件下仍能保持一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: FoundDP通过融合DP度量深度与单目深度基础模型的全局结构先验，有效解决了DP成像中弱视差区域的深度估计难题，为单相机度量深度估计提供了新的解决思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about dual-pixel depth estimation in computer vision, which is completely different from the research profile's focus on 3D motion generation from videos in Computer Graphics. While point 4 mentions "extracting visual guidance features from 2D videos for 3D generation," this paper addresses depth estimation from dual-pixel images, not video-based motion synthesis. The application domains are entirely different: the profile needs video-to-3D-motion generation, while the paper is about passive depth sensing. Methods also don't match - the profile needs VLM, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), and 3D motion generation models, whereas this paper uses ViT for depth estimation.

title: Hidden Forgetting in Continual Multimodal Learning: When Accuracy Survives but Grounding Fails
summary: Multimodal large language models must continually adapt to evolving tasks and domains, yet standard continual learning metrics mainly measure whether old answers remain correct, leaving the stability of multimodal grounding largely unexamined. We study this overlooked failure mode and ask whether a continually adapted MLLM can preserve not only what it answers, but also how it uses visual, textual, OCR, chart, and document evidence. We identify \emph{hidden evidence-use forgetting}, where answer accuracy is retained while the model silently shifts toward different or less grounded evidence channels, and propose \textsc{RCL}, a replay-free reliance-constrained continual learning framework. \textsc{RCL} freezes the previous checkpoint as a behavioral reference, estimates teacher and student evidence-reliance profiles through counterfactual channel interventions, and jointly optimizes task learning, prediction preservation, and reliance preservation without adding inference-time cost. Across CoIN, COAST, MCITlib, and an evidence-sensitive multimodal stream, \textsc{RCL} consistently improves final performance and reduces forgetting over replay-free, PEFT, routing, and memory-assisted baselines, while substantially lowering modality reliance drift, dominant evidence flips, and hidden forgetting rates. These results suggest that robust continual multimodal learning requires preserving the evidence path behind correct answers, not merely the answers themselves.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多模态大语言模型(MLLM)在持续学习中的"隐藏证据使用遗忘"问题：模型保持答案正确但证据引用方式发生偏移。提出RCL框架，通过冻结前一轮检查点作为行为参考，利用反事实通道干预估计师生证据依赖档案，联合优化任务学习、预测保持和依赖保持，在不增加推理成本的情况下显著提升性能并降低遗忘。
AI.motivation: 标准持续学习指标主要衡量旧答案是否保持正确，而忽视了多模态证据接地的稳定性。当MLLM持续适应新任务时，可能出现答案准确但证据引用方式悄然改变的情况，这种"隐藏证据使用遗忘"此前未被充分研究。
AI.method: 提出RCL(Reliance-Constrained Continual Learning)框架：1)冻结前一检查点作为行为参考；2)通过反事实通道干预估计教师和学生模型的证据依赖档案；3)联合优化任务学习、预测保持和依赖保持三个目标；4)无需重放机制，不增加推理时间成本。
AI.result: 在CoIN、COAST、MCITlib及证据敏感多模态流上，RCL相比无重放、PEFT、路由和记忆辅助基线方法，在最终性能、遗忘减少、模态依赖漂移、主导证据翻转和隐藏遗忘率等指标上均取得显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 稳健的持续多模态学习不仅需要保持答案本身，更需要保持正确答案背后的证据路径。这一发现表明多模态证据接地的稳定性是评估持续学习效果的关键维度。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about continual learning in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) - addressing the "hidden evidence usage forgetting" problem where models maintain correct answers but shift evidence citation methods. The research profile is about Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion generation from 2D videos using video generation models (Wan, Seedance), VLM-based quality supervision, and two-stage pipelines. These are entirely different research domains with no overlap - this is AI/ML research about model training stability, not computer graphics or motion synthesis. The paper does not address any of the pain points: domain gap between 2D/3D, quality assessment for motion synthesis, semantic consistency in text-to-3D, or visual feature extraction for 3D generation.

title: Rethinking Post-Hoc Calibration in Semantic Segmentation
summary: Reliable confidence estimates are essential in semantic segmentation, especially in safety-critical settings where overconfident errors can mislead downstream decisions. Yet modern segmentation models often remain miscalibrated. Post-hoc calibration offers a practical way to correct confidence estimates without retraining the segmentation model, but its use in dense prediction raises structural issues that are often overlooked. We study two such issues. First, adding a constant to all logits leaves the softmax probabilities unchanged, but several standard calibrators can still depend on this arbitrary offset. As a result, two logit representations encoding the same predictive distribution may yield different calibrated probabilities. We define translation-invariant (TI) calibrators as those whose outputs are unchanged under such shifts, characterize which common calibrators satisfy this property, and construct TI counterparts of shift-sensitive calibrators to isolate the effect of removing representation dependence. Second, post-hoc calibration is typically fitted by minimizing a likelihood-based objective, whereas segmentation models are trained with task-specific metrics such as Dice. This mismatch can cause calibration to alter class orderings and degrade the deployed segmentation map. We study decision-preserving calibration under argmax- and order-preservation constraints. Since enforcing these constraints collapses affine softmax calibrators to temperature scaling, we introduce class-conditional affine calibrators that can be made argmax- or order-preserving while retaining greater expressivity, allowing us to quantify the calibration-segmentation trade-off induced by decision preservation. Across natural-image and medical segmentation benchmarks, and under corruption-based covariate shift, matched comparisons show that TI variants generally improve calibration metrics, while decision-preserving variants prevent segmentation degradation and retain strong calibration performance. These results provide practical design principles for well-defined post-hoc calibration pipelines in semantic segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究语义分割中后处理校准的两个结构性问题：1) 某些校准器对logit的任意平移敏感，导致相同预测分布产生不同校准概率；2) 校准优化目标（似然）与分割训练目标（Dice）不匹配，可能改变类别顺序。作者提出平移不变(TI)校准器和决策保持校准器来解决这些问题。
AI.motivation: 在安全关键的语义分割场景中，过度自信的错误会误导下游决策，但现代分割模型通常存在校准不足的问题。后处理校准可以在不重训练模型的情况下修正置信度估计，但其在密集预测中的结构性问题常被忽视。
AI.method: 1) 定义平移不变(TI)校准器，构建TI版本的敏感校准器；2) 在argmax保持和顺序保持约束下研究决策保持校准；3) 引入类别条件仿射校准器以在保持决策的同时保留表达能力。
AI.result: 在自然图像和医学分割基准及腐蚀-based协变量偏移下，平移不变变体通常改善校准指标，决策保持变体防止分割性能下降并保持强劲校准表现。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为语义分割中定义良好的后处理校准流程提供了实用设计原则。

relevance_reason: This paper is about post-hoc calibration in 2D semantic segmentation (computer vision/image analysis), which is completely unrelated to the research profile focused on 3D motion generation in Computer Graphics. The application domains are entirely different: semantic segmentation calibration vs. video-to-3D motion synthesis. The methods (post-hoc calibration techniques like temperature scaling) have no relevance to video generation models, VLM-based quality supervision, or 3D motion generation pipelines. This is a Computer Vision paper that does not address any of the stated pain points about 2D-to-3D domain gaps, motion synthesis, or video-based visual guidance for 3D generation.

title: PACE: A Proxy for Agentic Capability Evaluation
summary: Evaluating LLM agents on benchmarks like SWE-Bench and GAIA can be expensive, time-consuming, and requires complex infrastructure. A single evaluation can cost thousands of dollars and take days to complete. In contrast, non-agentic LLM benchmarks that test individual capabilities (e.g., reasoning, code generation) are fast and cheap to run. In this paper, we investigate whether performance on expensive agentic benchmarks can be accurately predicted by the performance on a small, carefully selected subset of atomic evaluation instances. We introduce PACE, a framework that constructs proxy benchmarks by selecting instances from existing non-agentic evaluations whose aggregate scores most reliably predict model performances on agentic benchmarks. Given a pool of candidate instances spanning atomic capabilities, PACE fits a regression that maps a model's scores on a compact subset of source instances to its score on the target agentic benchmark. The subset itself is curated by combining two complementary instance-selection strategies, target-relevance local selection and globally informative global selection. We apply PACE to the 4 target agentic benchmarks in this paper, which yields PACE-Bench, the concrete proxy benchmark that we evaluate in the paper. Experiments across 14 models, 4 agentic benchmarks, and 19 non-agentic benchmarks show that PACE-Bench predicts agentic scores with leave-one-out cross-validation (LOOCV) mean absolute error (MAE) under 4%, Spearman correlation above 0.80, and pairwise model-ranking accuracy around 85%, all at much less than 1% of the full agentic evaluation cost. We further analyze the selected proxy instances, revealing which skills each agentic benchmark uniquely demands. PACE enables practitioners to obtain reliable estimates of agentic performance during model development, selection, and routing, without the overhead of full agent evaluation.

AI.tldr: PACE是一个框架，通过从非代理基准测试中选择少量原子评估实例来预测模型在代理基准测试（如SWE-Bench、GAIA）上的性能，从而大幅降低评估成本和时间。
AI.motivation: 代理基准测试评估成本高昂（单次评估数千美元，需数天完成），而非代理基准测试快速且廉价。研究目的是探索是否可以通过少量精心选择的原子评估实例准确预测代理基准测试表现。
AI.method: PACE结合两种实例选择策略：目标相关性局部选择（target-relevance local selection）和全局信息性全局选择（global selection），从现有非代理评估池中选取最能预测代理基准测试性能的实例子集，然后拟合回归模型将模型在源实例上的分数映射到目标代理基准测试分数。
AI.result: 实验涵盖14个模型、4个代理基准测试和19个非代理基准测试，结果显示：留一交叉验证（LOOCV）平均绝对误差（MAE）低于4%，Spearman相关系数超过0.80，成对模型排序准确率约85%，且成本不到完整代理评估的1%。
AI.conclusion: PACE使从业者能够在模型开发、选择和路由过程中获得可靠的代理性能估计，无需承担完整代理评估的开销，为高效评估LLM代理能力提供了可行方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI agent capability evaluation and benchmarking (predicting performance on SWE-Bench, GAIA), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video synthesis, or any of the specified pain points. The application domain is entirely different - it deals with AI evaluation methodology, not visual/motion synthesis. The methods (instance selection, regression models) have no overlap with the required methods (VLM, video generation models, motion generation models).

title: SFKD: Spatial--Frequency Joint-Aware Heterogeneous Knowledge Distillation via Multi-Level Wavelet Spectral Interaction
summary: Most existing knowledge distillation methods focus on homogeneous models (e.g., CNN-to-CNN), thereby overlooking the flexibility and potential of knowledge transfer across heterogeneous models. Due to intrinsic inductive bias discrepancies between heterogeneous models that cause spatial distribution inconsistencies, prior heterogeneous distillation methods often weaken or discard spatial information in heterogeneous representations. However, the spatial information in representations often encodes transferable global structural semantics as well as architecture-specific local details, and therefore should not be directly ignored. To better leverage the spatial information encoded in heterogeneous representations, we propose a Spatial-Frequency Joint-Aware Heterogeneous Knowledge Distillation framework (SFKD). By leveraging the complementary properties of wavelet transform spatial locality and Fourier representations in characterizing global energy distributions, we first apply multi-level discrete wavelet transform to explicitly decouple spatial information. The resulting wavelet sub-bands are further refined by a dual-stream dual-stage refinement module, and finally combined with a Gaussian-filtered frequency loss to selectively capture informative global information. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets under both homogeneous and heterogeneous models demonstrate the superiority of our method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SFKD框架，通过小波变换和傅里叶表示的互补性，解决异构模型知识蒸馏中的空间分布不一致问题，实现跨架构的有效知识转移。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法多关注同构模型，忽略了异构模型间知识迁移的潜力。异构模型间的内在归纳偏置差异导致空间分布不一致，以往的异构蒸馏方法往往削弱或丢弃空间信息，但这些空间信息包含了可迁移的全剧结构语义和特定架构的局部细节，不应被直接忽略。
AI.method: 提出空间-频率联合感知的异构知识蒸馏框架(SFKD)。1)利用小波变换的空间局部性和傅里叶表示的全局能量分布特征，应用多级离散小波变换显式解耦空间信息；2)通过双流双阶段 refinement 模块进一步细化小波子带；3)结合高斯滤波频率损失选择性地捕获信息性的全局信息。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，涵盖同构和异构模型场景，证明了该方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: SFKD框架能够有效利用异构表示中的空间信息，通过小波变换和傅里叶表示的互补性，实现跨异构架构的知识有效传递，为异构知识蒸馏提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about heterogeneous knowledge distillation using wavelet/Fourier transforms - a general machine learning/model compression technique. It is NOT about Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), or any of the specific application domains in the research profile. While it uses wavelet transforms for visual feature processing, the application is model knowledge transfer, not 3D motion synthesis from 2D videos. The pain points (domain gap between 2D-3D, quality assessment, semantic consistency) are completely unaddressed. This is a different field entirely.

title: Algebraic Model Counting for Global Analysis of Optimal Decision Trees
comment: Proc. Joint European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases (ECML-PKDD 2026), LNCS, Naples, Italy, 7-11 September 2026
summary: Ensuring model reliability in Explainable AI requires a global assessment of the hypothesis space. We propose a formal framework for the exhaustive analysis of optimal and near-optimal decision trees, called Algebraic Decision Tree Counting (ADTC). Inspired by Algebraic Model Counting (AMC) in knowledge representation, ADTC reformulates diverse analytical tasks, such as optimization, counting, and sampling, into a unified sum-of-products computation over a semiring $R$. While the hypothesis space of decision trees is doubly exponential with respect to the maximum depth $Δ$, our dynamic programming algorithm achieves $O^*(n^{O(Δ)})$ time complexity in the number of features $n$, where $O^*$ suppresses polynomial factors. To handle complex constraints consisting of multiple tree metrics, we introduce model behavior tensors that aggregate semiring values via convolution products over a tensor semiring. This algebraic approach efficiently constructs a model profile that captures the global landscape and trade-offs between criteria such as accuracy, size, and fairness. We demonstrate the utility of our software, emtrees, on real-world datasets, illustrating how ADTC facilitates evidence-based model selection in sensitive domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为代数决策树计数(ADTC)的形式化框架，用于对最优和近最优决策树进行全面分析。该框架将优化、计数和采样等不同分析任务统一转换为半环上的和-积计算，通过动态规划算法在特征数n上实现O*(n^O(Δ))的时间复杂度（Δ为最大深度），并引入模型行为张量处理多指标约束问题。
AI.motivation: 可解释人工智能中确保模型可靠性需要对假设空间进行全局评估。现有方法难以同时处理决策树优化、计数和采样等多种分析任务，且现有假设空间相对于最大深度呈双重指数增长，难以进行高效分析。
AI.method: 提出ADTC框架，将各种分析任务统一转换为半环R上的和-积计算；开发动态规划算法实现O*(n^O(Δ))时间复杂度；引入模型行为张量通过卷积积聚半环值以处理复杂约束。
AI.result: 开发了名为emtrees的软件工具，在真实数据集上演示了ADTC框架的实用性，能够有效构建捕捉全局景观和权衡关系的模型档案，同时考虑准确性、大小和公平性等多个标准。
AI.conclusion: ADTC框架为决策树的全局分析提供了有效形式化方法，能够支持敏感领域中的循证模型选择，为可解释人工智能的模型可靠性评估提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about algebraic decision tree counting for explainable AI - a completely different field. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), Visual Language Models, or any of the motion synthesis methods mentioned in the research profile. The paper addresses decision tree optimization and analysis in interpretable ML, which is unrelated to the visual computing and motion synthesis domain specified in the profile.

title: Towards Real-World Ultrasound Understanding: Large Vision-Language Models from Multi-Image Examinations with Long-Form Reports
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have achieved strong performance across many medical imaging tasks, yet their application to ultrasound remains limited due to its inherent complexity and variability. In this work, we revisit what is truly needed to enable real-world ultrasound understanding. Instead of introducing complex architectures or elaborate training strategies, we show that data scale and clinically faithful data alignment are the key factors. We construct a large-scale dataset of 1.5M real-world ultrasound examinations, containing 17.7M images, multi-organ coverage, and paired uncurated clinical reports. Crucially, we organize the data at the examination level, aligning multiple images with their corresponding reports to reflect real clinical workflows. We then fine-tune a standard LVLM using low-rank adaptation (LoRA) on this dataset without task-specific modifications. Surprisingly, this simple recipe already leads to strong performance across diverse ultrasound understanding tasks, outperforming prior methods designed with more complex pipelines. Beyond these results, we present model and data scaling analyses that provide insights into the role of scale in ultrasound LVLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了大规模数据和临床对齐的超声数据是实现高质量超声理解的关键，而非复杂的架构或训练策略。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型(LVLMs)在许多医学影像任务中表现出色，但在超声领域的应用仍然有限，因为超声图像具有复杂的特性和变异性。
AI.method: 构建了包含150万次真实超声检查的大规模数据集(1770万张图像)，覆盖多个器官，并配对未整理的临床报告。数据按检查级别组织，将多张图像与相应报告对齐以反映真实临床工作流程。然后使用低秩适配(LoRA)对该标准LVLM进行微调，无需针对特定任务进行修改。
AI.result: 这个简单的方法在各种超声理解任务上表现出色，优于之前设计的更复杂流程的方法。
AI.conclusion: 数据和模型规模的扩展是超声LVLMs的关键因素，简单的数据驱动方法可以超越复杂的专门设计。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically 3D motion generation from 2D videos using VLMs and video generation models. The paper is about medical ultrasound imaging interpretation using LVLMs. These are entirely different application domains (computer graphics/visual effects vs medical imaging), despite both using Vision Language Models. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points about domain gap between 2D visual features and 3D motion representation, video-to-motion synthesis, or quality assessment for motion generation.

title: Evidence-State Rewards for Long-Context Reasoning
summary: Long-context reasoning requires models to locate, revise, and synthesize evidence distributed across lengthy inputs. Existing long-context RL methods usually reward final answers or static evidence extraction, offering little feedback on how intermediate actions change the model's evidence state. We propose Maven, a reinforcement learning framework with an editable evidence memory. Maven defines an answer-conditioned evidence-state value and rewards action-level state transitions: add actions are credited by marginal gain and hindsight contribution, link actions by evidence synergy, and drop actions by improved answer support after removing misleading evidence. These rewards are assigned to the corresponding action spans in GRPO. Across Llama and Qwen models on LongBench v2, LongReason, and RULER, Maven outperforms outcome-only RL and evidence-identification baselines, producing more sufficient evidence sets and lower distractor retention. Our results show that long-context RL benefits from optimizing stateful evidence navigation rather than one-shot evidence extraction.

AI.tldr: Maven提出一种基于可编辑证据记忆的长上下文推理强化学习框架，通过动作级状态转换奖励（添加、链接、丢弃证据）来优化模型的证据导航能力，而非仅奖励最终答案。
AI.motivation: 现有长上下文RL方法仅奖励最终答案或静态证据提取，缺乏对中间动作如何改变模型证据状态的反馈，无法有效指导模型进行状态化的证据导航。
AI.method: Maven定义了一种答案条件下的证据状态价值函数，并设计三类奖励：1)添加动作根据边际增益和后见贡献给予奖励；2)链接动作根据证据协同性奖励；3)丢弃动作根据移除误导证据后答案支持改善程度奖励。这些奖励在GRPO中分配给对应的动作跨度。
AI.result: 在Llama和Qwen模型上，通过LongBench v2、LongReason和RULER数据集测试，Maven优于仅奖励结果的RL方法和证据识别基线，产生了更充分的证据集和更低的干扰项保留率。
AI.conclusion: 长上下文RL受益于优化状态化证据导航而非一次性证据提取，表明中间推理过程的可追踪性和细粒度奖励对长文本推理任务至关重要。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about long-context reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs) using reinforcement learning for evidence navigation - a natural language processing task. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video synthesis, or any of the visual/motion domains mentioned in the research profile. The application domain is entirely different (NLP vs. computer graphics/motion synthesis).

title: Robust Image Processing Techniques for Construction Environment Monitoring Using Underwater Robots
summary: This paper proposes a robust image processing framework for underwater robot-based construction environment monitoring, targeting complex degradations observed in real marine environments. Unlike conventional approaches that mainly consider absorption and backscattering, real underwater imagery is strongly affected by depth-dependent forward scattering blur and particle-induced degradations such as marine snow. To address this, we introduce a staged processing pipeline that sequentially models background degradation via depth-aware forward scattering and foreground degradation using realistic marine snow patterns extracted from real images. The resulting synthetic data are used to retrain an existing Joint-ID network without modifying its architecture, enabling an isolated evaluation of dataset realism. In addition, a lightweight post-processing scheme is applied to enhance contrast and structural clarity. Experiments on real underwater datasets collected in Korean coastal environments demonstrate consistent improvements in visual quality and UIQM scores. The results indicate that explicitly modeling forward scattering and realistic particle effects effectively reduces the synthetic-to-real gap and improves practical applicability in real-world underwater robotic operations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对水下机器人施工环境监测的鲁棒图像处理框架，通过分阶段处理管道模拟真实海洋环境中的前向散射模糊和海洋雪粒子降质，使用合成数据重新训练Joint-ID网络，并在真实韩国沿海数据集上验证了视觉质量和UIQM分数的提升。
AI.motivation: 真实水下图像受到深度依赖的前向散射模糊和海洋雪粒子降质的强烈影响，现有方法主要考虑吸收和后向散射，未能充分建模这些复杂退化问题，导致合成数据与真实数据之间存在显著差距。
AI.method: 提出分阶段处理管道：1) 通过深度感知的前向散射建模背景退化；2) 从真实图像提取海洋雪模式模拟前景退化；3) 使用合成数据重新训练现有Joint-ID网络而不修改其架构；4) 应用轻量级后处理增强对比度和结构清晰度。
AI.result: 在韩国沿海环境采集的真实水下数据集上实验表明，视觉质量和UIQM分数均获得一致提升，有效缩小了合成到真实的差距。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模前向散射和真实粒子效应可有效减少合成到真实的域迁移差距，提高水下机器人实际作业的适用性。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), text-to-3D motion synthesis, and extracting visual features for 3D generation. The paper is about underwater robotics and image processing for construction environment monitoring - dealing with marine snow, forward scattering blur, and underwater image quality enhancement. Despite both mentioning "visual feature extraction," the contexts are entirely different: one is for 3D motion synthesis, the other is for underwater image enhancement. This paper would not help someone working on 3D motion generation from video priors.

title: SUNTA: Hierarchical Video Prediction with Surprise-based Chunking
summary: Hierarchical state-space models (HSSMs) offer a promising approach to long-horizon prediction by segmenting sequences into temporal chunks. However, their performance hinges on how chunk boundaries are determined. While prior HSSMs typically rely on fixed-length chunking or similarity-based boundary detection, these methods often misalign with the intrinsic temporal structure of the data. We argue that chunking should instead be driven by prediction errors, which more directly indicate when longer-range context becomes necessary. Nevertheless, integrating surprise-based chunking into HSSMs introduces critical challenges, including hierarchical collapse during end-to-end training and the absence of surprise signals during open-loop prediction. To address these issues, we propose Surprise-based Nested Temporal Abstraction (SUNTA), a method that employs a decoupled training strategy to preserve surprise signals and uses internal inconsistency as a top-down surprise metric to determine chunk boundaries within imagined rollouts. Experiments on video prediction tasks in 2D and 3D environments demonstrate that SUNTA outperforms baselines, uniquely maintaining accurate predictions over 250 timesteps, whereas all baselines degrade within the first 10 timesteps.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SUNTA方法，通过基于预测误差（surprise）的分块策略解决层次状态空间模型在长时域预测中的问题，采用解耦训练策略保持surprise信号，并使用内部不一致性作为顶层surprise度量来确定想象 rollout 中的分块边界。实验表明该方法在2D和3D视频预测任务上表现优异，能在250步预测中保持准确度，而基线方法在10步内就出现退化。
AI.motivation: 现有层次状态空间模型(HSSM)依赖固定长度分块或相似性检测来确定分块边界，与数据内在时间结构不对齐。作者认为分块应由预测误差驱动，因为预测误差更能直接表明何时需要更长范围的上下文。然而，将基于surprise的分块集成到HSSM中面临关键挑战：端到端训练期间的层次坍塌，以及开环预测时缺少surprise信号。
AI.method: 提出Surprise-based Nested Temporal Abstraction (SUNTA)方法，包含两个核心创新：1) 采用解耦训练策略保持surprise信号；2) 使用内部不一致性作为自上而下的surprise度量，在想象rollout中确定分块边界。
AI.result: 在2D和3D环境的视频预测任务上的实验表明，SUNTA显著优于基线方法。它是唯一能够保持250步准确预测的方法，而所有基线方法在10步内就出现性能退化。
AI.conclusion: 基于预测误差驱动分块边界的策略是有效的，SUNTA通过解耦训练和内部不一致性度量成功解决了层次坍塌和surprise信号缺失的问题，为长时域预测提供了有效方案。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses VIDEO PREDICTION (predicting future video frames in pixel space), not 3D MOTION GENERATION (generating skeletal/articulated 3D motion from 2D videos). This is a fundamentally different application domain - video prediction is about forecasting visual content, while the research profile is about extracting 3D human motion from 2D video inputs. The methods are also completely different: this paper uses hierarchical state space models with surprise-based chunking, whereas the profile focuses on VLM-based quality supervision, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), and two-stage pipelines for motion synthesis. The paper mentions "3D video" but refers to 3D environment video prediction (like 3D scene videos), not 3D skeletal motion generation. No relevant overlap in domain or methodology.

title: Sparse-Aware Vector Quantization for Bandwidth-Efficient Collaborative 3D Semantic Occupancy Prediction
summary: Collaborative perception extends single-agent perception by enabling multiple vehicles to exchange complementary perceptual information. However, it introduces an inherent trade-off between perception gain and communication overhead, which is particularly severe for 3D semantic occupancy prediction that relies on fine-grained spatial structures. Existing methods typically compress 3D features into 2D, causing severe spatial information loss, or transmit dense 3D representations, hindering real-world deployment. To overcome these limitations, we propose a bandwidth-efficient collaborative Vector Quantization Semantic Occupancy Prediction (VQSOP) framework. VQSOP employs a Sparse-Aware Vector Quantization (SAVQ) mechanism that exploits 3D scene sparsity to compactly encode informative regions, drastically reducing communication overhead while preserving complete geometric context. Furthermore, to enhance structural consistency and feature continuity, we design a Dual-Branch Adaptive Spatial Refinement (ASR) module that dynamically fuses local high-frequency details with broad contextual semantics. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance while reducing communication volume by up to 82x.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VQSOP框架，通过稀疏感知矢量量化(SAVQ)和双分支自适应空间细化(ASR)模块，在3D语义占用预测中实现高效协作感知，在保持先进性能的同时将通信量降低82倍。
AI.motivation: 协作感知虽能扩展单智能体感知能力，但其在3D语义占用预测中面临感知增益与通信开销之间的固有权衡问题，现有方法要么将3D特征压缩为2D导致严重空间信息丢失，要么传输密集3D表示阻碍实际部署。
AI.method: 提出VQSOP框架，包含两部分：1) SAVQ机制利用3D场景稀疏性紧凑编码信息区域，保留完整几何上下文；2) ASR模块动态融合局部高频细节与广泛上下文语义，增强结构一致性和特征连续性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法达到最先进性能，通信量降低高达82倍。
AI.conclusion: VQSOP框架成功解决了协作感知中感知质量与通信效率的权衡问题，为实际部署提供可行方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about collaborative perception for autonomous driving/robotics (3D semantic occupancy prediction for multi-agent systems), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically 3D human motion synthesis from 2D videos. The application domains are entirely different: autonomous vehicle perception vs. human motion generation. Even though both deal with 3D representations, this paper addresses bandwidth-efficient communication between agents, not motion synthesis or video-to-3D generation.

title: ContextNest: Verifiable Context Governance for Autonomous AI Agent
summary:
Autonomous AI agents increasingly depend on external knowledge stores, yet most retrieval pipelines provide relevance without durable guarantees of provenance, version identity, integrity, traceability, or point-in-time reconstruction. We formalize this as context governance and present ContextNext, an open specification and reference implementation for governed AI-consumable knowledge vaults. ContextNext does not replace Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG); it supplies the governance layer beneath retrieval, determining which artifacts are approved, current, attributable, and integrity-verified before retrieval systems operate over them.
  The specification combines typed Markdown documents with metadata, deterministic set-algebraic selectors, contextnest:// URI references, SHA-256 hash-chained version histories, graph-level checkpoints, source nodes for live data through the Model Context Protocol (MCP), and audit traces of agent context consumption. These mechanisms let organizations reconstruct which knowledge versions informed an agent output and whether those versions were AI-eligible when consumed.
  We report first empirical results from two controlled experiments. In a stale-version attack isolating the governance-versus-retrieval failure mode, governed selection strictly Pareto-dominates BM25 sparse retrieval, with higher answer-quality pass rate (97% versus 93-90%) at about one-third the input-token cost. In a retrieval-determinism experiment over a 1,060-document corpus, deterministic selectors and BM25 return stable document sets across repeated identical queries (Jaccard 1.0), while a dense+HNSW baseline is non-deterministic on 80% of queries (mean Jaccard 0.611, worst case 0.210). These results suggest that context governance addresses failure modes retrieval quality alone is not designed to resolve. We release a core engine, CLI, and MCP server under open licenses.

AI.tldr: ContextNext是一个开放规范和参考实现，为AI可消费的知识库提供上下文治理层，解决了外部知识存储缺乏 provenance、版本身份、完整性、可追溯性和时间点重建保证的问题。
AI.motivation: 自主AI代理越来越依赖外部知识存储，但大多数检索管道仅提供相关性，无法确保知识制品的来源、版本一致性、完整性、可追溯性或时间点重建能力，这些问题被形式化为"上下文治理"问题。
AI.method: 规范结合了：1)类型化Markdown文档与元数据；2)确定性集合代数选择器；3)contextnest:// URI引用；4) SHA-256哈希链版本历史；5)图级检查点；6)通过MCP协议的实时数据源节点；7)代理上下文消耗审计追踪。
AI.result: 两个控制实验结果：1)陈旧版本攻击实验中，治理选择比BM25稀疏检索Pareto优，答案质量通过率97%对93-90%，输入token成本约1/3；2)1060文档语料库检索确定性实验中，确定性选择器和BM25返回稳定文档集(Jaccard 1.0)，而dense+HNSW基线80%查询非确定性(平均Jaccard 0.611，最差0.210)。
AI.conclusion: 上下文治理解决了检索质量本身无法解决的失败模式，ContextNext作为RAG底层治理层确定了哪些制品在检索前已获批、当前、可归因且完整验证。发布了核心引擎、CLI和MCP服务器开源许可。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely irrelevant to the research profile. It addresses "context governance" for AI agents - dealing with knowledge storage, provenance, versioning, and information retrieval - which has no connection to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation, or any of the visual/motion synthesis methods mentioned. The application domain is entirely different (AI infrastructure vs. computer graphics/motion synthesis).

title: LiZAD: A Lightweight Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection Framework for Industrial Manufacturing
comment: Accepted at the IEEE International Conference on Omni-Layer Intelligent Systems (COINS) 2026
summary: In modern high-throughput industrial production lines, product configurations and visual characteristics frequently change, making it impractical to collect and annotate data for every new scenario. This dynamic setting makes Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection (ZSAD) particularly suitable, as it enables defect detection without requiring training on target-specific samples. Although recent ZSAD approaches show promising results, they are computationally intensive and thus unsuitable for deployment on resource-constrained devices. We propose LiZAD: a lightweight framework designed for real-time ZSAD specifically tailored for use on edge devices. The proposed approach pairs the dense and spatially aware visual features of DINOv3, crucial for precise pixel-level localization, with the highly computationally efficient text embeddings of MobileCLIP2. These features are then mapped into a shared latent space via low-memory trainable projection heads. Compared to six state-of-the-art ZSAD models, LiZAD achieves an average memory reduction of 61.5%, a parameter reduction of 74.6%, and a speedup of 3.02x in terms of latency. Despite substantial reductions in computational and memory costs, our approach maintains competitive anomaly detection performance, dropping the average P-AUROC by just 6.4% relative to the best state-of-the-art model across the VisA, BTAD, MPDD, and MVTec-AD datasets. Finally, it is successfully deployed on the NVIDIA Jetson NX and Jetson AGX edge devices and tested on the real production line of the Industrial Computer Engineering Laboratory (ICE Lab) at the University of Verona. The code is available at https://github.com/intelligolabs/LiZAD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LiZAD，一个轻量级的零样本异常检测框架，专为边缘设备上的实时工业缺陷检测设计。该方法结合DINOv3的密集空间感知视觉特征和MobileCLIP2的高效文本嵌入，通过低内存可训练投影头映射到共享潜在空间。
AI.motivation: 现代高吞吐量工业生产线中产品和视觉特征频繁变化，无法为每个新场景收集和标注数据。现有的零样本异常检测方法虽然效果不错，但计算量大，不适合部署在资源受限的边缘设备上。
AI.method: LiZAD框架的核心创新在于：1) 采用DINOv3的密集空间感知视觉特征进行精确像素级定位；2) 使用MobileCLIP2的高效文本嵌入降低计算成本；3) 通过低内存可训练投影头将两种特征映射到共享潜在空间。
AI.result: 与六种最先进的零样本异常检测模型相比，LiZAD实现了：内存减少61.5%、参数减少74.6%、延迟提速3.02倍。在VisA、BTAD、MPDD和MVTec-AD数据集上，性能仅下降6.4%的P-AUROC。成功部署在NVIDIA Jetson NX和Jetson AGX边缘设备上，并在意大利维罗纳大学ICE实验室的真实生产线上测试有效。
AI.conclusion: LiZAD通过巧妙的特征融合和轻量化设计，在大幅降低计算和内存成本的同时，保持了具有竞争力的异常检测性能，为工业缺陷检测的边缘部署提供了可行的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about industrial anomaly detection for manufacturing quality control, which is completely unrelated to the research profile. The research profile is about Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion generation from 2D videos using video generation models (Wan, Seedance) and motion synthesis pipelines. LiZAD addresses defect detection in industrial manufacturing - a totally different application domain, goal, and research area. No overlap in methods or application.

title: Enhancing Fitness Intelligence through Domain-Specific LLM Post-Training
comment: 8 pages, 6 tables, 2 figures. Accepted by the 12th International Conference on Big Data Computing and Communications (BigCom 2026)
summary: Scientific Fitness Coaching (SFC) is typically delivered by human professionals, making it costly and inaccessible to many. While recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) show considerable promise for more inclusive fitness coaching, directly deploying prevailing general-purpose LLMs in SFC reveals critical limitations. These models often lack sufficient domain-specific knowledge integration, leading to weak performance on complex SFC scenarios. In this paper, we introduce FitOne, a series of fitness LLMs (with 8B and 32B parameters) designed to improve reliability and domain specialization for SFC applications. Built upon the Qwen3 foundation models, FitOne is developed through a three-stage post-training pipeline consisting of continual pre-training, supervised fine-tuning, and reinforcement learning, using large-scale, high-quality datasets derived from rigorous knowledge engineering. We conduct comprehensive evaluations of FitOne on professional fitness certification exams, including ACSM-EP and NSCA-CSCS, as well as general capabilities such as knowledge reasoning and instruction following. Experimental results show that, while retaining strong general capabilities, FitOne-8B/32B achieves average improvements of up to 10.09%/9.29% and 12.73%/7.01% on the ACSM-EP and NSCA-CSCS exams, respectively, compared with the Qwen3 base models. Furthermore, in-depth ablation studies confirm the necessity of each training stage, highlighting the pipeline's effectiveness in balancing domain expertise enhancement with general ability retention. We believe this research advances LLM systems toward more reliable fitness intelligence and will inspire future research on developing domain-specific LLMs.

AI.tldr: FitOne是一个基于Qwen3开发的专用健身大语言模型系列（8B和32B参数），通过三阶段后训练流程提升健身辅导的领域专业性和可靠性，在专业健身认证考试中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 当前科学健身指导主要由人工专业教练提供，成本高昂且难以普及；通用大语言模型缺乏足够的领域专业知识，在复杂健身场景中表现不足，需要开发专门的健身领域LLM。
AI.method: 基于Qwen3基座模型，采用三阶段后训练流程：持续预训练、监督微调和强化学习，使用大规模高质量数据集（源自严格的知识工程）。
AI.result: FitOne-8B/32B在ACSM-EP考试中分别提升10.09%和9.29%，在NSCA-CSCS考试中分别提升12.73%和7.01%，同时保持强大的通用能力。
AI.conclusion: 三阶段训练流程有效平衡了领域专业知识提升与通用能力保留，为开发可靠的健身智能LLM系统提供了有效方法，为未来领域专用LLM研究提供了参考。

relevance_reason: This paper is about a fitness-specific LLM (FitOne) for workout coaching, which is completely unrelated to the research profile in Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation. The application domains are entirely different: the paper addresses fitness guidance while the profile needs video-to-3D motion synthesis, visual feature extraction, and quality assessment for motion generation. There is no overlap in field, methods, or application domain.

title: Personalized 4D Whole-Heart Mesh Reconstruction from Cine MRI via Multi-Scale Temporal Modeling and Differentiable Contour Rendering
summary: Accurate 4D whole-heart mesh reconstruction from sparse cine MRI is critical for creating cardiac digital twins, but remains challenging due to limited 2D slice coverage and the complex coupling between cardiac shape and motion. Existing methods often rely on intermediate contour fitting and typically reconstruct static, single-phase, or partial cardiac geometries, limiting their ability to capture full-chamber dynamics. We propose a novel end-to-end framework for reconstructing temporally resolved whole-heart meshes from multi-view 2D cine MRI sequences by learning an image-to-mesh mapping. The framework incorporates a differentiable contour renderer inspired by the Beer-Lambert attenuation principle, enabling anatomy-aware supervision of 3D+t mesh deformation through contour-based projection losses. To improve temporal consistency across the cardiac cycle, we further introduce a multi-scale temporal modeling module that integrates global cycle-level dynamics with local inter-frame coherence to generate smooth and physiologically plausible mesh trajectories. The proposed method achieved a whole-heart mean absolute error of 1.68 $\pm$ 0.31 mm and a motion jitter of 0.77 $\pm$ 0.17 $\mathrm{mm}/\mathrm{frame}^{3}$, outperforming existing methods with lower reconstruction error and substantially improved motion smoothness. It also improved 2D contour alignment across multiple cine MRI views and supported downstream proof-of-concept electrophysiological simulation. The code will be released publicly upon acceptance of the manuscript for publication.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的端到端框架，从多视角2D cine MRI序列重建时间解析的全心脏网格。该方法结合了基于Beer-Lambert衰减原理的可微轮廓渲染器和多尺度时间建模模块，实现了心脏周期的平滑运动重建，在全心脏重建中达到了1.68±0.31 mm的平均绝对误差和0.77±0.17 mm/frame³的运动抖动。
AI.motivation: 准确从稀疏cine MRI重建4D全心脏网格对于创建心脏数字孪生至关重要，但面临2D切片覆盖有限和心脏形状与运动复杂耦合的挑战。现有方法通常依赖中间轮廓拟合，且通常重建静态、单相位或部分心脏几何结构，无法捕获完整的心腔动力学。
AI.method: 提出了一个端到端的图像到网格映射框架。核心创新包括：1) 引入基于Beer-Lambert衰减原理的可微轮廓渲染器，通过基于轮廓的投影损失实现3D+网格变形的解剖感知监督；2) 多尺度时间建模模块，整合全局周期级动力学与局部帧间一致性，生成平滑且生理合理的网格轨迹。
AI.result: 全心脏平均绝对误差为1.68±0.31 mm，运动抖动为0.77±0.17 mm/frame³。性能优于现有方法，重建误差更低，运动平滑度显著提升。在多视角cine MRI的2D轮廓对齐方面也有改善，并支持下游概念验证的电生理仿真。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了从稀疏多视角2D cine MRI到时间解析全心脏网格的端到端重建，通过可微轮廓渲染和多尺度时间建模有效提升了重建精度和运动平滑度，为心脏数字孪生应用提供了重要技术基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical imaging (cardiac heart mesh reconstruction from cine MRI), not computer graphics motion synthesis. While it does use 3D reconstruction and temporal modeling techniques, the application domain is completely different - it's for medical/digital twin applications, not for human motion generation, video-to-motion synthesis, or text-to-3D motion generation in the computer graphics sense. The pain points and methods described (VLM quality supervision, video generation models like Wan/Seedance, text-to-motion) are not addressed. This is a medical computer vision paper, not a computer graphics motion synthesis paper.

title: Coding-agents can replicate scientific machine learning papers
summary: Scientific machine learning papers typically make computational claims, e.g., that the relative mean square error is less than 5% or that the 95% predictive credible interval covers the test data. A coding agent can be prompted to replicate those claims from paper materials alone, but the prompt does not by itself reliably preserve progress or check whether generated evidence supports the paper's claims. We introduce Paper-replication, a workflow that makes each selected paper claim a target with recorded evidence, and implement it as a coding-agent skill. The workflow makes the agent record those targets, reconstruct the paper's method, run computational experiments, link generated outputs to provenance and comparisons with the paper's claims, record where matched evidence appears in the replication report, and pass validation checks before completion. We evaluate Paper-replication on twelve independent runs across four scientific machine learning papers. All twelve workspaces pass the completion gate, and all 158 recorded targets are matched with report coverage. Even in this completed workspace state, repeated runs differ in how papers are divided into targets, in numerical fidelity to the source papers, in elapsed replication time, in the number of intermediate executions replaced before final evidence is accepted, and in the rules used to accept evidence. Paper-replication makes completion depend on workspace evidence and validation checks rather than on the agent's final message.

AI.tldr: Paper-replication是一种工作流程，使编码智能体能够从论文材料复现科学机器学习论文的计算声明，并通过对已记录证据的验证检查来确保复现成功。
AI.motivation: 科学机器学习论文通常做出计算声明（如均方误差小于5%或95%预测可信区间覆盖测试数据），但现有提示方法无法可靠地保留复现进度或检查生成的证据是否支持论文声明。
AI.method: 将Paper-replication实现为编码智能体技能，工作流程包括：将论文声明作为目标进行记录、重建论文方法、运行计算实验、将生成输出与来源和论文声明进行比较、记录匹配证据在复现报告中的位置，并在完成前通过验证检查。
AI.result: 在四个科学机器学习论文的十二次独立运行评估中：所有12个工作区通过完成门控，所有158个记录目标与报告覆盖匹配。重复运行在以下方面存在差异：论文如何分解为目标、数值保真度、复现时间、最终证据接受前替换的中间执行数量，以及接受证据的规则。
AI.conclusion: Paper-replication使完成依赖于工作区证据和验证检查，而非智能体的最终消息。

relevance_reason: This paper is about using coding agents to replicate scientific machine learning papers - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. The application domain is entirely different (AI agent workflow for paper replication vs. 3D motion synthesis from 2D visual features). None of the methods (coding agents, paper replication workflows) match the research profile's methods (VLM, video generation models, 3D motion generation). This is a fundamental domain mismatch - the paper is about AI system development for scientific reproduction, not computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: NeoMap: Training-free Novel-View Synthesis from Single Images and Videos
comment: ECCV 2026. Jinxi and Tianyi are co-first authors. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/vLAR-group/NeoMap
summary: We study the challenging problem of novel view video synthesis from single images or monocular videos. Existing methods, which operate under the assumption that pre-trained video models lack native novel view synthesis capability and enforce view alignment via camera conditioning, task-specific fine-tuning, or stepwise hard denoising guidance, often suffer from artifacts and compromised global scene consistency. In this paper, we introduce NeoMap, a novel training-free framework designed to locate high-fidelity, view-consistent novel view solutions from general pre-trained video models. The key to our approach is the core insight that promising novel view solutions are inherently encoded within the natural video data manifold learned by pre-trained models, and the core challenge is simply to locate this optimal solution. We solve this via our core mechanism: convergent manifold alternating projection iterations that optimize the initial noise. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NeoMap significantly outperforms all existing methods across 3 standard novel view synthesis benchmarks, including the challenging Tanks-and-Temples, LLFF and DAVIS datasets, achieving state-of-the-art generation fidelity and top-tier view consistency.

AI.tldr: NeoMap是一种无需训练的新视角视频合成框架，利用预训练视频模型的自然流形来定位高保真、视角一致的新视角解决方案，通过收敛流形交替投影迭代来优化初始噪声。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设预训练视频模型缺乏原生新视角合成能力，需要通过相机条件化、任务特定微调或逐步硬去噪指导来强制视角对齐，但这会导致伪影和全局场景一致性受损。
AI.method: 核心思路是预训练模型已编码有前景的新视角解决方案于自然视频数据流形中，核心挑战是定位这个最优解。提出收敛流形交替投影迭代来优化初始噪声。
AI.result: 在Tanks-and-Temples、LLFF和DAVIS三个标准新视角合成基准上显著优于所有现有方法，实现最先进的生成保真度和顶级视角一致性。
AI.conclusion: NeoMap作为无需训练的框架，能够从通用预训练视频模型中定位高保真、视角一致的新视角解决方案，为新视角合成领域提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: While both papers are in Computer Graphics, the application domains are completely different. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation (temporal dynamics, character movement) using video priors, whereas NeoMap focuses on Novel-View Synthesis (creating new camera views of static scenes). The pain points in the profile involve 2D-to-3D motion representation, text-to-motion semantic consistency, and motion quality assessment - none of which are addressed by NeoMap's view synthesis approach. Even though both use video generation models, they solve fundamentally different problems: motion generation vs. static scene novel view rendering.

title: A$^{2}$utoLPBench: An Auto-Generated, Agent-Friendly LP Benchmark via Inverse-KKT Construction
summary: Most LP-from-text benchmarks are static datasets of word problems written and labeled by hand. Once such a dataset is released, its size is fixed, its difficulty is fixed, and every problem can leak into the training data of future LLMs. We present \textbf{A$^{2}$utoLPBench}, a benchmark for testing LLM-driven agents on linear programming problems written in plain text. We first pick a feasible point and dual, then write down a problem for which that point is optimal and the objective value is known. The answer is known by construction, with no solver call and no human annotator. The evaluation environment bundles a reference solver-critic baseline and a Docker image whose usage instructions are written for an LLM-driven agent to read. With these in place, any agent can run the benchmark and get a calibrated score with one command. Because the benchmark is a generator rather than a fixed dataset, it has properties no fixed dataset can match: an unlimited supply of fresh problems, a difficulty knob set by $(n,m)$, ground-truth answers correct by construction, low LLM-side cost per problem relative to human authoring, repeatable scores across independent batches, and resistance to training-data leakage when fresh post-cutoff seed ranges are used.

AI.tldr: A²utoLPBench是一个用于测试LLM驱动智能体解决线性规划问题的基准测试。与传统的静态人工标注数据集不同，它通过先选取可行点和 对偶问题，再反向构造优化问题的方式来生成问题，因此答案由构造保证正确，且无需调用求解器或人工标注。该基准提供了参考求解器-评论家基线和Docker镜像，支持智能体自动化评估。
AI.motivation: 现有的LP-from-text基准都是静态的人工编写标注的单词问题数据集，存在以下问题：一旦发布，规模固定、难度固定，且所有问题都可能泄露到未来LLM的训练数据中。
AI.method: 该基准采用生成器而非固定数据集的方式：首先选取一个可行点和对偶解，然后反向构造一个以该点为最优解且目标值已知的问题。这种方法使得答案由构造保证正确，无需调用求解器或人工标注。
AI.result: 该基准具有静态数据集无法匹配的优良特性：无限量新鲜问题供应、难度可通过(n,m)调节、答案由构造保证正确、LLM端成本低、独立批次结果可重复、以及使用截止日期后的种子范围可抵抗训练数据泄露。
AI.conclusion: A²utoLPBench通过生成器方式解决了传统静态基准的局限性，为评估LLM驱动智能体解决线性规划问题的能力提供了一个可扩展、可重复且防泄露的新范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM-driven agents solving linear programming problems via inverse-KKT construction. It has NO relevance to the research profile. The paper is in the field of Operations Research/Optimization and LLM benchmarking, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation models, visual feature extraction, or any of the specified pain points about 2D-3D domain gaps or motion synthesis. The application domain is entirely different - this is pure mathematical optimization, not visual computing or graphics.

title: Assessing VLM Reliability for Medical Image Quality Evaluation Under Corruption and Bias
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly applied in medical tasks such as pathology description, report generation, and visual question answering. Medical Image Quality Assessment (MIQA) supports diagnostic accuracy and patient safety by determining whether images meet the standards required for clinical decision-making. Automating MIQA with VLMs may reduce workload, but their behavior under real-world conditions, where images may be degraded or textual context may affect judgments, should be further explored before deployment. We benchmark VLMs on medical image quality using the MediMeta-C dataset zero-shot across seven corruption types and five severity levels. We evaluate sensitivity to degradation patterns, the effect of corruptions on embedding geometry, and whether textual attributes (demographics, expertise, infrastructure, institution) alter scores. Across 16 VLMs and seven modalities, pixelation produced the largest score reductions (mean -20.58%, up to -34.4% for OCT), whereas brightness had limited effect (-0.81%). Embedding displacement was associated with score changes. Same-family models showed correlations of 0.67-0.83; some produced increases up to +31% for corrupted mammography. Textual attributes affected scores: institutional prestige raised them +17.15%, and equipment age lowered them -14.7%. The largest changes were +95.62% (InternVL-8B) and -37.7% (MedGemma). Current VLMs show limitations for medical image quality assessment. Pixelation, a privacy-preserving transformation, reduces performance, indicating a trade-off between patient privacy and reliability. Sensitivity to contextual metadata indicates limited objectivity and marks metadata as a privacy and bias source. Privacy protection and objective quality assessment are related requirements for use.

AI.tldr: 本研究基准测试了16个视觉语言模型(VLM)在医学图像质量评估(MIQA)任务上的表现，使用MediMeta-C数据集零样本评估7种 corruption 类型和5种严重程度。研究发现像素化导致最大分数下降(-20.58%)，而文本属性(如机构声望)会影响评分，这表明VLM在MIQA中存在局限性，且患者隐私与可靠性之间存在权衡。
AI.motivation: 随着VLM在医学任务中的应用增加，需要在部署前探索其在现实条件下的行为——包括图像降级和文本上下文对判断的影响，以确保临床决策的准确性和患者安全。
AI.method: 使用MediMeta-C数据集对16个VLM进行零样本基准测试，涵盖7种 corruption 类型和5种严重程度；评估对降级模式的敏感性、corruption 对嵌入几何形状的影响，以及文本属性(人口统计、专业知识、基础设施、机构)是否改变评分。
AI.result: 像素化导致最大分数下降(平均-20.58%，OCT最高-34.4%)，亮度影响有限(-0.81%)；嵌入位移与分数变化相关；同家族模型相关性0.67-0.83；部分模型对降质乳腺X光图像评分提高至+31%；文本属性影响评分：机构声望提高+17.15%，设备老化降低-14.7%；最大变化为InternVL-8B的+95.62%和MedGemma的-37.7%。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLM在医学图像质量评估方面存在局限性。像素化(隐私保护转换)降低性能，表明患者隐私与可靠性之间存在权衡。对上下文元数据的敏感性表明客观性有限，元数据是隐私和偏见来源。隐私保护和客观质量评估是相关使用要求。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical image quality evaluation using VLMs - completely different application domain from Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. While it uses VLMs (a similar method), the application is in healthcare/medical imaging, not in video-to-3D motion synthesis. The pain points, methods, and end goals are entirely different - this addresses clinical decision making and patient safety, not domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, or video generation for motion synthesis.

title: A rubric-based controlled comparison of frontier language models on expert-authored clinical reasoning tasks
summary: Multiple-choice medical benchmarks are increasingly saturated, and recent rubric-based evaluations such as HealthBench have shown that open-ended clinical performance is far from solved - its "Hard" subset top score remains 32%. We present a small, deliberately difficult evaluation dataset of five clinician-authored clinical scenarios spanning four specialties (anaesthesia, internal/family medicine, emergency medicine, and obstetrics), each accompanied by an atomic, weighted, MECE rubric (25-62 criteria per task; 184 criteria total) authored from a clinician-drafted golden answer. We evaluate three frontier models: GPT 5.4, Claude Opus 4.7, and Gemini 3.1 Pro. Mean rubric pass rates were 0.47 (Claude), 0.39 (GPT), and 0.37 (Gemini). The central finding is an inversion of clinical priority: the highest-weighted (weight-5, critical) criteria passed at only 32.4-41.7%, while low-stakes weight-1 criteria passed at 80-90%. 56 of 108 critical (weight-5) criteria (52%) were satisfied by no model. Three LLM autoraters reproduced expert met/not-met labels on 92.8-94.7% of 552 graded criteria. We position this as a methods-and-preliminary-findings contribution: the five tasks demonstrate a scalable, defensible pipeline ready to develop into a large-scale benchmark.

AI.tldr: 该研究构建了一个小型但具有挑战性的临床评估数据集，包含5个临床场景（涵盖4个专科），每个场景配有原子化、加权、MECE的评分标准（25-62条/任务，共184条）。评估了三前沿模型：GPT 5.4、Claude Opus 4.7和Gemini 3.1 Pro，平均通过率分别为47%、39%和37%。核心发现是临床优先级倒置：权重最高（权重5，关键）标准仅32.4-41.7%通过，而低风险权重1标准80-90%通过。108个关键标准中56条（52%）无一模型满足。三种LLM自动评分器在552条标准上复现专家判断的准确率为92.8-94.7%。
AI.motivation: 当前多项选择医学基准已饱和，HealthBench等基于评分标准的评估显示开放性临床任务仍未解决（"困难"子集最高分仅32%）。现有基准难以有效区分模型在关键临床能力上的差异。
AI.method: 构建5个临床场景（覆盖麻醉科、内科/家庭医学、急诊医学和产科），由临床医生编写黄金答案并制定原子化、加权、MECE的评分标准（每任务25-62条，共184条）。评估三种前沿LLM，使用三种LLM自动评分器验证评分一致性。
AI.result: Claude平均通过率47%，GPT 39%，Gemini 37%。关键发现是临床优先级倒置：权重5的关键标准仅32.4-41.7%通过，而权重1标准80-90%通过。108个关键标准中56条（52%）无一模型满足。LLM自动评分器复现专家判断的准确率为92.8-94.7%。
AI.conclusion: 研究贡献在于提供了一套可扩展的防御性评估流程，可发展为大规模基准。核心问题在于当前LLM在关键临床决策上表现不足，存在临床优先级倒置现象，需要重点改进模型在关键临床任务上的能力。

title: MolSight: A Graph-Aware Vision-Language Model for Unified Chemical Image Understanding
summary: Using molecular large language models (LLMs) as a unified framework for understanding molecular structures and functions is emerging as a new trend in tasks such as molecular design and drug discovery. However, these models struggle to fully capture the visual representation of molecular structures, limiting their potential. While existing molecular vision-language models (VLMs) show promise, they still face challenges in structural alignment and lack the necessary topological modeling for accurate molecular understanding. To address this, we propose MolSight, a graph-aware vision-language model framework designed to enhance the understanding of molecular images by VLMs. MolSight integrates a Molecular Topology Module to inject chemical-bond adjacency information into vision tokens, and a Molecular Grounding Module to align visual features with chemical symbolic semantics. Our experiments demonstrate that MolSight significantly outperforms existing VLMs, molecular LLMs, and specialized tools across multiple chemical visual understanding tasks, achieving a new level of molecular image reasoning.

AI.tldr: MolSight是一种图感知的视觉语言模型框架，通过分子拓扑模块和分子接地模块增强分子图像理解，解决现有分子视觉语言模型在结构对齐和拓扑建模方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有分子大型语言模型难以完全捕捉分子结构的视觉表示，而现有分子视觉语言模型在结构对齐和精确分子理解方面缺乏必要的拓扑建模。
AI.method: 提出MolSight框架，包含两个核心模块：1) 分子拓扑模块将化学键邻接信息注入视觉token；2) 分子接地模块将视觉特征与化学符号语义对齐。
AI.result: MolSight在多个化学视觉理解任务上显著优于现有VLMs、分子LLMs和专用工具，达到了分子图像推理的新水平。
AI.conclusion: MolSight通过图感知方法有效提升了分子图像理解能力，为分子设计和药物发现等领域提供了更强大的视觉语言统一框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is about chemical/molecular image understanding using graph-aware VLMs, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. Although the paper uses Vision-Language Models (VLMs), the application domain is chemistry (molecular structure analysis), not computer graphics or motion synthesis. The research profile specifically targets 3D motion generation from 2D video, while this paper targets molecular structure recognition in chemistry. These are completely different application domains with no overlap.

title: UA-ChatDev: Uncertainty-Aware Multi-Agent Collaboration for Reliable Software Development
summary: Software development is a complex task that demands cooperation among agents with diverse roles. Large language models (LLMs) have enabled autonomous multi-agent software development frameworks that leverage role-based collaboration to automate requirements analysis, coding, testing, and refinement. However, existing approaches typically assume that intermediate agent outputs are equally reliable, leaving them vulnerable to hallucination propagation, where incorrect decisions generated in early development phases are transferred to downstream agents and negatively impact final software quality. To address this challenge, we propose UA-ChatDev, an uncertainty-aware multi-agent software development framework that integrates uncertainty quantification into agent interactions. It introduces a lightweight uncertainty estimation mechanism based on token-level log probabilities to assess the confidence of agent responses and employs phase-aware threshold calibration to selectively trigger retrieval-based verification when uncertainty exceeds acceptable levels. Extensive experiments on the SRDD benchmark demonstrate that UA-ChatDev consistently outperforms existing single-agent and multi-agent software development frameworks across completeness, executability, consistency, and overall quality metrics. Further ablation studies and communication analyses verify that uncertainty-aware interactions enhance code execution reliability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UA-ChatDev框架，通过将不确定性量化集成到多智能体软件开发交互中，解决LLM幻觉传播问题。该框架使用基于token级对数概率的轻量级不确定性估计机制，并采用阶段感知阈值校准来选择性触发检索验证。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设中间智能体输出同等可靠，导致早期开发阶段的错误决策会被传递到下游智能体，最终影响软件质量。已有研究未充分解决多智能体协作中的幻觉传播问题。
AI.method: 1) 引入基于token级对数概率的轻量级不确定性估计机制，评估智能体响应置信度；2) 采用阶段感知阈值校准，当不确定性超过可接受水平时选择性触发基于检索的验证。
AI.result: 在SRDD基准测试中，UA-ChatDev在完整性、可执行性、一致性和整体质量指标上均优于现有的单智能体和多智能体软件开发框架。消融实验和通信分析验证了不确定性感知交互可增强代码执行可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将不确定性量化融入多智能体软件开发流程，可有效缓解幻觉传播问题，显著提升生成软件的质量和可靠性。该方法为自动化软件开发中的信任校准提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM-based multi-agent systems for software development, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. The application domains are entirely different: software engineering vs 3D motion synthesis from 2D videos. There is no match in methods (LLM uncertainty quantification vs VLM/video generation/3D motion models) or pain points (hallucination in software vs domain gap in motion synthesis).

title: Open-Weather Robust 3D Detection via Dual-Critic Diffusion Alignment
summary: Robust 3D object detection under adverse weather remains a critical hurdle for autonomous driving. Despite progress with LiDAR-4D radar fusion, most methods are constrained by a closed-world assumption, implicitly requiring training and test weather to align in both type and severity. This premise fails in practice: the open-ended nature of weather, and even variations within a single type like rain, cause dramatically different LiDAR degradation patterns, leading to significant performance drops in unseen conditions. To address this, we present Dual-Critic Guided Diffusion Alignment (DCDA), a weather-agnostic framework that learns to recover degraded LiDAR features toward a clean manifold. Rather than modeling specific weather types, DCDA employs a 4D radar-conditioned diffusion process to progressively refine features, guided by two complementary critics. (i) A detection-guided critic, anchored by a pre-trained clean-weather model, ensures that the refined features retain object-level discriminability and localization accuracy. (ii) A weather adversarial critic enforces holistic distributional consistency with clean-weather representations. By aligning features through semantic and distributional constraints rather than explicit weather modeling, DCDA generalizes effectively to unseen weather types and severities without requiring paired data or weather labels. We further introduce a structured open-weather benchmark with held-out type-severity combinations and extensive experiments verify DCDA's advantages.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DCDA框架,利用4D雷达条件扩散模型恢复降质LiDAR特征,在无需成对数据或天气标签的情况下,实现对未知天气类型和严重程度的泛化。
AI.motivation: 当前3D目标检测方法基于封闭世界假设,要求训练和测试天气类型及严重程度一致。然而现实世界中天气变化复杂,即使是同一类型天气(如雨)也会产生不同的LiDAR退化模式,导致在未见条件下性能显著下降。
AI.method: 提出Dual-Critic Guided Diffusion Alignment (DCDA)框架,采用4D雷达条件扩散过程逐步细化特征,受两个互补评论家引导:(1)检测引导评论家,基于预训练清洁天气模型确保特征保留目标级可区分性和定位精度;(2)天气对抗评论家,强制特征与清洁天气表示进行整体分布一致性对齐。
AI.result: 通过语义和分布约束而非显式天气建模对齐特征,DCDA能有效泛化到未见天气类型和严重程度。实验验证了在引入的结构化开放天气基准上的优势。
AI.conclusion: DCDA通过结合检测引导和天气对抗两个评论家,在不依赖成对数据或天气标签的情况下,实现了对各种恶劣天气条件下3D目标检测的鲁棒性提升,为自动驾驶提供了更实用的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D object detection for autonomous driving using LiDAR in adverse weather conditions - completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. While it uses diffusion models, this is for LiDAR feature restoration, not for 3D motion generation, video generation, or text-to-motion synthesis. The application domain (autonomous driving perception) has no relevance to the research profile focused on computer graphics, human motion generation, and video-to-3D synthesis pipelines.

title: Criticality-Based Guard Rail Validation for AI Agent Decisions in Autonomous Telecom Networks
summary: The evolution toward fully autonomous telecommunications networks (Autonomous Network Levels 4-5) requires AI/ML agents to make real-time network decisions without human intervention. However, no standardized runtime mechanism exists to intercept and validate individual inference outputs before they trigger live network state changes, creating risks of erroneous autonomous decisions. This paper proposes the Guard Rail Validation (GRV) framework, a standardizable runtime architecture for intercepting and validating AI-driven decisions before execution. The framework evaluates decisions across multiple weighted dimensions -- including action scope, action type, service criticality, agent autonomy level, reversibility, and temporal behavioural patterns -- to determine a criticality level. Based on this level, graduated validation mechanisms are applied: execute-with-logging, bounds checking, independent agent validation, or multi-agent consensus. The framework additionally provides cross-agent conflict detection with criticality-weighted priority resolution and runtime conformance logging for regulatory compliance (e.g., EU AI Act Article 14). We present the architecture, algorithmic procedures, O-RAN deployment model, and evaluate threat coverage against known AI/ML attacks in telecommunications.

AI.tldr: 针对完全自主电信网络（自治网络等级4-5）中AI/ML智能体缺乏标准化运行时验证机制的问题，提出了Guard Rail Validation (GRV)框架。该框架在AI决策执行前对其进行拦截和验证，通过多维度评估确定关键性级别，并采用分级验证机制，同时支持跨智能体冲突检测和监管合规日志记录。
AI.motivation: 向完全自主电信网络（自治网络等级4-5）的演进要求AI/ML智能体能够在无人工干预的情况下实时做出网络决策。然而，目前缺乏标准的运行时机制来拦截和验证单个推理输出，然后再触发实际网络状态变更，这导致了错误自主决策的风险。
AI.method: GRV框架评估决策的多个加权维度（操作范围、操作类型、服务关键性、智能体自主级别、可逆性、时间行为模式）以确定关键性级别。基于该级别应用分级验证机制：执行并记录、边界检查、独立智能体验证或多智能体共识。该框架还提供跨智能体冲突检测（带关键性加权优先级解决）和运行时一致性日志记录，以满足监管合规要求（如欧盟AI法案第14条）。
AI.result: 提出了GRV架构、算法程序、O-RAN部署模型，并针对电信领域的已知AI/ML攻击评估了威胁覆盖范围。
AI.conclusion: GRV框架为自主电信网络提供了标准化的运行时验证架构，通过分级验证机制和监管合规支持，能够有效降低AI驱动决策的风险，为实现安全可靠的自治网络等级4-5提供技术基础。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The research profile is in Computer Graphics, focusing on 3D motion generation from videos using VLMs and video generation models. The paper is about AI guard rail validation frameworks for autonomous telecom networks - a completely different application domain (telecommunications), different methods (guard rails, criticality assessment), and doesn't address any of the stated pain points about 2D-to-3D motion synthesis or video-to-motion pipelines.

title: Understanding Geometric Representations in Self-Supervised Vision Transformers via Subspace Intervention
summary: We introduce a controlled subspace intervention framework to investigate how self-supervised Vision Transformers (ViTs) encode dense geometric information. While linear probing is widely used to assess geometric representations, it treats features as a black box, failing to disentangle the underlying topology. To address this issue, we decompose the weights of converged linear probes to isolate the low-rank subspaces containing explicit geometric signals using Singular Value Decomposition (SVD). Our perspective yields three key insights: (1) Pre-training objectives determine how features are encoded. DINOv2 aligns spatial features for efficient linear extraction, while Masked Autoencoders (MAE) tend to disperse these signals, requiring a broader spatial context. (2) Explicit geometric representations are highly compressible, suggesting dense predictive heads could potentially be constrained to low-rank subspaces with minimal performance loss. (3) The layer-wise task affinity suggests that geometric precision peaks at intermediate layers before yielding to semantic abstraction in the final layers. By connecting internal encoding mechanics with downstream performance, these findings provide a basis for effective feature selection and lightweight decoder design. The source code is available at https://github.com/Zhou-Weichen/Geosubprobe.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受控子空间干预框架，通过分解线性探针权重并使用奇异值分解(SVD)分离包含几何信号的低秩子空间，研究自监督Vision Transformers (ViTs)如何编码密集几何信息。实验表明DINOv2对齐空间特征便于线性提取，而MAE分散信号需要更广泛的空间上下文；几何表示具有高度可压缩性；几何精度在中间层达到峰值后向高级语义抽象演变。
AI.motivation: 线性探针虽广泛用于评估几何表示，但将其视为黑箱，无法解耦底层拓扑结构。因此需要一种新方法来揭示ViTs内部几何编码的机制。
AI.method: 1)训练收敛的线性探针；2)利用SVD分解探针权重以分离低秩子空间；3)在子空间上进行受控干预实验；4)对比DINOv2和MAE两种预训练目标
AI.result: 三个关键发现：(1)预训练目标决定特征编码方式——DINOv2对齐空间特征利于线性提取，MAE分散信号需更广泛上下文；(2)几何表示高度可压缩，密集预测头可约束至低秩子空间；(3)层间任务亲和性显示几何精度在中间层达峰后向语义抽象演变。
AI.conclusion: 该研究连接了内部编码机制与下游性能，为特征选择和轻量级解码器设计提供了理论基础和实践指导。

relevance_reason: This paper is about understanding geometric representations in Vision Transformers through linear probes and SVD decomposition - a fundamental computer vision/machine learning topic. While it touches on geometric encoding in DINOv2 and MAE, it does NOT address the research profile's core concerns: 3D motion generation, video-to-3D synthesis, quality assessment of generated videos, or semantic text-to-motion mapping. The application domain is fundamentally different - this is theoretical ViT analysis rather than computer graphics or motion synthesis. The methods (linear probe analysis, SVD) are unrelated to the mentioned video generation models (Wan, Seedance), VLMs for quality supervision, or two-stage video+motion pipelines.

title: Purified OPSD: On-Policy Self-Distillation Without Losing How to Think
summary: On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) has emerged as a promising paradigm for improving LLM reasoning, where a privileged teacher with access to reference solutions provides token-level supervision on the student's own generated trajectories. However, we find that OPSD consistently fails on long chain-of-thought (long-CoT) reasoning models, yielding at best marginal gains while destabilizing the reflective reasoning capability these models depend on. Through a novel decomposition of the teacher's supervision signal, we identify the root cause: the teacher's supervision is dominated by a reference-induced component that drives rote memorization of reference-specific shortcuts, while the question-conditioned, inference-transferable component is ignored or actively opposed. Based on this diagnosis, we propose a two-step solution. First, we construct a reference-only teacher (the same model conditioned on the reference without the question) to isolate the non-transferable component of the supervision signal; the residual after subtracting this component captures the question-conditioned, inference-transferable correction. Second, we use pointwise mutual information (PMI) as the mechanism to transform this residual into a well-formed PMI target distribution that the student can directly distill from, filtering out the reference-induced shortcut. Experiments on four long-CoT models across two datasets demonstrate consistent improvements over both the base model and standard OPSD, while preserving the models' natural epistemic behavior throughout training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对长链式思考(long-CoT)推理模型的改进蒸馏方法。标准OPSD方法在长-CoT模型上失败，论文通过分解监督信号识别出问题根源：教师监督包含一个参考诱导的成分（导致机械记忆）和一个可转移的推理成分。基于此，提出了两步解决方案：先构建"仅参考教师"来分离不可转移成分，再使用点互信息(PMI)将残差转换为可蒸馏的目标分布。实验在四个长-CoT模型和两个数据集上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 解决OPSD（on-policy self-distillation）方法在长链式思考(long-CoT)推理模型上的一致性失败问题。标准OPSD仅能提供边际收益，且会破坏模型依赖的反思性推理能力。
AI.method: 两步方法：1)构建"仅参考教师"（仅以参考答案为条件，不考虑问题）来隔离监督信号中不可转移的成分；2)使用点互信息(PMI)将残差转换为良好的PMI目标分布，过滤掉参考诱导的捷径。
AI.result: 在四个长-CoT模型和两个数据集上，相比基线模型和标准OPSD方法均获得一致改进，同时保持模型训练过程中的自然认知行为。
AI.conclusion: 通过分离参考诱导成分和可转移推理成分，并利用PMI机制，可以有效解决OPSD在长-CoT模型上的失败问题，实现稳定的性能提升。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM reasoning and self-distillation for long chain-of-thought models, which has NO relevance to the Computer Graphics research profile. The target field focuses on 2D video to 3D motion generation, visual feature extraction, and video generation models (Wan, Seedance). This paper addresses nothing related to computer graphics, motion synthesis, or visual/video generation - it's purely about improving language model reasoning through distillation techniques.

title: Training-free Controllable Human Motion Generation under Heterogeneous Constraints
summary: Training-free controllable motion generation has attracted growing interest for enabling flexible constraint enforcement without constraint-specific training. However, existing training-free methods require constraints to be continuous objective-based with differentiable losses, while many real-world requirements are criterion-based and provide only discontinuous, sparse, or even black-box feedback. In this paper, we propose Motion-Inference-as-Control (MIC), the first training-free motion generation framework that handles both continuous objective-based and criterion-based motion constraints under a shared mechanism. The key idea is to cast diffusion-based motion generation as a stochastic control problem. This perspective not only provides principled and practically effective step-wise control laws that support criterion-based constraints without requiring differentiability and naturally accommodate objective-based constraints as a special case, but also motivates a control-oriented constraint coordination mechanism that adaptively balances and reconciles motion constraints during generation. Experiments across diverse constraint settings demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework.

AI.tldr: 提出MIC框架，首个无需训练的运动生成方法，可同时处理连续目标约束和基于准则的约束，将扩散模型视为随机控制问题
AI.motivation: 现有无需训练的方法只能处理连续可微的目标约束，而许多实际需求只能提供不连续、稀疏甚至黑盒反馈，无法适用
AI.method: 将扩散运动生成建模为随机控制问题，提出控制导向的约束协调机制，自适应平衡和调和运动约束
AI.result: 在多种约束设置下验证了框架有效性，支持不可微约束和目标约束的统一处理
AI.conclusion: 首次实现无需训练框架下同时处理目标约束和准则约束的共享机制，为扩散模型控制提供新视角

relevance_reason: While this paper is about human motion generation in computer graphics (matching the general field), it does not address the specific research profile. The profile focuses on a two-stage pipeline using video generation models (Wan, Seedance) as priors to extract 2D visual features for 3D motion synthesis. This paper instead focuses on training-free controllable motion generation under heterogeneous constraints using stochastic control. Key pain points from the profile (domain gap between 2D visual features and 3D motion, video-to-3D pipeline, VLM quality supervision) are not addressed. The paper uses diffusion for motion generation but lacks the video feature extraction and two-stage pipeline approach central to the research profile.

title: Copewell: A Multi-Agent Swarm Architecture for Equitable Mental Wellness Support
summary: Mental health disorders affect nearly one billion people globally, yet 75% of individuals in low- and middle-income countries receive no treatment due to workforce shortages, cost barriers, and stigma. Current AI-powered wellness solutions predominantly rely on single-mode conversational interfaces that suffer high abandonment rates and fail to provide measurable, immediate relief calibrated to users' dynamic emotional states. This paper presents Copewell, a novel multi-agent swarm system designed to expand access to mental wellness support through human-centered AI principles. Our architecture introduces three technical innovations: (1) a multi-source assessment framework integrating self-reported, physiological, and contextual data to mitigate algorithmic bias; (2) valence-arousal emotion mapping using Russell's Circumplex Model of Affect to route users to specialized AI agents; and (3) dual-mode intervention delivery combining conversational support with evidence-based sensory wellness protocols. We examine the sociotechnical design considerations underlying Copewell's development, including a privacy-first architecture, embedded ethical oversight through a dedicated Ethics Supervisor agent, and participatory design informed by mental health practitioners. Early practitioner engagement and beta deployment inform design decisions and identify directions for future empirical evaluation. This work contributes to responsible AI discourse by demonstrating how technical architecture can operationalize equity and safety principles from inception.

AI.tldr: Copewell是一个新型多智能体集群系统，旨在通过以人为本的AI原则扩大心理健康支持的可及性。该系统整合了多源评估框架、情绪映射和双模干预交付，旨在解决低收入和中等收入国家75%心理疾病患者缺乏治疗的问题。
AI.motivation: 全球近10亿人受心理健康障碍影响，但低收入和中等收入国家75%的患者因劳动力短缺、成本障碍和污名化而无法获得治疗。现有AI健康解决方案主要依赖单一模式对话界面，放弃率高且无法根据用户动态情绪状态提供可衡量、即时的缓解。
AI.method: 该架构引入三项技术创新：(1)多源评估框架，整合自我报告、生理和情境数据以减轻算法偏见；(2)使用罗素情绪环状模型进行效价-唤醒度情绪映射，将用户路由至专业AI智能体；(3)双模干预交付，结合对话支持与循证感官健康方案。同时采用隐私优先架构、内置伦理监督（专用伦理监督智能体），并由心理健康从业者参与设计。
AI.result: 早期从业者参与和测试部署为设计决策提供了信息，并确定了未来实证评估的方向。该工作展示了如何从一开始就将公平和安全原则融入技术架构，为负责任的AI讨论做出了贡献。
AI.conclusion: Copewell通过多智能体架构和以人为本的设计理念，为扩大心理健康支持可及性提供了一种创新方案。其隐私优先、内置伦理监督的设计体现了负责任AI开发的理念。未来的工作将包括进一步的实证评估。
