title: Mirror Illusion Art
comment: CVPR 2026 Highlight, also got an Efficient CVPR award
summary: Mirror Illusion Art is a novel reflection-conditioned 3D illusion where one object yields two target appearances (front and mirror). The task is formulated as inverse design from two target 2D images (front and mirror) to a printable 3D object with geometry and texture. Prior topology-driven and shadow-based approaches demand substantial manual effort, optimize shape only, and often yield non-smooth or incomplete geometry. To address these challenges, we propose AutoMIA, an automated Mirror Illusion Art design pipeline that jointly optimizes shape and color. To stabilize optimization and suppress artifacts, four mechanisms are introduced: (1) projection-alignment component (PAC) selection to reduce surface noise, (2) position-weighted adaptive (PWA) suppression for background noise, (3) internal voxel preservation (IVP) to prevent internal fractures, and (4) shape-color decoupled (SCD) optimization that balance shape and color optimization. AutoMIA generate diverse smooth Mirror Illusion artworks successfully both in the digital and physical world, with only around 76s design time and 2.6 GB memory on average using a single RTX 3090, advancing inverse graphics and computational design. Our code is available at https://github.com/zxp555/AutoMIA.

AI.tldr: AutoMIA是一个自动化镜像幻象艺术设计管道，可从两个目标2D图像（正面和镜面）反向设计可打印的3D对象，同时优化形状和颜色，解决了传统方法需要大量手动工作、仅优化形状且几何不完整的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有拓扑驱动和基于阴影的镜像幻象方法存在三个主要问题：1) 需要大量手动工作；2) 仅优化形状，忽视颜色；3) 产生的几何不光滑或不完整。因此需要一种自动化的联合优化形状和颜色的方法。
AI.method: 提出四种机制：1) 投影对齐组件选择减少表面噪声；2) 位置加权自适应抑制背景噪声；3) 内部体素保留防止内部断裂；4) 形状-颜色解耦优化平衡形状和颜色优化。使用单个RTX 3090 GPU进行优化。
AI.result: 成功生成多样化光滑的镜像幻象艺术作品，数字和物理世界均有效。平均设计时间约76秒，内存2.6GB。
AI.conclusion: AutoMIA在镜像幻象艺术自动设计方面取得进展，推动了逆图形和计算设计的发展。代码已开源。

relevance_reason: The paper is about mirror illusion art (creating 3D objects that show different images from different viewing angles), which is completely different from the research profile's focus on 3D motion generation from videos. Even though both deal with 2D-to-3D conversion, the application domains are entirely different: this paper addresses static 3D object design for artistic illusion, while the research profile needs temporal motion synthesis/animation. The methods (geometric optimization) also differ significantly from the required methods (VLM, video generation models like Wan/Seedance, motion synthesis pipelines).

title: AgenticSTS: A Bounded-Memory Testbed for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
summary: Memory for a long-horizon LLM agent is a contract about what each future decision is allowed to see. The simplest contract appends past observations, tool calls, and reflections to every prompt, which makes prior context easy to access but also turns it into a jumbled mixture in which the effect of any single memory component is hard to isolate. We introduce and instrument an alternative bounded contract: every decision is made from a fresh user message assembled by typed retrieval, with no raw cross-decision transcript appended. The prompt thus stays bounded across runs of any length, and any single layer can be ablated in isolation. We instantiate the contract in Slay the Spire 2, a closed-rule stochastic deck-building game whose runs require hundreds of tactical and strategic decisions. A public online benchmark of frontier LLMs on the same game reports zero wins at the lowest difficulty across five configurations, and the developer-reported human win rate at the same difficulty is 16%; the task is hard but not saturated. Within our harness, a fixed-A0 ablation shows the largest observed difference when triggered strategic skills are enabled: the no-store baseline wins 3/10 games and adding the skill layer 6/10. At this sample size the comparison is directional rather than statistically decisive (Fisher exact p\approx0.37); a cross-backbone probe and public accumulating-context baselines are reported as operational comparisons rather than controlled tests of the contract variable itself. We release a reproducible testbed: 298 completed trajectories with condition tags, frozen memory/skill snapshots, prompt records, and analysis scripts -- an agent design and a validated, reusable methodology for studying how explicit memory layers shape long-horizon LLM-agent decisions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对长视野LLM智能体的"有界契约"记忆方案，取代简单追加所有历史上下文的做法，通过类型化检索为每次决策构建新鲜的用户消息。该方法在《杀出重镇2》游戏中验证，零存储基线胜率3/10，加入技能层后胜率6/10。
AI.motivation: 现有方案将过去观察、工具调用和反思简单追加到每个提示中，导致上下文变成混杂混合物，单一记忆组件的效果难以隔离。
AI.method: 有界契约方案：每次决策由通过类型化检索构建的新鲜用户消息做出，不附加原始跨决策转录本，使提示在任何长度运行中保持有界，可单独消融任意层。在《杀出重镇2》游戏中进行实验。
AI.result: 公开基准测试中前沿LLM在最低难度零胜率，人类胜率16%。固定A0消融显示启用触发技能时差异最大：零存储基线胜3/10，加入技能层后胜6/10（Fisher精确检验p≈0.37）。
AI.conclusion: 提出了有界契约记忆方案和可复现测试床（含298条轨迹、条件标签、冻结记忆/技能快照、提示记录和分析脚本），为研究显式记忆层如何塑造长视野LLM智能体决策提供了可验证、可复用的方法论。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM agents and bounded memory systems for long-horizon decision making in gaming scenarios. The application domain is AI agents for games (Heavy Rain-like game), not computer graphics, 3D motion generation, or video synthesis. The methods (typed retrieval for LLM prompts) have no connection to visual language models, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), 2D-to-3D motion synthesis, or visual feature extraction for 3D generation.

title: UnderOneFacade: Worldwide Facade Semantic Segmentation Benchmark Dataset
summary: Globally consistent semantic digital twins require centimeter-accurate and geographically transferable 3D facade segmentation. However, progress in facade parsing is limited by the lack of large-scale, standardized benchmarks for evaluating cross-domain generalization. Existing datasets are geographically narrow, semantically inconsistent, or insufficiently precise. We introduce UnderOneFacade, the largest cross-country and cross-continent 3D facade benchmark to date, comprising centimeter-accurate point clouds with hierarchical, harmonized, and architecturally grounded semantic labels totaling 2.7 billion annotated points. Through a systematic evaluation of representative point-, graph- and transformer-based architectures, we show that current methods struggle to recognize fine-grained architectural elements and degrade significantly across geographic domains, with the best models achieving only up to 33 IoU on the fine-grained LoFG3 benchmark. By combining geometric precision with standardized semantics at unprecedented scale, UnderOneFacade establishes a rigorous benchmark for developing robust and transferable 3D segmentation models. The dataset, evaluation scripts, and pretrained models will be released upon publication.

AI.tldr: 提出UnderOneFacade数据集，这是迄今为止最大的跨国家、跨大陆3D facade基准数据集，包含27亿个带标注的点云，具有分层、协调且基于建筑学的语义标签。通过系统评估点、图和Transformer架构，表明当前方法在精细建筑元素识别和跨地理域泛化方面存在显著挑战。
AI.motivation: 全球一致的语义数字孪生需要厘米级精度和地理可转移的3D立面分割，但现有数据集地理范围有限、语义不一致或精度不足，缺乏用于评估跨域泛化的大规模标准化基准。
AI.method: 构建包含27亿标注点云的分层语义标签数据集；系统评估代表性的点、图和Transformer架构。
AI.result: 当前方法在识别细粒度建筑元素方面表现不佳，且在跨地理域时性能显著下降，最佳模型在LoFG3细粒度基准上仅达到33 IoU。
AI.conclusion: UnderOneFacade通过结合几何精度与标准化语义，为开发鲁棒且可转移的3D分割模型建立了严格基准，将推动该领域研究进展。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on 3D human motion generation from video priors (character animation, motion synthesis), while this paper addresses 3D facade semantic segmentation for architectural buildings. Even though both involve 3D processing in computer graphics, they are in entirely different sub-fields - one is about dynamic human motion, the other is about static building structures. The methods (point cloud segmentation for buildings) and use cases (architectural digital twins) have no relevance to video-to-motion synthesis or character animation.

title: A Hippocampus for Linear Attention: An Exact Memory for What the Recurrent State Forgets
summary: Linear-attention and state-space language models compress the prefix into a fixed-size recurrent state, yielding O(1) memory at the cost of a lossy exact memory: when many key--value associations compete, earlier facts are overwritten and needle recall degrades. Inspired by Complementary Learning Systems, we give linear attention a hippocampal complement. HOLA (Hippocampal Linear Attention) keeps the usual delta-rule state as a compressive memory and adds a bounded exact KV cache, forming a semiparametric test-time memory: the state models linearly compressible structure, while the cache stores associations that should not be forced through that state. The cache writes without a learned eviction module, keeping tokens with large beta * ||e||, the prediction residual actually committed to the state; a decoupled RMSNorm-gamma cache read then turns these exact KV pairs into sharp retrieval rather than soft averaging. At 340M parameters trained on 15B SlimPajama tokens, HOLA lowers Wikitext perplexity from 27.32 to 22.92 (-16.1%), below a full-attention Transformer++ (26.88), and improves LAMBADA perplexity from 30.95 to 30.26. It also achieves the best linear in-context retrieval and remains much more robust than GDN or a matched HOLA+recency cache on RULER needle-in-a-haystack recall out to 32k tokens (16x its training length).

AI.tldr: HOLA（海马体线性注意力）通过为线性注意力模型添加精确KV缓存作为"海马体补充"，解决了固定大小递归状态导致的记忆丢失问题，在340M参数、15B tokens训练规模下，显著提升了多个数据集的困惑度表现。
AI.motivation: 线性注意力和状态空间语言模型将前缀压缩为固定大小的递归状态，导致精确记忆丢失——当大量key-value关联竞争时，早期事实被覆盖，needle recall下降。研究者灵感来自互补学习系统（Complementary Learning Systems），为线性注意力配备海马体补充。
AI.method: HOLA保留通常的delta-rule状态作为压缩记忆，并添加有界精确KV缓存，形成半参数测试时记忆：状态建模线性可压缩结构，缓存存储不应强制通过该状态的关联。缓存无学习驱逐模块写入，保留具有大β*||e||的token（实际提交给状态的预测残差）；解耦的RMSNorm-gamma缓存读取将这些精确KV对转换为锐利检索而非软平均。
AI.result: 在340M参数、15B SlimPajama tokens训练下：Wikitext困惑度从27.32降至22.92（-16.1%），低于全注意力Transformer++（26.88）；LAMBADA困惑度从30.95降至30.26；实现最佳线性上下文检索；在RULER needle-in-a-haystack召回任务中（至32k tokens，训练长度的16倍）显著优于GDN和HOLA+recency缓存。
AI.conclusion: HOLA通过结合压缩状态和精确缓存的互补记忆系统，成功解决了线性注意力模型的记忆瓶颈问题，在保持O(1)内存效率的同时实现了接近全注意力的性能，且在长上下文检索任务中表现出色。

The application domain is entirely different from Computer Graphics and 3D motion generation. It has no connection to video generation models, 2D-to-3D motion synthesis, visual feature extraction, or any of the pain points mentioned in the research profile.

title: Spatio-Temporal and Clinical Conditioning for Fine-Grained Radiology Report Retrieval
summary: Radiology is vital to modern healthcare, but rising imaging demand and persistent workforce shortages strain reporting capacity and clinical workflows. Automated radiology report generation has the potential to support radiologists and help alleviate this burden; however, existing retrieval-based methods remain rigid, lack explicit anatomical grounding, and do not account for longitudinal disease progression or available clinical context. In this work, we introduce STAR3, a multimodal, spatio-temporal, attentive retrieval framework for radiology report generation that aligns region-level anatomical information with clinical indications and longitudinal changes across chest X-ray studies. Our framework employs an object detector to identify anatomically meaningful regions and retrieves semantically relevant report sentences conditioned on both current clinical context and changes observed between prior and current examinations. This design enables anatomically and temporally grounded report generation that better reflects clinical reporting practice. Experiments on the MIMIC-CXR dataset demonstrate that STAR3 outperforms current retrieval-based approaches on retrieval, NLP and clinical metrics, highlighting the value of conditioning retrieval anatomically, temporally and clinically for advancing automated radiology report generation.

AI.tldr: STAR3是一个多模态、时空注意力检索框架，用于自动生成放射学报告，能够将区域级解剖信息与临床指征和胸部X光研究的纵向变化相结合。该框架使用目标检测器识别解剖学上有意义的区域，并根据当前临床背景和当前与既往检查之间观察到的变化来检索语义相关的报告句子。
AI.motivation: 放射学在现代医疗中至关重要，但不断增长的影像需求和持续的劳动力短缺给报告能力和临床工作流程带来压力。现有的基于检索的自动报告生成方法仍然不够灵活，缺乏明确的解剖学依据，且未考虑纵向疾病进展或可用的临床背景。
AI.method: 该框架采用目标检测器识别解剖学上有意义的区域，并基于当前临床背景以及既往和当前检查之间观察到的变化，检索语义相关的报告句子。这种设计实现了解剖学和时间上受限的报告生成，更好地反映临床报告实践。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-CXR数据集上的实验表明，STAR3在检索、NLP和临床指标上优于当前的基于检索的方法，突出了在解剖学、时间学和临床学上受限的检索对推进自动放射学报告生成的价值。
AI.conclusion: 通过在解剖学、时间维度和临床背景三个维度进行条件限制的检索方法，能够显著提升自动放射学报告生成的质量和临床相关性，为缓解放射科医生的工作负担提供了有效途径。

The application domains are entirely different - medical AI vs computer graphics/motion synthesis. Despite possibly using some computer vision techniques, the goal, output, and domain are fundamentally mismatched.

title: Grounded autonomous research: a fault-tolerant LLM pipeline from corpus to manuscript in frontier computational physics
comment: 39 pages, 5 figures. Accepted at the ICML 2026 AI for Science Workshop (https://openreview.net/forum?id=R5YXaPgUAx). Includes the pipeline-generated companion physics manuscript as an appendix. Data and scaffolding archive: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21126996
summary: Autonomous-research agents have demonstrated end-to-end LLM automation in machine-learning sandboxes where execution provides calibration. Frontier physical science differs categorically: physical reasoning underlies every methodology choice, toolchains are often underdocumented, and calibration must come from external literature anchors - which unscaffolded agents cite but do not confront, hallucinating plausible, unverifiable results from internal priors. We present a pipeline that runs end-to-end from a corpus of 11,083 recent condensed-matter physics arXiv papers to a publication-grade manuscript with three substantive physics findings (here on altermagnetic piezomagnetism): the agent autonomously conceives a research direction by mapping the corpus, calibrates methodology by reproducing published references, conducts novel first-principles computations, and writes the manuscript - grounded in literature throughout, across 47 fresh-context sessions in six phases sharing only on-disk state, with 2,162 literature-consultation events. Fault tolerance emerges from redundancy: fresh-context isolation, distributed grounding, and adversarial review catch what any single session misses; pre- and post-pilot stages are fully autonomous, and pilot requires bounded human intervention only at reproduction failures - operational knowledge curation, not scientific direction. Two paired failure modes - a pre-architecture baseline and a no-pilot ablation - isolate structurally enforced numerical confrontation at calibration checkpoints as the operative grounding mechanism. The primitives, characterized failure modes, and quantified intervention pattern lay a foundation for autonomous research in high-stakes scientific domains beyond computational physics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个端到端的自主研究代理管道，能够从大量arXiv论文语料库中自主发现研究课题、复现文献方法、执行计算并撰写可发表级论文。针对物理科学中LLM代理易产生幻觉、缺乏校准的问题，该系统通过47个fresh-context会话、2162次文献咨询事件，实现了对altermagnetic piezomagnetism的三个实质性物理发现。
AI.motivation: 当前自主研究代理在机器学习沙箱中表现良好，但物理科学有本质区别：物理推理是方法论选择的基础，工具链往往缺乏文档，校准必须来自外部文献锚点，而未加引导的代理只是引用文献而不面对它，会基于内部先验产生看似合理但无法验证的幻觉结果。
AI.method: 开发了一个端到端管道，包括六个阶段：1)通过映射语料库自主构思研究方向；2)通过复现已发表参考文献来校准方法；3)进行新颖的第一性原理计算；4)撰写稿件。系统采用fresh-context隔离、分布式接地和对抗性审查实现容错，仅在复现失败时需要有限人类干预。
AI.result: 系统从11,083篇凝聚态物理arXiv论文的语料库中生成了关于altermagnetic piezomagnetism的三个实质性物理发现，并产出了publication级别的稿件。实验证明，结构化强制数值 confrontation（数值对抗）在校准检查点处是有效的接地机制，两个配对失败模式（预架构基线和无引导消融）验证了这一机制。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为高风险科学领域的自主研究奠定了基础，通过量化干预模式、特征化失败模式和 primitives（原语），证明了物理科学中自主研究的可行性。关键创新在于通过fresh-context隔离、分布式接地和对抗性审查实现容错，以及在校准检查点强制进行数值 confrontation以确保结果的科学可靠性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about computational physics and autonomous research agents for discovering physics topics, not about computer graphics, video generation, or 3D motion synthesis. The application domain is completely different - it's about using LLMs for physics research automation, not about generating 3D motions from video or visual features. No relevance to the computer graphics motion generation research profile.

title: Evaluating Vision-Language Models as a Zero-Shot Learning Alternative to You Only Look Once and Optical Character Recognition for Nigerian License Plate Recognition
summary: License Plate Recognition (LPR) systems are critical tools in traffic monitoring, security enforcement, and urban mobility management. Traditional LPR systems often rely on a multi-stage pipeline involving object detection using You Only Look Once (YOLO) and Optical Character Recognition (OCR), which suffer from limitations such as high resource demands, poor performance in unstructured environments, and the need for large annotated datasets. This study explores the potential of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as a unified, zeroshot learning solution for Nigerian license plate recognition. Using a curated dataset of 88 challenging real-world images collected in Nigeria, we evaluate five selected VLMs: Gemini 2.0 Flash Exp (Google DeepMind), Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct (Alibaba), GPT-4o (OpenAI), Claude 4 Sonnet (Anthropic), and Llama 3.2 Vision 90b (Meta). Results based on Character Error Rate (CER) reveal that Gemini and Qwen significantly outperform other models in both accuracy and robustness, on the challenging image scenarios. This work highlights the practical advantages of VLMs over YOLO+OCR, questions the claims by model providers, and compares the performances of the VLMs.

title: DRIFTLENS: Measuring Memory-Induced Reasoning Drift in Personalized Language Models
summary: Personalization changes what a model says to a user; we show that it can also change the reasoning trajectory used to justify the response. Modern LLMs personalize interactions by storing user attributes, preferences, and prior context, then injecting this information into future prompts. We study whether such memory reshapes reasoning on open-ended questions where no single ground-truth answer exists. To quantify this effect, we introduce DRIFTLENS, a ground-truth-free framework that maps each expressed reasoning step to a value category and measures divergence between a question's no-memory trajectory and its trajectory under injected user-attribute memory. We first validate that DRIFTLENS distinguishes content-free pragmatic noise from substantive reasoning changes. Across four LLMs and 10 user-attribute categories, including age, occupation, and disability, user-attribute memory induces medium-to-large reasoning drift above each model's pragmatic-noise floor, even when final answers remain fluent, on-topic, and plausible. We then evaluate GRPO- and DPO-based post-training methods for reducing drift. Both reduce drift, but neither uniformly dominates; effects on downstream capability, helpfulness, and instruction following are model-and reward-dependent. These results suggest that memory-induced reasoning drift is a measurable and only partly mitigated failure mode of personalized language models.

AI.tldr: 个性化不仅改变LLM的输出内容，还会改变推理过程。现代LLM通过存储用户属性和偏好来进行个性化，但这种记忆会重塑开放式问题的推理轨迹。研究引入DRIFTLENS框架，发现用户属性记忆会导致中等至大型的推理漂移，即使最终答案保持流畅、相关和合理。
AI.motivation: 研究现代LLM通过存储用户属性、偏好和上下文来进行个性化交互，这种记忆是否会重塑没有标准答案的开放式问题的推理过程。
AI.method: 引入DRIFTLENS框架，将每个表达的推理步骤映射到价值类别，测量无记忆问题与其在注入用户属性记忆下的推理轨迹之间的分歧。在四个LLM和10个用户属性类别（包括年龄、职业、残疾等）上进行验证。
AI.result: 用户属性记忆诱导了中到大型的推理漂移，超过了每个模型的语用噪声基线，即使最终答案保持流畅、符合主题和合理。GRPO和 DPO后训练方法都可以减少漂移，但都不能统一主导；对下游能力、帮助性和指令遵循的影响取决于模型和奖励。
AI.conclusion: 记忆诱导的推理漂移是个性化语言模型的一个可测量且仅被部分缓解的失败模式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM personalization and reasoning drift measurement in NLP, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), VLM for quality supervision, and 2D-to-3D visual feature extraction. This paper addresses none of these areas - it's about language model reasoning processes, not visual/motion synthesis.

title: ComplexMimic: Human-Scene Interaction Imitation in Complex 3D Environments
summary: Physics-based Human-Scene Interaction (HSI) imitation learning is crucial for embodied intelligence as it bridges the gap between kinematic 3D motions and real-world dynamics. However, most existing methods focus on simplified scene settings, leaving complex environments largely unexplored, which limits their applicability in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we focus on HSI mimicry in complex environments. Under this complex setting, we observe an inherent trade-off between successfully performing interaction and maintaining natural, physically plausible motions. To address this challenge, we propose ComplexMimic, a framework that reconstructs diverse HSI by interpreting imperfect MoCap data. First, we introduce a Dual Flow Strategy, which learns two complementary experts: an imitation expert for accurate motion tracking and an interaction expert for collision-aware adaptation in complex scenes. Second, naive multi-expert distillation, which treats all experts equally, often under-samples challenging behaviors, limiting effective learning. To mitigate this issue, we propose a difficulty-aware distillation strategy that adaptively weights supervision and prioritizes hard-yet-learnable trajectories guided by failure statistics and learning progress signals. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that our approach outperforms current state-of-the-art methods. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/LuPan23/ComplexMimic.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ComplexMimic框架，解决复杂环境下人体-场景交互(HSI)的模仿学习问题，通过双流策略和难度感知蒸馏实现对不完美MoCap数据的物理 plausible 重建。
AI.motivation: 现有HSI方法主要针对简单场景设置，复杂环境下的交互研究不足；同时存在成功执行交互与保持自然物理动作之间的内在权衡问题。
AI.method: 1) 双流策略：学习两个互补专家——模仿专家负责精确动作追踪，交互专家负责复杂场景中的碰撞感知适应；2) 难度感知蒸馏：根据失败统计和学习进度信号自适应加权监督，优先处理困难但可学习的轨迹。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上超越当前最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ComplexMimic能有效重建复杂环境下的多样化HSI，通过难度感知蒸馏缓解了多专家蒸馏中挑战性行为采样不足的问题。

relevance_reason: The paper is in the Computer Graphics domain (3D human motion) but addresses a different application scenario. It focuses on Human-Scene Interaction (HSI) imitation from MoCap data, while the research profile specifically targets 2D video-to-3D motion generation using video generation models (Wan, Seedance), VLM supervision, and visual feature extraction. ComplexMimic doesn't use any of the specified methods (video generation priors, VLM, two-stage pipeline) - it uses MoCap data with a dual-stream imitation learning approach. This is moderately relevant as it deals with 3D human motion but misses the key methodological requirements of the profile.

title: Hierarchical Anti-Aesthetics: Protecting Facial Privacy against Customized Diffusion Models
summary: The rise of customized diffusion models has fueled a boom in personalized visual content creation, but it also introduces serious risks of malicious misuse, thereby posing threats to personal privacy. Image aesthetics are strongly correlated with human perception of image quality. Motivated by this observation, we address facial privacy protection from a novel aesthetic perspective by degrading the generation quality of maliciously customized models, thus reducing facial identity leakage. Specifically, we propose a Hierarchical Anti-Aesthetics (HAA) framework that exploits aesthetic cues at multiple perceptual levels. HAA consists of two key branches: (1) Global Anti-Aesthetics, which degrades overall aesthetics and generation quality by constructing a global anti-aesthetic reward mechanism and a corresponding loss; and (2) Local Anti-Aesthetics, which disrupts facial identity by using a local anti-aesthetic reward mechanism and loss to guide adversarial perturbations toward facial regions. By integrating both branches, HAA achieves anti-aesthetic degradation from a global to a local level during customized generation. Extensive experiments show that HAA outperforms existing methods in identity removal, providing an effective tool for protecting facial privacy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从美学角度保护人脸隐私的新方法，通过破坏定制扩散模型的美学质量来减少人脸身份泄露。框架HAA包含全局和局部两个反美学分支，能够从整体到局部逐步降低生成质量并破坏面部身份识别。
AI.motivation:
1. 个性化扩散模型的普及带来了恶意滥用的风险，威胁个人隐私
2. 图像美学与人类对图像质量的感知高度相关
3. 现有方法缺乏从美学角度保护人脸隐私的研究
AI.method:
提出Hierarchical Anti-Aesthetics (HAA)框架，包含两个关键分支：
1. 全局反美学：构建全局反美学奖励机制和损失，降低整体美学和生成质量
2. 局部反美学：使用局部反美学奖励机制，引导对抗扰动指向面部区域，破坏身份识别
通过整合两个分支实现从全局到局部的反美学退化
AI.result: 实验表明HAA在身份移除方面优于现有方法，提供了有效的人脸隐私保护工具
AI.conclusion: 从美学角度出发保护人脸隐私是一种可行且有效的新思路，HAA框架能够有效降低定制模型的人脸身份泄露风险

relevance_reason: This paper is about facial privacy protection against image generation diffusion models, which is completely unrelated to the research profile about 3D motion generation from 2D videos. The application domains are entirely different: face protection (computer vision/privacy) vs. human motion synthesis (computer graphics). While both mention diffusion models, they serve completely different purposes - one disrupts image generation quality for privacy, the other uses video generation as priors for motion synthesis. The pain points, methods, and goals have no overlap.

title: Steerability via constraints: a substrate for scalable oversight of coding agents
comment: Accepted to the Deep Learning for Code Workshop at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning, Seoul, South Korea, 2026
summary: Coding agents are capable; human oversight is the bottleneck. Unconstrained agents introduce security risks, erode codebase scalability, and make human review increasingly costly. We argue that the same methods used for decades to manage large human engineering teams: access control, network policies, strict coding conventions enforced by tooling; transfer directly to coding agents, and are cheaper (in token) than recent agentic scaffolding. We sketch a start-to-end system on this principle, and report a controlled experiment in scalable oversight: a small reviewer (Gemma 4 e4b) inspects a Python codebase containing 11 inserted backdoors. Recall rises from 54.5% (unconstrained, no tools) to 90.9% (constrained substrate plus a ~200-LoC `docs` CLI), with substrate and tools contributing independently. We choose Python deliberately: substrate-level oversight gains are largest where the language gives the fewest guarantees by default; the principles extend to languages like Rust.

AI.tldr: 论文提出将传统软件工程中管理大型人类团队的方法（访问控制、网络策略、严格编码规范）应用于AI编码智能体监督，并通过一个受控实验验证：使用Gemma 4 e4b审查器检查包含11个后门的Python代码库，召回率从54.5%提升至90.9%。
AI.motivation: AI编码智能体虽能力强，但无约束的智能体会引入安全风险、破坏代码库可扩展性，并使人工审查成本升高。现有智能体脚手架方法成本较高（token消耗大），需要更轻量级的监督方案。
AI.method: 采用受控实验方法：1）使用Gemma 4 e4b作为小型审查器；2）在Python代码库中植入11个后门；3）对比无约束（无工具）、有约束 substrate + ~200行代码的docs CLI两种条件下的检测效果。
AI.result: 召回率从54.5%（无约束、无工具）提升至90.9%（约束substrate + docs CLI），substrate和工具独立贡献提升效果。选择Python是因为其默认保障最少，substrate级监督增益最大，原理可扩展至Rust等语言。
AI.conclusion: 管理人类工程团队的传统方法可直接迁移用于AI编码智能体监督，且比近期智能体脚手架方法更节省token。约束substrate配合轻量级工具可显著提升安全审查效果。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI coding agents and software security (backdoor detection in Python code), not Computer Graphics or 3D motion synthesis. The application domain is completely different - it's software engineering/security, not computer graphics, video generation, or motion synthesis. While both involve LLMs, the Gemma 4 model here is used for code review, not for visual quality supervision or motion generation. The pain points, methods, and goals have zero overlap with the research profile.

title: PWM-ArtGen: Part World Model for Articulated Object Generation
summary: The key challenge in articulated 3D object generation from a single image is accurately predicting the underlying kinematic structure. Existing methods either infer kinematic parameters directly from a static image that lacks dynamic part-level kinematic relationships, or estimate parameters from visual dynamics generated from a single image, which is prone to accumulated errors of two steps. Moreover, the limited scale and diversity of existing annotated datasets further hinder generalization to complex, real-world objects. To overcome these limitations, we propose to learn the joint distribution of visual dynamics and kinematic parameters. Recognizing that articulated objects can be formulated as dynamic systems, we propose a unified Part World Model called PWM-ArtGen. To leverage unannotated data, this model couples action diffusion and image diffusion with independent diffusion timesteps, which enables visual branch co-training. We further curate a photorealistic dataset of 19.7k part-level image pairs without kinematic annotations, to support co-training. Experiments demonstrate that PWM-ArtGen substantially outperforms existing baselines in the resting state and exhibits strong zero-shot generalization to out-of-distribution objects.

AI.tldr: 提出PWM-ArtGen统一部分世界模型，通过耦合动作扩散和图像扩散学习视觉动态与运动参数的联合分布，解决从单图像预测关节式3D对象运动结构的难题
AI.motivation: 解决从单张图像生成关节式3D对象时准确预测底层运动结构的问题；现有方法存在静态图像缺乏动态部分级运动关系或两步估计导致误差累积的局限性；现有标注数据集规模小、多样性不足
AI.method: 提出统一的部分世界模型PWM-ArtGen，耦合动作扩散和图像扩散，具有独立的扩散时间步，实现视觉分支协同训练
AI.result: 实验表明PWM-ArtGen在静止状态预测方面显著优于现有基线，并对分布外对象表现出强大的零样本泛化能力
AI.conclusion: PWM-ArtGen在静态状态预测方面显著优于现有基线，并展现出对分布外对象的强零样本泛化能力

relevance_reason: While the paper uses diffusion models for 3D motion generation (similar methodology), the APPLICATION DOMAIN is fundamentally different. The research profile focuses on human motion generation from 2D video guidance, while this paper focuses on articulated OBJECT generation (mechanical objects like robots, doors, etc.) from single images. Articulated object motion is NOT the same as human motion generation - they have different motion characteristics, visual features, and applications. The paper does address the domain gap between 2D visual features and 3D motion (similar pain point), but the target application is completely different (objects vs humans).

title: Fast Multi-dimensional Refusal Subspaces via RFM-AGOP
comment: Accepted to the Mechanistic Interpretability Workshop at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning, Seoul, South Korea, 2026
summary: Steering and monitoring activations in Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used for both safety and interpretability. Early work assumed behaviours are encoded along single linear directions, but recent findings suggest complex behaviours, such as the refusal to answer harmful queries, live in multi-dimensional subspaces. However, existing methods for extracting these subspaces are computationally expensive, which becomes prohibitive on reasoning models who produce long reasoning traces. By adapting the Recursive Feature Machine (RFM) algorithm -- which can be computed efficiently -- with a probe-informed initialization, we are able to identify the multi-dimensional refusal subspace in seconds, on reasoning (Qwen 3) and non-reasoning (Qwen 2.5) models. While RFM allows for faster subspace identification, it also showed better performances on the ablation task than its alternatives. More work is planned to better understand the relations between subspaces found by different methods. If confirmed, RFM could be a cheap and scalable complement to existing subspace-extraction methods in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用递归特征机(RFM)算法快速提取LLM中的多维拒绝子空间，相比现有方法能在数秒内完成，且在消融任务上表现更好，可作为现有子空间提取方法的低成本可扩展补充。
AI.motivation: 早期研究假设行为沿单一线性方向编码，但最新发现表明复杂行为（如拒绝回答有害查询）存在于多维子空间中。然而现有子空间提取方法计算成本高，尤其是在处理长推理痕迹的推理模型时变得不可行。
AI.method: 通过探针 informed 初始化适配递归特征机(RFM)算法，该算法可高效计算，能在推理模型(Qwen 3)和非推理模型(Qwen 2.5)上快速识别多维拒绝子空间。
AI.result: RFM 能在数秒内识别拒绝子空间，且在消融任务上比替代方法表现更好。
AI.conclusion: RFM 可能是一种廉价且可扩展的现有LLM子空间提取方法的补充。未来计划进一步研究不同方法发现的子空间之间的关系。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about extracting refusal subspaces in Large Language Models (LLMs) for AI safety and alignment, focusing on LLM behavior analysis. The application domain is NLP/AI safety, not Computer Graphics or 3D motion generation. While both mention "feature extraction," the paper addresses entirely different problems (LLM refusal behavior) with no connection to video generation, motion synthesis, or visual feature extraction for 3D generation. The methods (RFM algorithm for probing LLM representations) are completely unrelated to the research profile's methods (VLM, video generation models like Wan/Seedance, 3D motion generation).

title: Embracing Intra-Class Heterogeneity for Semi-Supervised Medical Image Segmentation: From Diversity to Precision
summary: Due to the scarcity of expert-annotated data, Semi-Supervised Medical Image Segmentation (SSMIS) has emerged as a promising approach. Many anatomical structures in medical images exhibit significant intra-class heterogeneity, with different regions showing heterogeneous intensity patterns within the same structure. However, existing methods inadequately exploit this intensity-manifested intra-class heterogeneity, resulting in uniform structural representations and imprecise segmentation. Furthermore, the scarcity of labeled data makes it more difficult to effectively capture such complex heterogeneity. To address this, we propose Multiple Prototype Contrastive Learning (MPCL), an SSMIS framework that possesses better diversity and better precision. It consists of three novel designs: First, we provide structural representations with better diversity and propose Intensity-aligned Heterogeneous Prototype Generation (IHPG) that effectively models intra-class heterogeneity by generating multiple prototypes aligned with intensity characteristics. Second, we further enhance more diverse structural representations and build a solid foundation for more precise segmentation through Prototypical Space Optimization (PSO) that systematically optimizes a more discriminative and generalizable prototypical space. Finally, we achieve segmentation results with better precision through Dual-branch Knowledge Alignment (DKA) that efficiently promotes intra-class heterogeneity knowledge transfer from prototypical space to the segmentation network. Extensive experiments on three medical image datasets with significant intra-class heterogeneity demonstrate that MPCL significantly outperforms existing methods, especially under extremely limited labeled data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Multiple Prototype Contrastive Learning (MPCL)框架,用于半监督医学图像分割。该框架通过三个创新设计处理医学图像中的类内异质性问题:IHPG生成与强度特征对齐的异质原型,PSO优化原型空间的可辨别性和可泛化性,DKA实现知识从原型空间到分割网络的高效转移。实验表明该方法在极有限标注数据下显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 医学图像中解剖结构存在显著的类内异质性,同一结构内不同区域呈现异质强度模式。现有方法未能充分利用这种强度表现的类内异质性,导致结构表示同质化、分割精度低。此外,标注数据的稀缺进一步增加了捕获复杂异质性的难度。
AI.method: 提出MPCL框架包含三个核心模块:1)IHPG(强度对齐异质原型生成):生成与强度特征对齐的多个原型,有效建模类内异质性;2)PSO(原型空间优化):系统优化原型空间,增强表示的可辨别性和可泛化性;3)DKA(双分支知识对齐):促进类内异质性知识从原型空间到分割网络的高效转移。
AI.result: 在三个具有显著类内异质性的医学图像数据集上进行广泛实验,MPCL在极有限标注数据条件下显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MPCL框架通过多原型对比学习有效解决了半监督医学图像分割中的类内异质性建模问题,在标注数据稀缺场景下展现出优异的分割性能和泛化能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical image segmentation, which is completely unrelated to the research profile in Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion generation from video. Even though both fields may use deep learning techniques, the application domains are entirely different: medical imaging vs computer graphics/3D motion synthesis. The methods (prototype contrastive learning for semi-supervised segmentation) have no relevance to video generation models, VLMs for motion synthesis, or visual feature extraction for 3D motion generation.

title: Text-Driven 3D Indoor Scene Synthesis in Non-Manhattan Environments
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in 3D indoor synthesis for Manhattan environments. However, existing methods often fail to capture plausible object layout patterns in non-Manhattan settings, primarily because they struggle to model non-orthogonal spatial relationships, leading to high geometric violations and low physical fidelity. To address this challenge, we propose SPG-Layout, a novel text-driven framework designed to generate physically plausible indoor scenes within complex non-Manhattan environments. Specifically, we first utilize statistical priors of object distributions to guide the training process, enhancing environmental understanding and fidelity. Furthermore, mirroring human design workflows, we adopt a hierarchical layout strategy that prioritizes the placement of large objects, thereby substantially minimizing layout violations. By synergizing these components, SPG-Layout achieves a balanced optimization of semantic realism and physical plausibility. To evaluate performance in these complex settings, we constructed a new benchmark comprising 500 diverse non-Manhattan environments. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SPG-Layout consistently and significantly outperforms existing methods across both Manhattan and non-Manhattan environments. The code will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: SPG-Layout是一个新型的文本驱动框架，用于在复杂的非曼哈顿环境中生成物理上合理的室内场景。该方法利用统计先验指导训练，并采用分层布局策略优先放置大型物体，从而在语义真实性和物理合理性之间取得平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在非曼哈顿环境中无法捕捉合理的物体布局模式，主要因为难以建模非正交的空间关系，导致高几何违规和低物理真实性。
AI.method: 1. 利用物体分布的统计先验来指导训练过程，增强环境理解和保真度；2. 采用分层布局策略，优先放置大型物体，最大限度减少布局违规。
AI.result: 在包含500个不同非曼哈顿环境的新基准测试上，SPG-Layout在曼哈顿和非曼哈顿环境中均显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SPG-Layout通过结合统计先验和分层布局策略，成功实现了语义真实性和物理合理性的平衡优化，为非曼哈顿室内场景合成提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 3D indoor SCENE LAYOUT synthesis, while the research profile is about 3D MOTION GENERATION from video. These are completely different application domains in computer graphics. The profile focuses on video-to-motion synthesis pipelines using VLMs and video generation models, whereas this paper uses statistical priors and hierarchical layout strategies for generating static room configurations. The pain points, methods, and objectives are entirely mismatched.

title: Comprehensive Robustness Analysis of LiDAR-based 3D Object Detection in Autonomous Driving
summary: Recent advancements in LiDAR-only 3D object detection have demonstrated improved detection accuracy over benchmark datasets. However, the adversarial robustness of these models remains untested. Very few adversarial robustness studies exist for LiDAR-only 3D object detection and unfortunately, even they are limited to legacy models. Moreover, there is a systemic gap in the existing evaluation frameworks that rely simply on mAP ignoring other structural and predictive factors. To fill this gap, we propose a holistic framework that evaluates adversarial robustness using two structural factors (point cloud density and point cloud localization) and three predictive factors (misclassification, localization error, distance from ego). Using this framework, we perform an empirical study and critical analysis on recent and legacy state-of-the-art models using adversarial attacks specifically designed for LiDAR-based models. Our key finding is that high-capacity, voxel-based detectors are more susceptible to structured coordinate perturbations than pillar-based detectors. Additionally, non-anchor-based detectors demonstrate poor adversarial robustness, which necessitates rethinking model training techniques. Overall, our results demonstrate that recent models are as vulnerable to adversarial attacks as their predecessors. Therefore, we argue that there is a need to improve the evaluation benchmarks for 3D object detection that not only reward architectural modifications for improving detection accuracy, but also evaluate whether the design choices improve adversarial robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文针对LiDAR-only 3D目标检测的对抗鲁棒性进行研究，提出了一个综合评估框架（包含2个结构因素和3个预测因素），对多个先进模型进行实证分析，发现高容量voxel-based检测器比pillar-based检测器更容易受到对抗攻击，非anchor-based检测器鲁棒性较差。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR-only 3D目标检测的对抗鲁棒性研究不足，且现有评估框架仅依赖mAP，忽略了其他结构和预测因素。
AI.method: 提出 holistic framework: 结构因素(点云密度、点云定位) + 预测因素(误分类、定位误差、距 ego 距离)；对多个SOTA模型进行对抗攻击实验
AI.result: 1) Voxel-based检测器比pillar-based检测器更容易受到结构化坐标扰动攻击；2) 非anchor-based检测器对抗鲁棒性较差；3) 最新模型与之前模型一样容易受到对抗攻击
AI.conclusion: 需要改进3D目标检测的评估基准，不仅要奖励提高检测精度的架构修改，还要评估设计选择是否改善了对抗鲁棒性

title: Automated grading of Linux/bash examinations using large language models: a four-level cognitive taxonomy approach
summary: Scalable and reliable grading of command-line examinations remains a challenge in computing education, where rising enrolments make manual marking difficult and rule-based autograders cannot handle partial credit, equivalent solutions, or syntactic variation. This paper evaluates whether four frontier Large Language Models (GPT, Claude Opus, Gemini, and GLM) can approximate expert judgment when grading short Linux/bash command responses. The study adopts a four-level cognitive taxonomy that combines cognitive complexity and operational impact, ranging from information retrieval (L1) and basic file manipulation (L2) to structural operations (L3) and advanced system management (L4). The models were tested with two prompt variants, a minimal baseline and a rubric-enhanced version, on 1200 real responses from second-year Computer Engineering students independently graded by three expert instructors. Gemini~3.0 Pro with rubric-guided prompting achieved the highest human-AI agreement (ICC(3,1) = 0.888, MAE = 0.10, Bland-Altman bias = -0.014). Agreement declined consistently as taxonomy level increased, with the largest discrepancies at higher levels. Across all models, rubric quality had a larger effect than provider choice, with structured prompts consistently improving agreement. These results show that question complexity is a reliable predictor of the difficulty LLMs face in grading accurately, and they establish a principled, taxonomy-based framework for determining which questions are suitable for AI-assisted grading and which require human review, while also providing a transferable evaluation protocol and prompt templates.

AI.tldr: 研究评估了四种前沿大语言模型（GPT、Claude Opus、Gemini、GLM）在 grading Linux/bash 命令题目时的表现，发现Gemini 3.0 Pro配合rubric提示达到最高人机一致性（ICC=0.888），但随着题目认知复杂度增加，模型性能下降。
AI.motivation: 计算教育中命令行考试评分面临挑战：1）学生人数增加使人工评分困难；2）基于规则的自动评分器无法处理部分分数、等效解决方案或语法变体。需要找到可靠且可扩展的评分解决方案。
AI.method: 使用四层认知分类学（信息检索L1、基础文件操作L2、结构操作L3、高级系统管理L4）评估1200道真实学生作答，采用两种提示变体（最小基线和rubric增强版），比较四种LLM与三位专家讲师的评分结果。
AI.result: Gemini 3.0 Pro配合rubric引导提示达到最高人机一致性（ICC(3,1)=0.888, MAE=0.10, Bland-Altman偏差=-0.014）。一致性随分类学级别增加而下降，高级别题目差异最大。Rubric质量对一致性的影响超过模型提供商选择。
AI.conclusion: 题目复杂度是LLM评分难度的可靠预测因素；建立了基于分类学的原则框架，用于确定哪些题目适合AI辅助评分、哪些需要人工审核；提供了可转移的评估协议和提示模板。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about using LLMs to grade Linux/bash exam questions in computational education - an entirely different field. The research profile is in Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), and Visual Language Models for quality supervision. The paper's application domain (educational assessment) has no overlap with the target domain (computer graphics, motion synthesis, video generation).
