title: HandsOnWorld: Unconstrained Egocentric Video Generation with Camera-Disentangled Hand Control
summary: We present HandsOnWorld, a framework for hand-controlled egocentric video generation that forgoes multi-view and marker-based motion capture, learning instead from unconstrained monocular video. Such generality is bottlenecked by the scarcity of scalable 3D hand annotations: large egocentric corpora lack finger-level labels, whereas precise hand datasets are confined to narrow, instrumented settings, limiting prior hand-controlled generators to restricted scene distributions. We instead annotate 3D hands directly on in-the-wild egocentric video through monocular reconstruction, introducing a protagonist-centered annotation pipeline that filters the reconstructions at the action-semantic, image-quality, and 3D-geometric levels to build EgoVid-Pro, a dataset of clean, protagonist-only hand trajectories spanning 103K clips and roughly 12M frames across diverse everyday scenes. To resolve the camera-hand entanglement induced by large ego-motion, we further propose the Plücker Hand Map, a 3D-aware control signal that extends Plücker-ray representations from camera rays to the hand surface, disentangling camera and hand motion at the representation level. Experiments show that \method surpasses prior hand-controlled generators in reconstruction fidelity and control accuracy, and generalizes to out-of-distribution everyday scenes beyond the laboratory datasets on which prior methods rely.

AI.tldr: 提出HandsOnWorld框架，用于手部控制的自我中心视频生成，无需多视角和基于标记器的动作捕捉，而是从无约束的单目视频中学习。
AI.motivation: 当前瓶颈在于3D手部注释的稀缺性：大型自我中心视频缺少手指级标签，而精确的手部数据集局限于狭窄的仪器化场景，导致先前的手部控制生成器受限于受限的场景分布。
AI.method: 通过单目重建直接在野外自我中心视频上标注3D手部，提出以主人公为中心的标注流程，在动作语义、图像质量和3D几何层面过滤重建结果，构建EgoVid-Pro数据集（103K个片段，约12M帧）。提出Plücker Hand Map，将Plücker射线表示从相机射线扩展到手部表面，在表示层面解耦相机和手部运动。
AI.result: 在重建保真度和控制精度方面超越先前手部控制生成器，并泛化到先前方法依赖的实验室数据集之外的分布外日常场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了从无约束单目视频中学习手部控制的通用框架，通过Plücker Hand Map表示解决了相机-手部运动纠缠问题，并构建了大规模多样化的EgoVid-Pro数据集。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses hand video generation with 3D hand reconstruction, which touches on some visual feature extraction concepts from the profile. However, the core application domain is fundamentally different: this paper focuses on 2D egocentric video generation with hand control, not 3D motion synthesis for computer graphics. The pain points in the profile are about 3D motion generation quality assessment, text-to-motion semantic consistency, and using video priors for 3D motion synthesis - none of which this paper addresses. It's a video generation paper (2D) rather than a 3D motion generation paper.

title: EvoPolicyGym: Evaluating Autonomous Policy Evolution in Interactive Environments
summary: Autonomous agents are increasingly expected to improve executable policies through feedback, yet existing evaluations often collapse this process into a final score or confound it with open-ended software-engineering progress. We introduce Autonomous Policy Evolution, a controlled evaluation setting in which a harness-model agent repeatedly edits an executable policy system under a fixed interaction budget. We instantiate this setting in EvoPolicyGym, a benchmark built from compact interactive RL environments that evaluates how agents iteratively improve explored policies. On the EvoPolicyGym suite, GPT-5.5 achieves the strongest aggregate rank score and top-two performance on all 16 environments. Beyond leaderboard results, EvoPolicyGym also provides trajectory-level diagnostics that distinguish how agents allocate budget, convert feedback into parametric tuning. These analyses show that strong autonomous policy evolution depends not only on isolated task wins, but on discovering task-appropriate mechanisms and refining policies under bounded feedback.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Autonomous Policy Evolution评估框架和EvoPolicyGym基准，用于评估智能体在固定交互预算下迭代改进可执行策略的能力，GPT-5.5在16个环境中取得最佳综合排名。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法将策略改进过程简化为最终分数，或将其与开放式软件工程进展混淆，无法有效评估智能体通过反馈迭代改进可执行策略的能力。
AI.method: 构建EvoPolicyGym基准（基于紧凑交互式RL环境），在固定交互预算下让智能体反复编辑可执行策略系统，通过轨迹级诊断分析智能体如何分配预算并将反馈转化为参数调整。
AI.result: GPT-5.5在16个环境中均取得前两名表现，获得最强综合排名。分析表明成功的策略演化不仅依赖孤立的任务胜利，更取决于发现任务适当的机制并在有限反馈下精炼策略。
AI.conclusion: 强自主策略演化能力的关键在于：发现任务适当机制+在有限反馈下精炼策略，而不仅是单一任务表现。

relevance_reason: This paper is about autonomous policy evolution and reinforcement learning agents in interactive environments (EvoPolicyGym benchmark), which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics field. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), VLM-based quality supervision, and 2D-to-3D visual feature extraction for motion synthesis. This paper addresses none of these pain points and uses completely different methods (RL policy evaluation) rather than the visual/motion generation methods specified in the profile.

title: DeepGaze3.5-VL: Modeling Scanpaths via Autoregressive Token Prediction
summary: Understanding human visual attention on a scene over time has applications in domains such as interface design and inferring cognitive states. Modeling visual scanpaths has historically relied on specialized architectures with hand-crafted priors. While these architectures can model fixation sequences, their rigid structural biases restrict easy extendability and flexible conditioning. For instance, integrating task-specific instructions or adapting to distinct viewer identities requires custom, disjoint architectural additions. We frame scanpath prediction purely as a discrete sequence modeling task. By mapping coordinates into a text vocabulary, we leverage the pretrained representations of Vision-Language Models. This framing absorbs diverse factors of variation: simple prompting allows for global conditioning, such as providing viewer identities to capture personalized biases, or task-specific objectives like visual search. The framework can also integrate per-fixation attributes, such as individual fixation durations, alongside spatial locations. The autoregressive alignment enables the scalable, exact computation of per-fixation log-likelihoods, directly equivalent to the commonly used Information Gain (IG) metric. Our model, DeepGaze3.5-VL, establishes a new state-of-the-art across multiple datasets, achieving 2.18 bits of IG on MIT1003, a 46% improvement over DeepGaze III. This advantage persists even when baselines use identical high-capacity vision encoders. Beyond predictive performance, our generative framework serves as a powerful computational tool for direct behavioral interventions, allowing for controlled in-silico simulations that would be experimentally difficult or impossible to conduct in vivo. We demonstrate this ability by performing controlled interventions on the durations of pre-saccadic fixations, recovering known oculomotor phenomena purely from data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将视觉扫视路径预测重新定义为离散序列建模任务，通过将坐标映射为文本词汇并利用预训练的视觉-语言模型（VLM）表示。该框架可灵活整合观众身份、任务特定目标和每次注视的持续时间等多样化因素。模型DeepGaze3.5-VL在多个数据集上取得最先进性能，在MIT1003上达到2.18 bits的Information Gain，比DeepGaze III提升46%。
AI.motivation: 传统扫视路径预测方法依赖具有手工先验的专业化架构，虽然可以建模注视序列，但僵化的结构偏差限制了可扩展性和灵活的条件设置。集成任务特定指令或适应不同观众身份需要定制化的架构修改，缺乏统一的框架。
AI.method: 将扫视路径预测重新定义为离散序列建模任务。通过将坐标映射为文本词汇，利用预训练视觉-语言模型的表示能力。这种框架设计能够通过简单提示实现全局条件化（如提供观众身份捕获个性化偏差，或视觉搜索等任务目标），并可整合每次注视的属性（如注视持续时间）和空间位置。自回归对齐实现了可扩展的精确每次注视对数似然计算，直接等价于常用的信息增益（IG）指标。
AI.result: 模型DeepGaze3.5-VL在多个数据集上建立新的最先进性能：在MIT1003上达到2.18 bits的Information Gain，比DeepGaze III提升46%。即使基线使用相同的高容量视觉编码器，这一优势仍然存在。
AI.conclusion: 该生成框架不仅提升了预测性能，还可作为强大的计算工具用于直接的行为干预，支持在硅基环境中进行可控模拟（这类实验在活体中难以或无法进行）。通过干预前扫视注视的持续时间，成功恢复了已知的眼球运动现象，证明可从数据中纯粹地提取认知规律。

relevance_reason: This paper is about eye tracking/scanpath prediction (predicting human gaze patterns on 2D images) in the domain of cognitive science and visual perception. This is completely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation from videos. The paper does not address any of the pain points: domain gap between 2D visual features and 3D motion, quality assessment for motion synthesis, semantic consistency for 3D motions, or extracting visual features for 3D generation. Although both use VLMs, the application domains are entirely different - one predicts eye gaze coordinates, the other synthesizes 3D human motions from video inputs.

title: G-RRM: Guiding Symbolic Solvers with Recurrent Reasoning Models
summary:
In this work, we focus on SE-RRMs, a symbol-equivariant instantiation of RRMs that exhibits improved extrapolation to larger problem sizes. We propose a neuro-symbolic approach, ``Guiding with Recurrent Reasoning Models'' (G-RRM), which integrates SE-RRMs with symbolic solvers for constraint satisfaction problems. SE-RRMs act as neural solvers that generate full solution proposals and guide classical symbolic solvers, such as backtracking or SAT-based methods like Glucose 4.1 and CaDiCaL 3.0.0, that produce globally correct solutions. Centrally, we investigate when neural guidance with G-RRM improves the search efficiency of symbolic solvers. %
Our experiments show that the efficacy of G-RRM depends on two conditions: first, the problem instances must have an expansive combinatorial search space to expose potential gains, and second, the solver architecture must be capable of dynamically overwriting its branching choices to recover when neural hints are imperfect. When these conditions hold, guidance drives median conflict counts to zero and yields significant wall-clock speedups: on $9\times9$ Sudoku, where the SE-RRM correctly solves $91.1\%$ of instances, backtracking accelerates by $33.3\times$ and Glucose 4.1 by $1.70\times$ (median, $p<0.001$), with Glucose 4.1 retaining a $1.17\times$ speedup on perfect-hint $25\times25$ grids. In contrast, CaDiCaL 3.0.0, whose runtime is overhead-dominated and which always respects the injected branching hints rather than overwriting them, shows no significant speedup (median $1.02\times$, n.s.) and even a small significant mean slowdown ($0.90\times$) on $9\times9$. These results delineate the regimes in which neural guidance translates into practical speedups.

AI.tldr: 本文提出G-RRM方法，将神经符号求解器SE-RRM与经典符号求解器（如回溯法和SAT求解器）结合，用于求解约束满足问题。实验表明，在搜索空间较大且求解器能动态覆盖分支选择的条件下，神经引导能显著提升求解效率。
AI.motivation: 传统符号求解器在搜索空间庞大的组合优化问题中效率较低，而神经网络的泛化能力可能帮助指导搜索方向，但如何有效结合神经引导与符号求解器仍是开放问题。
AI.method: 提出G-RRM神经符号方法，将SE-RRM作为神经求解器生成完整解提案，引导经典符号求解器（回溯法、Glucose 4.1、CaDiCaL 3.0.0）进行全局正确求解。
AI.result: 在9×9数独上，SE-RRM正确解决91.1%实例，回溯法加速33.3倍，Glucose 4.1加速1.70倍；在完美提示的25×25网格上，Glucose 4.1保持1.17倍加速。CaDiCaL因无法覆盖分支选择，无显著加速。
AI.conclusion: 神经引导能否转化为实际加速取决于两个条件：问题实例需有 expansive 的组合搜索空间，且求解器架构需能动态覆盖分支选择以从不完美的神经提示中恢复。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about constraint satisfaction problems (Sudoku solving) using neural symbolic solvers and SAT solvers - this is in the field of AI/optimization, NOT Computer Graphics. The research profile is about 3D motion generation from 2D videos using VLMs and video generation models. The application domains are completely different: puzzle solving vs. 3D motion synthesis. The methods are also unrelated: SAT solvers vs. video generation and motion synthesis models.

title: ESC: Emotional Self-Correction for Reliable Vision-Language Models
comment: ECCV Main Track 2026 (113 pages, 15 tables, 65 figures). Project Page: https://genai4e.github.io/ESC/?
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved strong performance across diverse multimodal tasks, yet they remain vulnerable to unreliable reasoning. Existing self-correction methods mitigate these issues but typically rely on post-training or carefully engineered feedback, incurring high computational cost. In this work, we revisit this challenge through the lens of emotional cues, asking whether they can activate latent self-correction behaviors in VLMs without additional training. \textbf{We find that emotional signals serve as an effective trigger for self-correction, encouraging more cautious and reflective reasoning}. Motivated by this finding, we propose \escabstract (\textbf{\underline{E}}motional \textbf{\underline{S}}elf-\textbf{\underline{C}}orrection), a training-free self-correction framework. ESC introduces an external verifier that detects potentially incorrect initial responses and injects emotional feedback to encourage model to reflect, and produce a better revised response without additional training. Extensive experiments across safety, hallucination, vision-centric perception, and multimodal reasoning benchmarks show that ESC consistently improves reliability while preserving overall model utility. These results suggest that emotion can function not only as an ability to be recognized, but also as a practical control signal for scalable self-correction in VLMs. \textbf{We therefore believe that ESC provides a strong foundation for a new reliable human-like, emotion-integrated research direction.} Our project is publicly available at \textcolor{red}{https://genai4e.github.io/ESC/}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ESC框架，利用情感信号作为触发器，在不需额外训练的情况下激活视觉语言模型(VLM)的自我修正行为。ESC通过外部验证器检测可能错误的初始响应，并注入情感反馈促使模型反思并生成更好的修正响应。
AI.motivation: 现有自修正方法通常依赖后训练或精心设计的反馈，成本较高。研究问题是情感线索是否可以激活VLMs的潜在自我修正行为，且无需额外训练。
AI.method: 提出ESC（情感自我修正）框架，包含：1）外部验证器检测可能不正确的初始响应；2）注入情感反馈鼓励模型反思；3）在无额外训练的情况下生成修正响应。
AI.result: 在安全、幻觉、视觉中心感知和多模态推理等基准测试上的广泛实验表明，ESC在保持模型整体实用性的同时，始终如一地提高了可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 情感不仅是可以被识别的一种能力，也可以作为可扩展的自我修正的实际控制信号。ESC为可靠的人机情感集成研究方向提供了坚实基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about using emotional signals to trigger self-correction in Vision-Language Models for reliability/safety tasks. It is NOT related to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, or video-to-motion synthesis. While both mention VLM, the paper uses VLM for self-correction/reliability, not for quality supervision in motion synthesis. The application domain is completely different - this is AI reliability research, not computer graphics or motion generation research.

title: TCG-AR: Real-Time Multi-View Augmented Reality for Trading Card Game Streaming
summary: Trading card games are increasingly played and broadcast online, yet live streams remain mostly limited to flat top-down footage of the playing area. Augmenting such streams with virtual models of the played cards would improve the viewing experience, but most existing systems rely on instrumented playing surfaces and embedded chips, which are costly and impractical for casual players and large-scale events. In this work, we present TCG-AR, a novel real-time pipeline that augments trading card games using ordinary RGB cameras alone, without any physical markers or specialized hardware. Our pipeline detects, orients, and identifies the cards on the board, renders virtual content onto each card across all views, and can additionally compose a broadcaststyle view that summarizes the game state for spectators, streaming the augmented feeds to standard broadcasting software such as OBS. To train the detection, orientation, and identification models without manual labeling, we introduce an automatic procedure that generates annotated synthetic training data from a reference set of card images. Then, we evaluate several trained models on a new manually annotated dataset with real images, analyzing performance and runtime throughput that determine real-world usability. Overall, by relying only on commodity cameras and hardware, and by open-sourcing all code, models, and datasets, this work aims to serve as a reference for real-time trading card recognition and to make real-time augmented-reality streaming accessible to the broader community of players and streamers.

AI.tldr: TCG-AR是一个仅使用普通RGB摄像头实现纸牌游戏实时增强现实的管道，无需物理标记或专用硬件，可检测、定位、识别卡牌并渲染虚拟内容，支持广播风格视图生成和OBS流媒体。
AI.motivation: 解决现有纸牌游戏直播仅限平面俯视画面、缺乏沉浸感的问题；同时现有系统依赖仪器化游戏表面和嵌入芯片，成本高、不适用于普通玩家和大型赛事。
AI.method: 1）开发自动程序从参考卡牌图像生成带标注的合成训练数据；2）使用普通RGB摄像头检测、定位、识别卡牌；3）跨所有视角渲染虚拟内容；4）合成广播风格视图并流式传输到OBS。
AI.result: 在手动标注的真实图像数据集上评估了多个训练模型，分析了决定实际可用性的性能和运行时吞吐量。
AI.conclusion: 该工作仅依赖普通摄像头和硬件，通过开源代码、模型和数据集，可作为实时纸牌识别的参考，使增强现实流媒体对广大玩家和主播更加普及。

relevance_reason: This paper is about augmented reality for trading card games (card detection, AR rendering, broadcast view synthesis), which is completely unrelated to the research profile about 3D human motion generation. The application domains are entirely different - this paper deals with detecting and rendering on flat trading cards, not generating 3D motions from video or text. None of the methods (card detection, AR rendering) match the required methods (video generation models, VLM, motion synthesis). The pain points about domain gap between 2D features and 3D motion, quality assessment for motion synthesis, and text-to-motion semantic consistency are not addressed at all.

title: ReContext: Recursive Evidence Replay as LLM Harness for Long-Context Reasoning
summary: Understanding and reasoning over long contexts has become a key requirement for deploying large language models (LLMs) in realistic applications. Although recent LLMs support increasingly long context windows, they often fail to use relevant evidence that is already present in the input, revealing a gap between context access and effective context utilization. In this work, we propose Recursive Evidence Replay as LLM Harness for Long-Context Reasoning (RECONTEXT), a training-free inference method for improving long-context reasoning. RECONTEXT uses model-internal relevance signals to construct a query-conditioned evidence pool and replays it before final generation while preserving the full original context. This recursive selection process separates evidence organization from answer generation without training, external memory, or context pruning. We also provide a theoretical analysis based on associative memory, which characterizes the context as a memory store, the question as a retrieval cue, attention as cue-trace association, and replay as trace reactivation. Experiments on eight long-context datasets with 128K context length show that RECONTEXT consistently improves evidence utilization across Qwen3-4B, Qwen3-8B, and Llama3-8B, achieving the best average rank on all three backbones. Code is available at https://github.com/Yanjun-Zhao/ReContext.

AI.tldr: RECONTEXT是一种无需训练的推理方法，通过递归证据回放机制提升长上下文推理能力，解决大语言模型上下文访问与有效利用之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型虽然支持更长的上下文窗口，但往往无法有效利用输入中已存在的相关证据，揭示了上下文访问与有效利用之间的差距。
AI.method: 利用模型内部相关性信号构建查询条件证据池，在保持完整原始上下文的同时于最终生成前进行证据回放。该递归选择过程将证据组织与答案生成分离，无需训练、外部记忆或上下文剪枝。理论分析基于联想记忆框架：将上下文视为记忆存储、问题视为检索线索、注意力视为线索-痕迹关联、回放视为痕迹再激活。
AI.result: 在8个长上下文数据集、128K上下文长度上测试，Qwen3-4B、Qwen3-8B和Llama3-8B三种模型上均一致提升证据利用率，在所有三个骨干网络上实现最佳平均排名。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需训练即可有效改善长上下文推理，在不同模型规模和数据集上展现一致性提升。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM long-context reasoning and NLP, completely unrelated to the research profile. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics: 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), visual feature extraction, and VLM for visual quality supervision. The paper addresses LLM context utilization for text-based reasoning tasks - there is no overlap in application domain, methods, or target domain. This is a fundamental field mismatch (NLP vs Computer Graphics/3D vision).

title: Multimodal Fusion for Fine-Grained Classification of Breast Fibroadenoma and Phyllodes Tumors
summary: Breast fibroadenoma (FA) and phyllodes tumor (PT) are fibroepithelial breast lesions with highly overlapping appearances on B-mode ultrasound, making benign and borderline PT prone to being misclassified as FA and complicating preoperative decision-making. Existing computer-aided diagnosis methods commonly rely on single-modal imaging features and insufficiently exploit complementary clinical and textual information. To address this limitation, we construct the FAPT-M Dataset, a pathology-confirmed multimodal dataset comprising 910 patients with strictly reviewed ultrasound images, structured clinical attributes, and ultrasound diagnostic descriptions. Based on this dataset, we propose a clinically guided multimodal framework that integrates DenseNet-based visual encoding, CLIP-inspired text encoding, and lightweight clinical encoding, and further introduces clinical-conditioned adaptive modulation, cross-modal Transformer fusion, and dual-path representation learning to improve feature alignment and multimodal interaction. Under patient-level five-fold cross-validation, the proposed method achieves an accuracy of 77.64%, F1-score of 73.38%, and AUC of 89.74%, outperforming representative CNN-, Transformer-, and vision-language-based baselines. Ablation studies and class-balanced evaluations further confirm the contribution of three-modality fusion and the key architectural components. Overall, this work provides an effective multimodal approach for fine-grained FA-PT classification and establishes a high-quality benchmark for multimodal breast ultrasound analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了FAPT-M多模态数据集（910例患者），提出了一种融合超声图像、临床属性和超声诊断描述的多模态深度学习框架，用于区分乳腺纤维腺瘤（FA）和叶状肿瘤（PT），在五折交叉验证下达到77.64%准确率、73.38% F1分数和89.74% AUC。
AI.motivation: 乳腺纤维腺瘤（FA）和叶状肿瘤（PT）在B型超声上外观高度重叠，良性和交界性PT容易被误分类为FA，现有计算机辅助诊断方法通常依赖单一模态影像特征，未能充分利用互补的临床和文本信息。
AI.method: 基于FAPT-M数据集，提出临床指导的多模态框架：1）DenseNet视觉编码；2）CLIP启发的文本编码；3）轻量级临床编码；4）临床条件自适应调制；5）跨模态Transformer融合；6）双路径表示学习。
AI.result: 患者级五折交叉验证下达到准确率77.64%、F1分数73.38%、AUC 89.74%，优于CNN、Transformer和视觉-语言基线方法。消融实验和类别平衡评估证实了三模态融合和关键架构组件的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了一种有效的FA-PT细分类多模态方法，建立了多模态乳腺超声分析的高质量基准，为乳腺 fibroepithelial病变的术前精准诊断提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The research profile is in Computer Graphics focusing on 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), and two-stage pipelines for synthesizing 3D motions from 2D videos. The paper is about medical imaging classification - specifically distinguishing breast fibroadenoma from phyllodes tumors using ultrasound images and clinical data. Even though both papers use multimodal fusion and Transformer architectures, the application domains are entirely different: medical diagnosis vs computer graphics/motion synthesis. The methods (DenseNet for medical images, CLIP for clinical text) have no relevance to video-to-3D motion generation or visual guidance feature extraction for 3D content creation.

title: Online Safety Monitoring for LLMs
summary: Despite alignment training, LLMs remain prone to generating unsafe outputs at deployment time. Monitoring outputs online and raising an alarm when safety can no longer be assumed is therefore critical. We study a simple real-time monitor that turns a verifier signal from an external model into an alarm decision by thresholding, with the threshold calibrated via risk control. In experiments on mathematical reasoning and red teaming datasets, we show that this simple design is competitive with more advanced monitors based on sequential hypothesis testing.

AI.tldr: 研究了一种简单的实时监控方法，通过对外部模型的验证信号进行阈值处理来检测大语言模型的不安全输出，在数学推理和红队数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管进行了对齐训练，大语言模型在部署时仍然可能生成不安全输出，因此需要在线监控并在无法保证安全性时发出警报。
AI.method: 使用基于风险控制的阈值校准方法，将外部模型的验证信号转化为警报决策。
AI.result: 该简单设计在数学推理和红队数据集上的表现与基于序贯假设检验的高级监控器相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过风险控制校准的简单阈值监控方法是一种有效的不安全输出检测方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM safety monitoring, completely unrelated to the research profile. The application domain (LLM safety) has no connection to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation for motion synthesis, or visual feature extraction. It addresses entirely different pain points (LLM toxicity detection vs. domain gap between 2D visuals and 3D motion). The methods (threshold-based monitoring for LLM outputs) are completely different from VLM-based quality supervision, video generation models, or motion synthesis pipelines. This is a different research field entirely.

title: LongEgoRefer: A Benchmark for Long-Form Egocentric Video Referring Expression Comprehension
summary: Egocentric videos capture rich and diverse human-object interactions and have emerged as a fundamental resource for understanding human activities related to objects. In this context, Video Referring Expression Comprehension (Video REC), the task of localizing the temporal and spatial extent of a referred object in video frames given a natural language query, plays a key role in linking textual descriptions to observed objects in untrimmed egocentric recordings. However, existing egocentric Video REC benchmarks primarily focus on short video clips, where some target object appears densely within frames. Such settings do not reflect real-world egocentric recordings, which are long-form, untrimmed, and characterized by sparse object occurrences and complex activity transitions. To address this limitation, we introduce LongEgoRefer, a novel and challenging benchmark constructed from long-form videos in the Ego4D dataset. LongEgoRefer contains 1,498 referring expressions with an average video duration of 45 minutes. The benchmark exhibits extreme target sparsity, detailed linguistic descriptions, and complex human-object interactions embedded in long, dynamic egocentric narratives. Consequently, it defines a demanding spatio-temporal grounding problem that requires models to identify both when an event occurs and where the referred object appears within extended video sequences. We evaluate existing Video REC approaches, including training-free baselines based on vision-language models combined with Grounded SAM2. Extensive experiments show that even advanced baselines and current state-of-the-art models struggle significantly on LongEgoRefer. These results highlight the intrinsic difficulty of long-form egocentric spatio-temporal grounding and emphasize the need for more robust video understanding models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了LongEgoRefer，一个针对长视频的自我中心视频指代表达理解 benchmark，从Ego4D数据集中构建，包含1498个表达样本，平均视频时长45分钟，具有目标稀疏性高、语言描述详细等特点，是一个具有挑战性的时空定位任务。
AI.motivation: 现有自我中心视频指代表达理解(Video REC)基准测试主要集中在短视频片段上，无法反映现实世界中长视频、未剪辑、目标稀疏且活动转换复杂的场景。因此需要构建一个更贴近真实场景的长视频理解基准。
AI.method: 构建了LongEgoRefer benchmark，从Ego4D数据集中获取长视频，并对现有Video REC方法进行了评估，包括基于视觉语言模型的免训练基线方法结合Grounded SAM2。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使是先进的基线方法和当前的state-of-the-art模型在LongEgoRefer上都表现困难，突显了长视频时空定位的内在难度。
AI.conclusion: LongEgoRefer是一个具有挑战性的长视频自我中心时空定位基准，现有的视频理解模型难以应对，需要更强大的模型来处理稀疏目标、长时间跨度和复杂交互的场景。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses egocentric video understanding and spatial-temporal localization (Video REC), which is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on 3D motion generation and synthesis. The paper's task is video comprehension/recognition, not motion synthesis or generation. Even though it uses VLMs and visual features, the application domain is completely different - this is about understanding/identifying objects in first-person videos, not generating 3D motions from video priors. The pain points in the profile relate to 2D-to-3D conversion for motion synthesis, while this paper is about video grounding and localization.

title: Distributed Attacks in Persistent-State AI Control
summary: As AI coding agents become more autonomous, they increasingly ship code iteratively, with the codebase persisting across sessions. This persistence creates a new attack surface: a misaligned or prompt-injected agent can distribute attacks across pull requests (PRs) and time its payload for the PR with the best natural cover. To study the resulting dynamics, we introduce Iterative VibeCoding, a setting for AI control, the study of safely deploying capable but potentially untrusted AI. In Iterative VibeCoding, a coding agent builds software over a sequence of PRs in a persistent codebase while pursuing a covert side task. Our benchmark includes two task families: CLI tools and Flask web services, across 20 total task variations. We use Claude Sonnet 4.5 as the attack agent and GPT-4o as the monitor. We compare gradual attacks, which distribute the side task across PRs, against non-gradual attacks concentrated in a single PR. No single monitor is robust to both: which strategy evades best (success while evading the monitor) depends on the monitor type, so a defender cannot close off both gradual and non-gradual attacks with any one monitor. High evasion (>= 65%) generalizes across model attack agent backends (Sonnet 4.5, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Kimi K2.5), confirming this is a property of the persistent-state attack surface rather than a single model's capability. Evasion also remains high across state-of-the-art monitor models and the gap between gradual and non-gradual evasion widens for more capable models. We introduce a stateful link-tracker monitor that tracks suspicious buildup across PRs. On both task families, it detects gradual attacks substantially better than diff monitors that merely see more accumulated history. Combining this stronger monitor with trajectory monitors in a four-monitor ensemble reduces gradual-attack evasion from 93% under the weakest standard diff monitor to 47%.

AI.tldr: 研究AI编码代理在持久化代码库中的迭代部署带来的新攻击面，探索代理如何通过多个PR分散恶意任务以躲避监控，并提出防御方法。
AI.motivation: 随着AI编码代理变得更加自主，它们跨会话迭代发布代码，代码库持久化创造了新的攻击面：被注入恶意提示的代理可以在多个PR中分发攻击，选择最佳时机实施payload。
AI.method: 构建Iterative VibeCoding基准测试框架，包含20种任务变体（CLI工具和Flask Web服务）；使用Claude Sonnet 4.5作为攻击代理，GPT-4o作为监控；比较渐进式攻击（分散在多个PR中）与非渐进式攻击（集中在单个PR）的效果。
AI.result: 1) 单一监控无法同时抵御两种攻击策略；2) 高 evasion (≥65%) 在多种攻击代理模型（Claude、Gemini、Kimi）上通用；3) 渐进式与非渐进式evasion差距随模型能力增强而扩大；4) 状态ful链接追踪监控比diff监控更能检测渐进式攻击；5) 四监控 ensemble 将渐进式攻击evasion从93%降至47%。
AI.conclusion: 持久化状态攻击面是AI安全的重要挑战，单一监控无法防御所有攻击类型，需要结合多种监控策略（状态追踪+轨迹监控）的ensemble才能有效降低攻击成功率。

relevance_reason: This paper is about cybersecurity and AI agent security vulnerabilities in code repositories - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation, video synthesis, and visual features for motion synthesis. The paper addresses distributed attacks in AI coding agents, not graphics or motion generation. Zero application domain match.

title: WBMM: Windowed Batch Matrix Multiplication for Efficient Large Receptive Field Convolution
comment: 23 pages, 4 figures. Accepted as a Spotlight paper at ICML 2026. Code available at http://github.com/wansong-s/WBMM
summary: Large kernel depthwise convolutions achieve strong performance but suffer from significant degradation as kernel size grows due to irregular memory access from gather-based computation; while Large Kernel Acceleration (LKA) helps on small feature maps, it becomes counterproductive on large feature maps, even slower than non-accelerated implementations. We propose Windowed Batch Matrix Multiplication (WBMM), which partitions input into contiguous windows and indexes a compact relative position bias table to construct weight matrices, enabling regular memory access via batched matrix multiplication. This yields a unique property: WBMM's throughput improves with larger windows, opposite to depthwise convolutions that degrade with larger kernels. Operator-level benchmarks show WBMM with 14x14 windows outperforms 5x5 depthwise convolution baselines in speed while providing a 7.8x larger per-layer receptive field. Combined with inter-block cross-window communication and hierarchical window reparameterization, WBMM achieves comparable or higher accuracy on ImageNet-1K, COCO, and ADE20K with 1.31-1.88x training speedup, and demonstrates consistent advantages across GPU, CPU, and edge devices without requiring specialized acceleration kernels. Our code is available at http://github.com/wansong-s/WBMM

AI.tldr: 本文提出窗口批矩阵乘法(WBMM)，通过将输入划分为连续窗口并索引相对位置偏置表来构建权重矩阵，实现规则内存访问。WBMM的吞吐量随窗口增大而提升，与传统深度卷积随核增大而性能下降的特性相反。该方法在ImageNet-1K、COCO和ADE20K上实现相当或更高的精度，同时训练速度提升1.31-1.88倍。
AI.motivation: 大核深度卷积虽然性能强大，但随着核增大因基于gather的不规则内存访问导致显著性能下降；大型核加速(LKA)在小特征图上有效，但在大特征图上反而适得其反，甚至比非加速实现更慢。因此需要一种既能保持大 receptive field 又能保持高效的方法。
AI.method: 提出窗口批矩阵乘法(WBMM)：1)将输入划分为连续窗口；2)通过索引紧凑的相对位置偏置表构建权重矩阵；3)通过批矩阵乘法实现规则内存访问。结合块间跨窗口通信和分层窗口重参数化。
AI.result: 14x14窗口的WBMM比5x5深度卷基线更快，同时提供7.8倍更大的每层receptive field。在ImageNet-1K、COCO、ADE20K上达到相当或更高精度，训练速度提升1.31-1.88倍。在GPU、CPU和边缘设备上均展现一致性优势，无需专用加速内核。
AI.conclusion: WBMM独特地实现了吞吐量随窗口增大而提升的特性，解决了大核卷积的性能瓶颈问题。该方法在多种视觉任务和硬件平台上均有效，为大核卷积的高效部署提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about efficient convolution operations for image classification, detection, and segmentation (computer vision tasks), completely unrelated to the research profile's focus on 3D motion generation from 2D videos in Computer Graphics. The application domains are entirely different - this is a computer vision optimization paper, not a motion synthesis or video generation paper. No relevance to domain gap between 2D/3D, motion synthesis, or video-to-3D generation.

title: X-Splat: Gaussian Splatting for 3D CBCT Generation from Single Panoramic Radiograph
comment: 19 pages, 6 figures, including appendix. Under review
summary: Generating a 3D dental volume from a single panoramic radiograph (PXR) could provide a low-radiation alternative to Cone-Beam Computed Tomography (CBCT), but the problem is highly underdetermined: panoramic acquisition integrates 3D attenuation along curved X-ray paths into a 2D image, leaving depth-resolved anatomy unobserved. Existing implicit and generative approaches often produce oversmoothed geometry or anatomically inconsistent hallucinations, lacking geometry-driven supervision and relying on smooth representations unable to precisely localize sharp anatomical boundaries. We propose X-Splat, the first Gaussian Splatting framework for generating CBCT-like 3D dental volumes from a single PXR. X-Splat uses the known panoramic acquisition geometry as a generation scaffold: learnable anisotropic Gaussian primitives are initialized along the X-ray paths that formed the input image and adjusted in a single feed-forward pass, constrained by Beer-Lambert reprojection and multi-view radiographic training supervision. A lightweight residual refiner adds dataset-level anatomical priors without overriding the geometry already resolved by the Gaussians. We train on synthetic PXR-CBCT pairs, enabling direct volumetric supervision without paired real scans. We further introduce segmentation-based geometry-aware metrics, providing the first evaluation of PXR-based generation over maxillofacial anatomy. X-Splat outperforms NeRF- and GAN-based baselines, recovering individual teeth, cortical boundaries, and alveolar structure, including the mandibular canal which prior methods fail to reconstruct. Code will be available at https://github.com/tomek1911/X-Splat

AI.tldr: X-Splat是首个基于高斯溅射的框架，可从单张口腔全景片(PXR)生成类似CBCT的3D牙科体积，解决了传统方法几何过度平滑和解剖结构不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 从单张全景片生成3D牙科体积可提供低辐射替代方案，但该问题高度欠定：全景采集沿弯曲X射线路径将3D衰减集成到2D图像中，导致深度解剖结构无法观测。现有隐式和生成方法常产生过度平滑的几何或解剖学上不一致的幻觉。
AI.method: 提出X-Splat框架，利用已知的全景采集几何作为生成脚手架：沿形成输入图像的X射线路径初始化可学习的各向异性高斯原语，在单次前向传递中调整，通过Beer-Lambert重投影和多视角射线训练监督进行约束。轻量级残差细化器添加数据集级解剖先验。
AI.result: 在合成PXR-CBCT配对数据上训练，实现直接体积监督无需配对真实扫描。引入基于分割的几何感知指标。X-Splat优于NeRF和GAN基线方法，成功恢复单个牙齿、皮质边界和牙槽结构，包括下颌管（先前方法无法重建）。
AI.conclusion: X-Splat是首个将高斯溅射应用于口腔全景片到CBCT类3D体积生成的方法，通过几何驱动监督和精确定位解剖边界，显著提升了重建质量，可恢复下颌管等先前方法无法重建的解剖结构。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant application domain. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics for 3D human motion generation from videos (using VLMs, video generation models like Wan/Seedance), while this paper is about medical/dental imaging - specifically generating 3D CBCT dental volumes from X-ray images using Gaussian Splatting. Although both involve 3D reconstruction from 2D inputs, the domain (medical vs. motion synthesis), context (dental imaging vs. video-to-motion), and end goals are entirely different. This is a dental/medical imaging paper that happens to use a computer graphics technique (Gaussian Splatting).

title: AbsoluteDegradation: A Physics-Inspired Synthetic Film-Degradation Pipeline and Archival Film Restoration Benchmark
summary: Restoring archival film remains a fundamentally challenging problem due to the absence of paired training data and the lack of standardized evaluation benchmarks. Pristine versions of deteriorated footage are physically unrecoverable, requiring supervised methods to rely on synthetic data that often fail to capture the complex, temporally coherent nature of real film degradation. At the same time, existing real-world datasets are limited in scale, quality, and accessibility, hindering reliable evaluation and fair comparison across methods. We address both limitations with AbsoluteDegradation, a physics-inspired, modular pipeline for synthesizing realistic film degradations, and a new large-scale archival benchmark. The proposed pipeline models the analog-to-digital process as a structured composition of artifact families, incorporating signal-dependent grain, parametric scratches, and temporally coherent camera motion, enabling controlled generation of diverse degradation regimes. In parallel, we introduce a curated dataset of 81,576 high-resolution frames sourced from real archival footage, designed for consistent evaluation under real-world conditions. Together, these contributions provide a unified framework for training and benchmarking restoration models. Extensive experiments across multiple architectures show that models trained with AbsoluteDegradation generalize better to real-world footage, while the proposed benchmark reveals systematic failure modes of current methods. We hope this work establishes a foundation for reproducible and domain-authentic evaluation in archival film restoration.

AI.tldr: 提出 AbsoluteDegradation 管道和大规模 archival benchmark 数据集，解决 archival film restoration 缺乏真实训练数据和标准化评估基准的问题，实现更好的真实世界泛化。
AI.motivation: 解决 archival film restoration 缺乏配对训练数据和标准化评估基准的问题。现有真实数据集规模小、质量低、可访问性差，且合成数据无法捕捉真实 film degradation 的复杂时间相干特性。
AI.method: 提出 AbsoluteDegradation 管道，将模拟到数字过程建模为 artifact families 的结构化组合：信号相关噪声、参数化划痕、时间一致的摄像机运动。设计了包含 81,576 高分辨率帧的真实 archival footage 数据集。
AI.result: 在多种架构上的广泛实验表明，使用 AbsoluteDegradation 训练的模型对真实 footage 的泛化能力显著提升，同时 benchmark 揭示了当前方法的系统性失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为 archival film restoration 建立了可复现的评估框架，推动了该领域从合成数据向真实数据的迁移。提出的 pipeline 和 benchmark 可作为未来研究的统一基准，促进方法间的公平比较。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about archival film restoration and video enhancement (image processing), while the research profile is about 3D motion generation from 2D video in Computer Graphics. These are entirely different application domains - one deals with restoring old films, the other deals with synthesizing human/skeletal motion. No method overlap (film degradation simulation vs VLM/video generation for motion synthesis) and no relevance to any of the stated pain points.

title: AdaCount: Training-Free Similarity-Guided Spatial and Feature Adaptation for Zero-Shot Object Counting
summary: Zero-shot object counting (ZOC) aims to count instances of arbitrary object categories specified only through textual prompts. Recent training-free approaches leverage foundation models such as SAM to reformulate counting as a prompt-driven segmentation task, eliminating the need for costly counting-specific training data with point-level annotations. More recently, SAM3 introduced promptable concept segmentation, enabling the zero-shot segmentation of all instances corresponding to a text-defined concept. However, SAM3 struggles in densely populated scenes containing numerous small objects, where limited image resolution and insufficient attention to target-relevant regions often lead to missed instances and poor instance separation, hindering accurate object counting. To address this limitation, we propose AdaCount, a training-free framework for ZOC based on similarity-guided spatial and feature adaptation. AdaCount first estimates a prototype-driven similarity map that identifies target-relevant regions. This similarity map subsequently guides two complementary adaptations: (i) similarity-guided spatial warping, which reallocates image resolution toward target instances, and (ii) feature modulation, which amplifies target-relevant encoder representations. Together, these adaptations enable SAM3 to devote greater representational capacity to target-relevant regions while preserving global image context, without requiring any model retraining. Extensive experiments across six diverse counting benchmarks establish AdaCount as a new SOTA among training-free ZOC approaches.

AI.tldr: AdaCount是一种无需训练的零样本目标计数框架，通过相似性引导的空间和特征适应来解决密集场景中小物体计数的难题，在6个基准上实现SOTA。
AI.motivation: 解决SAM3在密集场景中计数小物体时的局限性：有限的图像分辨率和对目标相关区域关注不足导致实例遗漏和分离不良。
AI.method: 提出AdaCount框架，包含两个关键技术：(i)相似性引导的空间扭曲，将图像分辨率重新分配到目标实例；(ii)特征调制，放大目标相关的编码器表示。首先估计原型驱动的相似性图来识别目标相关区域，然后引导这两个互补的适应过程。
AI.result: 在6个不同的计数基准上建立了新的SOTA，成为训练-free ZOC方法中的最新技术。
AI.conclusion: AdaCount在6个不同计数基准上建立了新的SOTA，是首个无需训练的ZOC方法。没有提到具体的数值结果。

relevance_reason: This paper is about zero-shot object counting in computer vision (dense scene object detection), which is completely unrelated to the research profile. The profile focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion generation from videos, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), and two-stage pipelines for video-to-motion synthesis. While both involve visual features, the application domains are entirely different: object counting vs. 3D motion generation from 2D video priors. This represents a different field entirely with no meaningful connection to the stated pain points about domain gaps, motion synthesis, or semantic consistency in 3D motion generation.

title: SAMoR: Motion Modelling for Articulated Objects of Any Skeleton and Topology
summary: Modeling motion for articulated objects of arbitrary skeleton topology remains difficult: existing motion generators target a fixed human skeleton, and prior adaptations either fail to share a vocabulary across rigs or discard motion detail through global pooling. Our key observation is that while joint-level motion does not correspond cleanly across species, motion of functional joint groups does: a human arm, a wolf foreleg, and a bird wing share motion structure despite differing joint counts and connectivity, a correspondence that joint names (e.g., "forearm", "wing_L1") partially expose even when topology does not. We introduce SAMoR (Skeleton-Aware Motion Representation for Articulated Objects), a cross-topology motion representation that encodes each motion segment as a small fixed number ($K=8$) of part tokens shared across arbitrary skeletons. A graph-transformer encoder consumes per-joint motion features, kinematic graph structure, and joint-name embeddings, then compresses them into part-level tokens via cross-attention pooling and residual vector quantization, yielding a discrete motion codebook shared across rigs. To keep the part queries from collapsing into redundant global representations, we introduce a topology-agnostic attention supervision loss, with joint-name dropout to reduce over-reliance on text labels. We curate a heterogeneous corpus from HumanML3D, Truebones Zoo, and animated Objaverse-XL assets, and evaluate SAMoR on held-out characters with unseen skeletons. It supports accurate reconstruction and cross-topology transfer, and enables text-conditioned generation and part-wise editing via a MaskGIT token generator. SAMoR reaches $2.75 \times 10^{-2}$ normalized MPJPE on cross-topology reconstruction, $5.8\times$ below the strongest adapted variable-$J$ tokenizer baseline, while remaining competitive with fixed-skeleton specialists on HumanML3D.

AI.tldr: SAMoR是一种跨拓扑运动表示方法，通过将运动编码为共享的部分标记，实现任意骨架拓扑的运动生成、重建和迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有运动生成器针对固定人体骨架，先前适配方法要么无法跨骨架共享词汇表，要么通过全局池化丢弃运动细节。核心发现：虽然关节级运动在不同物种间不完全对应，但功能关节组的运动是对应的——人类手臂、狼前肢和鸟翼尽管关节数量和连接不同，但共享运动结构。
AI.method: 提出SAMoR（Skeleton-Aware Motion Representation），一种跨拓扑运动表示，将每个运动段编码为少量固定数量（K=8）的部分标记。图Transformer编码器消耗每关节运动特征、 kinematic图结构和关节名称嵌入，然后通过交叉注意池化和残差向量量化将其压缩为部分级标记，生成跨骨架共享的离散运动码本。引入拓扑无关的注意力监督损失和关节名称dropout以防止部分查询坍缩为冗余全局表示。
AI.result: SAMoR在跨拓扑重建上达到2.75×10^-2的归一化MPJPE，比最强的可变J tokenizer基线低5.8倍，同时在HumanML3D上与固定骨架专用模型保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: SAMoR成功实现了跨任意骨架拓扑的运动表示学习，支持跨拓扑迁移、文本条件生成和部分编辑，在跨拓扑重建任务上显著优于现有基线方法。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses 3D motion generation but with a fundamentally different approach than the research profile. While both involve 3D motion, SAMoR focuses on cross-topology motion transfer between different skeleton structures (e.g., human to wolf), NOT on extracting visual features from 2D videos for 3D generation. The research profile specifically requires: (1) two-stage pipeline using video generation models (Wan, Seedance) as priors, (2) visual feature extraction from 2D videos, and (3) VLM-based quality supervision. SAMoR uses graph transformers and vector quantization without any video processing or VLM components. This is a case of using similar methods (motion generation) but in a completely different application pipeline - the profile is about video-to-motion conversion, while SAMoR is about skeleton-to-skeleton motion transfer.

title: Patient-Specific Articulated Digital Twins from a Single Full-Body CT Scan
summary: Patient-specific anatomical models provide individualized context for surgical planning, image-guided intervention, and algorithm development. However, most CT-derived models are static: they preserve the body configuration captured at scan time, but cannot represent how the same anatomy would appear after patient repositioning. This limitation is especially important for radiographic imaging, where appearance depends jointly on imaging geometry and patient pose. We present a proof-of-concept for constructing a patient-specific articulated digital twin from a single full-body CT scan. The method fits a parametric human body model (SMPL) to obtain a patient-aligned kinematic scaffold, binds segmented bones and organs to an anatomy-aware rig, and retargets body-pose changes while preserving skeletal geometry. On three full-body CT subjects, the fitted scaffold achieved 15.8 $\pm$ 4.0 mm chamfer distance and 95.9 $\pm$ 1.8% skeletal enclosure. Recomposition at the acquisition pose preserved major radiographic structure, with overall SSIM of 0.872 $\pm$ 0.016 and PSNR of 18.5 $\pm$ 1.4 dB across paired DRRs. Across unseen target poses, the resulting twins enabled articulation while maintaining high skeletal enclosure (94.4 $\pm$ 0.4%). As a feasibility demonstration, we render the articulated twin as pose-dependent DRRs. These results suggest the feasibility of extending static, view-controllable CT simulation toward pose-controllable anatomical twins for future synthetic imaging and positioning studies.

The methods (CT scan processing) and goals (patient-specific anatomical models) have no overlap with the pain points about video-to-motion domain gap, quality assessment of video priors, or semantic text-to-motion consistency.

title: Efficient PEFT Methods with Adaptive Checkpointing for Vision Models and VLMs on Resource Constrained Consumer-GPUs
summary: Modern pretrained vision models achieve strong accuracy but demand substantial GPU memory for fine-tuning, making edge deployment impractical. This paper compares five parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods (Full FT, LoRA, AdaLoRA, QLoRA, BitFit) on Transformers- (ViT-Small, TinyViT) and Mamba-based vision backbones (Vim-Small, MambaVision-T) under an on-device VRAM budget (e.g., 2 GB), together with three gradient-checkpointing strategies (none, static, and a proposed memory-budget-aware adaptive algorithm); and we evaluate three families of foundation-model baselines: zero-shot contrastive vision language models (OpenCLIP, SigLIP), self-supervised vision backbones with lightweight evaluation protocols (DINOv2), and autoregressive VLMs for prompt-based classification (PaliGemma, MobileVLM, SmolVLM). Experiments on CIFAR-100 and DTD report accuracy, training time, energy, and the NetScore family of multi-objective metrics, which we extend with two deployment-aware variants. QLoRA and BitFit cut energy 20-30% at a 1-2% accuracy cost; the adaptive algorithm reduces peak memory 43-79% with 9-30% energy overhead. DINOv2 surpasses fine-tuned models on CIFAR-100 (0.917 vs. 0.897) at a fraction of the energy, while small autoregressive VLMs remain uncompetitive.

AI.tldr: 在2GB VRAM的设备端预算下，比较了5种参数高效微调方法(LoRA、AdaLoRA、QLoRA、BitFit)在Transformer和Mamba视觉主干网上的表现，并评估了3种梯度检查点策略和多个基础模型零样本/微调性能
AI.motivation: 现代预训练视觉模型精度高但微调需大量GPU显存，在边缘设备上部署不切实际，需要寻找内存高效的训练方法
AI.method: 比较5种PEFT方法(Full FT, LoRA, AdaLoRA, QLoRA, BitFit)在ViT-Small、TinyViT、Vim-Small、MambaVision-T上测试；3种梯度检查点策略(无静态、自适应)；评估3类基础模型(OpenCLIP/SigLIP零样本对比模型、DINOv2自监督、PaliGemma/MobileVLM/SmolVLM自回归VLM)
AI.result: QLoRA和BitFit节能20-30%但精度损失1-2%；自适应算法降低峰值显存43-79%但能耗增加9-30%；DINOv2在CIFAR-100上超越微调模型(0.917 vs 0.897)且能耗更低；小型自回归VLM竞争力不足
AI.conclusion: DINOv2自监督方法在边缘设备场景下是最优选择；QLoRA/BitFit是有效的参数高效微调方案；自适应梯度检查点可显著降低显存需求但带来能耗代价

The research profile is about Computer Graphics: specifically 3D motion generation from 2D videos using video generation models and VLMs for quality supervision. While both mention "VLMs" and "vision", the application domains are entirely different - training methodology optimization vs. 3D motion synthesis. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points: domain gap, quality assessment of video priors, semantic consistency in text-to-3D, or visual guidance extraction for 3D generation.

title: RadiomicNet: A Hybrid Radiomics-Guided Lightweight Architecture for Interpretable Medical Image Segmentation
comment: Accepted at the IEEE ICIP 2026 LBDL 2 Workshop
summary: Deep learning has achieved remarkable performance in medical image segmentation, yet it suffers from critical limitations: mathematical intractability, substantial parameter requirements, and lack of clinical interpretability. We propose RadiomicNet, a novel two-stream hybrid architecture that enhances standard deep learning by integrating handcrafted radiomics features directly into the segmentation learning process. The key contribution is the Radiomics Attention Gate (RAG), which leverages Gray-Level Co-occurrence Matrix (GLCM) and Local Binary Pattern (LBP) features to modulate skip-connection attention in a lightweight MobileNetV2-based encoder-decoder, providing ante-hoc interpretability without post-hoc approximations. A novel Radiomics Consistency Loss further enforces alignment between texture complexity and prediction uncertainty, reducing Expected Calibration Error (ECE) from 0.142 to 0.118. RadiomicNet achieves a Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) of 0.763 +/- 0.231 on the Breast Ultrasound Images (BUSI) dataset and 0.854 +/- 0.112 on Kvasir-SEG, outperforming U-KAN by 1.2% and 1.8%, respectively (p < 0.05, Wilcoxon signed-rank test), with only 3.27M parameters, 9.5x fewer than standard U-Net and 4.3x fewer than U-KAN. Gradient-based feature importance analysis reveals that GLCM dissimilarity (15.24%), GLCM energy (14.56%), and LBP entropy (11.49%) are the dominant radiomics cues, providing clinically meaningful explanations for segmentation decisions. The proposed approach demonstrates that compact, interpretable models grounded in domain knowledge can deliver state-of-the-art segmentation performance with substantially reduced computational overhead.

AI.tldr: RadiomicNet是一种新型两流混合架构医学图像分割模型，通过Radiomics Attention Gate (RAG)将GLCM和LBP等手工放射组学特征集成到深度学习分割流程中，在BUSI和Kvasir-SEG数据集上分别达到0.763和0.854的Dice分数，仅需3.27M参数即可实现最先进性能并提供可解释性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医学图像分割中性能优异，但存在数学不可解释性、参数需求大、缺乏临床可解释性等关键局限性。现有方法无法在保持高性能的同时提供可解释的决策依据。
AI.method: 提出RadiomicNet两流混合架构：(1)基于MobileNetV2的轻量级编码器-解码器；(2)放射组学注意力门(RAG)利用GLCM和LBP特征调节跳跃连接注意力；(3)放射组学一致性损失函数对齐纹理复杂性与预测不确定性。模型仅3.27M参数。
AI.result: BUSI数据集：DSC=0.763±0.231；Kvasir-SEG数据集：DSC=0.854±0.112；比U-KAN分别提升1.2%和1.8%(p<0.05)；ECE从0.142降至0.118；参数仅3.27M，比标准U-Net少9.5倍，比U-KAN少4.3倍；主要放射组学特征：GLCM差异性(15.24%)、GLCM能量(14.56%)、LBP熵(11.49%)。
AI.conclusion: RadiomicNet证明基于领域知识的紧凑可解释模型可实现最先进的分割性能，同时大幅降低计算开销。放射组学特征与深度学习的深度融合为医学图像分析提供了兼具性能、可解释性和效率的新范式。

The application domains are entirely different: medical imaging vs. computer graphics/motion synthesis.
