This is a medical imaging paper that happens to use a "two-stream architecture" but serves an entirely different purpose.

title: MedSaab-US: A Backpropagation-Free Multi-Scale Wavelet-Saab Framework for Thyroid Nodule Segmentation in Ultrasound Images
comment: Accepted at the IEEE ICIP 2026 LBDL 2 Workshop
summary: Deep learning (DL) methods dominate thyroid nodule segmentation in ultrasound (US) images, achieving high Dice scores but at the cost of millions of parameters, GPU-dependent training via backpropagation, and limited mathematical tractability. These limitations impede deployment in resource-constrained environments. In this paper, we propose MedSaab-US, a backpropagation-free segmentation framework grounded in the Green Learning paradigm. MedSaab-US extracts multi-scale spatial-frequency features by combining multi-level Discrete Wavelet Transform (DWT) with multi-scale channel-wise Saab (Subspace Approximation with Adjusted Bias) transforms at patch sizes of 5 x 5, 11 x 11, and 21 x 21 pixels. Label-Assisted Greedy (LAG) feature selection retains the most discriminative features, which are fed to an XGBoost classifier for pixel-wise prediction. The Saab transform parameters are determined analytically from data statistics, while XGBoost employs iterative greedy tree construction without requiring backpropagation. Evaluated on the TN3K dataset (2,879 training and 614 test images), MedSaab-US achieves a mean Dice coefficient of 0.4784 +/- 0.2190, precision of 0.5768, and recall of 0.5604, with a model footprint under 500K parameters and CPU-only inference in approximately 0.3 seconds per image. We present this result as an exploratory non-DL baseline for thyroid ultrasound segmentation and analyze the specific challenges posed by isoechoic nodules. An ablation study further quantifies the contribution of each pipeline component, including separate evaluations of LAG feature selection and training-set size.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MedSaab-US，一种基于Green Learning范式的无反向传播甲状腺结节超声图像分割框架，结合DWT多尺度频域特征与Saab变换，在TN3K数据集上达到0.4784 Dice系数，模型参数量少于500K，支持CPU推理约0.3秒/图。
AI.motivation: 深度学习方法虽在甲状腺结节分割中取得高Dice分数，但存在参数量大、需GPU训练、数学可解释性差等问题，难以部署于资源受限环境。因此需要一种轻量级、无需反向传播的替代方案。
AI.method: MedSaab-US框架：1)多尺度空频特征提取：结合多层离散小波变换(DWT)与多尺度通道级Saab变换( patch尺寸5×5、11×11、21×21)；2)标签辅助贪心(LAG)特征选择保留最具判别性特征；3)XGBoost分类器进行像素级预测。Saab变换参数由数据统计解析确定，XGBoost采用迭代贪心树构建无需反向传播。
AI.result: TN3K数据集(训练2879图，测试614图)：Mean Dice=0.4784±0.2190，Precision=0.5768，Recall=0.5604；模型参数量<500K；CPU推理时间约0.3秒/图。消融实验量化了各组件贡献，并单独评估了LAG特征选择和训练集规模的影响。
AI.conclusion: MedSaab-US作为非深度学习基线方法，在资源受限环境下具有部署优势。等回声结节(isoechoic nodules)仍存在特殊挑战，Dice分数相对较低是该方法的局限性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical image segmentation (thyroid nodule segmentation in ultrasound images) using traditional ML methods (XGBoost, Saab transform, wavelet features). It has NO relevance to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), text-to-motion synthesis, and VLM-based quality supervision. The application domain is completely different - medical imaging vs. computer graphics/motion synthesis. The methods are also entirely different - this uses backpropagation-free Green Learning with XGBoost, not diffusion models, VLM, or motion generation models.

title: DetailAnywhere: Fashion Detail Generation via Cross-Modal Feature Alignment Distillation
summary: Diffusion-based generative AI has achieved remarkable success in e-commerce applications such as virtual try-on, poster generation, and product background synthesis. However, when making online purchasing decisions for apparel, consumers also desire the freedom to examine specific detail regions of interest, such as collars, cuffs, and fabric textures, yet existing methods have not explicitly studied this setting. We therefore formalize a new, non-template task: Fashion Detail Generation with focus conditioning, and release FDBench, the first benchmark comprising 40K+ human-verified reference-detail pairs across 41 different categories. This task poses a unique semantic gap challenge: the model must bridge the correspondence between a focus marker on a product reference image and a photorealistic close-up view of the indicated region, while faithfully preserving the garment's identity, without any precise prompt. To bridge this gap, we propose Cross-modal Feature Alignment Distillation (CFAD), which leverages a fine-tuned DINOv3 teacher to align both branches of a Multimodal Diffusion Transformer in a shared semantic space via dual-branch distillation. To further improve consistency between generated details and reference images, we introduce a consistency reward model that jointly scores image pairs along three quality axes and optimizes generation via reinforcement learning. Experiments show that our model DetailAnywhere significantly outperforms all state-of-the-art opensource methods across all metrics and human evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一项新任务：带焦点条件的时尚细节生成（Fashion Detail Generation），旨在根据服装参考图像上的焦点标记生成指定区域的逼真特写视图。同时发布了首个基准数据集FDBench，包含41个类别、40K+人工验证的参考-细节配对。为解决语义差距问题，提出了跨模态特征对齐蒸馏（CFAD）方法，利用微调的DINOv3教师模型将多模态扩散变换器的两个分支对齐到共享语义空间。此外引入一致性奖励模型，通过强化学习优化生成质量。实验表明DetailAnywhere模型在所有指标和人类评估上显著优于现有开源方法。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散生成AI在电商应用中取得成功，但消费者在网购服装时希望能够查看领口、袖口、面料纹理等细节区域，现有方法未明确研究这一场景。因此需要 formalize 一个新任务：允许用户指定感兴趣区域并生成该区域的逼真特写，同时保持服装identity的一致性。
AI.method: 提出Cross-modal Feature Alignment Distillation (CFAD)方法：1) 利用微调的DINOv3教师模型将多模态扩散变换器的两个分支（参考分支和生成分支）在共享语义空间中进行双分支蒸馏对齐；2) 引入一致性奖励模型，从三个质量轴对图像对进行联合评分，并通过强化学习优化生成。
AI.result: 模型DetailAnywhere在所有指标和人类评估上显著优于所有最先进的开源方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文开创了带焦点条件的时尚细节生成新任务，发布了首个大规模基准FDBench，提出CFAD方法和一致性奖励机制有效解决了语义差距问题，所提DetailAnywhere模型达到了最优性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about fashion image generation (2D to 2D image synthesis), while the research profile is about 3D MOTION generation from 2D visual features. These are completely different application domains. Although both use diffusion models, the paper generates fashion detail images for e-commerce, not 3D motions. The methods (fashion image generation with DINOv3) do not address the pain points of domain gap between 2D visual features and 3D motion representation, or extracting visual guidance for 3D motion synthesis. This is a computer vision/image generation paper, not a 3D motion generation or computer graphics motion synthesis paper.

title: Efficient Waste Sorting for Circular Economy: A Confidence-guided comparison between One-Vs-All and One-Vs-Rest Classification Strategies with Human-in-the-Loop for Automated Waste Sorting
summary: The complexity of waste disposal regulations across European countries poses significant challenges for the residents and hinders the transition to a Circular Economy. In Germany, the proper sorting and disposal of household waste remains challenging across municipalities. Consequently, substantially reducing incorrectly disposed waste is vital for improving waste management and advancing the Circular Economy. AI-based waste sorting solutions can support residents through user-friendly tools, such as mobile applications, that guide proper waste disposal. To be effective in supporting the Circular Economy, however, these solutions must be configurable to reflect the specific waste sorting scheme of individual municipalities in Germany. In the scope of this work, an evaluation and analysis are performed of two prominent classification strategies: OvA and OvR. The research uses a dataset constructed in alignment with the waste categories and sorting scheme of the city of Goslar in Germany. Moreover, this work aims to extend beyond the overall performance by examining the behavior of OvA and OvR classification strategies in identifying samples likely to be misclassified. These classification strategies are compared by applying varying confidence thresholds to identify uncertain samples for subsequent human review. This evaluation aims to balance the number of misclassifications against the human effort required for data annotation.

AI.tldr: 本文针对德国城市垃圾处理分类复杂的问题，研究了两种AI分类策略（OvA和OvR）在垃圾识别中的应用，旨在通过置信度阈值识别可能误分类的样本，减少错误分类同时平衡人工审核工作量。
AI.motivation: 欧洲各国垃圾处理法规复杂，德国各市政区的垃圾分类方案差异显著，导致居民正确分类困难，错误分类率较高。开发可配置的AI垃圾识别工具对推进循环经济至关重要。
AI.method: 使用德国Goslar市的垃圾类别和分类方案构建数据集，比较One-vs-All (OvA)和One-vs-Rest (OvR)两种分类策略，通过应用不同置信度阈值来识别不确定样本供人工审核。
AI.result: 研究评估了两种分类策略在识别潜在误分类样本方面的表现，分析了减少误分类与人工标注工作量之间的平衡关系。
AI.conclusion: AI驱动的垃圾分类解决方案需适配各市政区特定分类规则，通过置信度阈值筛选不确定样本可有效平衡分类准确率与人工审核成本，为循环经济提供技术支持。

relevance_reason: This paper is about waste sorting classification using One-vs-All and One-vs-Rest strategies - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), or Visual Language Models. The application domain is environmental/waste management, not computer graphics or motion synthesis. The methods (traditional classification) are entirely different from the required methods (diffusion models, VLMs, video-to-motion pipelines). This is essentially a different field entirely.

title: When Token Compression Breaks: Structural Pruning vs. Token Reduction for Robust ViT Segmentation under High Compression
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) are strong backbones for semantic segmentation, but their computational cost limits deployment. Recent token compression methods for efficient transformer-based segmentation reduce this cost by decreasing the number of tokens. However, existing evaluations primarily focus on low-to-moderate compression, leaving their behavior under aggressive compression and corrupted inputs unclear. Meanwhile, structural pruning provides an orthogonal route to efficiency by removing redundant components in the ViT architecture, but is rarely compared to token compression under a unified protocol. To bridge this gap, we benchmark representative token compression and structural pruning methods for ViT-based semantic segmentation under matched FLOPs on ADE20K and Cityscapes, together with their common-corruption variants ADE20K-C and Cityscapes-C. Our results reveal a consistent trend on both clean and corrupted inputs: token compression is highly effective at mild reductions but degrades sharply when compression becomes severe, consistent with substantial information loss from overly aggressive token reduction. In contrast, structural pruning exhibits a smoother degradation curve and is more stable at high compression. Motivated by these findings, we study a prune-then-merge pipeline that applies moderate token compression on top of a moderately pruned backbone. At comparable FLOPs, this combined strategy consistently achieves a better accuracy-robustness trade-off at high compression, offering a practical recipe for deployment-oriented ViT segmentation. Code is available at https://github.com/phatnguyencs/vit-seg-compression.

AI.tldr: 本文对Vision Transformers (ViTs)语义分割中的token压缩和结构化剪枝方法进行了基准测试，发现在高压缩率下token压缩性能急剧下降，而结构化剪枝表现更稳定，并提出了prune-then-merge组合策略。
AI.motivation: 现有ViT高效分割研究主要关注轻中度压缩，对激进压缩和损坏输入下的行为研究不足；结构化剪枝与token压缩缺乏统一协议下的对比。
AI.method: 在ADE20K和Cityscapes数据集上对代表性的token压缩和结构化剪枝方法进行匹配FLOPs的基准测试，并扩展到损坏变体ADE20K-C和Cityscapes-C。
AI.result: Token压缩在轻度压缩时有效，但严重压缩时性能急剧下降；结构化剪枝在高压缩率下更稳定。Prune-then-merge组合策略在高压缩下能获得更好的准确率-鲁棒性权衡。
AI.conclusion: 在相同FLOPs下，prune-then-merge组合策略为部署导向的ViT分割提供了更优的准确率-鲁棒性权衡，是实际部署的有效方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about 3D motion generation from 2D videos (video-to-3D, motion synthesis), while this paper is about Vision Transformer (ViT) semantic segmentation and token compression methods. Even though both involve computer vision, they address entirely different problems - one is about generating 3D motions from videos, the other is about image segmentation with efficient ViT architectures. The paper does not address any of the pain points: domain gap between 2D-3D, quality assessment for motion synthesis, text-to-motion semantic consistency, or visual guidance extraction for 3D generation.

title: ArcAD: Anomaly-Rectified Calibration for Cold-Start Supervised Anomaly Detection
comment: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2026
summary: The deployment of Industrial Anomaly Detection (IAD) in real-world manufacturing frequently encounters a challenging cold-start bottleneck, in which limited normal samples fail to represent the full normal distribution and only a few anomalies are available. Under such a regime, existing methods struggle to form compact normal boundaries and fail to effectively exploit supervised signals from rare defects. To address this challenge, we propose Anomaly-Rectified Cold-start AD (ArcAD), a plug-and-play calibration framework for reconstruction-based IAD baselines. ArcAD follows a push-pull learning paradigm to construct a compact and discriminative normal boundary under data scarcity. On the one hand, ArcAD projects limited normal samples onto a hypersphere and pulls them into multiple compact clusters to maximize coverage of the normal manifold. On the other hand, it synthesizes pseudo-anomalies on the hypersphere and leverages real anomalies to push the boundary inward and sharpen anomaly discrimination. Extensive experiments on MVTec-AD, VisA, Real-IAD, and MANTA demonstrate that ArcAD significantly outperforms state-of-the-art supervised and unsupervised methods in both single-class and multi-class settings under cold-start conditions. Code is available at: https://github.com/LGC-AD/ArcAD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ArcAD框架，针对工业异常检测中的冷启动问题（正常样本有限且异常样本稀少），采用推-拉学习范式构建紧凑且具有判别性的正常边界。通过将正常样本投影到超球面上并聚类以最大化正常流形覆盖，同时合成伪异常并利用真实异常将边界向内推进以增强异常区分能力。在MVTec-AD、VisA、Real-IAD和MANTA数据集上验证了在单类和多类冷启动设置下的优异性能。
AI.motivation: 工业异常检测在实际部署中面临冷启动瓶颈：有限的正常样本无法代表完整的正常分布，且仅有少量异常可用。现有方法难以形成紧凑的正常边界，也无法有效利用稀有缺陷的监督信号。
AI.method: 提出Anomaly-Rectified Cold-start AD (ArcAD)，一种基于重构的工业异常检测基线的即插即用校准框架。采用推-拉学习范式：(1) 将有限正常样本投影到超球面上并拉入多个紧凑聚类，以最大化正常流形覆盖；(2) 在超球面上合成伪异常，并利用真实异常将边界向内推进，增强异常判别能力。
AI.result: 在MVTec-AD、VisA、Real-IAD和MANTA数据集上的广泛实验表明，ArcAD在单类和多类冷启动设置下显著优于最先进的监督和无监督方法。
AI.conclusion: ArcAD作为即插即用的校准框架，能够有效解决工业异常检测中的冷启动问题，通过推-拉学习范式构建紧凑且具有判别性的正常边界，在多个基准数据集上取得了最先进的性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about industrial anomaly detection (defect detection in manufacturing) using push-pull learning on hyperspheres. This is completely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics - specifically 3D human motion generation from 2D video. The application domains are entirely different: industrial quality control vs 3D motion synthesis. Despite potentially sharing some general ML concepts like feature extraction, the paper does not address any of the specified pain points (domain gap, quality assessment, semantic consistency, visual guidance extraction) and is not in the same field.

title: AnyGroundBench: A Specialized-Domain Benchmark for Video Grounding in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated immense promise in Spatio-Temporal Video Grounding (STVG). However, current evaluation protocols are largely confined to zero-shot assessments on general, daily-life benchmarks. This creates a critical disconnect from real-world applications in specialized fields, where models inevitably encounter rare visual concepts and complex spatio-temporal dynamics. Since exhaustive pre-training across infinite data distributions is infeasible, the ability to adapt to novel domains is essential. To bridge this gap, we introduce AnyGroundBench, a domain-adaptation benchmark designed to shift the STVG evaluation paradigm from static zero-shot testing to rigorous domain adaptation. Targeting five specialized domains (animal, industry, sports, surgery, and public security), AnyGroundBench pairs newly captured videos such as expert-annotated mouse behaviors with established datasets, unifying them through dense, high-fidelity spatio-temporal annotations. Crucially, the benchmark provides dedicated training subsets to systematically measure domain adaptability. We extensively evaluate 15 state-of-the-art VLMs, assessing their zero-shot generalization and In-Context Learning (ICL) capabilities under practical computational constraints. Ultimately, our findings reveal that current models fail in both zero-shot and ICL-based adaptation when confronted with specialized domains, exposing critical flaws in spatio-temporal reasoning that future research must address.

AI.tldr: 本文推出了AnyGroundBench，这是一个用于时空视频定位(STVG)的领域适应基准测试，涵盖动物、工业、体育、手术和公共安全五个专业领域。实验评估了15个最先进的视觉语言模型，结果表明当前模型在零样本和上下文学习场景下都无法有效适应专业领域，暴露了时空推理的关键缺陷。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型(VLM)在时空视频定位任务的评估主要局限于一般日常生活基准的零样本测试，这与专业领域的实际应用存在严重脱节。现实世界中模型会遇到稀有视觉概念和复杂的时空动态，而跨无限数据分布的预训练不可行，因此模型适应新领域的能力至关重要。
AI.method: 构建了AnyGroundBench领域适应基准，包含五个专业领域（动物、工业、体育、手术、公共安全），将新采集的视频（如专家标注的小鼠行为）与已有数据集配对，提供密集、高保真的时空注释。基准提供了专门的训练子集用于系统测量领域适应能力，并评估了15个最先进的VLM在零样本泛化和上下文学习(ICL)方面的表现。
AI.result: 当前模型在面对专业领域时，无论是在零样本泛化还是基于ICL的适应方面均表现失败，暴露了时空推理的关键缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究必须解决时空推理中的这些关键缺陷，以提高模型在专业领域中的领域适应能力。

relevance_reason: 完全无关的论文。该研究是关于计算机视觉中的时空视频定位任务(STVG)和VLM领域适应评估,属于视频理解领域。而研究档案是关于计算机图形学中的3D动作生成,特别是利用视频生成模型(VLM、Seedance等)从2D视频/文本合成3D人体动作。两者的应用领域完全不同:一个是视频事件定位,另一个是3D动作合成。论文虽然涉及VLM和视频,但完全不涉及3D运动生成、视觉特征提取用于3D生成、或视频生成模型作为运动合成的先验。

title: AGVBench: A Reliability-Oriented Benchmark of Data Augmentation for Vein Recognition
summary: Vein recognition is a secure biometric technology often constrained by limited annotated data and imaging variations. While data augmentation mitigates this, strategies designed for natural images may disrupt the fine-grained topology and textures essential for identity discrimination. We present AGVBench, which evaluates 30 representative augmentation strategies on five public palm- and finger-vein datasets with seven backbone architectures, covering classic CNNs, vision transformers, and vein-specific recognition models. Our results show that multi-image mixing methods (e.g., MixUp, PuzzleMix, StarMixup) generally provide the strongest recognition performance. However, they are often poorly calibrated and vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, revealing a clear inconsistency between clean accuracy and adversarial security. We also find that severe geometric transformations frequently degrade recognition, which is potentially due to feature misalignment or spatial cropping, and that augmentation effectiveness varies across palm and finger vein datasets. These findings prove that accuracy-centric evaluation is insufficient for biometric augmentation. AGVBench provides standardized protocols to support reproducible research and guide the design of reliable, secure, and robust vein recognition systems. Our codebase is available at https://github.com/Advance-VeinTech-Innovators/AGVBench.

AI.tldr: AGVBench是一个用于评估静脉识别中数据增强策略的基准测试平台，涵盖30种增强方法、5个公开静脉数据集和7种骨干网络架构。研究发现多图像混合方法（如MixUp、PuzzleMix、StarMixup）表现最佳，但存在校准差和对抗脆弱性问题，揭示了准确性与对抗安全性之间的不一致性。
AI.motivation: 静脉识别是一种安全的生物特征识别技术，但受限于有限的标注数据和成像变化。现有的自然图像数据增强策略可能会破坏对身份识别至关重要的细粒度拓扑和纹理结构，需要专门的评估基准来指导静脉识别系统的设计。
AI.method: 在5个公开的手掌和手指静脉数据集上评估了30种代表性增强策略，使用7种骨干架构（经典CNN、视觉Transformer和静脉专用识别模型）进行实验。
AI.result: 多图像混合方法（MixUp、PuzzleMix、StarMixup）通常提供最强的识别性能。但这些方法校准性差且容易受到对抗干扰，揭示了干净准确率与对抗安全性之间的明显不一致。严重几何变换经常降低识别率，这可能是由于特征错位或空间裁剪所致。增强效果因手掌和手指静脉数据集而异。
AI.conclusion: 以准确率为中心的评估不足以用于生物特征增强。AGVBench提供了标准化协议，支持可重复研究，并为设计可靠、安全和鲁棒的静脉识别系统提供指导。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about vein recognition (biometric identification) using data augmentation strategies, which is in the field of computer vision/biometrics. This has no connection to the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation from 2D videos. The application domain (biometric recognition vs 3D motion synthesis), methods (data augmentation for image classification vs VLM/video generation/motion synthesis), and research goals are entirely different.

title: FlowCIR: Semantic Transport via Flow Matching for Zero-Shot Composed Image Retrieval
summary: Zero-shot composed image retrieval (ZS-CIR) aims to retrieve a target image by editing a reference image with a natural-language instruction, without relying on domain-specific annotated triplets. Most existing ZS-CIR methods rely on textual inversion to translate the reference image into pseudo-text tokens and then compose them with the instruction via simple concatenation in the text space, which can be lossy and brittle for fine-grained semantics. In this work, we propose a new paradigm, namely FlowCIR, that casts ZS-CIR as conditional semantic transport between reference and target embeddings. Leveraging \emph{conditional flow matching}, our model learns a lightweight transport field that maps the instruction representation toward a target-aligned query embedding conditioned on the reference image. Since FlowCIR operates on pre-extracted VLM embeddings and trains only a small transport module without updating the image or text encoder, it offers a computationally efficient training protocol compared with prior textual-inversion-based approaches. The resulting framework is training-efficient, requiring roughly $10\times$ fewer training resources than prior textual-inversion-based approaches. We further identify negation and removal as a major failure mode of VLM-based composition. To address this, we propose an inference-only Multi-Negative Steering strategy that steers a negation-containing relative instruction away from its negated semantics, mitigating the limited negation handling of VLMs and improving robustness on negation-heavy queries. Extensive experiments on standard CIR benchmarks demonstrate that FlowCIR achieves strong and competitive performance compared with recent ZS-CIR methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FlowCIR，将零样本组合图像检索任务重新定义为条件语义传输问题。FlowCIR利用条件流匹配技术学习一个轻量级传输模块，将指令表示映射到与参考图像条件下的目标对齐查询嵌入。该方法操作于预提取的VLM嵌入上，仅训练小型传输模块而无需更新图像或文本编码器，训练效率比之前的文本反转方法提高约10倍。此外，论文还提出了多负向引导策略来处理VLM在否定语义处理方面的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有ZS-CIR方法大多依赖文本反转技术将参考图像转换为伪文本标记，然后在文本空间简单拼接指令，这种方式对于细粒度语义可能存在信息损失且不够鲁棒。此外，基于VLM的组合方法存在否定词处理失败的问题。
AI.method: 提出FlowCIR新范式，将ZS-CIR任务建模为参考图像与目标嵌入之间的条件语义传输。利用条件流匹配（conditional flow matching）技术，学习一个轻量级传输字段，在参考图像条件作用下，将指令表示映射到目标对齐的查询嵌入。FlowCIR操作于预提取的VLM嵌入，仅训练小型传输模块而不更新图像或文本编码器。同时提出推理阶段的多负向引导（Multi-Negative Steering）策略来处理否定语义。
AI.result: FlowCIR在标准CIR基准测试上展现出强劲且具有竞争力的性能，相比之前的文本反转方法具有显著的训练效率优势（减少约10倍训练资源）。
AI.conclusion: FlowCIR通过条件语义传输的创新视角解决了ZS-CIR任务，提供了一个训练高效的解决方案。Multi-Negative Steering策略有效缓解了VLM在否定语义处理方面的局限性，提升了对否定密集查询的鲁棒性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Zero-shot Composed Image Retrieval (an image retrieval task in computer vision), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion generation from videos. The application domains are completely different: image retrieval vs 3D motion/video synthesis. Although both use VLM embeddings, the purpose is entirely different - this paper uses VLM for semantic transport in image retrieval, not for quality supervision in motion synthesis. Flow matching here is used for semantic transport between images, not for motion generation or video synthesis. There is no relevance to the pain points about domain gap between 2D visuals and 3D motion, video-to-3D generation, or motion synthesis from videos.

title: DisciplineGen-1M: A Large-Scale Dataset for Multidisciplinary Visual Generation and Editing
summary: Recent image generation and editing models can produce visually appealing natural images, yet they remain unreliable when the target image is a knowledge-intensive diagram whose correctness depends on disciplinary concepts, symbolic structure, and precise spatial relations. We introduce DisciplineGen-1M, a million-scale multidisciplinary dataset that supports text-to-image generation and image editing. It contains 1.2M samples spanning mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology, geography, computer science, economics, history, music, and sports. To construct the dataset, we design a scalable framework that combines vector-graphics rendering, OCR-based editing, curated programmatic synthesis, and large-scale text-to-image filtering. These pipelines produce captions, editing instructions, structured annotations, and paired images with controllable semantic differences. Building on DisciplineGen-1M, we further introduce a discipline-informed reasoning-generation model for both text-to-image generation and image editing. Experiments on discipline-related benchmarks, GenExam and GRADE, show substantial improvements over open-source baselines, while evaluations on general reasoning-informed benchmarks, WISE and RISE, further indicate broader transfer. The results suggest that large-scale structured academic visual data is a key ingredient for moving image generation from aesthetic plausibility toward verifiable knowledge-grounded visual creation. We will publicly release our dataset, model, and source code of the data curation pipeline to ensure reproducibility and benefit future research.

AI.tldr: DisciplineGen-1M是一个百万规模的多学科数据集，支持文本到图像生成和图像编辑，包含120万个涵盖数学、物理、化学、地理、计算机科学、经济学、历史、音乐和体育等学科的样本。
AI.motivation: 当前图像生成和编辑模型虽然能产生视觉上吸引人的自然图像，但在生成依赖于学科概念、符号结构和精确空间关系的知识密集型图表时仍然不可靠。
AI.method: 设计了一个可扩展的框架，结合矢量图形渲染、基于OCR的编辑、策划的程序化合成和大规模文本到图像过滤，构建了包含标题、编辑指令、结构化注释和具有可控语义差异的配对图像的数据集。在此基础上进一步引入了学科信息推理生成模型。
AI.result: 在学科相关基准测试GenExam和GRADE上相比开源基线模型取得了显著改进，在一般推理基准WISE和RISE上的评估进一步表明了更广泛的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 大规模结构化学术视觉数据是将图像生成从美学 plausibility 推向可验证的知识 grounded 视觉创作的关键要素。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about 3D motion generation from 2D video features, while this paper is about text-to-image generation and image editing for educational scientific diagrams. The paper addresses 2D static image generation, not 3D motion synthesis. Pain points in the profile focus on video-to-motion pipelines, quality assessment of video priors, and semantic consistency for 3D motions - none of which this paper addresses. The methods (text-to-image, vector graphics rendering, OCR) are also unrelated to video generation models (Wan, Seedance) and 3D motion generation.

title: GAP-GDRNet: Geometry-Aware Monocular Visual Pose Sensing on a Single-Target Synthetic Spacecraft Dataset
summary: Monocular relative pose sensing is a central perception problem in non-cooperative rendezvous and on-orbit servicing. In spacecraft images, however, weak surface texture, thin appendages, illumination changes, and partial occlusion often leave only sparse and unstable geometric evidence. This article presents GAP-GDRNet, a geometry-aware attention-enhanced framework for monocular RGB-based 6D pose sensing. The method follows the geometry-guided direct regression paradigm of GDR-Net and modifies two points in the pipeline: an attention-based feature refinement (AFR) module is placed before dense geometric prediction, and a patch-level geometric self-attention (PGSA) module is inserted into Patch-PnP. AFR reinforces global spacecraft structure together with local weak-texture cues; PGSA then relates downsampled geometric patches before final pose regression. A Blender-based annotation process supplies target masks, visible-region masks, dense model-coordinate maps, camera intrinsics, and 6D pose labels for supervised training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GAP-GDRNet，一种基于几何感知注意力增强的单目RGB 6D位姿估计框架，用于非合作交会对接和在轨服务任务中的航天器相对位姿感知。
AI.motivation: 航天器图像存在表面纹理薄弱、细小附件、光照变化和部分遮挡等问题，导致传统方法只能获取稀疏且不稳定的几何证据，因此需要一种更鲁棒的单目相对位姿感知方法。
AI.method: 该方法基于GDR-Net的几何引导直接回归范式进行改进：(1) 在密集几何预测前引入基于注意力机制的特征细化(AFR)模块，增强全局航天器结构与局部弱纹理线索；(2) 在Patch-PnP中插入补丁级几何自注意力(PGSA)模块，建立下采样几何补丁间的关联；(3) 使用Blender生成标注数据，包括目标掩码、可见区域掩码、密集模型坐标图、相机内参和6D位姿标签。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提方法在航天器相对位姿估计任务上相比基线方法有显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入注意力机制增强几何特征表示，GAP-GDRNet能够有效应对航天器图像中的弱纹理、遮挡等挑战，为非合作交会对接任务提供了一种可行的单目视觉感知方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation (human/character motion synthesis from videos/text), while this paper is about spacecraft pose estimation for non-cooperative rendezvous and docking - a computer vision/robotics application in space missions. The methods (VLM, video generation models like Wan/Seedance, 3D motion generation) are unrelated to GDR-Net based pose estimation for spacecraft. None of the research profile's pain points (domain gap between 2D/3D, quality assessment for motion synthesis, text-to-motion semantic consistency) are addressed.

title: Dual-Selective Network for Domain-Incremental Change Detection
comment: International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks, ICANN-2026
summary: Domain-incremental change detection (DICD) continuously adapts models to new geographic domains while preserving prior knowledge. However, a structural mismatch exists: the label space remains fixed while domain characteristics vary drastically. Consequently, incremental models struggle to maintain stable spatial change representations across domains. Existing strategies, such as replay-based or regularization-based methods, often fail to scale to long domain sequences, leading to knowledge degradation or increased computational cost. We propose Dual-Selective Incremental Network (DSINet), a unified framework built on visual state space models. DSINet leverages Mamba's input-dependent selective mechanism through a selective spatial state unit (S3U). This unit preserves stable spatial change structures while filtering domain-specific variations during feature propagation. As a result, spatial representations remain stable across domains, preventing the accumulation of feature confusion over incremental steps. Additionally, we employ a concentration-balanced distillation (CBD) strategy to stabilize knowledge transfer across domains. It balances hardness and confidence concentration effects during incremental updates. This ensures reliable probability mass allocation and prevents over-smoothing or mode collapse during distillation. Together, these mechanisms maintain stable learning dynamics throughout incremental stages. Experimental results demonstrate that DSINet mitigates knowledge degradation across long domain sequences while maintaining the linear computational efficiency of state space models.

AI.tldr: 提出Dual-Selective Incremental Network (DSINet)，基于视觉状态空间模型解决领域增量变化检测问题，通过S3U单元保持稳定的空间变化表示，通过CBD策略平衡蒸馏过程中的硬度和置信度集中效应。
AI.motivation: 现有领域增量变化检测方法存在结构不匹配问题：标签空间固定但领域特征变化剧烈，导致增量模型难以维护跨领域的稳定空间变化表示。现有基于回放或正则化的策略无法扩展到长领域序列，导致知识退化或计算成本增加。
AI.method: 提出统一框架DSINet，基于视觉状态空间模型。核心包括：1) 选择性空间状态单元(S3U)：利用Mamba的输入依赖选择性机制，在特征传播中保留稳定的空间变化结构同时过滤领域特定变化；2) 集中平衡蒸馏(CBD)：平衡增量更新中的硬度和置信度集中效应，确保可靠的概率质量分配，防止蒸馏过程中过平滑或模式崩溃。
AI.result: 实验结果表明DSINet在长领域序列上缓解了知识退化，同时保持了状态空间模型的线性计算效率。
AI.conclusion: DSINet通过S3U和CBD机制在增量阶段保持稳定的学习动态，有效解决了领域增量变化检测中的知识退化问题，兼具高效性与稳定性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about domain-incremental change detection in computer vision, which is completely unrelated to the research profile focused on 3D motion generation from videos in Computer Graphics. While both involve visual analysis, the application domains are entirely different: this paper addresses change detection between images/domains using state space models, whereas the profile concerns video-to-3D-motion synthesis, quality assessment, and semantic consistency in motion generation. The methods (Mamba-based incremental learning) and task (change detection) have no overlap with 3D motion generation, two-stage video-to-motion pipelines, or VLM-based quality supervision for motion synthesis.

title: VisionAId: An Offline-First Multimodal Android Assistant for People with Visual Impairment, Featuring Personalized Object Retrieval
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. Project repository available at: github.com
summary: Over 285 million people worldwide live with a visual impairment, for whom everyday tasks such as avoiding obstacles, locating personal belongings, recognizing familiar faces, or handling cash remain persistent obstacles to personal autonomy. Existing assistive applications are typically limited to recognizing predefined categories, depend heavily on cloud connectivity, or require dedicated hardware. We present VisionAId, an Android application that turns a commodity smartphone into a real-time visual assistant. The system integrates six on-device deep learning models (metric monocular depth estimation, instance segmentation, visual and facial embeddings, face detection, and a custom banknote detector) running entirely through ONNX Runtime, with an optional cloud large language model (Google Gemini Flash) used only for narrative scene description and automatic object labeling. A distinctive contribution is a few-shot pipeline for personal objects: the user photographs an object from several angles, and the system later locates that specific instance in the environment, guiding the user toward it with augmented-reality markers, spatial audio, and distance-proportional haptics. All feedback is multimodal (Romanian speech synthesis, voice commands, vibration). On a reference device (Samsung Galaxy S21 Ultra), INT8 quantization reduces depth latency from ~1200 ms to ~491 ms, the custom banknote detector reaches an mAP@50 of 0.986, and metric depth is calibrated to below 1 cm of error within 3 m.

AI.tldr: VisionAId是一款将普通智能手机转变为实时视觉助手的Android应用，专为视障人士设计。该系统集成了6个端侧深度学习模型（深度估计、实例分割、视觉/人脸嵌入、人脸检测、钞票检测），完全通过ONNX Runtime运行，并可选使用云端大语言模型进行场景描述。其特色在于支持少样本学习，用户可拍摄个人物品后让系统定位该物品，并通过AR标记、空间音频和触觉反馈引导用户。
AI.motivation: 全球有2.85亿视障人士，日常任务如避障、找物品、识别人脸或处理现金仍是挑战。现有辅助应用通常局限于预定义类别、严重依赖云计算或需要专用硬件，因此需要一款无需特殊硬件、完全本地运行的智能视觉助手。
AI.method: 1）集成6个端侧深度学习模型（单目度量深度估计、实例分割、视觉嵌入、人脸嵌入、人脸检测、自定义钞票检测器）；2）所有模型通过ONNX Runtime运行；3）可选云端LLM（Gemini Flash）用于叙事场景描述和自动物体标注；4）开发少样本个性化物体识别管道，用户从多角度拍摄物品后系统定位该特定实例；5）多模态反馈（罗马尼亚语语音合成、语音命令、振动、AR标记、空间音频、距离比例触觉）。
AI.result: 在参考设备（三星Galaxy S21 Ultra）上，INT8量化将深度推理延迟从约1200ms降至约491ms；自定义钞票检测器达到mAP@50为0.986；度量深度校准在3米内误差小于1cm。
AI.conclusion: VisionAId成功将普通智能手机转变为功能强大的视觉助手，通过端侧推理、多模态反馈和少样本个性化学习，显著提升视障人士的日常独立性和生活质量，技术指标表明其具备实际应用可行性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about an assistive Android application for visually impaired people (object detection, depth estimation for navigation, face recognition, currency detection). It has NO relevance to the Computer Graphics research profile which focuses on 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), text-to-motion synthesis, and quality assessment. The application domain is completely different - this is accessibility/assistive technology, not computer graphics or motion synthesis.

title: Search-based Testing of Vision Language Models for In-Car Scene Understanding
comment: Accepted at the Industry Track of the 41st IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering (ASE 2026)
summary: In the automotive domain, in-car scene understanding (ISU) enables the detection of safety-critical events, such as driver distraction, and supports drivers or passengers by analyzing the in-car scene and adapting the environment (e.g., ambient lighting). The industry is increasingly exploring vision-language models (VLMs) to interpret camera-recorded in-car scenes and extract information for downstream reasoning tasks. However, VLMs may generate incomplete, erroneous, or misleading scene descriptions, highlighting the need for systematic testing. Collecting real in-vehicle data is costly, difficult to scale, and often infeasible, particularly in early design stages. In this paper, we present ISU-Test, an automated testing approach that combines rendering-based scene generation with search-based testing to evaluate ISU systems. By framing testing as an optimization problem and systematically modifying scene parameters, our method generates diverse in-car scenarios and explores a wide range of configurations. We evaluate ISU-Test on both an industrial prototype and open-source VLMs across two case studies: question answering and captioning, comparing against randomized scenario generation. Results show that ISU-Test significantly outperforms the baseline, achieving up to 10 times higher failure rates and up to 3.6 times higher failure coverage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ISU-Test，一种结合渲染场景生成和搜索式测试的自动化测试方法，用于评估车载场景理解(ISU)系统中视觉语言模型(VLM)的性能。该方法将测试建模为优化问题，通过系统修改场景参数生成多样化车内场景。
AI.motivation: VLM在解释车内场景时可能产生不完整、错误或误导性的场景描述，但收集真实车载数据成本高、难以扩展，在早期设计阶段尤其不可行。因此需要系统性的测试方法来评估ISU系统的可靠性。
AI.method: ISU-Test结合渲染场景生成与搜索式测试，将测试建模为优化问题，系统修改场景参数生成多样化的车内场景并探索广泛配置。对工业原型和开源VLM在问答与描述两个案例中进行评估。
AI.result: ISU-Test显著优于基线方法，失败率提升高达10倍，失败覆盖率提升高达3.6倍。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为ISU系统的VLM测试提供了有效框架，通过自动化生成测试场景可有效发现VLM在车载场景理解中的缺陷，为提升系统安全性提供了重要支持。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about 3D human motion generation from 2D visual features/videos in Computer Graphics, while this paper is about testing Vision Language Models for in-car/automotive scene understanding. Although both use VLMs, they are applied in entirely different domains - one focuses on motion synthesis and the other on automotive scene interpretation. The pain points, methods, and goals are unrelated.

title: OrbitQuant: Data-Agnostic Quantization for Image and Video Diffusion Transformers
summary: Diffusion transformers (DiTs) achieve state-of-the-art image and video generation, but their multi-step sampling and growing parameter count make inference expensive. Post-training quantization (PTQ) is the natural remedy, yet DiT activations shift across timesteps, prompts, and guidance branches, forcing prior methods to re-fit calibration data for every new checkpoint or modality. We present OrbitQuant, a data-agnostic weight-activation quantizer that bypasses range estimation by quantizing in a normalized, rotated basis. In this basis, a randomized permuted block-Hadamard (RPBH) rotation concentrates each coordinate around one fixed, known marginal regardless of the input, so a single Lloyd-Max codebook serves all timesteps, prompts, and layers of a given input dimension. We extend the same quantizer to weight rows offline, absorbing the rotation into the weights so that it cancels inside each linear layer and only a forward rotation on the activations remains at runtime. The same recipe transfers from image to video with no per-modality tuning. Across FLUX.1, Z-Image-Turbo, Wan 2.1, and CogVideoX, it sets the state of the art for PTQ at several low-bit settings. It also pushes PTQ of image diffusion transformers to W2A4 with usable generation quality.

AI.tldr: OrbitQuant是一种用于扩散Transformer(DiT)的后训练量化(PTQ)方法,通过在归一化旋转基中量化来绕过范围估计,使用随机置换块Hadamard(RPBH)旋转将每个坐标集中在固定边际周围,从而单个Lloyd-Max码本可适用于所有时间步、提示和层。
AI.motivation: 扩散Transformer虽然实现了先进的图像和视频生成效果,但多步采样和参数量大导致推理成本高。现有PTQ方法面临激活值随时间步、提示和引导分支变化的难题,需要为每个新检查点或模态重新拟合校准数据。
AI.method: 1)使用RPBH旋转在归一化旋转基中量化,使每个坐标集中在固定已知边际周围,单个码本适用于所有场景;2)将旋转离线吸收到权重中,使运行时仅需对激活值进行前向旋转;3)同一量化器可从图像迁移到视频,无需针对模态调整。
AI.result: 在FLUX.1、Z-Image-Turbo、Wan 2.1和CogVideoX上达到PTQ SOTA;在图像扩散Transformer上实现W2A4(权重2位激活4位)可用生成质量。
AI.conclusion: OrbitQuant是一种数据无关的权重-激活量化器,成功解决了DiT激活值跨时间步变化带来的量化难题,为扩散Transformer的高效推理提供了实用方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about quantization optimization for diffusion Transformers in image/video generation, which is completely unrelated to the research profile's focus on 3D human motion synthesis. While both involve diffusion models, the application domains are entirely different: this paper optimizes inference efficiency for image/video generation (e.g., FLUX.1, Wan 2.1 for visual content), whereas the research profile needs methods for extracting 3D motion from 2D videos. The pain points mentioned (domain gap between 2D visual features and 3D motion, quality assessment for motion synthesis, semantic consistency for 3D motions) are not addressed at all. Even though Wan 2.1 appears in both, it's used here as a quantization benchmark, not for motion generation. This is a classic example of using similar deep learning methods (diffusion) in completely different application domains.

title: InvSplat: Inverse Feed-Forward Scene Splatting
summary: Inverse rendering aims to recover both 3D geometry and physically meaningful material properties from images, enabling applications such as relighting and novel view synthesis. Optimization-based methods achieve high fidelity but require costly per-scene fitting, while image-space learning-based approaches often suffer from multi-view inconsistencies and lack an explicit 3D representation for stable novel view rendering. We present a feed-forward multi-view reconstruction framework for inverse rendering that directly predicts a structured 3D Gaussian representation with intrinsic material attributes. Each Gaussian primitive is parameterized by mean, normal, opacity, rotation, scale, albedo, metallic, and roughness, enabling a disentangled and physically grounded scene representation. Our model integrates priors from a material estimation network with a multi-view 3D reconstruction backbone, allowing joint prediction of geometry and reflectance parameters in a single forward pass. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate improved multi-view consistency compared to 2D baselines, accurate material recovery, and stable novel view rendering. Our representation further supports physically-based relighting and more faithful modeling of view-dependent effects compared to existing RGB-based feed-forward reconstruction methods. Our project webpage is: $\href{https://poliik.github.io/invsplat/}{\text{https://poliik.github.io/invsplat/}}$.

The application domain mismatch is significant: static scene reconstruction vs. dynamic motion generation.
