title: Combating Textual Noise and Redundancy: Entropy-Aware Dense Visual Token Pruning
summary: Visual token pruning is a crucial strategy for accelerating VLMs by compressing redundant image patches, yet existing methods often fail to preserve critical cues under dense instructions and fine-grained queries. In this paper, we investigate this failure and identify two underlying bottlenecks: the widespread dispersion of textual noise that corrupts dense cross-modal scoring, and the feature fragmentation inherent to standard token selection. To address these issues, we propose Entropy-Aware Dense Pruning (EADP), a framework that reformulates pruning as a structured compression problem. EADP first leverages statistical entropy to quantify and filter out textual noise, yielding a robust, fine-grained instruction relevance score. Subsequently, instead of naive Top-K selection, EADP casts token selection as a submodular maximization problem with a spatial prior, explicitly ensuring a holistic and non-redundant visual representation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EADP improves the accuracy-efficiency trade-off of VLMs, robustly preserving fine-grained visual cues under strict token budgets while achieving SoTA performance on challenging multimodal benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EADP框架，通过熵感知方法解决视觉语言模型中token剪枝的两个核心问题：文本噪声干扰和特征碎片化，在保持细粒度视觉线索的同时实现SoTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉token剪枝方法在密集指令和细粒度查询场景下无法保留关键视觉线索，存在两个瓶颈：1) 文本噪声分散导致跨模态评分受损；2) 标准token选择方法的特征碎片化问题。
AI.method: 提出熵感知密集剪枝(EADP)框架，包含两个核心模块：1) 利用统计熵量化和过滤文本噪声，获得鲁棒的细粒度指令相关性评分；2) 将token选择建模为带空间先验的子模块最大化问题，确保整体且非冗余的视觉表示。
AI.result: 实验表明EADP显著提升了VLM的精度-效率权衡，在严格token预算下能鲁棒保留细粒度视觉线索，在挑战性多模态基准测试上达到SoTA性能。
AI.conclusion: EADP通过结构化压缩方式重新定义剪枝问题，有效解决了文本噪声和特征碎片化两大难题，为加速视觉语言模型提供了新的有效途径。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on visual token pruning in Visual Language Models (VLMs) to address text noise and feature fragmentation - a pure NLP/Vision language modeling problem. It has no connection to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, or video-to-motion synthesis. The research profile is specifically about 3D motion generation from 2D videos with concerns like domain gap between 2D/3D, quality assessment for motion synthesis, and semantic text-motion consistency. While VLMs are mentioned as a potential method in the profile, this paper only uses VLM concepts as a foundation to solve an unrelated token pruning problem, not for any graphics or motion generation task. The application domain is completely different - this is about improving VLM efficiency, not about generating or assessing 3D motions.

title: NEvo: Neural-Guided Evolutionary Video Synthesis for Dynamic Visual Selectivity
summary: The human brain processes dynamic visual input through hierarchically organized, functionally specialized regions. While recent in silico brain encoding models can synthesize optimal stimuli to probe selectivity in different brain regions, prior work has been largely limited to static images, leaving dynamic visual processing underexplored. We introduce a novel neural-guided video synthesis framework that generates stimuli optimized for target brain regions across visual cortex. Our method performs evolutionary search over a structured prompt space, guided by a dynamic encoding model that predicts voxel-level responses to video inputs. By maximizing predicted activity for a target ROI, the framework efficiently discovers hyper-activating dynamic stimuli that consistently surpass handcrafted localizer videos. The synthesized videos recover known selectivities across ventral, dorsal, and lateral pathways, and further reveal systematic differences in sensitivity to temporal dynamics. A searchlight analysis provides new insight into the progression toward increasingly complex social-dynamic features along the lateral stream, further supported by probing with synthesized abstract, non-naturalistic stimuli. Taken together, our framework enables in silico exploration of dynamic visual selectivity, with new predictions for in vivo experiments

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种神经引导的视频合成框架，通过进化搜索和动态编码模型生成针对特定脑区的最优动态视觉刺激，成功揭示了腹侧、背侧和侧侧视觉通路的时空敏感性差异，并为动态视觉选择性的离体探索提供了新方法。
AI.motivation: 先前的大脑编码模型主要局限于静态图像，动态视觉处理的神经机制尚未被充分探索。该研究旨在填补这一空白，通过生成针对目标脑区优化的动态刺激来探测不同视觉通路的选择性。
AI.method: 研究团队开发了一个神经引导的视频合成框架，采用进化搜索算法在结构化提示空间中进行优化，并由动态编码模型引导以预测 voxels 级别的大脑反应。通过最大化目标 ROI 的预测活动，发现超激活动态刺激，并结合搜索液分析和抽象非自然刺激探查。
AI.result: 合成的视频成功恢复了腹侧、背侧和侧侧视觉通路的已知选择性，揭示了不同脑区对时间动态敏感性的系统性差异。搜索液分析进一步揭示了侧侧通路对复杂社会动态特征加工的渐进性，且抽象刺激探查结果支持这一发现。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了动态视觉选择性的离体探索，为体内实验提供了新的预测，有望推动对人类视觉系统层级化组织的深入理解。

relevance_reason: This is a neuroscience paper focused on brain encoding and visual pathway selectivity, not Computer Graphics. It uses video synthesis to probe neural responses in the brain, completely unrelated to 3D motion generation, video-to-3D synthesis, or any computer graphics applications. The application domain is fundamentally different - neuroscience vs. computer graphics. It addresses none of the pain points (domain gap between 2D/3D, quality assessment for motion synthesis, semantic consistency for 3D motions, visual guidance extraction for 3D generation).

title: Learning Spectral and Polarimetric Clues for One-to-Multimodal Novel View Synthesis
summary: Neural rendering techniques allow for accurate reconstruction of the geometry and color appearance of 3D scenes. Some methods have extended their use to additional imaging modalities, such as multispectral, infrared, or polarimetric data. However, all of these approaches require expensive sensors and calibrated setups to capture new multimodal frames for each new scene. We propose Spectral and Polarimetric Implicit Learned Representation (SPoILeR), a novel method to obtain multi-view consistent renderings of unconventional modalities for scenes where either only RGB frames or very few of the additional modalities are available. Thanks to a multimodal pre-training phase, the model learns the mutual correlation between different modalities. This step allows predicting accurate renderings of unconventional modalities during a fine-tuning phase supervised only by RGB images. Experimental results show that the approach can accurately render infrared, polarimetric, and multispectral frames for scenes where no input sample captured by these types of sensors is provided.

AI.tldr: SPoILeR是一种神经渲染方法,可通过RGB图像预测红外、极化和多光谱等非常规模态的多视角一致渲染结果,无需实际捕获这些模态的输入样本。
AI.motivation: 现有神经渲染方法虽能重建3D场景几何和颜色,但扩展到其他成像模态时需要昂贵的传感器和校准设置来捕获新的多模态帧,这限制了技术的可扩展性和实用性。
AI.method: 提出 Spectral and Polarimetric Implicit Learned Representation (SPoILeR):1)多模态预训练阶段学习不同模态间的相互相关性;2)微调阶段仅通过RGB图像监督即可预测非常规模态的准确渲染结果。
AI.result: 实验表明,该方法可在没有红外、极化或多光谱传感器捕获输入样本的场景中,准确渲染这些非常规模态的图像。
AI.conclusion: SPoILeR突破了传统多模态神经渲染对专用传感器的依赖,实现了仅用RGB数据即可预测多种非常规成像模态的渲染能力,为低成本多模态渲染提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper addresses novel view synthesis for different imaging modalities (infrared, polarimetric, multispectral), while the research profile focuses on 3D motion generation from 2D videos. These are different application domains within Computer Graphics - motion synthesis vs. novel view synthesis. The methods are also unrelated: the profile uses video generation models (Wan, Seedance), VLM supervision, and visual feature extraction for motion, while this paper uses neural rendering for spectral/polarimetric prediction. The pain points are entirely different (motion representation quality vs. multi-modal rendering).

title: Representation Distribution Matching for One-Step Visual Generation
summary: We elucidate the design space of Representation Distribution Matching (RDM), our name for the paradigm that trains a one-step image generator by matching generated and reference feature distributions under frozen pretrained encoders. We identify two design axes, how the distributions are compared and the representations they are compared in, and controlled studies along them yield three findings. First, the classical MMD, which could not train convincing generators a decade ago, becomes a strong and scalable objective once estimated right. Second, the generated batch is then the operative variable, with an optimum above 2048, far beyond customary batch sizes. Third, any single representation can be gamed, driven below the real score while images stay visibly fake, so we match against a balanced battery of encoders and evaluate with SW_r14, a Sliced-Wasserstein distance over 14 encoders that is independent of the training loss and resists gaming. Combining the preferred choices yields improved RDM (iRDM): it sets the one-step state of the art on ImageNet at SW_r14 1.30, corroborated by PickScore, a human-preference proxy our objective never optimizes, which prefers it over the prior best one-step generator on 71.2% of matched samples. The same recipe post-trains the four-step FLUX.2 [klein] into a one-step generator, surpassing the four-step version on GenEval, 0.826 to 0.794, and on PickScore, 22.76 to 22.58, in 90 H200 GPU-hours. Project page: https://alan-lanfeng.github.io/rdm/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了表征分布匹配(RDM)范式，通过在冻结的预训练编码器下匹配生成特征与参考特征的分布来训练一步图像生成器。通过研究两种设计轴：分布比较方式和表征选择，发现：1)正确估计的MMD成为强大且可扩展的目标函数；2)生成批次存在最优值2048以上；3)单一表征可被欺骗，需使用均衡的编码器电池评估。组合最优选择得到iRDM，在ImageNet上达到SW_r14 1.30的一步生成最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的一步图像生成器训练缺乏有效的特征分布匹配方法，需要解决如何高效匹配生成特征与真实特征分布的问题，同时避免单一表征被欺骗的情况。
AI.method: 提出表征分布匹配(RDM)范式，研究两种设计轴：1)分布比较方式(MMD等)；2)表征选择(不同预训练编码器)。采用SW_r14(基于14个编码器的切片Wasserstein距离)作为评估指标以抵抗欺骗。
AI.result: iRDM在ImageNet上达到SW_r14 1.30的一步生成最佳性能；使用PickScore评估，人类偏好比之前的最佳一步生成器高出71.2%。将FLUX.2四步模型蒸馏为一步生成器，在GenEval上从0.794提升至0.826，PickScore从22.58提升至22.76，仅需90 H200 GPU小时。
AI.conclusion: 正确估计的MMD是训练一步生成器的有效目标；生成批次大小存在最优值(>2048)；多编码器评估对防止欺骗至关重要。RDM范式为一步图像生成器训练提供了有效的设计空间和最优选择组合。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 2D image generation (one-step visual generation) while the research profile is about 3D MOTION generation/synthesis. These are completely different application domains in Computer Graphics. Although both use distribution matching methods (MMD, SW), the paper focuses on distilling FLUX.2 for image generation on ImageNet, not on video-to-motion synthesis, text-to-3D-motion, or extracting visual features for 3D generation. This is a case of using similar methods (distribution matching, diffusion distillation) but in the WRONG application domain - similar to evaluating "diffusion for image generation" vs "diffusion for human motion generation" which should receive low scores.

title: Transformer Geometry Observatory TGO-II: Representational Similarity Observatory
summary: While Vision Transformers have achieved remarkable success across computer vision and language applications, the geometric evolution of their internal representations throughout training remains insufficiently understood. Existing analyses primarily focus on attention mechanisms and downstream performance, leaving the evolution of representation geometry largely unexplored. In this work, we present Transformer Geometry Observatory-II (TGO-II), a representation geometry analysis framework designed to investigate how Transformer representations evolve during supervised training. TGO-II analyzes Vision Transformer (ViT-Small/16) representations using Centered Kernel Alignment (CKA), Singular Vector Canonical Correlation Analysis (SVCCA), Two-Nearest Neighbor Intrinsic Dimensionality (TwoNN-ID), and token covariance analysis. Our experiments reveal three key observations. First, both CKA and SVCCA progressively decrease throughout training, indicating increasing representational specialization across Transformer layers. Second, intrinsic dimensionality consistently increases before stabilizing, suggesting progressive expansion of the representation manifold into a larger set of locally accessible degrees of freedom. Third, token covariance and coupling analyses demonstrate that strong token interaction structure persists throughout training, challenging the hypothesis that increasing representational complexity arises primarily from progressive token independence. These findings suggest that representation complexity and layer specialization emerge simultaneously during training. Manifold expansion appears to occur without token decoupling. Together, these observations motivate a new hypothesis in which Vision Transformers increase representational complexity through progressively richer transformations while preserving strong token interaction structure during learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TGO-II框架分析Vision Transformer在训练过程中内部表示的几何演化，揭示了表示特化、流形扩展和token交互结构三个关键现象，为理解Transformer训练动态提供了新视角。
AI.motivation: 现有分析主要关注注意力机制和下游性能，对表示几何在训练中的演化理解不足。作者希望研究Transformer表示在监督训练过程中如何演变。
AI.method: 使用TGO-II框架对ViT-Small/16进行分析，采用CKA、SVCCA、TwoNN-ID和token协方差分析四种方法。
AI.result: 1) CKA和SVCCA在训练中持续下降，表示表示特化增强；2) 内在维度先增加后稳定，表明流形扩展；3) token交互结构持续存在，挑战了token独立性假设。
AI.conclusion: 表示复杂度和层特化在训练中同时出现；流形扩展不伴随token解耦；Vision Transformers通过渐进丰富的变换增加表示复杂度，同时保持强token交互结构。

relevance_reason: This paper analyzes Vision Transformer representation geometry during training - a fundamental machine learning research topic. While it uses ViT, the application domain is completely different from the research profile's 3D motion generation in Computer Graphics. It doesn't address any of the specified pain points (domain gap, quality assessment, semantic consistency, visual feature extraction) and uses analysis methods (CKA, SVCCA) rather than generation methods (VLM, video generation models, motion synthesis). The paper is about understanding training dynamics, not about generating or assessing 3D motions from 2D videos.

title: Show Me Examples: Inferring Visual Concepts from Image Sets
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) can follow complex textual instructions, yet they struggle to reason from purely visual context. In particular, current models fail to infer shared concepts from sets of example images and apply them to new inputs. We introduce Visual Concept Inference from Sets (VICIS), a task that evaluates this capability. Given a small context set of images sharing a concept and a query image, the model must generate new images that preserve the context-defined concept while remaining consistent with the query. We show that state-of-the-art VLMs perform poorly on this task, often ignoring the visual context or defaulting to biased generations. To address this gap, we propose a training framework and architecture that learn to infer visual concepts from image sets and extract concept-specific embeddings from queries. Experiments on synthetic data and large-scale ImageNet/WordNet data show that our model generates more accurate and diverse outputs and generalizes to unseen concepts and modalities such as sketches.

AI.tldr: VICIS任务评估视觉语言模型从图像集合中推断共享概念并应用于新查询图像的能力，现有的先进模型在该任务上表现不佳，作者提出的方法显著提升了概念推理和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前的视觉语言模型虽能遵循复杂的文本指令，但难以从纯视觉上下文进行推理，特别是在从示例图像集合中推断共享概念并应用于新输入方面存在困难。
AI.method: 提出了一种训练框架和架构，学习从图像集合中推断视觉概念，并从查询中提取概念特定嵌入。
AI.result: 在合成数据和大规模ImageNet/WordNet数据上的实验表明，模型能够生成更准确和多样化的输出，并泛化到未见过的概念和草图等模态。
AI.conclusion: 研究提出了VICIS任务和相应的训练框架，实验表明模型在合成数据、ImageNet和WordNet数据上表现优异，能够生成更准确和多样化的输出，并泛化到未见过的概念和模态（如草图）。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses a completely different application domain. While the research profile focuses on 3D MOTION generation/synthesis from 2D videos (Computer Graphics), this paper focuses on inferring visual concepts from STATIC IMAGE SETS for image-based reasoning. The methods differ significantly in purpose: the profile needs video-to-motion pipelines, quality supervision for motion synthesis, and 2D-to-3D domain transfer, while this paper deals with concept inference from static images. No overlap in application domain or pain points - this is computer vision (concept inference) rather than computer graphics (motion synthesis).

title: Object-centric LeJEPA
summary: Image encoders trained with LeJEPA can deliver strong features for downstream tasks, but, like other image-level self-supervised methods, typically require large training datasets. Aligning representations at the level of objects rather than whole scenes promises greater data efficiency, but doing this in a completely self-supervised way, effectively jointly partitioning a scene and representing its objects, is unstable: the two are locked in a cyclic dependency, partitioning requires meaningful representations, while meaningful representations require consistent partitioning. We sidestep this instability by taking object masks as given during training, using cheap, off-the-shelf SAM proposals. We extend LeJEPA - whose distributional anti-collapse objective ports naturally from whole images to variable-sized sets of objects - to align object-centric representations rather than whole images. An additional instance-separating loss, which treats other objects in the same scene as negatives, further boosts downstream performance. Across two model scales and 10-100% of COCO, object-level LeJEPA outperforms image-level LeJEPA on tracking (DAVIS), classification (ImageNet-1k), segmentation (ADE20k), and re-identification (NAVI).

AI.tldr: 提出目标级LeJEPA方法，利用SAM提供的目标掩码进行目标级别的表示对齐，通过实例分离损失提高数据效率，在多个视觉任务上优于图像级方法。
AI.motivation: 图像级自监督学习方法需要大量训练数据，而在目标级别对齐表示可以提高数据效率。但完全自监督地进行目标分割和表示学习存在循环依赖问题，导致训练不稳定。
AI.method: 利用现成的SAM模型生成目标掩码，将LeJEPA从整幅图像扩展到可变大小的目标集合，并引入实例分离损失将同一场景中的其他目标视为负样本。
AI.result: 在两个模型规模和10-100%的COCO数据集上，目标级LeJEPA在DAVIS跟踪、ImageNet-1k分类、ADE20k分割和NAVI重识别任务上均优于图像级LeJEPA。
AI.conclusion: 目标级表示对齐结合现成目标提议可有效提升自监督学习的数据效率，在多个下游视觉任务上取得显著性能提升。

relevance_reason: This paper is about object-centric representation learning using LeJEPA and SAM for visual tasks (classification, segmentation, tracking). It is a computer vision paper focused on representation learning, NOT Computer Graphics or 3D motion generation. The application domain is completely different - it has nothing to do with synthesizing 3D motions from 2D videos, quality assessment, or the two-stage video+motion pipeline mentioned in the research profile. The methods (LeJEPA, SAM segmentation) are also unrelated to the required methods (VLM, video generation models like Wan/Seedance, 3D motion generation).

title: Wavelet-Guided Semantic Signal Compensation for Inversion-Free Image Editing
summary: Text-guided image editing aims to modify visual content according to a target prompt while preserving the background. Recent inversion-free image editing frameworks such as FlowEdit have demonstrated strong editing capability without requiring inversion. Empirically, FlowEdit can achieve substantial semantic changes under appropriate hyperparameter settings. However, we observe that under certain global attribute shifts, the editing trajectory may not effectively move away from the source distribution in the early timesteps. Our analysis suggests that in the high-noise regime, the dominant manifold-seeking flow toward the data manifold can reduce the influence of the text-conditioned direction, leading to limited global modification while background structures remain only moderately preserved. Inspired by this observation, we propose an inversion-free, frequency-aware semantic compensation strategy that strengthens the effective signal in the early stage of generation, while maintaining structural consistency in the background. The proposed method improves global editing capacity without sacrificing background fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于流模型的无反转图像编辑方法，通过频率感知语义补偿策略解决早期时间步中文本条件方向影响力不足的问题，从而在保持背景保真度的同时增强全局编辑能力。
AI.motivation: 观察到FlowEdit等无反转图像编辑框架在某些全局属性变化下，早期时间步的编辑轨迹未能有效远离源分布。在高噪声状态下，流模型的数据流形寻求特性会削弱文本条件方向的影响，导致全局修改有限且背景结构保留不理想。
AI.method: 提出无反转的频率感知语义补偿策略：在生成早期增强有效信号强度，同时在背景区域保持结构一致性。
AI.result: 该方法在保持背景保真度的前提下，显著提升了全局编辑能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过频率感知语义补偿有效解决了流模型高噪声状态下的编辑瓶颈，为文本引导的图像编辑提供了更优的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Complete application domain mismatch. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation from 2D videos (human motion synthesis), while this paper is about 2D image editing using flow-based models. Although both involve generative models, the application domains are entirely different - image editing vs motion synthesis. The paper addresses 2D image manipulation, not 3D motion generation or video-to-motion pipelines.

title: Learning to Evolve Scenes: Reasoning about Human Activities with Scene Graphs
summary: Understanding human behavior while interacting with the surrounding world is crucial for many applications of embodied AI. First-person videos are particularly informative for this problem, as they well capture how activities reshape the scene over time. However, existing approaches often rely on implicit visual or language-aligned representations, disregarding structured reasoning over the scene dynamic. We argue that explicit, compositional and editable representations of human-environment interactions can play a crucial role for rich grounded activity understanding. To this end, we introduce SG-Ego, a large scale annotation set extending Ego4D with spatio-temporal scene graphs, where relations triplets are consolidated over time into explicit time-evolving descriptions of the scene state. To reason over this representation, we propose GLEN, a graph-based model that operates over scene graph sequences to both align them with textual actions and model their temporal evolution. In addition, we formulate the activity-driven graph-edit forecasting (A-GEF) problem, a novel task that casts scene dynamics as a sequence of structured transformations conditioned on ongoing actions, enabling explicit reasoning about how scenes change over time. We validate our approach across multiple downstream tasks, spanning retrieval benchmarks as EgoMCQ and EgoCVR, as well as long-horizon reasoning benchmarks as EXPLORE-Bench and the newly introduced A-GEF. GLEN achieves strong results compared to raw video baselines and it excels in reasoning settings, typically addressed only with MLLMs, while enabling controllable and structured predictions of scene dynamics driven by human activities. We believe our results establish spatio-temporal scene graphs, together with models that reason over them, as strong compositional and interpretable representations for video understanding and potentially beyond.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SG-Ego数据集和GLEN模型，利用时空场景图进行第一人称视频中人类活动理解，并通过活动驱动的图编辑预测(A-GEF)任务实现场景动态的显式推理。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖于隐式的视觉或语言对齐表示，忽略了场景动态的结构化推理。显式、可组合和可编辑的人类-环境交互表示对于丰富的具身活动理解至关重要。
AI.method: 1) 构建SG-Ego大规模标注数据集，扩展Ego4D，添加时空场景图，关系三元组随时间整合为场景状态的显式时间演化描述；2) 提出GLEN模型，基于图结构在场景图序列上运作，对齐文本动作并建模时间演化；3) 提出活动驱动的图编辑预测(A-GEF)新任务，将场景动态形式化为基于持续动作的结构化转换序列。
AI.result: GLEN在EgoMCQ和EgoCVR等检索基准以及EXPLORE-Bench和A-GEF等长程推理基准上相比原始视频基线取得优异结果，在推理设置中表现出色，可与MLLMs媲美，同时支持可控和结构化的场景动态预测。
AI.conclusion: 时空场景图及其推理模型可作为视频理解的强有力组合式和可解释表示，为具身AI理解人类行为提供新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about scene graph understanding for first-person video activity recognition (video understanding), which is completely different from the research profile's focus on 3D motion generation and video-to-motion synthesis in Computer Graphics. The paper deals with analyzing/understanding human activities in videos using scene graphs, not generating 3D motions from visual or textual inputs. Methods used (scene graphs, GLEN model) are unrelated to the profile's methods (VLM for quality supervision, video generation models like Wan/Seedance, 3D motion generation, two-stage pipelines). The application domain mismatch is fundamental - this is computer vision/video understanding rather than computer graphics/motion synthesis.

title: MARVEL: Margin-Aware Robust von Mises-Fischer Expert Learning for Long-Tailed Out-of-Distribution Detection
summary: For clinical deployment, it is essential that automated diagnostic systems remain reliable when confronted with previously unseen cases, yet deep models routinely misclassify out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs with high confidence, underscoring the need for more robust OOD detection methods. Although substantial effort has been devoted to improving model robustness, most of the existing literature assumes balanced datasets, evaluates OOD detection on coarse or non-clinical OOD sources, or lacks comprehensive assessment across diverse OOD scenarios. To address the gaps, we propose a novel methodology trained on diverse and imbalanced medical datasets and evaluated across a clinically reflective OOD spectrum. Our framework comprises three key components: (1) a Nonlinear von Mises-Fisher (NvMF) classifier capable of learning non-linear decision boundaries, with theoretical proof of its asymptotic connection to cosine classifiers; (2) a multi-expert framework in which margin-aware NvMF classifiers specialise in different regions of label distribution to better handle imbalance; and (3) an outlier expert trained explicitly to distinguish inlier from outlier data, thereby strengthening OOD detection. Evaluation on RFMiD, ISIC2019, and NCTCRC datasets demonstrates consistent improvements over state-of-the-art methods, achieving mean FPR95 reductions of 8.45%, 13.02%, and 36.90% respectively. These gains are further supported by comprehensive ablations that validated the contributions of each component. This enables reliable identification of unfamiliar cases for deferral to clinicians, supporting safer AI-assisted diagnosis in real-world workflows. Our code is available at https://github.com/redboxup/MARVEL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MARVEL框架，针对医学影像中分布外（OOD）检测问题，通过非线性von Mises-Fisher分类器、多专家系统和异常值专家三个组件，在不平衡医学数据集上实现更鲁棒的OOD识别，在RFMiD、ISIC2019和NCT-CRC数据集上分别降低FPR95达8.45%、13.02%和36.90%。
AI.motivation: 临床部署需要自动诊断系统对未见过的病例保持可靠性，但深度模型常将分布外输入高置信度误分类，现有文献多假设平衡数据集、评估非临床OOD来源，缺乏对多样化OOD场景的综合评估。
AI.method: 提出三组件框架：(1)非线性von Mises-Fisher (NvMF)分类器学习非线性决策边界，有渐近连接余弦分类器的理论证明；(2)多专家框架中margin-aware NvMF分类器专精于标签分布不同区域，更好地处理类别不平衡；(3)显式训练异常值专家区分内点与外点数据，增强OOD检测能力。
AI.result: 在RFMiD、ISIC2019和NCT-CRC数据集上评估，一致超越最先进方法，分别实现FPR95降低8.45%、13.02%和36.90%的平均提升，消融实验验证了各组件的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了对不熟悉病例的可靠识别，可 deferral 给临床医生，支持更安全的AI辅助诊断工作流程。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection in medical imaging for automated diagnosis systems. It has zero connection to Computer Graphics, 3D motion generation, video generation models, or any of the visual feature extraction methods mentioned in the research profile. The application domain (medical imaging OOD detection) is entirely different from the target domain (video-to-3D motion synthesis in computer graphics).

title: Interpretation-Oriented Cloud Removal via Observation-Anchored Residual Flow with Geo-Contextual Alignment
summary: Cloud removal (CR) is essential for optical remote sensing, serving as a prerequisite for reliable downstream interpretation, such as semantic segmentation and change detection. However, existing CR approaches often prioritize visual realism while overlooking their impact on subsequent analytical tasks, leading to semantic drift and degraded downstream performance. To address this issue, we propose Geo-Anchored Cloud Removal (GACR), a unified framework that jointly ensures faithful reconstruction and robust interpretability. At its core, GACR incorporates Observation-Anchored Residual Flow (OAR-Flow), which reformulates CR as a physically grounded residual inversion process. By anchoring the generative trajectory to the cloudy observation rather than pure noise, OAR-Flow enables fast, stable, and faithful reconstruction. To further preserve semantic structures critical for downstream interpretation, GACR integrates Geo-Contextual Prior Alignment (GCPA) to constrain the reconstruction within a semantic manifold induced by a Vision Foundation Model (VFM). Consequently, GACR strictly maintains the spatial-semantic integrity of complex landscapes. Extensive experiments across six CR datasets and twelve downstream tasks demonstrate that GACR produces superior reconstruction quality while consistently improving downstream task accuracy. The code is available at https://github.com/wzy6055/GACR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Geo-Anchored Cloud Removal (GACR)框架，通过OAR-Flow和GCPA两个模块联合确保忠实重建和鲁棒可解释性，在6个数据集和12个下游任务中验证了其优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有云去除方法往往优先考虑视觉逼真度而忽视对后续分析任务的影响，导致语义漂移和下游性能下降。需要在确保重建质量的同时，保持对下游解释任务（如语义分割和变化检测）重要的语义结构。
AI.method: 提出统一框架GACR，包含两个核心组件：1) OAR-Flow（观测锚定残差流）：将云去除重新表述为物理驱动的残差反演过程，将生成轨迹锚定到云观测而非纯噪声；2) GCPA（地理上下文先验对齐）：利用视觉基础模型（VFM）诱导的语义流形约束重建过程，保持语义结构的完整性。
AI.result: 在6个云去除数据集和12个下游任务上的广泛实验表明，GACR产生更优的重建质量，同时持续提高下游任务准确性。
AI.conclusion: GACR通过将生成轨迹锚定到云观测而非纯噪声，实现了快速、稳定且忠实的重建。同时，GCPA模块确保重建结果保持在由视觉基础模型诱导的语义流形内，严格保持了复杂景观的空间-语义完整性。实验表明GACR在6个云去除数据集上具有 superior reconstruction quality，并在12个下游任务中 consistently improving downstream task accuracy。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about cloud removal in satellite/remote sensing imagery (geospatial computer vision), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D motion generation from 2D videos. These are entirely different application domains - remote sensing image processing vs. human/3D motion synthesis. The methods (OAR-Flow, GCPA for cloud removal) have no relevance to video generation models (Wan, Seedance), 3D motion generation, or VLM-based quality supervision for motion synthesis. Despite both mentioning "visual feature extraction," the purposes are completely unrelated.

title: EAGLE-360: Embodied Active Global-to-Local Exploration in 360$^\circ$
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated exceptional capabilities in standard visual understanding, adapting them for active visual search in 360$^\circ$ panoramic environments exposes fundamental limitations. Specifically, standard MLLMs struggle to effectively model inherent panoramic properties, such as severe polar distortion and continuous cylindrical topologies, which significantly degrades target detection accuracy. Consequently, existing panoramic search methods attempt to compensate by relying heavily on fragmented local viewpoints. Burdened by rigid initialization and a lack of global panoramic priors, these approaches suffer from myopic, inefficient exploration and struggle with robust error recovery when targets are out of view. To overcome these challenges, we propose EAGLE-360, a novel Embodied Active Global-to-Local Exploration framework. Rather than performing exhaustive local searches, EAGLE-360 leverages global priors to establish an initial holistic perspective, iteratively reasoning and progressively narrowing the search space. Architecturally, we adapt RoPE Rolling, a coordinate-shifting positional encoding mechanism, to seamlessly model the continuous topologies of panoramas. To facilitate this paradigm, we construct the large-scale EAGLE-360 dataset, comprising 14,000+ 4K panoramas and 70,000+ rounds of high-quality VQA dialogues. By employing a training pipeline that integrates Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), we effectively elicit complex spatial reasoning and tool-calling capabilities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EAGLE-360 establishes a new state-of-the-art for 360$^\circ$ visual search, achieving nearly an 8-fold increase in accuracy over the base model while significantly enhancing exploration efficiency.

AI.tldr: EAGLE-360是一种用于360°全景环境中主动视觉搜索的嵌入式主动全局-局部探索框架，通过RoPE Rolling位置编码处理全景连续拓扑，结合SFT和GRPO训练，在大规模数据集上实现近8倍精度提升。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs难以有效建模360°全景的极地畸变和连续圆柱拓扑，导致目标检测精度严重下降；现有全景搜索方法依赖碎片化局部视角，缺乏全局全景先验，存在视野受限、探索低效和错误恢复困难等问题。
AI.method: 1) 全局-局部探索框架：利用全局先验建立初始全景视角，迭代推理逐步缩小搜索空间；2) RoPE Rolling位置编码：适应全景连续圆柱拓扑；3) 训练pipeline：监督微调(SFT)+群组相对策略优化(GRPO)；4) 构建大规模EAGLE-360数据集：14,000+ 4K全景图和70,000+轮高质量VQA对话
AI.result: EAGLE-360在360°视觉搜索任务上建立新SOTA，相比基线模型精度提升近8倍，同时显著增强探索效率。
AI.conclusion: EAGLE-360通过全局-局部探索策略、RoPE Rolling位置编码和创新训练范式，有效解决了MLLMs在360°全景视觉搜索中的极地畸变、连续拓扑建模和探索效率问题。实验表明该方法达到新SOTA，精度提升近8倍，同时显著增强了探索效率。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation from video/text (e.g., extracting visual features from 2D videos for 3D human motion synthesis). EAGLE-360 is about embodied AI, robotic exploration, and 360° panoramic visual search - a robotics/CV task, not graphics/motion generation. Despite both using VLMs, the goals are entirely different: motion synthesis vs. visual search in 3D environments.

title: GeoMix: Descriptor-Free Visual Localization via Global Context and Multi-Detector Training
summary: Descriptor-free visual localization eliminates high-dimensional descriptor storage, preserves scene privacy, and simplifies map maintenance, yet its accuracy still lags far behind descriptor-based pipelines. We identify this gap to insufficient geometric discriminability in geometry-only matching. Without visual appearance, current methods underutilize local geometry cues, lack the global context among keypoints, and overfit to a single keypoint detector. We further observe that descriptor-free matching naturally enables multi-detector training, as heterogeneous keypoints can be optimized in a shared geometry-only space without aligning descriptor spaces. Building on these insights, we propose GeoMix, a descriptor-free 2D-3D matching framework that strengthens geometric discriminability at three levels. Locally, directional and distance-aware embeddings enrich neighborhood aggregation with fine-grained spatial structure. Globally, learnable context nodes aggregate and redistribute scene-wide information via cross-attention to resolve ambiguities beyond local receptive fields. At the training level, Mix-Training exploits this detector-agnostic geometry space to learn representations across multiple keypoint detectors. Extensive experiments on MegaDepth, Cambridge Landmarks, 7Scenes, and Aachen Day-Night show that GeoMix sets a new state of the art among descriptor-free methods, reducing 75th-percentile rotation error by 89\% and translation error by up to 90\% over the previous best, while generalizing zero-shot to unseen detectors and narrowing the gap to descriptor-based pipelines. Code is available at $\href{https://github.com/YejunZhang/Geomix}{\text{this links}}$.

AI.tldr: GeoMix是一个无需描述子的2D-3D匹配框架，通过在局部、全局和训练三个层面增强几何判别性，在多个数据集上实现了无需描述子方法的最新性能。
AI.motivation: 无需描述子的视觉定位避免了高维描述子存储、保护场景隐私、简化地图维护，但精度仍落后于基于描述子的方法。差距源于纯几何匹配中几何判别性不足：现有方法未充分利用局部几何线索、缺乏关键点间的全局上下文、过度拟合单一关键点检测器。
AI.method: 提出GeoMix框架，从三个层次增强几何判别性：1)局部层面：方向和距离感知嵌入丰富邻域聚合；2)全局层面：可学习上下文节点通过交叉注意力聚合和重分配全场景信息；3)训练层面：Mix-Training利用检测器无关的几何空间学习多检测器表示。
AI.result: 在MegaDepth、Cambridge Landmarks、7Scenes和Aachen Day-Night数据集上，GeoMix无需描述子方法中创下新SOTA，第75百分位旋转误差降低89%，平移误差降低高达90%，同时实现对未见检测器的零样本泛化，缩小了与描述子方法的差距。
AI.conclusion: GeoMix通过多层次几何判别性增强和多样化检测器训练策略，成功提升了无需描述子视觉定位的精度，实现了对未见检测器的零样本泛化，为无需描述子方法的发展提供了新方向。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses visual localization (2D-3D matching for camera pose estimation), which is a completely different application domain from the research profile's focus on 3D motion synthesis from videos. While both involve 2D-3D relationships, the goals are orthogonal: the paper aims to localize camera position in a 3D scene, whereas the research profile seeks to generate/synthesize 3D motions from 2D video priors. The methods (geometric matching for localization vs video generation models + motion synthesis) and downstream applications are entirely different.

title: Towards Robustness against Typographic Attack with Training-free Concept Localization
comment: 15 pages main text, provisionally accepted to ECCV 2026
summary: Models trained via Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP) serve as the foundational vision encoders for most modern Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs). Despite their widespread adoption, CLIP models exhibit a critical yet underexplored failure mode: irrelevant text appearing within images confounds visual representations, biasing them toward lexical meaning rather than true visual semantics. This robustness issue, commonly described as a Typographic Attack (TA), exposes a vulnerability that poses a significant risk to safety-critical applications such as autonomous driving. To achieve interpretable and effective robustness against TA, we propose a novel, training-free mechanistic interpretability method. Our method provides sampling-based interpretations of hidden state representations and quantitatively attributes semantic versus lexical focus to individual attention heads. Through probabilistic analysis and circuit mining, we isolate specific Vision Transformer (ViT) components that disproportionately encode lexical information, thereby identifying the mechanistic source of TA. We further show that simple interventions applied directly to the identified circuits, without any additional training, can substantially improve robustness against Typographic Attacks in object classification. These interventions, such as selective adjustment of attention weights, also outperform both supervised and training-free defense methods. Our experiments demonstrate that applying the proposed intervention to the vision encoders of several state-of-the-art LVLMs yields substantial gains in Visual Question Answering accuracy under Typographic Attack interference on RIO-Bench. These results confirm both the efficacy and the generalizability of our mechanistic approach. Code is released at https://github.com/Liu-524/SamplingTAR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的机械可解释性方法，通过采样解释CLIP模型的隐藏状态表示，识别Vision Transformer中编码词汇信息的特定注意力头，并对其进行简单干预以提升对字体攻击的鲁棒性。该方法在目标分类和视觉问答任务上均优于现有防御方法。
AI.motivation: CLIP模型作为现代大型视觉语言模型的基础视觉编码器，存在一个关键但未被充分探索的失效模式：图像中出现的无关文本会混淆视觉表示，使其偏向词汇意义而非真实视觉语义。这种被称为"字体攻击"的鲁棒性问题对自动驾驶等安全关键应用构成重大风险。
AI.method:
1) 提出一种无需训练的机械可解释性方法
2) 提供基于采样的隐藏状态表示解释
3) 对单个注意力头进行语义焦点与词汇焦点的定量归因
4) 通过概率分析和电路挖掘识别编码词汇信息的特定ViT组件
5) 直接对识别出的电路进行简单干预（如选择性调整注意力权重）
AI.result:
1) 在目标分类任务中显著提升了对字体攻击的鲁棒性
2) 干预方法优于有监督和无监督防御方法
3) 在RIO-Bench上应用于多个先进LVLMs的视觉编码器后，视觉问答准确率获得显著提升
4) 证明了该方法的有效性和可泛化性
AI.conclusion: 通过机械可解释性方法可以识别字体攻击的机制根源，无需额外训练即可通过简单干预提升模型鲁棒性，该方法具有良好的可泛化性，适用于多种先进视觉语言模型。

relevance_reason: This paper is about adversarial robustness and mechanistic interpretability of CLIP/ViT models for security against typographic attacks. It has NO relevance to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics for 3D motion generation, video generation models (Wan, Seedance), and visual feature extraction for synthesizing 3D motions from 2D videos. The application domains are completely different - the paper addresses vision-language model security vulnerabilities while the profile addresses 3D motion synthesis from visual inputs.

title: Seek to Segment: Active Perception for Panoramic Referring Segmentation
summary: Existing referring segmentation models passively process static images captured from fixed perspectives, limiting their applicability in Embodied AI, where agents must perform active perception in the continuous 360$^\circ$ environments. To bridge this gap, we introduce a novel task: Active Panoramic Referring Segmentation (APRS). In this setting, an agent is required to adjust its viewing direction ($Δθ, Δφ$) to explore the 360$^\circ$ environment, seeking the object specified by a user instruction for segmentation. To tackle this challenging task, we propose PanoSeeker, a memory-augmented agent for efficient APRS. Rather than relying on heuristic scanning, PanoSeeker integrates a Vision-Language Model (VLM) with EgoSphere, an explicit spatial visual memory. By progressively integrating sequential local observations into a unified 360$^\circ$ representation, EgoSphere enables the agent to plan efficient and non-redundant search trajectories. Once the target is found, the agent performs active viewpoint alignment and outputs the segmentation mask. Furthermore, we curate an expert-annotated search trajectory dataset with memory timelines for Supervised Fine-Tuning, followed by Reinforcement Learning post-training to explicitly optimize PanoSeeker's exploration efficiency. Extensive experiments on our newly established APRS benchmark demonstrate that PanoSeeker achieves superior search efficiency and segmentation accuracy, significantly outperforming adapted state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一项新任务——主动全景指向分割(APRS)，解决现有指向分割模型仅能处理静态图像的问题，使智能体能够在360°环境中主动调整视角探索并分割目标对象。
AI.motivation: 现有指向分割模型被动处理静态图像，无法应用于需要在连续360°环境中进行主动感知的具身AI场景，因此需要提出新的任务范式。
AI.method: 提出PanoSeeker方法，结合视觉语言模型(VLM)和EgoSphere（显式空间视觉记忆），通过逐步整合连续局部观察形成统一的360°表示，规划高效无冗余的搜索轨迹。采用专家标注的搜索轨迹数据集进行监督微调，随后使用强化学习后训练优化探索效率。
AI.result: 在新建立的APRS基准测试上，PanoSeeker实现了 superior search efficiency and segmentation accuracy，显著优于 adapted state-of-the-art baselines。
AI.conclusion: PanoSeeker能够有效解决主动全景指向分割任务，在搜索效率和分割精度上均取得优异表现，为具身AI中的主动感知提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses panoramic image segmentation for embodied AI, which is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on 3D motion generation from 2D videos. While both mention VLM, the application domains are completely different: this paper is about segmentation in 360° environments for robots, not about video-to-motion synthesis, quality assessment of video priors, or extracting visual features for 3D generation. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points related to domain gap between 2D features and 3D motion, semantic consistency in text-to-motion, or two-stage video+motion pipeline.

title: From SRA to Self-Flow: Data Augmentation or Self-Supervision?
summary: Representation alignment has become an effective way to accelerate diffusion transformer training and improve generation quality. Recent self-alignment methods, such as SRA and Self-Flow, further remove the dependency on external pretrained encoders by constructing alignment within the diffusion model itself. However, the mechanism behind the improvement from SRA to Self-Flow, dual-time scheduling, remains under-examined: Self-Flow attributes its gain to interactions between tokens at different noise levels, where cleaner tokens help infer noisier ones. In this work, we revisit this explanation and ask whether the gain instead comes from data augmentation along the noise dimension. To disentangle these factors, we introduce Attention Separation, which preserves the same dual-timestep input as Self-Flow while blocking attention between tokens assigned to different noise levels. Surprisingly, removing such interaction does not degrade performance and can even improve it, suggesting that the improvement from SRA to Self-Flow mainly comes from data augmentation. Furthermore,We show that Attention Separation itself provides an augmentation effect by splitting a single image into multiple effective training parts to expand the training data. Based on these observations, we combine self-representation alignment with dual-timestep and attention-separation augmentation, and demonstrate the effectiveness of this design on ImageNet.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了Self-Flow中双时间调度机制的性能提升来源，提出注意力分离方法，证明性能提升主要来自数据增强而非跨噪声级别的token交互。
AI.motivation: 之前研究认为Self-Flow的提升源于不同噪声级别token之间的交互（干净token帮助推断噪声token），作者想探究这一解释是否正确，性能提升是否实际来自数据增强。
AI.method: 引入注意力分离（Attention Separation）方法：保留Self-Flow的双时间步输入，但阻止不同噪声级别token之间的注意力交互，从而分离两种因素。
AI.result: 移除跨噪声级别交互后性能未下降甚至提升，证明提升来自数据增强。注意力分离本身通过将单图分割为多个有效训练样本提供增强效果。在ImageNet上验证了结合自表示对齐、双时间步和注意力分离增强的设计有效性。
AI.conclusion: Self-Flow相比SRA的性能提升主要源于数据增强而非跨时间步token交互。注意力分离是一种有效的数据增强技术，可扩展训练数据。该发现为理解自对齐方法提供了新视角。

relevance_reason: This paper is about image generation (diffusion models on ImageNet), while the research profile is about 3D MOTION generation in Computer Graphics. These are completely different application domains. The pain points in the profile focus on 3D motion synthesis, semantic consistency for 3D motions, and extracting visual guidance for 3D generation - none of which are addressed by this paper. Although both involve diffusion models, they are used for different purposes: 2D image generation vs 3D motion generation, which are distinct areas in computer graphics.

title: PointDiT: Pixel-Space Diffusion for Monocular Geometry Estimation
summary: State-of-the-art single-image 3D reconstruction methods often rely on complex hybrid architectures and loss functions, or compress geometry into latent spaces in order to leverage pre-trained latent diffusion models. In this work, we show that such architectural overhead and intricate loss formulations are unnecessary. We introduce a minimalist pixel-space Diffusion Transformer, built on a plain ViT, that operates directly on raw 3D point map patches and is conditioned on image tokens from a pre-trained DINOv3. Unlike existing latent diffusion approaches, we train our diffusion backbone entirely from scratch, eliminating the need for point map tokenizers. Despite its simplicity, our approach surpasses complex latent-based diffusion models while remaining significantly simpler than hybrid alternatives. Notably, it produces sharper geometric structure and is more robust in highly ambiguous regions, such as transparent objects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种极简的像素空间扩散Transformer，直接在原始3D点图块上操作，无需复杂的潜在空间压缩或混合架构。该方法使用预训练DINOv3的图像tokens进行条件化，从零开始训练，超越了复杂的潜在扩散模型。
AI.motivation: 现有最先进的单图像3D重建方法通常依赖复杂的混合架构和损失函数，或将几何压缩到潜在空间以利用预训练潜在扩散模型。作者认为这些架构开销和复杂的损失函数设计是不必要的。
AI.method: 提出一种基于普通ViT的极简像素空间扩散Transformer，直接处理原始3D点图 patches，并使用预训练DINOv3的图像tokens进行条件化。完全从零开始训练扩散骨干网络，无需点图tokenizer。
AI.result: 尽管方法极其简单，但超越了复杂的基于潜在扩散的模型，同时显著简化于混合替代方案。该方法产生更清晰的几何结构，并在透明物体等高度模糊区域更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 复杂的潜在空间压缩和混合架构设计对于高质量单图像3D重建并非必要。极简的像素空间方法配合适当的条件化策略即可实现更优性能，尤其在几何清晰度和处理困难场景方面表现突出。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses monocular 3D GEOMETRY ESTIMATION (static 3D shape reconstruction from single images), which is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on 3D MOTION GENERATION (temporal sequence of movements from videos). While both use diffusion models, the application domains are completely different: static geometry vs. dynamic motion synthesis. The paper doesn't address any motion-specific pain points like video-to-motion conversion, temporal consistency, or motion quality assessment. It's a geometry reconstruction paper, not a motion generation paper.

title: Alignment Is All You Need For X-to-4D Generation
summary: Generative diffusion models excel at synthesizing high-quality images, videos, and 3D content under multimodal control. However, arbitrary user-defined modality-to-4D (X-to-4D) generation remains challenging due to the high cost of constructing diverse datasets and the limited scalability of existing methods. This paper presents Align4D, a flexible framework that translates any-modal input into coherent video-3D pairs, using video to guide 4D motion and 3D data to shape 4D geometry. Align4D introduces three key techniques: (1) Object Distance Alignment, which searches Video-Aligned and Multiview-Aligned Object Distances (VAOD/MAOD), respectively, to reconcile 4D renderings with video and the priors of multiview diffusion models; (2) Motion-Geometry Joint Alignment, which constrains known and unknown views through synchronized video and 3D inputs, ensuring consistent 4D generation; and (3) Asynchronous Optimization, which decouples Gaussian attribute and deformation network training to enhance motion and geometry fidelity. We further propose the X4D dataset, which integrates prompt, image, video, and 3D data for benchmarking. Experiments on X4D and Consistent4D demonstrate that Align4D achieves state-of-the-art quality and consistency in X-to-4D generation. Project page: https://miaoqiaowei.github.io/Align4D/.

AI.tldr: Align4D是一个灵活的框架，可以将任意模态输入（文本、图像、视频、3D）转换为连贯的4D内容（视频-3D对）。该方法通过视频引导4D运动，通过3D数据塑造4D几何形状，实现了任意用户定义的X-to-4D生成。
AI.motivation: 当前任意用户定义的模态到4D（X-to-4D）生成仍然具有挑战性，原因包括：构建多样化数据集的高成本，以及现有方法的可扩展性有限。这促使研究者开发一个灵活且可扩展的框架来处理各种输入模态。
AI.method: 提出三种关键技术：(1) 目标距离对齐（Object Distance Alignment）：搜索视频对齐和多视角对齐的目标距离（VAOD/MAOD），协调4D渲染与视频和多视角扩散模型的先验；(2) 运动-几何联合对齐（Motion-Geometry Joint Alignment）：通过同步的视频和3D输入约束已知和未知视图，确保一致的4D生成；(3) 异步优化（Asynchronous Optimization）：解耦高斯属性和变形网络训练，提高运动和几何保真度。
AI.result: 在X4D和Consistent4D数据集上的实验表明，Align4D在X-to-4D生成中达到了最先进的质量和一致性。
AI.conclusion: Align4D作为一个灵活的框架，能够处理任意模态输入并生成高质量、几何一致且运动连贯的4D内容，为多模态条件下的4D生成提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: The paper is in Computer Graphics and deals with 3D motion generation from visual inputs (video), which is methodologically similar to the research profile. However, there's a significant domain mismatch: the research profile focuses on human motion synthesis from 2D videos (addressing human motion generation with methods like VLM quality supervision), while this paper focuses on general 4D object/scene generation (dynamic 3D objects/scenes) rather than human motion. The paper uses alignment techniques for X-to-4D which differs from the specific human motion synthesis pipeline mentioned in the profile.

title: WorldDirector: Building Controllable World Simulators with Persistent Dynamic Memory
summary: We present WorldDirector, a highly controllable video world model framework designed for persistent dynamic object memory and unrestricted viewpoint exploration. Unlike existing world models that entangle physical dynamics with pixel rendering and rely on continuous visual observation to sustain motion, our framework explicitly decouples semantic motion orchestration from visual generation. By leveraging an LLM to coordinate 3D trajectories with camera movements and subsequently employing these orchestrated trajectories as control signals for video generation, our approach ensures strict physical logic and appearance stability, successfully preserving the exact visual identities of dynamic entities even when they re-enter the scene after prolonged periods out of view. Experimental results demonstrate that our method supports the synthesis of complex and extended events with unprecedented controllability and persistent dynamic object memory. Project Page: https://worlddirector.github.io/

AI.tldr: WorldDirector是一个高度可控的视频世界模型框架，通过解耦语义运动编排与视觉生成，实现持久动态对象记忆和无限制视角探索。
AI.motivation: 现有世界模型将物理动态与像素渲染纠缠在一起，且依赖持续视觉观察来维持运动，无法在物体长时间离开视野后保持其视觉身份。
AI.method: 利用LLM协调3D轨迹与相机运动，将编排后的轨迹作为视频生成的控制信号，实现物理逻辑和外观稳定性的严格控制。
AI.result: 成功保持动态实体的精确视觉身份，即使物体在长时间离开场景后重新进入也能准确渲染，支持复杂和扩展事件的合成，具有前所未有的可控性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过显式解耦语义运动编排与视觉生成，为视频世界模型提供了严格的物理逻辑和持久的动态对象记忆能力。

relevance_reason: While this paper touches on some related technical elements (VLM, video generation, visual feature extraction), it focuses on a DIFFERENT application domain. The research profile is about 3D MOTION GENERATION from 2D videos (human motion synthesis), while WorldDirector is about VIDEO WORLD MODELS for maintaining visual identity in generated video scenes. Both use LLMs and video generation techniques, but the end goal differs: WorldDirector generates controllable videos, not 3D motion. The paper doesn't address extracting 3D motion from 2D visual features or semantic consistency between text and 3D motions - which are core pain points in the research profile.
